explanationSource: In the tunnel, the alternatives for subsequent traffic are low. Therefore, if possible, stop in one of the marked emergency bays in the event of a breakdown. Switch on the hazard light on your car and switch off the engine due to the high risk of poisoning by exhaust gases in the tunnel.
answerASource: Switch on the hazard warning lights
answerBSource: If possible, park the vehicle in an emergency bay
answerCSource: Let the engine run by way of precaution
questionTextTarget: Tünelde arıza halinde ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Mümkünse aracı acil park cebine alın, dörtlüleri yakın ve egzoz gazı zehirlenmesi riskinden dolayı motoru kapatın.
answerBTarget: Mümkünse aracı acil park cebine almak

questionTextSource: You are driving in a tunnel and approach the end of a traffic jam. What do you do?
explanationSource: If you recognize a traffic jam in front of you, it is important to immediately press the hazard light to warn the drivers behind you of the coming situation. This way, they can react better to the situation. During traffic jams, the car driver should stop the engine but not leave the car. Turning in the tunnel is not allowed.
answerASource: Switch on the hazard warning lights
answerBSource: Make a U-turn and leave the tunnel
answerCSource: At the end of the traffic jam, switch off the engine and leave the vehicle
questionTextTarget: Tünelde gidiyor ve trafik sıkışıklığının sonuna yaklaşıyorsunuz. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Trafik sıkışıklığını fark edince arkadakileri uyarmak için dörtlüleri yakmalısınız. Kuyruk sonunda motoru kapatabilirsiniz, fakat aracı terk etmemelisiniz. Tünelde U dönüşü yasaktır.
answerCTarget: Trafik sıkışıklığının sonunda motoru kapatıp aracı terk etmek

questionTextSource: What must you remember concerning the lighting equipment of your vehicle?
explanationSource: The car driver must properly install the lighting equipment on the vehicle. In addition to full functionality, the lighting must also be clean, so that other drivers see you in bad weather or in a tunnel.
answerASource: It must be correctly installed
answerBSource: It must be clean
answerCSource: It must be in operating condition
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın aydınlatma donanımıyla ilgili neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Aydınlatma donanımı doğru takılmış, temiz ve çalışır durumda olmalıdır. Böylece kötü havada ve tünelde görülürsünüz.

questionTextSource: What can cause even dipped headlights to dazzle oncoming traffic?
explanationSource: Head lamps set too high, wrongly installed bulbs, or loading a car the wrong way can dazzle oncoming traffic as well as the car driver driving in front. Back-heavy loads change the radius of the light cone of the low beam; he goes upwards and leads to dangerous glares. You should know the headlamp beam height control on your car.
answerASource: Headlights set too high
answerBSource: Incorrectly inserted bulbs
answerCSource: An overloaded vehicle
questionTextTarget: Kısa farlar bile karşı trafiği nasıl kamaştırabilir?
explanationTarget: Farların çok yüksek ayarlanması, ampullerin yanlış takılması veya aracın yanlış/aşırı yüklenmesi kısa farların karşı trafiği kamaştırmasına neden olabilir.

questionTextSource: How is it possible to prevent oncoming traffic being dazzled by the dipped headlights?
explanationSource: In order not to dazzle oncoming traffic, you should pay attention to how your low beam is adjusted and that it is adjusted after repairs to the headlights or after new installations. If you have to change the bulbs, only use approved bulbs.
answerASource: The headlight range can be adjusted depending on the load carried by the vehicle
answerBSource: Only permissible light bulbs may be used in each of the headlights
answerCSource: The headlight setting should be checked after every repair
questionTextTarget: Kısa farların karşı trafiği kamaştırması nasıl önlenebilir?
explanationTarget: Far yükseklik ayarı yüke göre ayarlanmalı, yalnızca izin verilen ampuller kullanılmalı ve far tamirlerinden sonra ayar kontrol edilmelidir.
answerATarget: Far mesafesi aracın yüküne göre ayarlanabilir
answerBTarget: Her farda yalnızca izin verilen ampuller kullanılmalıdır
answerCTarget: Her tamirden sonra far ayarı kontrol edilmelidir

questionTextSource: A railway employee is waving a white-red-white flag at a level crossing. What does this mean?
explanationSource: If a railroad employee waves a white-red-white flag in front of a railroad crossing, you must wait at a safe distance before the crossing. Waving the flag means that the railroad crossing is blocked until the train has passed and the railroad employee stops the blockage.
answerASource: You must wait in front of the level crossing
answerBSource: You may cross the rails carefully
answerCSource: The flag is only meant for the train driver
questionTextTarget: Bir demiryolu çalışanı hemzemin geçitte beyaz-kırmızı-beyaz bayrak sallıyor. Bu ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Bayrak sallanıyorsa hemzemin geçit kapalıdır. Geçitten önce güvenli mesafede beklemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: When must you wait at a level crossing?
explanationSource: All road users are required to stop and wait immediately before a level crossing in the following situations: when the signal system's red flashing light comes on, when the barriers start to lower, when the barriers are closed, when a staff member waves a white-red-white flag , You must wait until the blockage is released again.
answerASource: When a flashing red light comes on
answerBSource: When the barriers are being lowered
answerCSource: When a railway employee is waving a white-red-white flag
questionTextTarget: Hemzemin geçitte ne zaman beklemelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Kırmızı yanıp sönen ışık yandığında, bariyerler inmeye başladığında veya demiryolu çalışanı beyaz-kırmızı-beyaz bayrak salladığında beklemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: You are approaching a level crossing with half barriers and flashing lights. The red light is flashing but the barrier is still open. What do you do?
explanationSource: When the red flashing light of a barrier system lights up before rail traffic, all road users must stop in front of the diagonal cross. Driving on is strictly prohibited even if the half barrier is still open. The barriers have fast closing times and can jam vehicles. Rail vehicles are approaching at high speeds and have a very long braking distance of several hundred meters. Therefore, they cannot react situationally to obstacles.
answerASource: Wait in front of the St. Andrew's Cross
answerBSource: Proceed as long as the half barrier is open
answerCSource: If no rail vehicle is in sight, cross the level crossing
questionTextTarget: Yarı bariyerli ve ışıklı bir hemzemin geçide yaklaşıyorsunuz. Kırmızı ışık yanıp sönüyor ama bariyer hâlâ açık. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Kırmızı yanıp sönen ışıkta St. Andreas haçı önünde beklemelisiniz. Yarı bariyer açık olsa bile geçmek kesinlikle yasaktır.
answerBTarget: Yarı bariyer açık olduğu sürece devam etmek

questionTextSource: A railway employee is waving a red lamp at a level crossing. What does this mean?
explanationSource: All car drivers and other road users must wait at a safe distance before the crossing if a member of the railway staff secures a low-traffic level crossing with a red light. Waving the red light means that the tracks are inaccessible and trains have priority.
answerASource: You must wait in front of the level crossing
answerBSource: You may cross the rails carefully
answerCSource: The red lamp is of no significance for you
questionTextTarget: Bir demiryolu çalışanı hemzemin geçitte kırmızı lamba sallıyor. Bu ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Kırmızı lamba, geçidin kapalı olduğunu ve trenlerin önceliği olduğunu gösterir. Geçitten önce beklemelisiniz.
answerCTarget: Kırmızı lambanın sizin için anlamı yoktur

questionTextSource: You are approaching a level crossing where the barriers are open. What do you do?
explanationSource: Nevertheless, as you approach a railroad crossing with the barriers open, you must reduce speed and be aware of the track. The car driver should make sure that the transition is possible without danger and that no rail vehicle is approaching. When you see that a traffic jam could occur, it is necessary to keep a distance so that no car will end up standing on the rails. Rail transport always has priority.
answerASource: Approach at moderate speed, look along the railway line
answerBSource: Wait in front of the level crossing if you would have to wait on it because of traffic congestion
answerCSource: Proceed at the same speed as road traffic always has precedence in such cases
questionTextTarget: Bariyerlerin açık olduğu bir hemzemin geçide yaklaşıyorsunuz. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Bariyerler açık olsa da hızınızı azaltmalı, ray hattına bakmalı ve geçidi güvenle geçebileceğinizden emin olmalısınız. Trafik sıkışıklığı nedeniyle geçitte kalacaksanız beklemelisiniz.
answerATarget: Orta hızla yaklaşmak, demiryolu hattına bakmak
answerBTarget: Trafik sıkışıklığı nedeniyle üzerinde beklemek zorunda kalacaksam hemzemin geçidin önünde beklemek
answerCTarget: Bu durumda karayolu trafiği her zaman öncelikli olduğu için aynı hızla devam etmek

questionTextSource: At the entrance to an industrial estate, there is a St. Andrew's Cross with the supplementary sign "Industrial estate, rail vehicles have precedence". What must you remember?
explanationSource: Even if there are no barriers and no diagonal crosses at the level crossings in the entire industrial area, motor vehicle drivers must give priority to all rail vehicles. Always expect a train to come, observe the railway lines accurately and approach the tracks only with moderate speed.
answerASource: Approach level crossings at moderate speed only
answerBSource: Rail vehicles have precedence at all level crossings
answerCSource: Motor vehicles have precedence at level crossings without St. Andrew's Cross
questionTextTarget: Bir sanayi bölgesi girişinde “Sanayi bölgesi, raylı araçların önceliği vardır” ek levhalı St. Andreas haçı var. Neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Hemzemin geçitlere yalnızca orta hızla yaklaşmalısınız. St. Andreas haçı olan hemzemin geçitlerde raylı araçların önceliği vardır.
answerATarget: Hemzemin geçitlere yalnızca orta hızla yaklaşmak
answerBTarget: Raylı araçların tüm hemzemin geçitlerde önceliği vardır
answerCTarget: St. Andreas haçı olmayan hemzemin geçitlerde motorlu araçların önceliği vardır

questionTextSource: These level crossing barriers have not moved for some time now. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource:
Apparently there is a fault with the railway barrier. It is therefore not safe to use the railway crossing. Do not cross the railway crossing under any circumstances; if a train is approaching, there is an acute danger to your life and there is also a risk that you will not be able to get through under the barriers and get stuck.
Inform the police about the fault at the railway crossing so that the problem can be fixed.
answerASource: I do not cross the level crossing
answerBSource: I report the fault to the police
answerCSource: I cross the level crossing taking extra care
questionTextTarget: Bu hemzemin geçit bariyerleri bir süredir hareket etmiyor. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Bariyerler kapalı kaldığında hemzemin geçidi geçmemeli ve arızayı polise bildirmelisiniz. Dikkatli de olsa geçmek yasaktır.

questionTextSource: You are driving along a forest track and approach a level crossing without St. Andrew's Cross. What do you do?
explanationSource: Even without the diagonal cross, a car driver must always give priority to a rail vehicle on field and forest paths. Approach the railroad crossing at moderate speed and listen for a train approaching. Observe the track and stop, if necessary, to let the rail vehicle pass.
answerASource: Proceed at moderate speed and check to see if a rail vehicle is approaching
answerBSource: Listen out in case a rail vehicle signals its approach by whistling or ringing a bell
answerCSource: Proceed without taking any special precautions since rail vehicles are required to wait here
questionTextTarget: Orman yolunda gidiyor ve St. Andreas haçı olmayan bir hemzemin geçide yaklaşıyorsunuz. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Teknik güvenlik olmayan hemzemin geçitlerde orta hızla yaklaşmalı, raylı araç gelip gelmediğine bakmalı ve sesli uyarı olup olmadığını dinlemelisiniz.
answerATarget: Orta hızla ilerler ve raylı araç yaklaşıyor mu kontrol ederim
answerBTarget: Raylı aracın düdük veya zil ile yaklaştığını bildirip bildirmediğini dinlerim
answerCTarget: Raylı araçlar burada beklemek zorunda olduğu için özel önlem almadan devam ederim

questionTextSource: What do you do at a level crossing when the barriers are closed?
explanationSource: At a level crossing with closed gates, all car drivers have to wait in front of the diagonal cross. If there is no traffic sign, a safe distance to the rails must be observed. Be careful not to block intersections or T-junctions when waiting. In the dark, lighting must be switched on, parking light is sufficient.
answerASource: Wait before the St. Andrew's Cross without obstructing junctions
answerBSource: If possible, switch on the side lights when it is dark
answerCSource: Use the road area and wait directly in front of the barrier
questionTextTarget: Bariyerler kapalıyken hemzemin geçitte ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: St. Andreas haçı önünde, kavşakları engellemeden beklemelisiniz. Karanlıkta mümkünse park lambalarını yakabilirsiniz. Bariyerin hemen önünde beklemeyin.
answerATarget: Kavşakları engellemeden St. Andreas haçı önünde beklemek
answerCTarget: Yol alanını kullanıp doğrudan bariyerin önünde beklemek

questionTextSource: When are you allowed to cross a level crossing with flashing lights but no barriers after a train has passed?
explanationSource: You may only cross the level crossing after the red flashing light turns off, as another train could follow. Do not be fooled by oncoming traffic to drive on if the car driver waiting on the opposite site already starts driving too early after the train has passed through.
answerASource: When the flashing red light goes out
answerBSource: Immediately after the train has passed, even if the flashing red light is still on
answerCSource: As soon as the oncoming traffic sets off, even if the flashing red light is still on
questionTextTarget: Tren geçtikten sonra bariyersiz ama yanıp sönen ışıklı hemzemin geçidi ne zaman geçebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Kırmızı yanıp sönen ışık sönmeden hemzemin geçidi geçemezsiniz. Tren geçmiş olsa bile beklemelisiniz.
answerBTarget: Tren geçer geçmez, kırmızı ışık hâlâ yanıp sönse bile
answerCTarget: Karşı trafik hareket eder etmez, kırmızı ışık hâlâ yanıp sönse bile

questionTextSource: You are approaching a level crossing with barriers. Where must you wait if you would have to stop on the rails in case of traffic congestion?
explanationSource: If you are unable to pass the railroad crossing quickly due to slow traffic, then stop in front of the diagonal cross. Waiting directly in front of the rails or at the level of the barriers is prohibited, because at these positions you may be hit by the dynamic pressure of the train, by the train itself or trapped by the barriers.
answerASource: In front of the St. Andrew's Cross
answerBSource: Just before the rails
answerCSource: Level with the barrier
questionTextTarget: Bariyerli bir hemzemin geçide yaklaşıyorsunuz. Trafik sıkışıklığı nedeniyle rayların üzerinde kalacaksanız nerede beklemelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Rayların üzerinde kalma ihtimali varsa St. Andreas haçı önünde beklemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: What do you do here?
explanationSource: All car drivers and other road users must wait at a safe distance if railway staff guards a low-traffic level crossing with a white-red-white flag. Under no circumstances should you cross the tracks here, as the transition is blocked by the swinging of the flag and trains have priority.
answerASource: Approach at moderate speed and wait
answerBSource: Proceed as the roadway is only blocked for oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Burada ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Orta hızla yaklaşmalı ve beklemelisiniz. Yol sadece karşı trafik için kapalı değildir; hemzemin geçitte dikkat gerekir.
answerBTarget: Yol sadece karşı trafik için kapalı olduğu için devam etmek

questionTextSource: The barrier of a level crossing inside a built-up area is closed. Where must you wait?
explanationSource: Trucks and vehicles with trailers (vehicles over 7.5 t permissible total mass) are only required to wait outside of built-up areas behind the level crossing (80 m) ahead marker. Inside a built-up area they have to wait in front of the diagonal crosses.
answerASource: In front of the St. Andrew's Cross
answerBSource: Before the last beacon
answerCSource: Before the first beacon
questionTextTarget: Yerleşim içinde bir hemzemin geçidin bariyeri kapalı. Nerede beklemelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Kapalı bariyerde St. Andreas haçının önünde beklemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign mean?
explanationSource: The diagonal crosses indicate that rail transport has priority here. As a car driver you need to wait when a rail vehicle is approaching. A lightning bolt in the diagonal cross is an indication of an electrical overhead line, which is important for special transports with a big height.
answerASource: Indication of existing overhead electrical wires
answerBSource: Rail traffic always has priority
answerCSource: You must always wait when a rail vehicle is approaching
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret mevcut elektrikli havai hatlara dikkat çeker. Raylı trafik yaklaşırken beklemek zorundasınız.
answerATarget: Mevcut elektrikli havai hatların bulunduğuna işaret
answerCTarget: Raylı araç yaklaşıyorsa her zaman beklemelisiniz

questionTextSource: A light signal with no level crossing sign is positioned before a level crossing, and in front of a junction with a road to the right. The red light is illuminated. Where must you wait?
explanationSource: In the event of a red light, the car driver must stop in any case. In order not to block the traffic from the road going to the right, the red light is located several meters from the actual railroad crossing. Wait at the stop line or at the light sign if no line is available.
answerASource: At the stop line
answerBSource: In front of the light signal, if there is no stop line
answerCSource: I can drive up to the level crossing after watching out for other traffic
questionTextTarget: Hemzemin geçitten önce, fakat sağa giden bir yol kavşağından da önce, hemzemin geçit işareti olmayan bir ışıklı sinyal var. Kırmızı ışık yanıyor. Nerede beklemelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Kırmızı ışıkta dur çizgisinde, dur çizgisi yoksa ışıklı sinyalin önünde beklemelisiniz.
answerBTarget: Dur çizgisi yoksa ışıklı sinyalin önünde
answerCTarget: Diğer trafiğe dikkat ederek hemzemin geçide kadar gidebilirim

questionTextSource: What must you do in this situation?
explanationSource: The railway employee secures the level crossing and therefore you should stop before the St. Andrew's cross.
answerASource: - stop in front of the level crossing
answerBSource: - drive on past to the left of the flagman
answerCSource: - drive on past to the right of the flagman
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Bayrakçı hemzemin geçidi kapatıyorsa geçitten önce durmalısınız. Sağından veya solundan geçemezsiniz.

questionTextSource: Who is required to stop at a level crossing with a red flashing light in the form of an arrow point to the right?
explanationSource: A diagonal cross with a red flashing light in the form of an arrow to the right can be found behind an intersection or T-junction after a railroad crossing. The right arrow indicates that the car drivers who turn right must wait.
answerASource: Traffic turning right
answerBSource: Traffic moving straight ahead
answerCSource: Traffic turning left
questionTextTarget: Sağa yön gösteren kırmızı yanıp sönen ışıklı hemzemin geçitte kim durmak zorundadır?
explanationTarget: Ok sağa dönene işaret ediyorsa, sağa dönen trafik durmak zorundadır.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign combination shows you a level crossing. The car driver may approach the level crossing only at 10 km/h and cross it at that speed.
answerASource: - which I may approach at a maximum speed of 10 km/h
answerBSource: - which I may cross at a maximum speed of 10 km/h
answerCSource: - over which rail traffic may pass at a maximum speed of 10 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti kombinasyonu neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu kombinasyon, hemzemin geçide ve geçidin üzerinden en fazla 10 km/saat hızla yaklaşılabileceğini/ geçilebileceğini gösterir.
answerCTarget: - raylı trafiğin en fazla 10 km/saat hızla geçebileceği

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: If there is a risk that you might come to a stop on the rails due to a traffic jam situation or stagnant traffic, stop in front of the diagonal cross and wait until you can safely and quickly cross the level crossing. Fatal accidents occur when a car standing on the rails cannot avoid the approaching train.
answerASource: I wait in front of the level crossing
answerBSource: I carefully cross the tracks
answerCSource: I wait at the tracks
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Hemzemin geçidin önünde beklemelisiniz. Rayları geçmek veya raylarda beklemek tehlikelidir.

questionTextSource: You are approaching a rail crossing. The barrier begins to lower. What should you do?
explanationSource: When a driver approaches a gate that lowers, he/she must wait in front of the level crossing. This also applies if no rail vehicle is yet to be seen. Switching on the hazard light is not required.
answerASource: I wait in front of the level crossing
answerBSource: I continue driving if there is no train in sight
answerCSource: I switch on my hazard lights
questionTextTarget: Bir demiryolu geçidine yaklaşıyorsunuz. Bariyer inmeye başlıyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Bariyer inmeye başladığında hemzemin geçidin önünde beklemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: Where do you have to anticipate encountering rail crossings with no technical safeguards?
explanationSource: In industrial and port areas, on field and forest paths, as well as on roads with little traffic, you should expect a railway crossing without a barrier or traffic light (technically unprotected).
answerASource: On less-frequently used roads
answerBSource: In industrial zones and port areas
answerCSource: On dirt tracks and forest tracks
questionTextTarget: Teknik güvenlik sistemi olmayan hemzemin geçitlerle nerelerde karşılaşmayı beklemelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Az kullanılan yollarda, sanayi ve liman bölgelerinde, tarla ve orman yollarında teknik güvenliksiz hemzemin geçitler olabilir.

questionTextSource: You want to cross a level crossing with the barriers open. What is correct?
explanationSource: Even when the barriers are open, you must always approach level crossings with caution and at a moderate speed. This gives you enough time to react to possible bumps and dangerous situations. Moderate speed in this context does not mean walking speed, because you can also drive faster than walking speed. In this way you can prevent possible dangerous situations with approaching trains or lowering barriers.
answerASource: I have to approach the level crossing at a moderate speed
answerBSource: I expect there to be bumps in the road when crossing the level crossing
answerCSource: I am only allowed to cross the tracks at walking speed
questionTextTarget: Bariyerleri açık bir hemzemin geçidi geçmek istiyorsunuz. Hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Hemzemin geçide orta hızla yaklaşmalı ve geçerken yol yüzeyinde tümsekler olabileceğini hesaba katmalısınız. Her zaman yürüme hızında geçme zorunluluğu yoktur.
answerBTarget: Hemzemin geçidi geçerken yolda tümsekler olabileceğini hesaba katmalıyım

questionTextSource: What should you do now?
explanationSource: Level crossings may not be crossed when the flashing lights above the St. Andrew's Cross are on or the barriers are lowered.
answerASource: - stop before the cross
answerBSource: - cross the level crossing quickly
answerCSource: - drive through an open barrier
questionTextTarget: Şimdi ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Hemzemin geçitte kapatma işareti varsa haçtan önce durmalısınız. Açık bariyerden hızla geçmemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: At a tramstop, passengers are getting on and off a tram onto the roadway. What do you do if you want to drive past on the right?
explanationSource: Tram passengers who get off the tram at one stop and walk to the sidewalk or walk from the sidewalk to the tram have absolute priority over vehicle traffic. You as a car driver have to wait. Only when an obstruction or threat to passengers is ruled out, you may pass by the tram carefully at walking pace.
answerASource: Wait if passengers can be endangered or inconvenienced
answerBSource: Drive cautiously at walking speed past if this is possible without endangering or inconveniencing passengers
answerCSource: Give a clear warning signal and proceed
questionTextTarget: Tramvay durağında yolcular taşıt yoluna inip biniyor. Sağdan geçmek istiyorsanız ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Yolcular tehlikeye girecek veya engellenecekse beklemelisiniz. Tehlike yoksa yalnızca yürüme hızında dikkatlice geçebilirsiniz.
answerATarget: Yolcular tehlikeye girebilir veya engellenebilirse beklemek
answerBTarget: Yolcuları tehlikeye atmadan veya engellemeden mümkünse yürüme hızında dikkatlice geçmek
answerCTarget: Açık uyarı sinyali verip devam etmek

questionTextSource: What do you do when a bus has stopped at a bus stop with its hazard warning lights switched on?
explanationSource: A bus that stops at a stop with the hazard light on may only be passed at walking pace. Walking speed also applies to oncoming traffic. Drive past the bus at a distance that preempts any danger or obstruction to passengers. Wait, if necessary. A sufficient distance improves the visibility to see pedestrians stepping forward.
answerASource: Drive past at walking speed only and, if necessary, stop
answerBSource: Drive past at a sufficient distance in order to exclude endangering pedestrians
answerCSource: Wait if passengers could be inconvenienced
questionTextTarget: Bir otobüs durakta dörtlü ikaz ışıkları açık şekilde durduğunda ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Durakta dörtlüleri açık otobüsü yalnızca yürüme hızında ve yeterli mesafeyle geçebilirsiniz; gerekirse durmalı, yolcuları engellememelisiniz.
answerATarget: Yalnızca yürüme hızında geçmek ve gerekirse durmak
answerBTarget: Yayaları tehlikeye atmamak için yeterli mesafeyle geçmek

questionTextSource: Which vehicles must you allow to set off from marked bus stops?
explanationSource: You have to give priority to public and school buses that want to drive away from marked stops, as long as they announce their intention of departure, for example, by indicating. Exceptions are taxis, as these are not bound to fixed stops and timetables.
answerASource: Regular buses
answerBSource: School buses
answerCSource: Taxis
questionTextTarget: İşaretli otobüs duraklarından hangi araçların hareket etmesine izin vermelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Düzenli hat otobüsleri ve okul otobüslerinin duraktan hareket etmesine izin vermelisiniz. Taksiler buna dahil değildir.

questionTextSource: A regular bus in the oncoming traffic has stopped at a bus stop on the same roadway with hazard warning lights switched on. What do you do?
explanationSource: Even if the bus is on the side of oncoming traffic, you are obliged to drive past the bus at walking pace as soon as it stops with the hazard light on. This is also the case when no pedestrians want to cross the street. Likewise, a sufficiently large safety distance must be maintained in order not to endanger persons entering or leaving. The car driver must guarantee all pedestrians safe crossing of the road and, if necessary, wait for them.
answerASource: Slow down to walking speed
answerBSource: Only proceed at walking speed if passengers want to cross the roadway
answerCSource: Proceed at the same speed since the bus has stopped on the other side of the roadway
questionTextTarget: Karşı yönde, aynı taşıt yolunda duran bir hat otobüsünün dörtlü ikaz ışıkları açık. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Aynı taşıt yolunda dörtlüleri açık duran otobüsün yanından karşı yönden de sadece yürüme hızında geçebilirsiniz.
answerBTarget: Yolcular taşıt yolunu geçmek isterse yalnızca yürüme hızında devam etmek
answerCTarget: Otobüs yolun karşı tarafında durduğu için aynı hızla devam etmek

questionTextSource: You are approaching a regular bus which has stopped in the opposite direction at a bus stop on your roadway and its hazard warning lights are switched on. What must you expect?
explanationSource: It is to be expected that passers-by carelessly and without paying any attention to traffic will cross the street because they still want to reach the bus. Likewise, it can be expected with people exiting the bus who walk on the road in front of or behind the bus.
answerASource: Passengers will cross the roadway in order to catch the bus
answerBSource: Passengers leaving the bus will suddenly cross the roadway
answerCSource: Passengers will cross the roadway only after the hazard warning lights of the bus are switched off
questionTextTarget: Sizin taşıt yolunuzda karşı yönde durakta duran ve dörtlüleri açık olan bir hat otobüsüne yaklaşıyorsunuz. Neyi beklemelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Yolcular otobüse yetişmek veya otobüsten indikten sonra aniden yolu geçmek isteyebilir.
answerATarget: Yolcular otobüse yetişmek için yolu geçebilir
answerBTarget: Otobüsten inen yolcular aniden yolu geçebilir
answerCTarget: Yolcular yalnızca otobüsün dörtlüleri kapandıktan sonra yolu geçer

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: You have to slow down and stay behind the bus first. As long as the bus is driving with the hazard lights on, you must not overtake the it. You also can not change the lane because to the left of you is a vehicle that is just overtaking you.
answerASource: I remain behind the bus for the moment
answerBSource: I overtake the bus at a moderate speed
answerCSource: I switch lane without overtaking immediately
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Duraktaki otobüs nedeniyle şimdilik arkasında kalmalısınız. Hemen sollamak veya şerit değiştirmek tehlikeli olabilir.

questionTextSource: You would like to drive past a local transport bus, which has come to a stop at a bus stop. What must you be aware of?
explanationSource: It is allowed to drive past a public bus that stops at a bus stop. When passing by, you will usually get into the traffic lane of oncoming traffic. Therefore, pay particular attention to oncoming traffic. It is still wrong to drive as close to the bus as possible though. Because this way you might endanger pedestrians. It is not necessary to drive at walking speed, but drive very carefully.
answerASource: - drive past maintaining sufficient space to the side
answerBSource: - drive past carefully
answerCSource: - watch out for oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Durakta durmuş bir yerel ulaşım otobüsünün yanından geçmek istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Yeterli yan mesafe bırakmalı, dikkatli geçmeli ve karşı trafiğe dikkat etmelisiniz.

questionTextSource: You are approaching a local transport bus, which has come to a stop at a bus stop. What must you watch out for when driving past it?
explanationSource: You may drive past a public bus, a tram or a designated school bus only with caution and sufficient lateral distance when the vehicle is waiting at a stop. The same rule applies if the bus is standing in oncoming traffic. Careless people may be on the road, and you, as a car driver, must pay particular attention to this.
answerASource: That there is sufficient space to the side
answerBSource: My speed
answerCSource: For pedestrians on the road
questionTextTarget: Durakta durmuş bir yerel ulaşım otobüsüne yaklaşıyorsunuz. Yanından geçerken neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Yan mesafe, hız ve yoldaki yayalar özellikle önemlidir.

questionTextSource: What must you be prepared for?
explanationSource: The omnibus standing opposite of you will start driving. Thereby he could swing on your side of the road. Even vehicles behind the omnibus could come on your side of the road, while trying to overtake. Brake as a car driver, keep to the right and stop if necessary.
answerASource: Oncoming vehicles will move onto my side of the road
answerBSource: As it begins moving, the bus will swing onto my side of the road
answerCSource: Passengers walking in front of the bus onto the road
questionTextTarget: Neye hazırlıklı olmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Karşıdan gelen araçlar sizin tarafınıza geçebilir, otobüs hareket ederken şeridinize savrulabilir ve yolcular otobüsün önünden yola çıkabilir.
answerATarget: Karşıdan gelen araçların benim yol tarafıma geçmesine
answerBTarget: Otobüs hareket ederken benim yol tarafıma savrulmasına

questionTextSource: All vehicles have been waiting at the junction for a few seconds. What should you do in this situation?
explanationSource: Here, the traffic rule "left yields to right" applies and every driver must give priority to the vehicle on the right. In order for the situation to dissolve, a car driver must refrain from his/her right of way. By clearly recognizable hand signals you should give up your right of way, so that all vehicles can continue.
answerASource: I use clear hand signals to forego my right of way
answerBSource: I am the first to drive to the centre of the junction, where I stop
answerCSource: I am the first to pass through the junction
questionTextTarget: Tüm araçlar kavşakta birkaç saniyedir bekliyor. Bu durumda ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Belirsiz durumda önceliğinizden açık el işaretleriyle vazgeçebilir ve trafik akışının güvenli şekilde çözülmesine yardımcı olabilirsiniz.
answerBTarget: Kavşağın ortasına ilk ben gider ve orada dururum

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you are obliged to respect public transport and its passengers. In this situation where the tram stops and there are people at the bus stop who have to cross the road to get in, the following applies: stop behind the tram and wait for all passengers to get in or out.
answerASource: I remain behind the tram
answerBSource: I drive past the tram on the right-side
answerCSource: I overtake the tram on the left
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Tramvayın arkasında kalmalısınız. Yolcuları tehlikeye atarak sağdan veya soldan geçmeyin.

questionTextSource: What is the correct course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: Passengers can step onto the road, you should increase your attention. But you can keep up your speed.
answerASource: I maintain my speed
answerBSource: I drive with an increased level of alertness
answerCSource: I slow down to walking speed now
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Durakta dörtlüleri açık otobüs/tramvay nedeniyle dikkat artırılmalı ve yürüme hızına düşülmelidir.

questionTextSource: What do you have to be aware of in this situation?
explanationSource:
If the bus is at the bus stop and has its warning lights on, you are only allowed to drive past it at walking speed. This is because people getting off the bus could cross the road at the bus stop. Someone could also run across the road to catch the bus.
Therefore, watch out for people, slow down and stop if necessary.
answerASource: Pedestrians could cross the road
answerBSource: I may drive past the bus at walking speed
answerCSource: I may not drive past the bus
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Yayalar yolu geçebilir. Dörtlüleri açık otobüsün yanından yalnızca yürüme hızında geçebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: What is the right thing to do in this situation?
explanationSource: When buses move in traffic with their hazard lights on, other vehicles must always be particularly considerate. If the bus is approaching a stop with the hazard lights on, it may not be overtaken. However, if the bus is at a stop, you can drive past at walking pace.
answerASource: I am only allowed to pass the bus at walking speed
answerBSource: The [blue] car must stop
answerCSource: I am allowed to continue at the same speed
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Duran otobüsün yanından yalnızca yürüme hızında geçebilirsiniz; mavi araç da gerekirse durmalıdır.
answerATarget: Otobüsün yanından yalnızca yürüme hızında geçebilirim

questionTextSource: What do you need to consider in this situation?
explanationSource: Buses at stops may be overtaken at walking speed if they are stationary and have their hazard lights on. However, it is always important to be particularly considerate when driving past buses in order to be able to react in a timely manner to dangerous situations, such as people suddenly stepping onto the road.
answerASource: People might cross the road
answerBSource: I am only allowed to pass the stationary bus at walking speed
answerCSource: I must not pass a stationary bus
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda neyi dikkate almalısınız?
explanationTarget: İnsanlar yolu geçebilir. Duran otobüsün yanından yalnızca yürüme hızında geçilebilir.
answerBTarget: Duran otobüsün yanından yalnızca yürüme hızında geçebilirim

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: You must not obstruct or endanger passengers. Therefore, stay behind the tram until you can drive on without endangering the passengers.
answerASource: I remain behind the tram
answerBSource: I drive past the tram on the right-side
answerCSource: I overtake the tram on the left
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Tramvayın arkasında kalmalısınız; yolcuları tehlikeye atmamak için sağdan veya soldan geçmeyin.

questionTextSource: How must a load projecting more than 1 m beyond the rear reflectors of the vehicle be marked in darkness?
explanationSource: If you carry cargo that protrudes more than 1 m from the end of the vehicle, it must be marked accordingly by a red light and a red reflector. Thus, the end of the load is made visible to the traffic behind you and a correspondingly high safety distance can be maintained. An orange warning sign shows the transport of dangerous goods subject to marking. The rear fog lamp does not improve the visibility and must not be used.
answerASource: By a red light and red rear reflector
answerBSource: By an orange warning plate
answerCSource: By switching the fog tail lamp on
questionTextTarget: Aracın arka reflektörlerinden 1 metreden fazla taşan yük karanlıkta nasıl işaretlenmelidir?
explanationTarget: Karanlıkta arkaya 1 metreden fazla taşan yük kırmızı ışık ve kırmızı arka reflektörle işaretlenmelidir.
answerATarget: Kırmızı ışık ve kırmızı arka reflektörle

questionTextSource: What can be the effect of an overload of only 20%?
explanationSource: The entire vehicle design, the drivability and the center of gravity of a car are matched and tested by the manufacturer to a certain maximum permissible load limit. Exceeding the maximum limit can affect the driving behavior of the vehicle negatively. In addition, you risk permanent damage, such as warping and breaking load-bearing parts on your car.
answerASource: The brakes may be overstrained
answerBSource: Steering may become worse
answerCSource: There may be too much strain on the load-bearing parts of the vehicle
questionTextTarget: Sadece %20 aşırı yüklemenin etkisi ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Aşırı yük frenleri zorlayabilir, direksiyonu kötüleştirebilir ve aracın taşıyıcı parçalarına aşırı yük bindirebilir.
answerCTarget: Aracın taşıyıcı parçalarına fazla yük binebilir

questionTextSource: What is the significance of orange warning plates on a vehicle?
explanationSource: An orange warning sign indicates vehicles that are loaded with dangerous goods as so-called hazardous materials transportation. Other car drivers should be warned this way. In the event of a traffic accident, the orange warning sign serves as a clue to the emergency services.
answerASource: - dangerous goods
answerBSource: - cattle
answerCSource: - easily perishable food
questionTextTarget: Araçtaki turuncu uyarı levhaları ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Turuncu uyarı levhaları tehlikeli madde taşındığını gösterir.

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of if you want to transport a load?
explanationSource: The load must be carefully secured so that it can't fall down. The car driver may not be handicapped by the load, not even in his/her visibility. The permissible dimensions and weight limits must be observed. At the front, the load may protrude only above a height of 2.5 m by a maximum of 50 cm. This regulation reduces the risk of injury in the event of a rear-end collision.
answerASource: - may not interfere with me
answerBSource: - may not slide even when I brake
answerCSource: - may never project over the front of the vehicle
questionTextTarget: Yük taşımak istiyorsanız neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Yük sizi engellememeli ve fren yapıldığında kaymamalıdır. Ön tarafa hiç taşmaması kuralı her durumda doğru değildir.

questionTextSource: From what height it is permitted for loads to project up to 50 cm in front of your vehicle?
explanationSource: If your vehicle has a height of up to 2.5 m, the cargo may protrude forwards by 50 cm. This cargo projection up to 50 cm is also permitted on trains and must never be exceeded in order to minimize the risk of injury in rear-end collisions.
questionTextTarget: Yükün aracınızın önünden 50 cm’ye kadar taşmasına hangi yükseklikten itibaren izin verilir?
explanationTarget: Yük 2,50 m yüksekliğin üzerinde aracın önünden en fazla 50 cm taşabilir.

questionTextSource: What do you have to make sure of regarding the load on your vehicle?
explanationSource: When loading your vehicle, you must not exceed the permissible axial loads. You must secure the cargo in accordance with the recognized rules of engineering
answerASource: My vehicle may not exceed the gross axle weight rating
answerBSource: I have to use suitable equipment to prevent the load from shifting
answerCSource: My vehicle may exceed the gross vehicle weight rating by a maximum of 5%
questionTextTarget: Aracınızdaki yükle ilgili neyi sağlamalısınız?
explanationTarget: İzin verilen aks yükleri aşılmamalı ve yükün kaymasını önlemek için uygun ekipman kullanılmalıdır. Toplam ağırlık %5 aşılabilir değildir.
answerATarget: Aracım izin verilen aks yükünü aşmamalıdır
answerBTarget: Yükün kaymasını önlemek için uygun ekipman kullanmalıyım
answerCTarget: Aracım izin verilen toplam ağırlığı en fazla %5 aşabilir

questionTextSource: Who is responsible for the roadworthiness of a licensed vehicle?
explanationSource: Responsible for the roadworthy condition of a vehicle are both the owner of the vehicle as well as the driver. The driver has to check the operational reliability as well as roadworthiness of the vehicle before driving. The owner has to make sure that this actually happens. This also applies to the TÜV examination. The liability insurance is not responsible.
answerASource: The driver
answerBSource: The owner
answerCSource: The motor liability insurance company
questionTextTarget: Trafiğe kayıtlı bir aracın yol güvenliğinden kim sorumludur?
explanationTarget: Yol güvenliğinden hem sürücü hem de araç sahibi sorumludur. Zorunlu sigorta şirketi değil.

questionTextSource: What must you do when you are travelling and you notice that your vehicle is no longer roadworthy?
explanationSource: If a vehicle is not roadworthy, the driver must remove it from traffic as soon as possible. Note that driving to the nearest workshop is also prohibited. Only after the damage has been repaired, you may continue driving.
answerASource: Take the vehicle out of the traffic as quickly as possible
answerBSource: Continue only when the damage has been repaired
answerCSource: Proceed to the next authorised dealer
questionTextTarget: Yolda giderken aracınızın artık trafiğe elverişli olmadığını fark ederseniz ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Aracı mümkün olduğunca hızlı şekilde trafikten çıkarmalı ve ancak hasar giderildikten sonra devam etmelisiniz.
answerATarget: Aracı mümkün olduğunca çabuk trafikten çıkarmak
answerBTarget: Yalnızca hasar onarıldıktan sonra devam etmek

questionTextSource: Which defects of a vehicle can result in a danger for road traffic?
explanationSource: Worn tires have a negative effect on the grip and could lead the car to skidding. Defective tail lamps make the car less visible to the surrounding traffic. Insufficient braking action can lead to a prolonged braking distance therefore lead to higher risk of accidents, especially for rear-end collisions. All three defects lead to a threat to traffic safety.
answerASource: Worn tyres
answerBSource: Defective rear lamps
answerCSource: Insufficient braking effect
questionTextTarget: Bir araçtaki hangi kusurlar trafik için tehlike oluşturabilir?
explanationTarget: Aşınmış lastikler, arızalı arka lambalar ve yetersiz fren etkisi trafik güvenliği için tehlikelidir.

questionTextSource: You want to make a telephone call while driving a vehicle. What must you be aware of?
explanationSource: Being on the phone or operating a telephone while driving distracts the driver. Even if you're using a hands-free kit, you'll need to keep in mind that some of your senses are distracted and you cannot focus entirely on driving.
answerASource: I may be distracted by the call
answerBSource: I may be distracted through operating the telephone
answerCSource: Telephoning using a hands-free unit does not distract me
questionTextTarget: Araç kullanırken telefon görüşmesi yapmak istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Telefon konuşması ve telefonu kullanmak dikkatinizi dağıtabilir. Hands-free kullanmak da tamamen dikkatsiz yapmaz.
answerCTarget: Hands-free ile telefon etmek dikkatimi dağıtmaz

questionTextSource: You want to make a telephone call while driving. What must you be aware of?
explanationSource: While driving, you're only allowed to use the speaker phone. If you do not have a hands-free kit, you must drive to a suitable location and stop the engine completely. Only then you are allowed to use your mobile phone. To use your phone while driving without hands-free equipment is a serious offense, a so-called A-offense, with high penalties.
answerASource: I need to have a hands-free unit
answerBSource: I may use the telephone without a hands-free unit, if the vehicle is parked in a suitable place, and the engine is fully switched off
answerCSource: I may use the telephone without a hands-free, if the vehicle is moving at walking pace
questionTextTarget: Araç kullanırken telefon etmek istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Araç hareket halindeyken telefon için hands-free gerekir. Hands-free olmadan ancak araç uygun yerde park edilmiş ve motor tamamen kapatılmışsa kullanabilirsiniz.
answerBTarget: Araç uygun yerde park edilmiş ve motor tamamen kapalıysa hands-free olmadan telefonu kullanabilirim
answerCTarget: Araç yürüme hızında gidiyorsa hands-free olmadan telefonu kullanabilirim

questionTextSource: You want to use a motor vehicle on public roads. What must you observe?
explanationSource: You may only use a vehicle on public roads if it is roadworthy and if there is liability insurance for the vehicle.
answerASource: The motor vehicle must be roadworthy
answerBSource: The motor vehicle must be covered by liability insurance
answerCSource: I must be the vehicle owner
questionTextTarget: Kamu yollarında motorlu araç kullanmak istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Motorlu araç trafiğe elverişli olmalı ve sorumluluk sigortası bulunmalıdır. Aracın sahibi olmanız şart değildir.
answerBTarget: Motorlu araç sorumluluk sigortası kapsamında olmalıdır

questionTextSource: What applies immediately before and on zebra crossings?
explanationSource: There is a strict ban on passing in front of and on cross-walks. That is, so that you as a car driver always have a good view of the cross-walk and potential passers-by. Parking and stopping up to five meters in front of and on the pedestrian crossing is prohibited. Generally, you have to approach a cross-walk carefully.
answerASource: - overtake
answerBSource: - stop
answerCSource: - park
questionTextTarget: Yaya geçitlerinin hemen önünde ve üzerinde ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Yaya geçitlerinde ve hemen önünde sollama ve durma yasaktır. Park etmek de bu nedenle mümkün değildir.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: At a pedestrian crossing you have to allow the pedestrians to cross the road. The pedestrian from the right comes running fast and could run into the street. Drive at moderate speed and stop if necessary.
answerASource: I stop because a man wants to cross the pedestrian crossing
answerBSource: I continue driving slowly, because there is no indication that any pedestrian wants to cross the pedestrian crossing
answerCSource: I stop because a child behind the van is going to walk onto the road
questionTextTarget: Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Bir kişi yaya geçidinden geçmek istiyorsa durmalısınız. Ayrıca minibüsün arkasından çocuk çıkabileceğini de hesaba katmalısınız.
answerATarget: Bir erkek yaya geçidinden geçmek istediği için dururum
answerBTarget: Hiçbir yayanın geçmek istediğine dair işaret olmadığı için yavaşça devam ederim
answerCTarget: Minibüsün arkasındaki çocuk yola çıkacağı için dururum

questionTextSource: What is correct in this situation?
explanationSource: You are at a pedestrian crossing. In this situation, you must not overtake the cyclist before and at a pedestrian crossing.
answerASource: - not overtake [the cyclist]
answerBSource: - overtake [the cyclist], because there is no oncoming traffic visible
answerCSource: - only overtake [the cyclist] at a moderate speed
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Yaya geçidinin hemen önünde bisikletliyi sollamamalısınız.

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate with traffic islands like this?
explanationSource: Often cyclists and pedestrians think they have priority. Therefore, drive carefully..
answerASource: Pedestrians thinking that they have the right of way over the road traffic
answerBSource: Cyclists crossing the road without paying attention to the traffic
answerCSource: Pedestrians always respect the right of way for vehicles
questionTextTarget: Böyle trafik adalarında neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Yayalar kendilerinin öncelikli olduğunu düşünebilir, bisikletliler trafiğe dikkat etmeden yolu geçebilir. Bu nedenle dikkatli olun.
answerATarget: Yayaların yol trafiğine karşı öncelikleri olduğunu düşünmeleri
answerBTarget: Bisikletlilerin trafiğe dikkat etmeden yolu geçmesi
answerCTarget: Yayaların araçların önceliğine her zaman saygı göstermesi

questionTextSource: What is the correct course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: Pedestrians always have priority at the pedestrian crossing. So you must be aware of pedestrians and be prepared to slow down and stop.
answerASource: I watch the [pedestrians] closely
answerBSource: I reduce my speed and prepare to stop if necessary
answerCSource: I continue driving at the same speed
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Yayaları dikkatle izlemeli, hızınızı azaltmalı ve gerekirse durmaya hazırlanmalısınız.
answerBTarget: Hızımı azaltır ve gerekirse durmaya hazırlanırım

questionTextSource: The traffic light is green. You want to turn right. How do you respond to pedestrians wishing to cross the road into which you want to turn?
explanationSource: If the driver wants to turn right and the traffic light signals "green", he must stop when pedestrians cross the road, regardless of how many there are. If the cross-traffic’s traffic light shows "red", pedestrian lights in the side street are mostly "green". Even without the presence of a traffic light the pedestrian must be given the advantage and the driver must stop and wait in this case. Even cyclists who drive straight ahead at the right of the driver or approach the right-turning driver, have priority and must be allowed through.
answerASource: Allow the pedestrians to cross the road
answerBSource: Make the turn quickly before the pedestrians
answerCSource: Warn the pedestrians by sounding the horn
questionTextTarget: Trafik ışığı yeşil. Sağa dönmek istiyorsunuz. Döneceğiniz yoldan geçmek isteyen yayalara nasıl davranırsınız?
explanationTarget: Dönerken yolu geçmek isteyen yayalara öncelik vermelisiniz.

questionTextSource: How do you respond to pedestrians wishing to cross the road into which you want to turn?
explanationSource: If a car driver wants to turn into a street that is crossed by pedestrians, or pedestrians want to cross it, the driver has to give precedence to the pedestrians and has to stop. Therefore, fast driving is wrong. It does not matter if the cross-walk is marked or not.
answerASource: Allow the pedestrians to cross the road
answerBSource: Make the turn quickly before the pedestrians
answerCSource: Only wait if the pedestrians are using a marked crossing
questionTextTarget: Döneceğiniz yoldan geçmek isteyen yayalara nasıl davranırsınız?
explanationTarget: Dönerken yolu geçmek isteyen yayalara, işaretli geçit olmasa bile, geçmeleri için izin vermelisiniz.
answerCTarget: Yalnızca yayalar işaretli geçidi kullanıyorsa beklemek

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: The car has to wait until the pedestrians have crossed the street. If you want to turn into a road that is being crossed by pedestrians, the pedestrians have priority over the car. You as a car driver have to show consideration and need to stop.
answerASource: Wait, because the two pedestrians have priority
answerBSource: Continue driving, because the two pedestrians have to give way to me
answerCSource: Proceed in front of the oncoming pedestrian, because he is required to wait
questionTextTarget: Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: İki yaya önceliklidir. Beklemelisiniz.
answerBTarget: Devam etmek, çünkü iki yaya bana yol vermek zorunda
answerCTarget: Karşıdan gelen yayanın önünden geçmek, çünkü sadece o beklemek zorunda

questionTextSource: In which instances do you have to approach a pedestrian crossing with particular care?
explanationSource: Generally, motorists have to approach a pedestrian crossing cautiously. Particular caution is advised when people want to cross the road or the view of the pedestrian crossing is limited, for example by an already waiting vehicle in front of the pedestrian crossing. Under no circumstances should you overtake this vehicle.
answerASource: If pedestrians want to cross the road
answerBSource: If the view of the pedestrian crossing is restricted
answerCSource: If another vehicle is already waiting at the pedestrian crossing
questionTextTarget: Hangi durumlarda yaya geçidine özellikle dikkatli yaklaşmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Yayalar geçmek istiyorsa, görüş kısıtlıysa veya başka bir araç yaya geçidinde bekliyorsa özellikle dikkatli yaklaşmalısınız.
answerCTarget: Başka bir araç yaya geçidinde bekliyorsa

questionTextSource: A pedestrian crossing is covered in snow; only the sign "Pedestrian crossing" is visible. A pedestrian wants to cross the road. What is the right thing to do?
explanationSource: The sign makes it clear that there is a pedestrian crossing. As a car driver, you must behave just like you do on a visible pedestrian crossing, when the road is covered in snow. Approach the cross-walk particularly careful, brake and stop if necessary.
answerASource: Brake carefully
answerBSource: Allow the pedestrian to cross
answerCSource: Continue driving carefully, because no road markings are visible
questionTextTarget: Yaya geçidi karla kaplı; sadece “Yaya geçidi” işareti görülüyor. Bir yaya yolu geçmek istiyor. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Çizgiler görünmese bile işaret geçidi belirtir. Dikkatli fren yapmalı ve yayaya geçiş hakkı vermelisiniz.
answerCTarget: Yol çizgileri görünmediği için dikkatli şekilde devam etmek

questionTextSource: A pedestrian wants to cross the road via the pedestrian crossing. What should you do?
explanationSource: Approach the pedestrian crossing at moderate speed and signal that you are compliant. If there is eye contact with the pedestrian, emphasize this with gestures. If lowering the speed is not sufficient to enable the pedestrian to cross the route, you have to stop. Before and on pedestrian crossings, no other vehicle may be overtaken.
answerASource: I get ready to stop
answerBSource: I refrain from overtaking
answerCSource: I overtake the waiting vehicles taking extra care
questionTextTarget: Bir yaya, yaya geçidinden yolu geçmek istiyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Durmaya hazır olmalı ve yaya geçidinde/önünde sollamadan vazgeçmelisiniz. Bekleyen araçları sollamayın.

questionTextSource: What should you do in this situation?
explanationSource: If at a pedestrian crossing a pedestrian clearly wants to cross the road, you must approach and wait at a moderate pace. When traffic is halting, you must not stop on a pedestrian crossing. In such a case, you must also keep T-junctions and intersections clear.
answerASource: I allow the pedestrian to cross the road
answerBSource: I wait this side of the pedestrian crossing until the blue vehicle has made the turn
answerCSource: I pull up directly behind the blue vehicle
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Yayanın yolu geçmesine izin vermeli ve mavi araç dönene kadar yaya geçidinin bu tarafında beklemelisiniz. Geçidi kapatmayın.
answerBTarget: Mavi araç dönüşünü yapana kadar yaya geçidinin bu tarafında beklerim

questionTextSource: Why is it particularly important to adopt a defensive driving style when approaching pedestrian crossings?
explanationSource: Approaching this area defensively and braking slowly shows pedestrians that you are complying with your duty of waiting. This allows pedestrians to safely cross the road. In addition, you avoid rear-end collisions by stopping in a timely manner.
answerASource: In order that pedestrians are not unduly alarmed
answerBSource: In order to avoid rear-end collisions
answerCSource: In order that vehicles following behind can overtake more easily
questionTextTarget: Yaya geçitlerine yaklaşırken defansif sürüş tarzı neden özellikle önemlidir?
explanationTarget: Yayaları gereksiz yere korkutmamak ve arkadan çarpma riskini azaltmak için yaya geçitlerine dikkatli yaklaşılmalıdır.
answerCTarget: Arkadan gelen araçların daha kolay sollaması için

questionTextSource: You are driving in the left-hand lane of a two-lane one-way street. About 30 m in front of you, a truck comes to a stop in the right-hand lane before a pedestrian crossing. What should you do?
explanationSource: In no case may a vehicle be overtaken before and on pedestrian crossings. The truck blocks the view of the pedestrian crossing. He may let pedestrians cross the street. Even if he is waiting in a different lane, he must not be overtaken. Drive at moderate speed to the pedestrian crossing, ready to stop.
answerASource: I approach at a moderate speed
answerBSource: I give a warning signal and drive past the truck
answerCSource: I continue driving swiftly
questionTextTarget: İki şeritli tek yönlü bir yolda sol şeritte gidiyorsunuz. Yaklaşık 30 m ileride bir kamyon sağ şeritte yaya geçidinden önce duruyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Kamyon yaya geçidinde yaya için durmuş olabilir. Orta hızla yaklaşmalı ve dikkatli olmalısınız.
answerBTarget: Uyarı sinyali verip kamyonun yanından geçerim

questionTextSource: A cyclist wishes - without dismounting - to cross the road at a pedestrian crossing. What should you do?
explanationSource: The cyclist acts contrary to road traffic regulations. He has to dismount before crossing the pedestrian crossing. However, as a car driver who approaches the pedestrian crossing cautiously and at a moderate pace, you will not run him over. That too would be contrary to road traffic regulations. You stop for the cyclist on the pedestrian crossing, if necessary, and let him/her pass.
answerASource: I allow the cyclist to cross the road
answerBSource: I sound my horn and continue driving without giving way to the cyclist
answerCSource: I only brake just short of the pedestrian crossing
questionTextTarget: Bir bisikletli inmeden yaya geçidinden karşıya geçmek istiyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Bisikletli bisiklet üzerinde geçiyorsa yaya geçidi önceliği yoktur. Korna çalmadan ve tehlike yaratmadan sürmelisiniz; gerekirse fren yapabilirsiniz.
answerBTarget: Korna çalar ve bisikletliye yol vermeden devam ederim
answerCTarget: Yalnızca yaya geçidinin hemen önünde fren yaparım

questionTextSource: In front of you is a pedestrian crossing, beyond which the traffic in your lane is backed up. What should you do?
explanationSource: When traffic is halting, you must not stop on a pedestrian crossing. Here, the same rule of intersections and T-junctions applies, which must also be kept clear.
answerASource: Come to a stop before the pedestrian crossing to allow people to cross
answerBSource: Wait on the pedestrian crossing if there is no-one in sight
answerCSource: Wait on the pedestrian crossing to shorten the traffic jam
questionTextTarget: Önünüzde bir yaya geçidi var, geçidin ilerisinde şeridinizde trafik sıkışmış. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Yaya geçidini kapatmamalısınız. İnsanların geçebilmesi için yaya geçidinden önce durmalısınız.
answerATarget: İnsanların geçebilmesi için yaya geçidinden önce durmak
answerCTarget: Trafik sıkışıklığını kısaltmak için yaya geçidinde beklemek

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: If you want to turn and you encounter pedestrians who want to cross the road, you should pay attention to them. You must stop and wait with the turn.
answerASource: I wait, because the two pedestrians have priority
answerBSource: I continue driving, because the two pedestrians have to wait
answerCSource: I take the turn before [the oncoming pedestrian], because only [this one] is required to wait
questionTextTarget: Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: İki yaya önceliklidir. Beklemelisiniz.
answerBTarget: Devam ederim, çünkü iki yaya beklemek zorunda
answerCTarget: [Karşıdan gelen yayanın] önünden dönerim, çünkü yalnızca [o] beklemek zorundadır

questionTextSource: You have damaged a parked vehicle. Though you have waited for a reasonable length of time, the injured party has not appeared. What must you do?
explanationSource: After leaving the personal data on the damaged vehicle, you must inform a nearby police station about the incident. This can also be done by phone. Default is considered as a hit and run and is a criminal offense that may cost more than the driving license. The often-quoted reasonable waiting time on the damaged vehicle is relative and not a legally specified time. Direct contact can only facilitate the transaction.
answerASource: Leave your name and address on the damaged vehicle and immediately report the accident to the police
answerBSource: You may leave the scene of the accident without taking further action
answerCSource: It is sufficient to give your name and address to a witness who was not involved
questionTextTarget: Park etmiş bir araca zarar verdiniz. Makul süre beklemenize rağmen zarar gören kişi gelmedi. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Adınızı ve adresinizi hasarlı araçta bırakmalı ve kazayı derhal polise bildirmelisiniz.
answerATarget: Adımı ve adresimi hasarlı araçta bırakıp kazayı hemen polise bildirmek
answerBTarget: Başka işlem yapmadan kaza yerinden ayrılabilirim
answerCTarget: Adımı ve adresimi olaya karışmamış bir tanığa vermek yeterlidir

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: If there has been an accident in the tunnel and if at least one car burns and there's smoke, you have to stop and leave your car. You can leave the tunnel via the emergency exit and follow the emergency lights. If none exist, you have to feel your way along the tunnel wall. Since the fire department may need to move your car away, the ignition key or transponder should be left in the car.
answerASource: - leave the ignition key or transponder behind when leaving the vehicle
answerBSource: - exit the tunnel via the emergency exit
answerCSource: - wait in the vehicle for the scene of the accident to be cleared
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Tünelde yangın ve duman varsa aracı terk etmeli, kontak anahtarı veya transponderi araçta bırakmalı ve acil çıkıştan tüneli terk etmelisiniz.
answerATarget: - aracı terk ederken kontak anahtarını veya transponderi araçta bırakmak
answerCTarget: - kaza yeri temizlenene kadar araçta beklemek

questionTextSource: Under what emergency numbers can you call the police and the emergency services in Germany?
explanationSource: In Germany emergency numbers for the police are 110 as well as 112 for the accident ambulance and the fire department. The numbers also work if your mobile phone has no more credit.
questionTextTarget: Almanya’da polisi ve acil servisleri hangi acil numaralardan arayabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Almanya’da polis için 110, itfaiye ve ambulans için 112 acil numaraları kullanılır.

questionTextSource: You are involved in an accident. What document must you present to the other person involved in the accident, if requested?
explanationSource: In the event of a traffic accident, all parties involved must show the following documents upon request: driver's license and certificate of registration part 1 (registration certificate) or the operating license. You must also provide information about the liability insurance to the best of your knowledge.
answerASource: My driving licence
answerBSource: The registration certificate Part I or the operating permit
answerCSource: The liability insurance contract
questionTextTarget: Bir kazaya karıştınız. Talep edilirse kazaya karışan diğer kişiye hangi belgeyi göstermelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Kaza halinde ehliyetinizi ve ruhsat belgesi I. bölümünü veya işletme iznini göstermek zorundasınız. Sigorta hakkında da bilgi vermelisiniz.
answerBTarget: Ruhsat belgesi I. bölüm veya işletme izni

questionTextSource: You are the first to arrive at the scene of the accident where there are injured people. You secure the scene of the accident and have gained an overview of the situation. What else do you have to do?
explanationSource: Before you take care of the injured, you must alert the ambulance service, after which you are obliged to provide first aid to the injured.
answerASource: - deliver first aid to the injured
answerBSource: - notify the emergency services
answerCSource: - document the accident
questionTextTarget: Yaralıların bulunduğu bir kaza yerine ilk gelen kişisiniz. Kaza yerini güvenceye aldınız ve durumu değerlendirdiniz. Başka ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Acil servisi haber vermeli ve yaralılara ilk yardım yapmalısınız. Kazayı belgelemek ilk öncelik değildir.

questionTextSource: You are involved in an accident in a carpark. The vehicle damage is minor. Everyone involved agrees that the police do not need to be informed. What would be helpful now for the claims process?
explanationSource: You should exchange the most important information with the other party involved in the accident in order to be able to get in touch. You should also mutually record the course of the accident. Document the damage with photos. This enables the insurance company to better assess and evaluate the damage.
answerASource: Photographing the scene of the accident from a number of angles
answerBSource: Exchanging the necessary details with those involved
answerCSource: Describing the cause of the accident in the accident report
questionTextTarget: Bir otoparkta kazaya karıştınız. Araç hasarı küçük. Herkes polise haber vermeye gerek olmadığı konusunda anlaştı. Hasar süreci için şimdi ne yardımcı olur?
explanationTarget: Taraflarla gerekli bilgileri değişmeli, kaza yerini farklı açılardan fotoğraflamalı ve kaza nedenini rapora yazmalısınız.

questionTextSource: Your vehicle has damaged someone else’s parked vehicle. Despite waiting a reasonable period of time, the owner of the damaged car fails to appear. What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: StVO § 34 6. a) - 7. allows you to leave the scene of an accident after a reasonable waiting period if you have left your name and address at the scene of the accident and reported the accident to the police.
answerASource: - leave my name and address at the scene of the accident
answerBSource: - report the accident to the police
answerCSource: - give my name and address to a witness not involved in the accident
questionTextTarget: Aracınız başka birinin park etmiş aracına zarar verdi. Makul süre beklemenize rağmen hasarlı aracın sahibi gelmedi. Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Makul bekleme süresinden sonra adınızı ve adresinizi kaza yerinde bırakmalı ve kazayı polise bildirmelisiniz.
answerATarget: - adımı ve adresimi kaza yerinde bırakmak
answerCTarget: - adımı ve adresimi kazaya karışmamış bir tanığa vermek

questionTextSource: You are involved in an accident with another vehicle to which the following orange-coloured sign is attached. You see a liquid leaking from the vehicle. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource:
Vehicles with orange warning signs are transporting dangerous goods.

In the event of an accident involving a hazardous goods transport, you must state the numbers on the orange-coloured sign when making an emergency call. This way, the emergency call centre knows which substances the vehicle is transporting and can send the appropriate special forces. You should avoid contact with the leaking liquids and keep your distance if possible.
answerASource: I provide the number of the orange-coloured sign when making the emergency call
answerBSource: I avoid walking in the area into which the liquid has leaked
answerCSource: I attempt to block the leak in the vehicle
questionTextTarget: Turuncu renkli levha takılı başka bir araçla kazaya karıştınız. Araçtan sıvı sızdığını görüyorsunuz. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Turuncu levha tehlikeli madde taşımacılığını gösterir. Acil çağrıda levhadaki numarayı bildirin, sızan sıvının olduğu alana girmeyin ve sızıntıyı kapatmaya çalışmayın.
answerATarget: Acil çağrıda turuncu levhadaki numarayı bildiririm

questionTextSource: You are the first person to arrive at the scene of an accident with injured persons. In which order do you proceed?
explanationSource: The correct order of the necessary action steps is: 1. Secure the accident site so that no following vehicles drive into the accident. 2. Provide first aid to the injured, 3. Alert the accident ambulance. If you are not traveling alone and have passengers, these three steps or some of them can be processed at the same time. For example, you provide first aid while a passenger informs the ambulance.
answerASource: Make the scene of the accident safe - give first aid - call the rescue service
answerBSource: Give first aid - call the rescue service - make the scene of the accident safe
answerCSource: Call the rescue service - make the scene of the accident safe - give first aid
questionTextTarget: Yaralıların olduğu bir kaza yerine ilk gelen kişisiniz. Hangi sırayla hareket edersiniz?
explanationTarget: Önce kaza yerini güvenceye alın, sonra ilk yardım yapın ve acil servisi arayın. Yolcular varsa işlemler paralel yapılabilir.
answerATarget: Kaza yerini güvenceye almak - ilk yardım yapmak - kurtarma servisini aramak
answerBTarget: İlk yardım yapmak - kurtarma servisini aramak - kaza yerini güvenceye almak
answerCTarget: Kurtarma servisini aramak - kaza yerini güvenceye almak - ilk yardım yapmak

questionTextSource: You are the first person to arrive at the scene of an accident with injured persons. What should you do first as a rule?
explanationSource: If you are the first to reach an accident with an injured person, keep a cool head and first secure the accident scene as your first act. This allows you to actively prevent further accidents and protect the injured. Then look for the injured and administer first aid. Inform the ambulance.
answerASource: Make the scene of the accident safe
answerBSource: Drive to the next telephone box and call the rescue service
answerCSource: Check the seriousness of the injuries
questionTextTarget: Yaralıların olduğu bir kaza yerine ilk gelen kişisiniz. Kural olarak ilk ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: İlk olarak kaza yerini güvenceye almalısınız; böylece başka kazaları önler ve yaralıları korursunuz.
answerBTarget: En yakın telefon kulübesine gidip kurtarma servisini aramak

questionTextSource: How can you get help on an autobahn?
explanationSource: In the event of a breakdown or accident on the highway, you can call for help at the emergency telephone number and at 112 or 110. If your vehicle can still be brought to the nearest rest stop, you can also make your call for help there.
answerASource: From the autobahn service areas
answerBSource: Use an emergency call box
answerCSource: Dial 112 or 110
questionTextTarget: Otoyolda nasıl yardım alabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Otoyolda acil telefon kutusunu kullanabilir, 112 veya 110’u arayabilir ya da mümkünse dinlenme tesisinden yardım isteyebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: You notice an accident in the tunnel. What do you have to do?
explanationSource: In the event of an accident in a tunnel, the driver is obliged to immediately use the hazard light to warn the following traffic. Park the vehicle on the right-hand side of the lane or, if possible, in a passenger bay and step out carefully to inspect the scene of the accident and do the emergency call. Secure the accident scene and provide first aid. Also pay attention to your own protection, emergency exits and emergency telephones.
answerASource: Switch on the hazard warning lights
answerBSource: Inform emergency services via the SOS-telephone
answerCSource: Do not leave your vehicle
questionTextTarget: Tünelde bir kaza fark ediyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Tünelde kazada dörtlüleri yakmalı ve SOS telefonu üzerinden acil servise bilgi vermelisiniz. Aracı hiç terk etmeyin kuralı doğru değildir; duruma göre kaza yerini kontrol edip yardım gerekir.
answerBTarget: SOS telefonu üzerinden acil servise bilgi vermek

questionTextSource: You are involved in a traffic accident. What are you obliged to do?
explanationSource: If the damage is minor, the one who caused the accident must immediately move to the side in order to avoid traffic congestion and other hazards. He also has a duty to inform other parties that he was involved in the accident. If he doesn't do that, it will be prosecuted as a hit and run. This entails a previous conviction and the withdrawal of the driver's license. He must give his name and address to authorized persons. These are just some of the duties of an accident perpetrator.
answerASource: - move promptly to the side of the roadway if damage is minor
answerBSource: - inform the other persons involved that I was also involved in the accident
answerCSource: - provide my name and address upon demand to those entitled to this information
questionTextTarget: Bir trafik kazasına karıştınız. Ne yapmakla yükümlüsünüz?
explanationTarget: Küçük hasarda yolu hemen boşaltmalı, kazaya karıştığınızı diğerlerine bildirmeli ve yetkili kişilere adınızı ve adresinizi vermelisiniz.
answerATarget: - hasar küçükse derhal taşıt yolunun kenarına geçmek
answerBTarget: - diğer ilgili kişilere kazaya karıştığımı bildirmek
answerCTarget: - bilgi almaya yetkili kişilere talep üzerine adımı ve adresimi vermek

questionTextSource: You have an accident on a rural road. How do you secure the scene of the accident site?
explanationSource: Switching on the hazard light is the first measure, but insufficient to protect the scene of the accident. The breakdown triangle should be set up outside of towns about 100 meters before the accident. If necessary, the following road users need to be warned by hand signals, as long as no persons, including their own, are endangered.
answerASource: I turn on my hazard lights immediately
answerBSource: I set up the warning triangle in a well-visible position about 100 m from the scene of the accident
answerCSource: If necessary, I warn other vehicles, by using hand signals for example
questionTextTarget: Kırsal yolda kaza yaptınız. Kaza yerini nasıl güvenceye alırsınız?
explanationTarget: Önce dörtlüleri yakın. Uyarı üçgenini kaza yerinden yaklaşık 100 m önce görünür bir yere koyun ve gerekirse el işaretleriyle diğer araçları uyarın.
answerBTarget: Uyarı üçgenini kaza yerinden yaklaşık 100 m uzakta iyi görünür bir yere koyarım
answerCTarget: Gerekirse diğer araçları örneğin el işaretleriyle uyarırım

questionTextSource: How can you tell the shortest way to the next emergency telephone on federal motorways?
explanationSource: You can recognize the shortest route to the nearest emergency call post using the black arrows (direction triangles) on the reflector post. They point the way on federal motorways.
answerASource: - black arrows on the delineators
answerBSource: - direction markings on the guardrails
answerCSource: - ground markings on the hard shoulder
questionTextTarget: Federal otoyollarda en yakın acil telefonun en kısa yolunu nasıl anlarsınız?
explanationTarget: Reflektör direklerindeki siyah oklar en yakın acil telefonun yönünü gösterir.

questionTextSource: What are you obliged to do, if you are involved in a road traffic accident?
explanationSource: After an accident, the car driver and all other participants must stop and inform themselves about the consequences of the accident. Immediately take care of securing the scene of the accident to avoid further damage. Then administer first aid to injured people.
answerASource: - stop and determine the consequences of the accident
answerBSource: - secure the scene of the accident
answerCSource: - provide aid if anyone has been injured
questionTextTarget: Trafik kazasına karıştıysanız ne yapmakla yükümlüsünüz?
explanationTarget: Durmalı, kazanın sonuçlarını belirlemeli, kaza yerini güvenceye almalı ve yaralı varsa yardım sağlamalısınız.

questionTextSource: A vehicle driver has slightly damaged another vehicle, and unlawfully leaves the scene. What consequence could this have?
explanationSource:
If you leave the scene of an accident on the road, you commit a hit-and-run. According to the Criminal Code, committing a hit-and-run can be punished with a fine or imprisonment for up to three years.
