A hit-and-run can result in points in Flensburg, a driving ban of a maximum of three months and the withdrawal of the driver's license. It is also always possible to order a medical-psychological examination in the event of a significant violation.
answerASource: A fine or imprisonment
answerBSource: A withdrawal of the driving licence or a driving ban
answerCSource: An order to undergo a medical/psychological examination
questionTextTarget: Bir sürücü başka bir araca hafif zarar verip hukuka aykırı şekilde olay yerinden ayrılıyor. Bunun sonucu ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Kaza yerinden kaçmak para cezası veya hapis, ehliyetin alınması ya da sürüş yasağı ve tıbbi-psikolojik muayene emri gibi sonuçlar doğurabilir.

questionTextSource: A police officer is regulating the traffic at a crossroads even though the traffic lights are in operation. What applies?
explanationSource: Road traffic regulations have a defined ranking, which you must observe. Thus, a police officer is superior to everything else. Followed by traffic lights, which in turn are above the traffic signs. If there are no traffic signs, traffic lights or police, the rule "left yields to right" applies.
answerASource: The police officer's signals
answerBSource: The traffic light signals
answerCSource: The traffic signs governing priority
questionTextTarget: Trafik ışıkları çalışmasına rağmen bir polis memuru kavşakta trafiği düzenliyor. Ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Polis memurunun işaretleri trafik ışıklarından ve öncelik işaretlerinden üstündür.

questionTextSource: A police officer is regulating the traffic at a crossroads where there are also traffic signs governing priority. What applies?
explanationSource: The instructions of the policeman have the highest priority. You have to obey, no matter what the signs say. The following order of priority of the traffic regulation applies: The police officer has the highest authority. Traffic lights are superior to traffic signs. Traffic signs are superior to the basic rule "left yields to right".
answerASource: The police officer's signals
answerBSource: The traffic signs governing priority
answerCSource: 'The rule "right before left"'
questionTextTarget: Bir polis memuru, öncelik işaretleri de bulunan bir kavşakta trafiği düzenliyor. Ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Polis talimatları en üst sıradadır. Trafik işaretleri veya sağdan gelen kuralı buna göre geri planda kalır.

questionTextSource: How important are instructions from police officers?
explanationSource: The driver must always follow the signs and instructions of police officers. Other arrangements and rules, such as traffic lights or traffic signs, are put last. However, the road user must not neglect due diligence.
answerASource: They must be obeyed
answerBSource: They must be obeyed only if they tally with the traffic signs installed
answerCSource: They release you from your own duty to take care
questionTextTarget: Polis memurlarının talimatları ne kadar önemlidir?
explanationTarget: Polis memurlarının işaret ve talimatlarına uyulmalıdır. Ancak bu, kendi dikkat yükümlülüğünüzü ortadan kaldırmaz.
answerBTarget: Sadece yerleştirilmiş trafik işaretleriyle uyuşuyorsa uyulmalıdır

questionTextSource: What is correct?
explanationSource: The police officer gives the traffic instructions by his body position and with specific arm movements. A raised arm means: The drivers waiting at the intersection are not allowed to continue driving, previously locked drivers should prepare for the onward journey. For this, the policeman spreads his arms from the body or puts them on the body, depending on the instructions. If the police officer stands with his chest to the driver, the driver must stop. If the police officer stands sideways and the driver sees his profile, the driver may continue driving at a moderate speed.
answerASource: The yellow car must leave the crossroads
answerBSource: I must get ready to proceed
answerCSource: I can turn now
questionTextTarget: Hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Polisin kaldırılmış kolu bekleyen trafiğe durmayı, kavşaktaki araçlara ise kavşağı boşaltmayı bildirir. Siz hareket etmeye hazırlanmalısınız.

questionTextSource: What is correct?
explanationSource: The police officer regulates traffic by the help of body gestures. A transversely outstretched arm to the engine means you have to stop at the intersection. If the officer stands with his chest looking towards you, your direction of travel is locked. With two outstretched arms or arms pressed to the body, he can release the direction of travel. If the policeman is standing sideways towards you and you can see his profile, you are allowed to drive slowly. If his arm is stretched upwards, you have to stop and if the traffic is closed, you may continue driving soon. Vehicles in an intersection must leave.
answerASource: Wait at the crossroads
answerBSource: Turn without stopping
questionTextTarget: Hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Polis size karşı duruyorsa yönünüz kapalıdır. Kavşakta beklemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: What is correct?
explanationSource: The car driver, who sees the policeman from the side, can cross the intersection. He/she can drive through the intersection without stopping because the policeman has cleared the direction of travel for him/her. It is not necessary for the policeman to spread his arms.
answerASource: Cross the crossroads at a brisk pace
answerBSource: Wait at the crossroads for further instructions from the police officer
questionTextTarget: Hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Polis yan profiliyle sizin yönünüzü serbest bırakıyorsa kavşağı durmadan geçebilirsiniz; yine de dikkatli olmalısınız.
answerBTarget: Polisin diğer talimatlarını beklemek için kavşakta beklemek

questionTextSource: In your rear-view mirror, you see the words "STOP POLIZEI" (Stop Police) in red illuminated letters on the roof of a police car immediately behind your car. Who does this apply to?
explanationSource: Since the request is displayed to the front and you are directly front of the police car, the request is addressed to you. You are required by law to follow the instructions from police officers.
answerASource: To you only
answerBSource: To all following vehicles
answerCSource: To all vehicles on the road
questionTextTarget: Dikiz aynanızda hemen arkanızdaki polis aracının tavanında kırmızı ışıklı “STOP POLIZEI” yazısını görüyorsunuz. Bu kime yöneliktir?
explanationTarget: Yazı öne doğru gösterildiği ve polis aracının hemen önünde siz olduğunuz için talimat yalnızca size yöneliktir.

questionTextSource: The words "BITTE FOLGEN" (PLEASE FOLLOW) are illuminated on a police car immediately preceding your car. What does this mean?
explanationSource: Policemen are allowed to stop car drivers to carry out traffic checks and to check their ability to drive. The request to stop can be made through the PLEASE FOLLOW sign on the police vehicle in front of you. By law, you must comply with this directive.
answerASource: Only you must follow the police car
answerBSource: All cars driving in the same direction must follow the police car
answerCSource: Only heavy goods transports must follow the police car
questionTextTarget: Hemen önünüzdeki polis aracında “BITTE FOLGEN” yazısı yanıyor. Bu ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Bu talimat polis aracının hemen arkasındaki sürücüye yöneliktir. Polis aracını takip etmelisiniz.
answerATarget: Sadece siz polis aracını takip etmelisiniz
answerBTarget: Aynı yönde giden tüm araçlar polis aracını takip etmelidir
answerCTarget: Sadece ağır yük taşıyan araçlar polis aracını takip etmelidir

questionTextSource: You are overtaken by a police vehicle, which pulls in immediately in front of you. The words "BITTE FOLGEN" (PLEASE FOLLOW) appear illuminated in red on the roof. What should you do?
explanationSource: The signal "PLEASE FOLLOW" always applies to the driver directly behind the police car. So, you have to follow the instructions of the police, drive after the officers and stop behind the police car as soon as it stops.
answerASource: - follow the police vehicle
answerBSource: - stop if the police vehicle stops
answerCSource: - allow the engine to continue running once I have stopped
questionTextTarget: Bir polis aracı sizi sollayıp hemen önünüze geçiyor. Tavanında kırmızı “BITTE FOLGEN” yazısı yanıyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Polis aracını takip etmeli ve durursa arkasında durmalısınız. Durduktan sonra motoru çalışır bırakmanız gerekmez.

questionTextSource: You are overtaken by a police vehicle, which pulls in immediately in front of you. The words "BITTE FOLGEN" (PLEASE FOLLOW) appear illuminated in red on the roof. To whom does this apply?
explanationSource: The signal "PLEASE FOLLOW" on a police car applies to the vehicle immediately behind the police, in this case for you. The police may stop you for traffic control. Follow the police vehicle and stop when it stops.
answerASource: To me
answerBSource: To all vehicles in my lane
answerCSource: For police and rescue vehicles following behind
questionTextTarget: Bir polis aracı sizi sollayıp hemen önünüze geçiyor. Tavanında kırmızı “BITTE FOLGEN” yazısı yanıyor. Bu kime yöneliktir?
explanationTarget: Bu sinyal polis aracının hemen arkasındaki araca, yani size yöneliktir.
answerCTarget: Arkadan gelen polis ve kurtarma araçlarına

questionTextSource: A police signalling disc is displayed towards you from a vehicle driving in front of you. What does this mean?
explanationSource: Basically, the driver who drives directly behind the police car has to follow the signal given by the police. If this is recognizable, the police signaling disc may also apply to drivers in front. You must not overtake the police car and you have to follow it.
answerASource: I have to follow the vehicle until it stops
answerBSource: I may not overtake the vehicle
answerCSource: I have to turn in the direction indicated
questionTextTarget: Önünüzde giden araçtan size doğru polis işaret diski gösteriliyor. Bu ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Polis aracını durana kadar takip etmeli ve onu sollamamalısınız.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: The police officer is hierarchically first in the right-of-way. Basic rule "right before left", traffic signs and light signals have no effect at this moment. Nevertheless, be attentive because other road users could still behave incorrectly.
answerASource: I cross over the junction carefully
answerBSource: I wait outside of the junction for further instructions from the police officer
answerCSource: I let [the blue vehicle] move first
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Polis trafiği düzenliyorsa sağdan gelen kuralı, ışıklar ve işaretler geçici olarak geçerli değildir. Polis yönünüzü serbest bırakıyorsa kavşağı dikkatlice geçebilirsiniz.
answerBTarget: Polis memurunun başka talimatları için kavşağın dışında beklerim
answerCTarget: [Mavi aracın] önce hareket etmesine izin veririm

questionTextSource: Who has priority here?
explanationSource: The traffic is regulated by the police so that the red car is allowed to drive first.
answerASource: The [red] car
answerBSource: The motorbike
answerCSource: Me
questionTextTarget: Burada kimin önceliği vardır?
explanationTarget: Trafik polis tarafından düzenleniyor. Bu durumda kırmızı araba önce gidebilir.

questionTextSource: What is the right thing to do in this situation?
explanationSource: If a traffic police officer is directing traffic, the instructions must be followed.  In this situation, the traffic policeman stands in front of you, facing you and with his arms outstretched. This means that you have to wait at the intersection and vehicles from the right and left have the right of way.
answerASource: - wait before the junction
answerBSource: - without waiting, turn right
answerCSource: - turn round
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Polis size dönük ve kolları açık duruyorsa beklemelisiniz. Sağdan ve soldan gelen trafik serbesttir.

questionTextSource: What applies here?
explanationSource: The traffic policeman's gesture dictates the behavior in traffic. If the officer stands lengthways to your direction of travel and you can see his profile, you can continue and turn right. Right-turning drivers should cross the intersection quickly, as long as no pedestrian or cyclist approaches them. If you want to turn left, enter the intersection to ensure undisturbed traffic flow and wait for the policeman's instructions.
answerASource: The crossroads may be crossed
answerBSource: You must wait for further signals from the police officer before the crossroads may be entered
answerCSource: Turning off is prohibited
questionTextTarget: Burada ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Polis memuru sizin yönünüze yan duruyorsa kavşaktan geçebilir ve dönebilirsiniz. Sol dönüşte kavşağa girip polisin talimatını bekleyebilirsiniz.
answerBTarget: Kavşağa girmeden önce polis memurunun diğer işaretleri beklenmelidir

questionTextSource: Which conduct is right?
explanationSource: The traffic light system regulates the right of way for the traffic moving straight ahead. The turning lane on the left does not have its own traffic light. When turning left, you must therefore enter the intersection area and wait until a gap in the oncoming straight traffic allows you to pass. On the lane previously branching off for right-turning drivers, the traffic sign applies instead of the traffic light. Note the cross traffic when turning.
answerASource: The green car must wait
answerBSource: I may turn observing the traffic signs
answerCSource: I may only turn when the lights show "green"
questionTextTarget: Hangi davranış doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Sol dönüş şeridinin kendi trafik ışığı yoksa trafik işaretlerine ve karşı trafiğe dikkat ederek dönüş yapılır. Düz giden trafik ışığı bu dönüş şeridini doğrudan düzenlemeyebilir.

questionTextSource: The traffic lights are on flashing amber. What is the correct procedure?
explanationSource: The yellow flashing light indicates that the traffic light is out of order. Instead, the traffic signs are valid that regulate the right of way and you must give priority here. Without traffic signs, the rule "left yields to right" applies.
answerASource: Approach with greater caution, giving way if necessary
answerBSource: Wait until the lights change
questionTextTarget: Trafik ışığı sarı yanıp sönüyor. Doğru işlem nedir?
explanationTarget: Sarı yanıp sönen ışık, ışık sisteminin devre dışı olduğunu gösterir. Öncelik trafik işaretlerine göre belirlenir; gerekirse yol vermelisiniz.
answerATarget: Daha dikkatli yaklaşmak, gerekirse yol vermek

questionTextSource: What is permitted at these traffic lights with green arrow sign?
explanationSource: The additional sign with green arrow on a black background allows you to turn right after stopping at the red traffic light. Despite the additional sign, the car driver has to make sure that the cross traffic is not endangered. This includes pedestrians and cyclists. Turning is permitted only on the right lane and may only be performed after stopping and ensuring that you can turn safely.
answerASource: Turn right from the right lane after having stopped first, when there is no obstruction or danger to others
answerBSource: Turn right without stopping
answerCSource: Turn right only when the traffic lights are green
questionTextTarget: Yeşil ok levhası bulunan bu trafik ışıklarında neye izin verilir?
explanationTarget: Kırmızı ışıkta, önce durduktan ve kimseyi engelleyip tehlikeye atmadığınızdan emin olduktan sonra sağ şeritten sağa dönebilirsiniz.
answerATarget: Önce durduktan sonra, kimseyi engellemeden veya tehlikeye atmadan sağ şeritten sağa dönmek
answerCTarget: Sadece trafik ışığı yeşil olduğunda sağa dönmek

questionTextSource: At these traffic lights with a green arrow sign, where should a vehicle stop before turning right?
explanationSource: The car driver has to stop at the stop line. If none exists, then he has to stop in any case before the intersection or T-junction. If the traffic situation allows it, turning to the right is also possible when the traffic light is red. A right-turning driver should behave just as he does with a stop sign, when the traffic light is red. The right of way of the cross traffic must be considered and granted.
answerASource: At the stop line
answerBSource: Before the crossing or junction if there is no stop line
answerCSource: There is no need to stop
questionTextTarget: Yeşil ok levhalı bu trafik ışıklarında sağa dönmeden önce araç nerede durmalıdır?
explanationTarget: Önce dur çizgisinde durmalısınız. Dur çizgisi yoksa kavşak veya yol birleşiminden önce durmalısınız.
answerBTarget: Dur çizgisi yoksa kavşak veya yol birleşiminden önce

questionTextSource: How should you behave in this situation?
explanationSource: The traffic light has priority over other traffic signs and lane markings. Cross the intersection without stopping, as long as the traffic light is green.
answerASource: Pass through the crossing without stopping
answerBSource: Stop on the line of sight
answerCSource: Stop on the stop line
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda nasıl davranmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Trafik ışığı trafik işaretlerinden ve yol çizgilerinden üstündür. Işık yeşilse kavşağı durmadan geçebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: Where must you wait?
explanationSource: A traffic light in operation has priority over traffic signs, which regulate the right of way. Also, if there is a stop line, stop there and wait until you are allowed to continue.
answerASource: At the stop line
answerBSource: At the point where you can see along the intersecting road (sight line)
answerCSource: Level with the traffic lights
questionTextTarget: Nerede beklemelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Çalışan bir trafik ışığı öncelik işaretlerinden üstündür. Dur çizgisi varsa orada durup beklemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: What is correct in this situation?
explanationSource: If a traffic light turns red, car drivers who want to drive straight ahead or to the left must stop and wait. If there is an additional traffic light with a glowing green arrow pointing to the right, it is allowed to continue driving and to turn right. A traffic light without additional traffic lights or arrows, however, is valid for all directions.
answerASource: Traffic turning right may proceed
answerBSource: Traffic continuing ahead may proceed
answerCSource: Traffic turning left may proceed
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Kırmızı ışıkta düz giden ve sola dönen trafik beklemek zorundadır. Yanan yeşil sağ ok varsa sadece sağa dönen trafik devam edebilir.
answerBTarget: Düz devam eden trafik devam edebilir

questionTextSource: What should you do?
explanationSource: The traffic light switches from green to yellow directly in front of you. Your speed is 45 km/h. So, you're too fast in order to slow down and stop in front of the traffic light. There is also a truck behind you, which could hit you while doing an abrupt braking maneuver. Drive on briskly.
answerASource: Continue driving
answerBSource: Slow down
questionTextTarget: Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Işık tam önünüzde yeşilden sarıya dönüyor. Hızınız ve arkanızdaki kamyon nedeniyle güvenli durmak zor olduğundan devam etmelisiniz.

questionTextSource: What is correct in this situation?
explanationSource: Basically, when turning left, you as a car driver have to grant the oncoming traffic right of way. Since in this situation, the green arrow lights on the opposite street corner, you can assume that the traffic light for the oncoming traffic is red. So, you can turn.
answerASource: I may turn unimpeded
answerBSource: I must allow the oncoming traffic to pass through
answerCSource: I have to wait in the centre of the junction
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Sola dönerken normalde karşı trafiğe yol vermelisiniz. Ancak bu durumda karşı yöndeki yeşil ok onların kırmızıda beklediğini gösterir; dönebilirsiniz.
answerBTarget: Karşıdan gelen trafiğin geçmesine izin vermeliyim

questionTextSource: You want to turn right at these traffic lights with a green arrow sign. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: Thanks to the green arrow sign, you can turn at this traffic light even when it's red. To do this, merge right and come to a brief stop in front of the traffic light. Afterwards, make sure that you do not obstruct or endanger other road users. Also note that cross traffic still has priority.
answerASource: I stop before the junction
answerBSource: I have to ensure that other road users are not impeded
answerCSource: I may turn right into any lane
questionTextTarget: Yeşil ok levhalı bu trafik ışığında sağa dönmek istiyorsunuz. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Yeşil ok levhası sayesinde kırmızıda da sağa dönebilirsiniz. Bunun için önce durmalı ve diğer yol kullanıcılarını engellemediğinizden emin olmalısınız. İstediğiniz herhangi bir şeride dönemezsiniz.
answerBTarget: Diğer yol kullanıcılarının engellenmediğinden emin olmalıyım

questionTextSource: What should you do?
explanationSource: In front of you you see a traffic light changing from green to yellow. You drive at 40 km/h. Since you are still far enough from the traffic lights, you have to slow down.
answerASource: Slow down
answerBSource: Continue driving
questionTextTarget: Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Önünüzdeki trafik ışığı yeşilden sarıya dönüyor. Hâlâ yeterince uzakta olduğunuz için yavaşlayıp durmalısınız.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: If the yellow traffic light flashes, the traffic light system is out of operation. Then the general right of way applies. You are not on a priority road; therefore, possible cross traffic has the right of way.
answerASource: I allow any cross traffic the right of way
answerBSource: I wait at the stop line for the next set of green lights
answerCSource: I drive through the junction quickly, because "yellow" is displayed
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Sarı yanıp sönen ışıkta sistem devre dışıdır ve genel öncelik kuralları geçerlidir. Siz öncelikli yolda değilsiniz, bu yüzden çapraz trafiğe yol vermelisiniz.
answerBTarget: Bir sonraki yeşil ışık için dur çizgisinde beklerim

questionTextSource: Under what circumstances may you cross a junction during a red light?
explanationSource: You are allowed to run over a red traffic light at an intersection under the following circumstances: If you want to carefully give way to an emergency vehicle with a blue flashing light and an emergency horn or if a police officer is regulating the traffic at the intersection.
answerASource: To carefully afford space to an emergency vehicle with a blue flashing light and siren sounding
answerBSource: If there is a police officer on the junction directing traffic
answerCSource: Under no circumstances
questionTextTarget: Hangi durumlarda kırmızı ışıkta bir kavşağı geçebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Kırmızı ışık, yalnızca mavi ışıklı ve sirenli acil araca dikkatlice yol vermek için veya kavşakta trafiği düzenleyen bir polis memuru varsa aşılabilir.
answerATarget: Mavi ışıklı ve sirenli bir acil araca dikkatlice yer açmak için
answerBTarget: Kavşakta trafiği yöneten bir polis memuru varsa

questionTextSource: You now want to turn right at these traffic lights with a green arrow sign. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: If there is a green arrow sign at a traffic light, you are allowed to cross a red light if you have stopped at the stop line first. You may turn if there is no risk of obstructing or endangering other road users.
answerASource: I initially halt at the stop line
answerBSource: I ensure that other road users are not impeded
answerCSource: Without stopping, I take the turn at walking speed
questionTextTarget: Şimdi yeşil ok levhalı bu trafik ışığında sağa dönmek istiyorsunuz. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Yeşil ok levhası varsa önce dur çizgisinde durmalısınız. Ancak diğer yol kullanıcılarını engelleme veya tehlikeye atma ihtimali yoksa dönebilirsiniz.
answerBTarget: Diğer yol kullanıcılarının engellenmediğinden emin olurum

questionTextSource: What is the rule at this traffic-light-controlled junction with additional signage?
explanationSource: On traffic lights with this additional sign, only cyclists, even at red, can turn to the right.
answerASource: - cyclists are permitted to turn right, even when the light is showing red
answerBSource: - motor vehicles are permitted to turn right, even when the light is showing red
answerCSource: - cyclists must turn right
questionTextTarget: Ek levhalı bu ışıklı kavşakta kural nedir?
explanationTarget: Bu ek levha ile yalnızca bisikletliler kırmızı ışıkta sağa dönebilir. Motorlu araçlar için geçerli değildir ve bisikletliler de sağa dönmek zorunda değildir.
answerATarget: - bisikletlilerin ışık kırmızı olsa bile sağa dönmesine izin verilir
answerBTarget: - motorlu araçların ışık kırmızı olsa bile sağa dönmesine izin verilir

questionTextSource: The traffic lights facing you have already been “green” for some time now. What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: As the traffic light has been green for some time, there is a high probability that it will change to yellow at any moment. Keep driving, ready to brake, because you will have to stop if it switches to yellow. You must not speed up, as a maximum of 30 km/h is permitted.
answerASource: I continue driving, ready to brake because the traffic lights could change to “amber”
answerBSource: I watch the traffic lights closely
answerCSource: I accelerate to ensure that I can still safely pass through the junction while the traffic lights are “green”
questionTextTarget: Karşınızdaki trafik ışıkları bir süredir “yeşil”. Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Işık bir süredir yeşilse her an sarıya dönebilir. Bu nedenle frenlemeye hazır şekilde devam etmeli, hızlanmamalısınız.
answerATarget: Işıkların “sarıya” dönebileceği için frenlemeye hazır şekilde devam ederim
answerCTarget: Işık “yeşil”ken kavşağı güvenle geçebilmek için hızlanırım

questionTextSource: You want to turn left and the lights are "green". On your left there is a tram wanting to proceed straight ahead. What is correct?
explanationSource: Although you are allowed to drive, due to the green light, you have to grant the tram the right of way, as it continues straight ahead. You should therefore only enter the intersection halfway and let oncoming vehicles pass before turning left.
answerASource: You must wait
answerBSource: The tram must wait
answerCSource: You must come to an agreement since there are no rules for this
questionTextTarget: Sola dönmek istiyorsunuz ve ışık “yeşil”. Solunuzda düz gitmek isteyen bir tramvay var. Hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Yeşil ışık yanıyor olsa da düz giden tramvay önceliklidir. Bu nedenle beklemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: You have taken the right lane by mistake although you want to turn left. How are you allowed to proceed?
explanationSource: Due to the solid line, you must not change the lane here. Follow only the arrows on your lane. Turning left from this lane would be prohibited and would endanger or at least hinder other drivers.
answerASource: Straight ahead
answerBSource: To the right
answerCSource: To the left when the traffic lights are "green"
questionTextTarget: Yanlışlıkla sağ şeride girdiniz, fakat sola dönmek istiyorsunuz. Nasıl devam edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Burada sürekli çizgi nedeniyle şerit değiştiremezsiniz. Yalnızca kendi şeridinizdeki okları takip edebilirsiniz; yani düz gidebilir veya sağa dönebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: What is the right behaviour now?
explanationSource: Since this situation is a two-phase traffic light, there is no green signal. After the red light is off, you can catch up with the truck. If there was no space left behind the truck to the exit on the right, you would have to wait at the traffic lights until there was enough space to stop.
answerASource: - off now
answerBSource: - off only when the lorry drives on
answerCSource: - off only when my light is green
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Bu iki aşamalı bir trafik ışığı düzenidir. Kırmızı ışık söndüğünde hemen çıkabilirsiniz; kamyonun hareket etmesini veya yeni bir yeşil ışığı beklemeniz gerekmez.
answerBTarget: - ancak kamyon hareket ettiğinde hareket etmek
answerCTarget: - ancak benim ışığım yeşil olduğunda hareket etmek

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: The traffic lights are out of order, therefore the right-of-way traffic signs apply. You must give way.
answerASource: I allow any cross traffic the right of way
answerBSource: I wait at the stop line for the next set of green lights
answerCSource: I drive through the junction quickly, because "yellow" is displayed
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Trafik ışıkları arızalı olduğu için öncelik işaretleri geçerlidir. Bu durumda yol vermelisiniz.
answerBTarget: Bir sonraki yeşil ışık için dur çizgisinde beklerim

questionTextSource: A vehicle with flashing blue light and siren is approaching. What do you do?
explanationSource: A blue flashing light and siren are used in emergency situations such as car accidents or house fires. For this reason, you have to clear a passage for the emergency vehicles as fast as you can. Therefore, slowly reduce your speed and drive to the right edge of the road. If necessary, drive on the sidewalk and stay there.
answerASource: Clear the way for the vehicle
answerBSource: Drive carefully onto the pavement if necessary
answerCSource: At all events, brake hard and stop
questionTextTarget: Mavi yanıp sönen ışığı ve sireni açık bir araç yaklaşıyor. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Acil araca derhal yol açmalısınız. Gerekirse dikkatlice kaldırıma yanaşabilirsiniz; ancak her durumda ani sert fren yapıp durmak doğru değildir.
answerCTarget: Her durumda sert fren yapıp dururum

questionTextSource: You hear a siren. Which questions must you ask yourself?
explanationSource: If you hear a siren, you should first determine which direction the emergency vehicle is coming from. Then you have to consider where you can go, without hindering the emergency vehicle from continuing and without endangering yourself.
answerASource: Where is the emergency vehicle coming from?
answerBSource: Could I obstruct the emergency vehicle?
answerCSource: Is this vehicle allowed to use a siren at all?
questionTextTarget: Bir siren duyuyorsunuz. Hangi soruları kendinize sormalısınız?
explanationTarget: Acil aracın nereden geldiğini ve onu engelleyip engellemediğinizi düşünmelisiniz. Aracın siren kullanmaya yetkili olup olmadığını sorgulamanız gerekmez.
answerCTarget: Bu aracın siren kullanmaya yetkisi var mı?

questionTextSource: What can a flashing amber light on a vehicle be a warning for?
explanationSource: A yellow flashing light warns against dangers that require particularly careful driving behavior. These hazards are work or accident sites or unusually slow, wide or long vehicles.
answerASource: For dangers at roadworks or the scene of an accident
answerBSource: For an exceptionally wide vehicle
answerCSource: For a large transport proceeding at low speed
questionTextTarget: Bir araçtaki sarı yanıp sönen ışık neye karşı uyarı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sarı yanıp sönen ışık yol çalışması veya kaza yeri tehlikesini, çok geniş araçları veya yavaş ilerleyen büyük taşımaları gösterebilir.
answerATarget: Yol çalışması veya kaza yeri tehlikelerine

questionTextSource: What does it mean when the flashing blue light of a vehicle is switched on but not the siren?
explanationSource: A blue flashing light warns you of accidents or situations such as a fire run. Any driver should allow vehicles with blue flashing lights to pass through, as this may indicate an emergency, vehicle escort or a platoon.
answerASource: Warning of an accident or other dangers
answerBSource: Warning of fire-brigade in action
answerCSource: A breakdown vehicle is on duty and on its way to its destination
questionTextTarget: Bir aracın mavi yanıp sönen ışığı açık ama sireni kapalıysa bu ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Sirensiz mavi ışık, bir kaza ya da başka bir tehlike konusunda uyarı olabilir.
answerATarget: Bir kaza veya başka tehlikelere karşı uyarı
answerCTarget: Arıza yardım aracı görevde ve hedefe gidiyor

questionTextSource: What can a flashing blue light (without siren) mean?
explanationSource: A blue flashing light without siren indicates to accidents or other emergencies - so you should allow free passage here as well. Blue light is also used during blue light driving. It can also be used to secure platoons.
answerASource: The vehicle is on duty. You should give way
answerBSource: Advance warning of a closed convoy
answerCSource: Without a siren, a flashing blue light does not mean anything
questionTextTarget: Mavi yanıp sönen ışık (siren olmadan) ne anlama gelebilir?
explanationTarget: Siren olmadan da mavi ışık görevdeki bir aracı veya kapalı bir konvoyu önceden haber verebilir. Hiçbir anlamı yok demek yanlıştır.
answerBTarget: Kapalı bir konvoy hakkında ön uyarı
answerCTarget: Sirensiz mavi yanıp sönen ışığın hiçbir anlamı yoktur

questionTextSource: You are being followed by an ambulance with its blue lights flashing and siren sounding. What should you do?
explanationSource: You are required to make space for the ambulance as soon as possible. Be careful not to endanger other road users. If possible, turn right if you are on a right lane; on the highway and multi-lane roads an alley must be formed.
answerASource: I move out of the way immediately without endangering others
answerBSource: I prompt the driver of the vehicle beside me to make way
answerCSource: I make way immediately once the traffic light has turned green
questionTextTarget: Mavi ışıkları ve sireni açık bir ambulans sizi takip ediyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Diğerlerini tehlikeye atmadan derhal yol açmalısınız. Kırmızı ışıkta ise ancak dikkatlice yer açabilirsiniz; sadece yeşili beklemek doğru değildir.
answerATarget: Diğerlerini tehlikeye atmadan hemen kenara çekilirim
answerBTarget: Yanımdaki aracın sürücüsünü yol açması için uyarırım
answerCTarget: Ancak trafik ışığı yeşile döndüğünde yol açarım

questionTextSource: At which places where there are no traffic signs regulating priority does the rule "right before left" apply?
explanationSource: At intersections and T-junctions without a traffic-regulating traffic sign "left yields to right" applies. If a vehicle leaves a property or a restricted traffic area, all other road users, including pedestrians and children on the sidewalk, have priority.
answerASource: At crossroads and junctions
answerBSource: At driveways
answerCSource: At the end of a traffic calmed area
questionTextTarget: Önceliği düzenleyen trafik işaretleri olmayan hangi yerlerde “sağdan gelen önce geçer” kuralı uygulanır?
explanationTarget: Bu kural kavşak ve yol birleşimlerinde geçerlidir; özel mülk çıkışlarında ve trafik sakinleştirme bölgesi çıkışlarında geçerli değildir.

questionTextSource: At which places where there are no traffic signs regulating priority does the rule "right before left" apply?
explanationSource: At intersections and T-junctions without priority signs, the vehicles coming from the right have priority. The same applies to roads that are equally ranked according to their signage. Lanes with drop kerb, drives as well as field and forest trails are an exception. If you are on one of these roads, you must give priority to other road users.
answerASource: At crossroads and junctions
answerBSource: At junctions with sunken kerbstone
answerCSource: At junctions of farm tracks or forest tracks with other roads

questionTextSource: What is the correct conduct?
explanationSource:
The following hierarchy applies on a priority road: In principle, vehicles on a priority road always have priority. However, when leaving a priority road, you must give priority to oncoming vehicles. However, vehicles that want to drive onto a priority road must give priority to other road users on the priority road.
This means you have to give priority to the tram because it is traveling on a priority road, does not change direction and you want to turn left.

questionTextSource: What applies at this junction?
explanationSource:
The blue traffic signs, with the white bicycle in the middle, indicate a bicycle street. This road may only be used by bicycles, unless otherwise expressly indicated by other traffic signs. In addition, the triangular traffic sign “Give way” indicates that cross traffic must be given priority.
You do not necessarily have to stop at the traffic sign “Give way” and you can cross the intersection carefully as there is no traffic visible from the right or left.
answerASource: - cross the junction
answerBSource: - turn right
answerCSource: - turn left
questionTextTarget: Bu kavşakta ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Bisiklet yolu/sokağı işaretleri, bu yolun normalde bisikletlere ayrıldığını gösterir. Ayrıca 'Yol ver' işareti nedeniyle çapraz trafiğe öncelik vermelisiniz. Görünür trafik yoksa dikkatlice kavşağı geçebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: What does this road sign indicate?
explanationSource: Basically, the traffic sign “Prohibited all types of vehicles” means that vehicles are not allowed to drive on the road. However, motorcycles or bicycles may be pushed.
answerASource: - not drive
answerBSource: - drive at walking speed
answerCSource: - drive as residents
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret, otomobiller ve diğer çok izli motorlu araçlar için geçiş yasağı anlamına gelir.

questionTextSource: You are driving on a one-way street with signposting. What is correct?
explanationSource:
The direction of travel on a one-way street is always indicated by the white arrow on the traffic sign. If you are on your one-way street, you are allowed to park on the right or left side of the road in the direction of travel. 
In order not to obstruct the traffic behind you when turning left, you must move as far to the left as possible. This leaves enough space for vehicles that want to go straight or turn right.
answerASource: I have to get as far to the left as possible in order to turn left
answerBSource: I may also park on the left-hand side of the road
answerCSource: I may park against the direction of traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret, motosikletlerin geçişinin yasak olduğunu gösterir.

questionTextSource: What do you do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The road is too narrow for two lanes. The traffic sign regulates the right of way. The oncoming traffic is granted priority. If you are met by vehicles, you must stop early and allow oncoming traffic to pass.
answerASource: You must give precedence to oncoming traffic
answerBSource: You are not allowed to turn
answerCSource: You take precedence over oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret, 'Dur. Yol ver' anlamına gelir. Her durumda durmalı ve öncelikli trafiğe yol vermelisiniz.

questionTextSource: In which directions are you allowed to continue?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "You" only allows turning to the right or left" only allows you to turn left or right. The desired direction of travel needs to be indicated. You are not allowed to drive straight ahead.
answerASource: To the left
answerBSource: To the right
answerCSource: Straight ahead
questionTextTarget: Hangi yönlerde devam edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret sadece sağa veya sola dönmeye izin verir. Düz devam edemezsiniz ve dönüş yönünü sinyallemelisiniz.

questionTextSource: A school bus is stopping on the roadway approximately 80 m in front of you. Can this be dangerous?
explanationSource: If a school bus stops in front of you on the road about 80 m away, you have to expect the following: Children could suddenly run on/off the road to reach the bus, for example, by the shortest route. This danger exists even if school crossing guards secure the traffic. You have to be ready to brake and you are only allowed to drive past the school bus at walking speed.
answerASource: Yes, because children frequently run across the road to catch the bus
answerBSource: Yes, because children do not always take the shortest route to cross the roadway
answerCSource: No, because school crossing patrols regulate traffic at every school bus stop
questionTextTarget: Yaklaşık 80 m önünüzde bir okul otobüsü taşıt yolunda duruyor. Bu tehlikeli olabilir mi?
explanationTarget: Çocuklar otobüse yetişmek için veya yolu en kısa yerden geçmek için aniden yola koşabilir. Her durakta okul geçit görevlisi bulunmaz.
answerATarget: Evet, çünkü çocuklar otobüse yetişmek için sık sık yola koşar
answerBTarget: Evet, çünkü çocuklar taşıt yolunu geçerken her zaman en kısa yolu seçmez
answerCTarget: Hayır, çünkü her okul otobüsü durağında okul geçit görevlileri trafiği düzenler

questionTextSource: Who is allowed to drive a motor vehicle on this road?
explanationSource: The street is a declared sidewalk, with the additional sign "delivery vehicles only". Therefore, this road may only be used by a distributor with a motor vehicle. The distributor must be able to prove that he has to deliver something in this street. He has to drive at walking speed, regardless of whether or not pedestrians pass the street. He has to take care of pedestrians.
answerASource: Persons delivering goods
answerBSource: Shoppers
answerCSource: Visitors
questionTextTarget: Bu yolda kim motorlu araç kullanabilir?
explanationTarget: Yol yaya yolu olarak belirlenmiş ve ek levhada sadece teslimat araçlarına izin verilmiştir. Bu nedenle sadece mal teslim eden kişiler motorlu araçla girebilir.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are allowed to use the special lane marked like this?
explanationSource: The lane shown here is intended for public buses. Only they are allowed to use this lane. For all other drivers the use of this lane is prohibited.
answerASource: Regular buses
answerBSource: Trucks
answerCSource: Cars
questionTextTarget: Bu şekilde işaretlenmiş özel şeridi hangi araçlar kullanabilir?
explanationTarget: Bu şerit hat otobüsleri içindir. Diğer araçların kullanması yasaktır.

questionTextSource: Who is allowed to enter a street sign-posted like this?
explanationSource: The additional sign indicates that drivers who have to go on errands in this street privately, or for business reasons may enter. Residents and visitors are customers of shops, patients of medical practices as well as people who live in this street and their visitors. Through traffic is prohibited in this street.
answerASource: Residents
answerBSource: People visiting residents
answerCSource: Through-traffic
questionTextTarget: Bu şekilde işaretlenmiş bir sokağa kim girebilir?
explanationTarget: Ek levha, burada işi olanların girebileceğini gösterir. Sakinler ve sakinlerin ziyaretçileri girebilir; transit geçiş yasaktır.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are not allowed to use a road sign-posted like this?
explanationSource: Cars, but also other multi-lane motor vehicles, may not drive on a road with this sign. These include cars, trucks and buses. The ban does not apply to motorcycles, including side cars, and non-motorized vehicles.
answerASource: Trucks
answerBSource: Cars
answerCSource: Motorcycles
questionTextTarget: Bu şekilde işaretlenmiş yolu hangi araçlar kullanamaz?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret otomobiller ve diğer çok izli motorlu araçlar için geçiş yasağıdır. Kamyonlar da buna dahildir; motosikletler dahil değildir.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are not allowed to use a road sign-posted like this?
explanationSource: This round road sign with the red border prohibits the passage for cyclists. It usually can be found on roads where you are allowed to drive fast and where a cyclist can get into dangerous situations due to his or her low speed. Motorized vehicles such as motorcycles and cars may continue here.
answerASource: Bicycles
answerBSource: Motorcycles
answerCSource: Cars
questionTextTarget: Bu şekilde işaretlenmiş yolu hangi araçlar kullanamaz?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret bisikletlilere geçiş yasağı getirir. Motorlu araçlar bu işaretten etkilenmez.

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are not allowed to use a road sign-posted like this?
explanationSource: A round traffic sign with a red border indicates a general traffic ban for vehicles. If the circle contains a symbol, the types of vehicles to which the traffic ban applies are specified more precisely. Here the road may not be used by motorcyclists.
answerASource: Motorcycles
answerBSource: Cars
answerCSource: Trucks
questionTextTarget: Bu şekilde işaretlenmiş yolu hangi araçlar kullanamaz?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret motosikletlerin geçişini yasaklar. Otomobil ve kamyonlar bu işaretle yasaklanmış değildir.

questionTextSource: What do these traffic signs indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Do not enter" forbids car drivers to enter this road with vehicles of all kinds. The additional sign makes it clear that this prohibition applies only in 100 meters. It does not explicitly state for how long. Always expect that vehicles can come out of this road.
answerASource: No entry 100 m ahead
answerBSource: A one-way street 100 m long
answerCSource: A customs post 100 m ahead
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretleri neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Giriş yasağının 100 m ileride başlayacağını gösterir. Bu, tek yönlü yolun 100 m uzunlukta olduğu anlamına gelmez.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign indicates the beginning of a zone with a maximum speed of 30 km/h. It is often set up in residential areas and only once at the beginning. You are not allowed to drive faster than 30 km / h in the entire area. This speed limit is canceled with the "End of the 30 km/h zone" sign.
answerASource: - a permitted maximum speed of 30 km/h
answerBSource: - an obligatory minimum speed of 30 km/h
answerCSource: - a recommended speed of 30 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret, 30 km/saat azami hız bölgesinin başlangıcını gösterir. Bu hız öneri veya asgari hız değildir.

questionTextSource: A traffic calmed commercial zone (verkehrsberuhigter Bereich) starts here. What must you do?
explanationSource: In a traffic calming zone with shops, road users are often distracted by the displays in the shop windows. You must therefore pay attention to rain and inattentive foot traffic. Your maximum speed is 20 km/h. This is a no parking, but waiting allowed zone and you're obliged to use your parking disc. To offer parking to many customers, the maximum parking time is two hours.
answerASource: You must specifically watch out for busy pedestrian traffic
answerBSource: You must pay attention to the allowed maximum parking time
answerCSource: You must observe a minimum speed of 20 km/h
questionTextTarget: Burada trafik sakinleştirilmiş ticari bölge başlıyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Yoğun ve dikkatsiz yaya trafiğine özellikle dikkat etmeli ve izin verilen park süresine uymalısınız. 20 km/saat asgari hız yoktur.
answerATarget: Yoğun yaya trafiğine özellikle dikkat etmelisiniz
answerBTarget: İzin verilen azami park süresine dikkat etmelisiniz

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates the end of an area in which the permitted speed was set to 30 km/h and thus cancels the maximum speed of 30 km/h.
answerASource: - a permitted maximum speed of 30 km/h
answerBSource: - an obligatory minimum speed of 30 km/h
answerCSource: - a recommended speed of 30 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret, 30 km/saat azami hız bölgesinin sonunu gösterir.

questionTextSource: Are you allowed to drive at a speed faster than 60 km/h here?
explanationSource: Due to the additional sign, the maximum permissible speed of 60 km/h applies only in wet conditions. Decrease the speed of your vehicle accordingly, if the entire roadway is covered with a thin film of water and therefore counts as wet. If the road is dry or only damp, you are also allowed to drive faster than 60 km/h as a car driver.
answerASource: Yes, if the roadway is dry
answerBSource: Yes, if the roadway is wet
questionTextTarget: Burada 60 km/saatten daha hızlı sürebilir misiniz?
explanationTarget: Ek levhaya göre 60 km/saat sınırı sadece yol ıslakken geçerlidir. Yol kuruysa 60 km/saatten hızlı sürebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: What do you do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign dictates that you have to drive here at least at a speed of 60 km/h. Driving slower is only allowed if traffic safety requires it. A car driver may not use this road if he/she cannot or is not allowed to drive that fast due to the vehicle or its load or due to lack of personal abilities.
answerASource: You must drive at least at a speed of 60 km/h, weather and traffic conditions permitting
answerBSource: You may not use this road if you cannot or are not allowed to drive at least 60 km/h
answerCSource: You are not allowed to drive faster than 60 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretini gördüğünüzde ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret asgari hızın 60 km/saat olduğunu gösterir. Hava ve trafik koşulları uygunsa en az bu hızda gitmelisiniz; bunu yapamayan araçlar yolu kullanamaz. Azami hız değildir.
answerATarget: Hava ve trafik koşulları izin veriyorsa en az 60 km/saat hızla gitmelisiniz
answerBTarget: En az 60 km/saat süremeyen veya sürmesine izin verilmeyen araçlar bu yolu kullanamaz

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are you allowed to overtake where you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The restriction on overtaking prohibits a car driver from overtaking multi-lane vehicles such as cars, trucks or tractors and motorcycles with side cars. Motorcycles without a side car and bicycles are allowed to be overtaken, as these are single-lane vehicles.
answerASource: Motorcycle without sidecar
answerBSource: Motorcycle with sidecar
answerCSource: Car
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretinin olduğu yerde hangi araçları sollayabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Sollama yasağı çok izli araçlar ve sepetli motosikletler için geçerlidir. Sepetsiz motosikleti sollayabilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: What do these traffic signs indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign signals a restriction on overtaking on multi-lane motor vehicles or motorcycles with side car. The black arrows with the km indication indicate that the restriction on overtaking applies for 3 km. The restriction on overtaking comes into force starting from the traffic sign.
answerASource: No overtaking for 3 km
answerBSource: Start of a no-overtaking area 3 km ahead
answerCSource: Roadway with two lanes in one direction for 3 km
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretleri neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Sollama yasağı bu işaretten itibaren 3 km boyunca geçerlidir.
answerBTarget: 3 km ileride sollama yasağı bölgesi başlangıcı
answerCTarget: 3 km boyunca aynı yönde iki şeritli yol

questionTextSource: What do these traffic signs indicate?
explanationSource: With this traffic sign the car driver is prohibited to overtake multi-lane vehicles and motorcycles with side car. The additional sign prohibits overtaking in 200 meters. Since it contains no black arrows, it does not mean that you are not allowed to overtake in the next 200 meters.
answerASource: Start of a no-overtaking area 200 m ahead
answerBSource: No overtaking for 200 m
answerCSource: End of a no-overtaking area 200 m ahead
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretleri neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Sollama yasağı 200 m ileride başlayacaktır. Bu, önümüzdeki 200 m boyunca hemen sollama yasağı olduğu anlamına gelmez.
answerATarget: 200 m ileride sollama yasağı bölgesi başlangıcı
answerCTarget: 200 m ileride sollama yasağı bölgesi sonu

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates the end of the speed limit of 60 km/h. The car driver may drive at the usual speed again.
answerASource: End of speed restriction
answerBSource: A prohibition to drive faster than 60 km/h
answerCSource: Start of speed restriction
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret 60 km/saat hız sınırının sonunu gösterir.

questionTextSource: Which prohibitions cease to apply when you see this sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign cancels all road restrictions. For example, road restrictions include restrictions on overtaking and speed limits. Stopping restrictions such as a parking ban are not covered by road restrictions.
answerASource: No overtaking
answerBSource: Speed restrictions
answerCSource: No parking
questionTextTarget: Bu işareti gördüğünüzde hangi yasaklar sona erer?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret bütün güzergâh yasaklarını kaldırır; örneğin sollama yasağı ve hız sınırları. Park yasağı buna dahil değildir.

questionTextSource: What do these traffic signs indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign signals the car driver that it is forbidden to come to a stop on the road. The additional sign extends the stopping restriction and also prohibits stopping on the side strip for all vehicles, not just for trucks.
answerASource: - on the roadway and the hard shoulder
answerBSource: - on the hard shoulder only
answerCSource: - for trucks only
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretleri neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Durma yasağı hem taşıt yolunda hem de bankette geçerlidir ve tüm araçlar için geçerlidir.

questionTextSource: What is allowed in the zone which starts here?
explanationSource: With the traffic sign "No parking. Waiting is allowed.", there is a restricted stopping ban in an entire area without stopping signs being placed here in certain streets. As a car driver, you are allowed to wait up to three minutes throughout the entire zone. Situations of loading and unloading or getting in and out of the car may also take longer.
answerASource: Stopping for up to 3 minutes
answerBSource: Stopping for loading or unloading as well as boarding or alighting
answerCSource: Parking, provided a parking disc is used
questionTextTarget: Burada başlayan bölgede neye izin verilir?
explanationTarget: Kısıtlı durma yasağı bölgesinde üç dakikaya kadar durabilir, ayrıca yükleme-boşaltma ve yolcu indirme-bindirme için durabilirsiniz. Park etmek, park diskiyle bile serbest değildir.
answerBTarget: Yükleme veya boşaltma ile yolcu indirme-bindirme için durmak

questionTextSource: What ends here?
explanationSource: Here the no parking zone ends. Note that this traffic sign is often only on placed on the left side of the road and does not suspend the stopping restriction.
answerASource: A no-waiting area
answerBSource: A no-stopping area
answerCSource: All previous zonal prohibitions
questionTextTarget: Burada ne sona erer?
explanationTarget: Burada kısıtlı durma yasağı bölgesi sona erer. Tüm bölgesel yasakların veya mutlak durma yasağı bölgesinin sonu değildir.

questionTextSource: When must you indicate?
explanationSource: If you enter the roundabout, you do not need to indicate this because the entrance to the circle is always to the right. On the other hand, if you leave the roundabout, you will need to indicate this to make it easier for other drivers to enter the circle.
answerASource: When you leave the roundabout
answerBSource: When you enter the roundabout
questionTextTarget: Ne zaman sinyal vermelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Döner kavşağa girerken sinyal verilmez. Döner kavşaktan çıkarken sinyal vermelisiniz.

questionTextSource: You are approaching this combination of traffic signs. What must you remember?
explanationSource: Vehicles driving in the roundabout have right of way. Indicating when entering the roundabout is not necessary, as a roundabout is always entered from the right. Therefore, the answer "Entering the roundabout must be indicated" is wrong. You only indicate when you leave a roundabout. This makes sense because this makes it easier for vehicles to enter the roundabout.
answerASource: Vehicles in the roundabout have priority
answerBSource: You must indicate to leave the roundabout
answerCSource: You must indicate when entering the roundabout
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti kombinasyonuna yaklaşıyorsunuz. Neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Döner kavşaktaki araçlar önceliklidir. Döner kavşaktan çıkarken sinyal vermelisiniz; girerken sinyal verilmez.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign mean?
explanationSource: You have to give priority to the vehicles driving in the roundabout. In the roundabout there is always an absolute stopping restriction. You only indicate when you leave a roundabout. This helps other cars to enter the roundabout. A general driving with walking speed in the roundabout is not required.
answerASource: Stopping on the roundabout is forbidden
answerBSource: You must indicate when entering the roundabout
answerCSource: You are only allowed to drive at walking speed
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Döner kavşakta durmak yasaktır, ancak trafik gerektirirse durulabilir. Girerken sinyal verilmez ve yürüme hızı zorunlu değildir.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign mean?
explanationSource: The traffic signs indicate that the drivers in the roundabout have priority. They also show that you do not need to indicate when entering the roundabout, as motorists can only enter the circle to the right. As soon as you leave the roundabout, you will need to indicate that to make it easier for other road users to enter the roundabout.
answerASource: You must give way to vehicles in the roundabout
answerBSource: You must indicate when leaving the roundabout
answerCSource: You must indicate when entering the roundabout
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Döner kavşaktaki araçlara yol vermelisiniz. Döner kavşaktan çıkarken sinyal vermelisiniz; girerken sinyal verilmez.

questionTextSource: What must you do when you see this combination of traffic signs?
explanationSource: When driving in, you must give priority to the vehicles in that are already in the roundabout. The circle may only be entered through the right. You only indicate when leaving the roundabout. This regulation makes it easier for drivers to enter the roundabout. When recognizing the turn signal, they can decide whether they can already enter the circle with due regard for due diligence.
answerASource: You must indicate right to leave the roundabout
answerBSource: When entering the roundabout, you must give way
answerCSource: You must enter to the left
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti kombinasyonunu gördüğünüzde ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Döner kavşağa girerken yol vermelisiniz. Kavşağa sağdan girilir; çıkarken sağa sinyal verirsiniz.
answerATarget: Döner kavşaktan çıkmak için sağa sinyal vermelisiniz

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign identifies a cycle path that cyclists must use but is prohibited for other road users. Cyclists crossing the road have their own warning sign.
answerASource: A mandatory cycle path
answerBSource: A "cyclists prohibited" zone
answerCSource: Cyclists crossing the carriageway
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret zorunlu bisiklet yolunu gösterir. Bisikletliler bu yolu kullanmalıdır; yol geçen bisikletliler için uyarı değildir.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign combination indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign announces that after a hundred meters you will find a priority road where you will find the traffic sign "Give way". In any case, you must stop there at the stop line or line of sight.
answerASource: - "Stop. Give way."
answerBSource: - "Give way."
answerCSource: - "Give way to oncoming traffic"
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti kombinasyonu neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: 100 m ileride 'Dur. Yol ver.' işaretinin bulunduğunu bildirir. Orada durmak zorundasınız.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "Footway" marks paths which may be used exclusively by pedestrians and cyclists up to 10 years. Car drivers, cyclists and other road users may not be traveling on these routes. However, exceptions may be regulated by additional signs.
answerASource: A footpath
answerBSource: A prohibition on cycles and mopeds
answerCSource: The start of a traffic-calming zone
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret yaya yolunu gösterir. Araçlar, bisikletler ve mopedler normalde kullanamaz; istisnalar ek levhalarla düzenlenir.

questionTextSource: What vehicles are permitted to use this road?
explanationSource: The traffic sign "No vehicles of any kind permitted" includes all vehicles. Only motor bicycles such as motorcycles and scooters and bicycles may be pushed here.
answerASource: Cycles and motorcycles that are pushed
answerBSource: Motor vehicles
answerCSource: Electric-powered vehicles
questionTextTarget: Bu yolu hangi araçlar kullanabilir?
explanationTarget: Araçlara genel yasak vardır. Bisikletler ve motosikletler yalnızca itilerek götürülebilir.

questionTextSource: How must you act when driving a vehicle during permitted delivery times?
explanationSource: Since the traffic sign "Footway" is combined here with the additional sign "Delivery vehicles only", a distributor may drive on a road that is marked this way. You have to drive at walking speed, regardless of whether pedestrians are visible or not. Pedestrians have priority, you should be especially considerate of them.
answerASource: I may only drive at walking speed
answerBSource: I must keep a close look out for pedestrians
answerCSource: If there are no pedestrians in my vicinity, I may drive faster than walking speed
questionTextTarget: İzin verilen teslimat saatlerinde araç kullanırken nasıl davranmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Teslimat aracı olarak yaya yolunda sadece yürüme hızında gidebilir ve yayalara özellikle dikkat etmelisiniz. Yakında yaya olmasa bile daha hızlı gidemezsiniz.
answerCTarget: Yakınımda yaya yoksa yürüme hızından hızlı gidebilirim

questionTextSource: What must you do upon seeing this traffic sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates the prohibition to turn in order to drive in the opposite direction. Turning left, however, is allowed. This traffic sign does not only apply to dead ends.
answerASource: I may not perform a U-turn here
answerBSource: I am in a cul-de-sac and have to turn around
answerCSource: I may not turn left here
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretini gördüğünüzde ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Burada U dönüşü yapmak yasaktır. Sola dönmek yasak değildir ve bu işaret yalnızca çıkmaz sokakla ilgili değildir.

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: Starting from these traffic signs a maximum of 60 km/h may be driven, regardless of the weather conditions. In bad weather conditions, the speed must be reduced further. However, the traffic sign does not say that 60 km/h must always be driven in order to stay safe. There is no traffic sign for a recommended minimum speed.
answerASource: I may not drive faster than 60 km/h
answerBSource: There is absolutely no problem in driving at 60 km/h
answerCSource: The recommended minimum speed is 60 km/h
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işareti neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: Bu işaretten itibaren azami hız 60 km/saat olur. Hava kötü ise daha da yavaş sürmelisiniz; 60 km/saat her zaman güvenli demek değildir.
answerBTarget: 60 km/saat hızla gitmekte kesinlikle sorun yoktur

questionTextSource: What does this traffic sign indicate?
explanationSource: This traffic sign means "You must go straight ahead". You can only drive straight ahead and are not allowed to turn. The one-way street sign has the same colors but is rectangular.
answerASource: I may only drive straight ahead

If there is no stop line, you must stop at the line of sight and your wheels have to stop completely. You always have to stop, even if there is no cross traffic.

questionTextSource: What is allowed on priority roads outside built-up areas?

Parking vehicles constitute a hindrance and/or danger to flowing traffic, since vehicles are traveling much faster here than within the closed local area. Since a hard shoulder is not considered a lane, you may use it for parking. If there is a possibility to dodge on a hard shoulder, you should also use this for waiting shortly.

answerBSource: Parking on the hard shoulder
answerCSource: Parking on the roadway
