questionTextTarget: Yanlış yerleştirilmiş yük motosikletin sürüş dengesini nasıl etkiler?
explanationTarget: Arka tarafa ağır yük yüksek hızda yalpalamaya neden olabilir. Tek tarafa yükleme sürüş davranışını olumsuz etkiler. Depo çantasındaki hafif bagaj kaymayı artırmaz.
answerATarget: Arkaya yerleştirilen ağır yük yüksek hızlarda motosikletin yalpalamasına neden olur
answerBTarget: Sadece bir tarafa yerleştirilen yük sürüş davranışını olumsuz etkiler
answerCTarget: Depo çantasındaki hafif bagaj kayma ihtimalini artırır

questionTextSource: What might be needed when a motorcycle is fully loaded?
explanationSource: If the motorbike is fully loaded, the load exerts more pressure on the tyres. You should therefore check the tyre inflation pressure. The weight of the load could push the chassis down further and must therefore be readjusted. If the load extends beyond the motorbike, you should also readjust the rear view mirrors.
answerASource: An adjustment of the tyre inflation pressure
answerBSource: An adjustment of the chassis
answerCSource: An adjustment of the rear-view mirrors
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet tamamen yüklüyken ne gerekebilir?
explanationTarget: Tam yükte lastik basıncı, şasi ayarı ve arka görüş aynaları ayarlanabilir.

questionTextSource: Carrying a rucksack while cycling can affect the handling of your two-wheeler. What can the consequences be?
explanationSource: By carrying a backpack, you offer a larger surface for crosswinds to attack. Carrying a backpack also shifts your center of gravity upwards. This means you can't steer as quickly.
answerASource: A greater susceptibility to side wind
answerBSource: A displacement of the centre of gravity
answerCSource: An improvement in the manoeuvrability
questionTextTarget: Bisiklet sürerken sırt çantası taşımak iki tekerlekli aracınızın sürüşünü etkileyebilir. Sonuçları ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sırt çantası yan rüzgâra duyarlılığı artırabilir ve ağırlık merkezini değiştirebilir. Manevra kabiliyetini iyileştirmez.

questionTextSource: What do white plates with a black "A" on a truck mean?
explanationSource: A truck with white plates marked with a black "A" transports litter. The white plates with a black "A" must be clearly visible both at the front and at the back of the truck.
answerASource: - is transporting waste materials
answerBSource: - is transporting dangerous goods
answerCSource: - is driven by a beginner
questionTextTarget: Kamyondaki siyah “A” harfli beyaz levhalar ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Siyah A harfli beyaz levha, kamyonun atık madde taşıdığını gösterir. Tehlikeli madde veya acemi sürücü anlamına gelmez.

questionTextSource: What must you bear in mind if you want to carry luggage on the roof of your car?
explanationSource: Luggage on the roof changes the center of gravity of your vehicle upwards. This has a significant influence on the driving characteristics of the car. The driving characteristics are worse, especially in curves. The vehicle is wind-prone. It must be ensured that the permissible roof load and total mass are not exceeded.
answerASource: The roadhandling characteristics are adversely affected
answerBSource: The permissible total mass must not be exceeded
answerCSource: The maximum roof load stipulated by the car manufacturer (owner's manual) must not be exceeded
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın tavanında bagaj taşımak istiyorsanız neyi dikkate almalısınız?
explanationTarget: Tavan yükü sürüş davranışını olumsuz etkiler. İzin verilen toplam ağırlık ve üreticinin kullanım kılavuzunda belirtilen azami tavan yükü aşılmamalıdır.
answerCTarget: Araç üreticisinin belirttiği azami tavan yükü aşılmamalıdır

questionTextSource: What must you reckon with when transporting luggage on the roof of your car?
explanationSource: The luggage on the roof changes the center of gravity of the vehicle - it is raised. This increases the danger of tipping over and the aerodynamic drag increases. As a result, your vehicle is more sensitive to crosswind and air pressure when a wheel or truck overtakes you. In curves the driving stability also deteriorates due to the higher center of gravity. Your vehicle will tilt more.
answerASource: The vehicle inclines more on bends
answerBSource: The vehicle's susceptibility to side wind is greater
answerCSource: The vehicle's roadhandling is improved on account of the higher centre of gravity
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın tavanında bagaj taşırken neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Tavan yükü ağırlık merkezini yükseltir; araç virajlarda daha fazla yana yatar ve yan rüzgâra daha duyarlı olur. Sürüş davranışı iyileşmez.
answerATarget: Araç virajlarda daha fazla yana yatar
answerBTarget: Araç yan rüzgâra daha duyarlı olur
answerCTarget: Yüksek ağırlık merkezi nedeniyle aracın sürüş davranışı iyileşir

questionTextSource: What must you do when transporting bicycles on the roof of your car?
explanationSource: Bicycles on the roof require special attention: think of safety regulations and careful attachment. Check the fastenings regularly during driving breaks. Loads on the roof change the center of gravity of the vehicle, they lift it. The driving quality deteriorates especially in curves. Avoid high speeds.
answerASource: Safely attach holding device and bicycles
answerBSource: Avoid driving at high speed
answerCSource: Regularly check the fixing devices
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın tavanında bisiklet taşırken ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Taşıyıcı sistemi ve bisikletleri güvenli şekilde sabitlemeli, yüksek hızdan kaçınmalı ve sabitlemeleri düzenli olarak kontrol etmelisiniz.
answerATarget: Taşıma tertibatını ve bisikletleri güvenli şekilde sabitlemek

questionTextSource: What must you check when transporting bicycles on a rear-mounted support system?
explanationSource: Check if the rear carry system is securely fastened. Likewise, the attachment of bicycles is to be checked. If illuminating devices or the license plate is obscured, technical equipment must be installed at the end of the vehicle system for adequate lighting and/or to attach the license plate number. Back-heavy loading changes the center of gravity of the vehicle. Check the distribution of the load.
answerASource: Whether, according to the manufacturer's instructions, the system is adequate for the vehicle
answerBSource: Whether system and bicycles are fixed safely
answerCSource: Whether lighting equipment or number plate are covered
questionTextTarget: Arka taşıyıcı sistemde bisiklet taşırken neyi kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Sistemin üretici talimatlarına göre araca uygun olup olmadığını, sistem ve bisikletlerin güvenli sabitlenip sabitlenmediğini, aydınlatma veya plakanın kapatılıp kapatılmadığını kontrol etmelisiniz.
answerATarget: Sistemin üretici talimatlarına göre araca uygun olup olmadığını
answerBTarget: Sistem ve bisikletlerin güvenli şekilde sabitlenip sabitlenmediğini
answerCTarget: Aydınlatma sistemi veya plakanın kapatılıp kapatılmadığını

questionTextSource: How must a load be marked in darkness or bad visibility when it extends laterally more than 40 cm beyond the side lights of the vehicle?
explanationSource: In the dark or in poor visibility conditions, a cargo that laterally protrudes more than 40 cm beyond the marker lights of the vehicle must be marked with additional lights. These are to be attached laterally no more than 40 cm from the edge and no more than 1.5 m above the roadway. For the front, a white lamp is required, for the back you need to install a red light. The hazard lights must not be switched on by you as a car driver while driving.
answerASource: By a white light to the front
answerBSource: By a red light to the back
answerCSource: By switching on the hazard warning lights
questionTextTarget: Yük aracın yan lambalarından 40 cm’den fazla yana taşıyorsa, karanlıkta veya kötü görüşte nasıl işaretlenmelidir?
explanationTarget: Yana taşan yük, öne doğru beyaz ışık ve arkaya doğru kırmızı ışıkla işaretlenmelidir. Dörtlü ikaz ışıkları bunun yerine geçmez.

questionTextSource: What is the maximum height allowed above the roadway for a red light marking a load extending to the back?
explanationSource: The maximum height for attaching the lamp is 1.5 meters. This is to ensure that the marking is in the field of vision of other road users. If the red light is higher above the road, it could be overlooked.
questionTextTarget: Arkaya taşan yükü işaretleyen kırmızı ışığın yol yüzeyinden izin verilen azami yüksekliği nedir?
explanationTarget: Arkaya taşan yükü işaretleyen kırmızı ışık yol yüzeyinden en fazla 1,50 m yüksekte olmalıdır.

questionTextSource: Under what conditions is a load allowed to project over the front of a vehicle?
explanationSource: If the cargo is fastened above a height of 2.50 m, it may protrude up to 50 cm from the front of the vehicle. This regulation is intended to reduce the danger and risk of injury from rear-end collisions with cargo. In general, cargo should always be carefully secured so that it can neither slip nor fall.
answerASource: If the load does not project over more than 50 cm and is above a height of 2.50 m
answerBSource: If the load is marked with a red light
questionTextTarget: Yük hangi şartlarda aracın önünden dışarı taşabilir?
explanationTarget: Yük, 2,50 m’den daha yüksek bir noktada ise ve 50 cm’den fazla dışarı taşmıyorsa öne doğru taşabilir.
answerATarget: Yük 50 cm’den fazla taşmıyorsa ve 2,50 m’den daha yüksekteyse

questionTextSource: During a break you find out that one of the lashing straps has torn. What do you do?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you must ensure that your cargo is properly secured throughout the journey. With a defective strap, you may only continue your journey if proper securing of the cargo is ensured by other securing devices. If this is not the case, you must not continue your journey.
answerASource: Continue your trip after the lashing strap has been replaced
answerBSource: Continue your trip when the load is secured by other sufficient securing means
answerCSource: Continue your trip because a slipping load will be caught by the side panels
questionTextTarget: Mola sırasında gerdirme kayışlarından birinin koptuğunu fark ediyorsunuz. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Yolculuğa ancak kayış değiştirildikten veya yük başka yeterli güvence araçlarıyla sabitlendikten sonra devam edebilirsiniz. Yan panellerin yükü tutacağına güvenemezsiniz.
answerATarget: Gerdirme kayışı değiştirildikten sonra devam ederim
answerBTarget: Yük başka yeterli güvence araçlarıyla sabitlenmişse devam ederim
answerCTarget: Yük kayarsa yan paneller tutacağı için devam ederim

questionTextSource: Do the requirements for properly securing of loads apply to all small transporters?
explanationSource: Without exception, the requirements for proper securing of the load apply to all vans. Back-heavy loading shifts the center of gravity of the vehicle to the back. As a result, the front wheel is no longer sufficiently burdened and the grip deteriorates. This promotes dangerous pendular movements.
answerASource: They apply to all small transporters
answerBSource: They only apply to small transporters with open loading space
answerCSource: They only apply to small transporters without separation wall to the loading space
questionTextTarget: Yüklerin usulüne uygun güvenceye alınması şartları tüm küçük taşıyıcılar için geçerli midir?
explanationTarget: Yük güvenliği kuralları tüm küçük taşıyıcılar için geçerlidir. Sadece açık yük alanlı veya ayırma duvarı olmayan araçlarla sınırlı değildir.
answerBTarget: Sadece açık yük alanlı küçük taşıyıcılar için geçerlidir
answerCTarget: Sadece yük alanına ayırma duvarı olmayan küçük taşıyıcılar için geçerlidir

questionTextSource: You want to drive a truck with a gross vehicle weight rating of 5.0 t and bearing an orange warning sign. What conditions must you fulfil?

questionTextSource: What can help with friction-locked load securing?
explanationSource:
In force-locking load securing, the transported goods are pressed onto the loading surface by means of lashing. This type of lashing is also known as tie-down lashing.
The load usually stands freely on the loading surface and is only secured by the increased force applied. In most cases, the frictional force between the loading surface and the load is increased.
The load is secured with the aid of load securing equipment such as lashing straps, lashing chains, anti-slip mats or cover nets and with the aid of attachment points on the loading surface.
This prevents the load from slipping.
answerASource: Lashing straps
answerBSource: Anti-slip mats
answerCSource: Lashing chains
questionTextTarget: Sürtünmeye dayalı yük güvencelemeye ne yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sürtünmeye dayalı güvenceleme için gerdirme kayışları, kaymaz matlar ve bağlama zincirleri kullanılabilir.

questionTextSource: What should be taken into consideration when selecting load-securing lashing equipment?
explanationSource:
Among other things, the face and shape of the load are decisive for the selection of suitable and necessary lashing equipment. 
Equally important are the requirements of the vehicle, such as the permissible payload and the attachment points.
answerASource: The shape of the load
answerBSource: The weight of the load
answerCSource: The available lashing points
questionTextTarget: Yük güvence bağlama ekipmanı seçerken ne dikkate alınmalıdır?

questionTextSource: You want to secure your load by lashing it down. What should you bear in mind?
explanationSource: When lashing down, the load is pressed onto the loading area using lashing devices to increase the friction force and prevent slipping. It is important to check the tension of the lashing devices, as the necessary contact force and thus the required friction can only be achieved with sufficient tension. In addition, this method is only suitable for dimensionally stable loads; flexible goods can deform under the tension, which means that the pre-tensioning force is lost and load securing is no longer guaranteed.
answerASource: - regularly check the tension of the lashing equipment
answerBSource: - only secure dimensionally stable loads by lashing them down
answerCSource: - choose the smallest possible lashing angle
questionTextTarget: Yükünüzü aşağı bastırarak bağlamak istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?

answerCTarget: - mümkün olan en küçük bağlama açısını seçmek

answerASource: The truck is loaded and the trailer is empty

questionTextTarget: Sürüş güvenliği açısından hangisi daha iyidir?
explanationTarget: Kamyonun yüklü ve römorkun boş olması sürüş güvenliği açısından daha iyidir. Ağırlığın çekici araçta olması stabiliteyi artırır.

questionTextSource: What must you remember when you wish to transport animals on a trailer?
explanationSource: You have to make sure that the maximum authorized mass of the trailer is not exceeded and subject to special rules for the transport of animals in an animal transportation.
answerASource: The special regulations for the transport of animals
answerBSource: The total permissible mass of the trailer must not be exceeded
answerCSource: Animals may only be transported on trailers with air-brakes
questionTextTarget: Römorkta hayvan taşımak istiyorsanız neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Hayvan taşımacılığına ilişkin özel kurallara uymalı ve römorkun izin verilen toplam ağırlığını aşmamalısınız. Hayvanlar sadece havalı frenli römorklarda taşınabilir denemez.
answerBTarget: Römorkun izin verilen toplam ağırlığı aşılmamalıdır
answerCTarget: Hayvanlar yalnızca havalı frenli römorklarda taşınabilir

questionTextSource: When must attached working equipment be marked with red-white warning plates?
explanationSource: A red and white warning board is then to mount when it protrudes rearward more than 1 m on the rear lamps of the tractor if it has traffic hazardous parts and also when it laterally by more than 40 cm beyond the boundary or rear lamps of the tractor protrudes. All three are correct.
answerASource: When it has parts presenting a danger to traffic
answerBSource: When extending laterally more than 40 cm beyond the side lights or rear lights of the tractor
answerCSource: When extending more than 1 m to the back beyond the rear lights of the tractor
questionTextTarget: Takılı çalışma ekipmanları ne zaman kırmızı-beyaz uyarı levhalarıyla işaretlenmelidir?
explanationTarget: Trafik için tehlikeli parçaları varsa, traktörün yan/arka ışıklarından yana 40 cm’den fazla taşıyorsa veya arka ışıklardan 1 m’den fazla geriye taşıyorsa işaretlenmelidir.
answerATarget: Trafik için tehlike oluşturan parçaları varsa
answerBTarget: Traktörün yan veya arka ışıklarından yana 40 cm’den fazla taşıyorsa
answerCTarget: Traktörün arka ışıklarından 1 m’den fazla geriye taşıyorsa

questionTextSource: What duties do you have when driving a loaded vehicle?
explanationSource: If you lead a loaded vehicle, you are responsible for ensuring that the safety of the vehicle is not affected by the charge and you have to adjust your speed to the load conditions.
answerASource: I am responsible for ensuring that the load does not impair the road safety of the vehicle
answerBSource: I must adjust my speed to the nature of the load
answerCSource: With loads at risking of tipping, I have to arrange for someone to accompany the load on the loading area to ensure it is secure
questionTextTarget: Yüklü bir araç kullanırken hangi görevleriniz vardır?
explanationTarget: Yükün aracın yol güvenliğini bozmadığından sorumlusunuz ve hızınızı yükün özelliklerine göre ayarlamalısınız. Devrilme riski olan yüklerde yük alanına refakatçi koymak doğru değildir.
answerATarget: Yükün aracın yol güvenliğini bozmadığından sorumluyum
answerCTarget: Devrilme riski olan yüklerde yük alanında bir kişinin yükü gözetmesini sağlamalıyım

questionTextSource: What happens if you do not wear snug-fitting clothing?
explanationSource: Clothes that are not loose and not snug-fitting will be flapping at high speed which reduces your stability. They could also reduce your rear-view vision. They, however, will not have any impact on air resistance.
answerASource: At high speed, flapping clothing affects road safety
answerBSource: Blown up clothing reduces your vision in the rear-view mirror
answerCSource: Blown up clothing reduces air resistance
questionTextTarget: Vücuda oturan kıyafet giymezseniz ne olur?
explanationTarget: Yüksek hızda bol kıyafetler dalgalanarak yol güvenliğini etkiler ve aynadan görüşünüzü azaltabilir. Hava direncini azaltmaz.
answerATarget: Yüksek hızda dalgalanan kıyafet yol güvenliğini etkiler
answerBTarget: Şişen kıyafet dikiz aynasındaki görüşünüzü azaltır

questionTextSource: What must you do before setting off on a journey?
explanationSource: All three are correct. Make sure that everything is fixed well on your motorcycle. Make sure that you wear adequate clothing, check your helmet visor. And finally, ensure the safety of the road and motorcycle.
answerASource: Check road safety and operational safety of the motorcycle
answerBSource: Check helmet visor and snug-fitting clothing
answerCSource: Check if panniers and top case are fixed correctly
questionTextTarget: Yola çıkmadan önce ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Motosikletin yol ve işletme güvenliğini, kask vizörünü, vücuda oturan kıyafeti ve çantaların/topcase’in doğru sabitlendiğini kontrol etmelisiniz.
answerATarget: Motosikletin yol güvenliğini ve işletme güvenliğini kontrol etmek
answerBTarget: Kask vizörünü ve vücuda oturan kıyafeti kontrol etmek
answerCTarget: Yan çantaların ve topcase’in doğru sabitlendiğini kontrol etmek

questionTextSource: Why are motorcyclists required to wear an appropriate protective helmet?
explanationSource: A helmet is required to protect your head against injuries and potential death
answerASource: To avoid head injuries as much as possible
answerBSource: So it is easier to listen to the radio
answerCSource: To reduce air resistance at higher speed
questionTextTarget: Motosikletlilerin uygun koruyucu kask takması neden zorunludur?
explanationTarget: Koruyucu kask baş yaralanmalarını mümkün olduğunca önlemek için zorunludur. Radyo dinlemek veya hava direncini azaltmak için değildir.
answerATarget: Baş yaralanmalarını mümkün olduğunca önlemek için
answerCTarget: Yüksek hızda hava direncini azaltmak için

questionTextSource: Which items are part of a motorcyclists safety equipment?
explanationSource: An appropriate jacket, trousers and boots are part of the safety equipment that can protect you in case of accidents and injuries. Gym shoes are not protective equipment
answerASource: Appropriate jacket
answerBSource: Appropriate trousers
answerCSource: Gym shoes
questionTextTarget: Motosikletçinin güvenlik ekipmanına hangi parçalar dahildir?
explanationTarget: Uygun ceket ve uygun pantolon güvenlik ekipmanının parçasıdır. Spor ayakkabı uygun koruyucu ekipman değildir.

questionTextSource: Why should you wear appropriate boots when riding a motorcycle?
explanationSource: Boots do not reduce air resistance. Appropriate boots are a protective that will protect you from injury and undercooling
answerASource: You could suffer considerable foot injuries even if a motorbike just topples over whilst standing
answerBSource: Undercooling due to weather factors can damage your health
answerCSource: Because air resistance is reduced
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürerken neden uygun bot giymelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Uygun botlar, motosiklet dururken devrilse bile ciddi ayak yaralanmalarını önlemeye yardımcı olur ve hava koşullarına bağlı üşümeye karşı korur. Hava direncini azaltmaz.
answerATarget: Motosiklet dururken devrilse bile ciddi ayak yaralanmaları yaşayabilirsiniz
answerBTarget: Hava koşullarına bağlı üşüme sağlığınıza zarar verebilir

questionTextSource: Which motorcycle clothing increases optical perceptibility?
explanationSource: To increase your visibility, wear bright and light colours. Dark colours are less visible, especially at night.
answerASource: Clothing in bright colours
answerBSource: Clothing in light colours
answerCSource: Clothing in dark colours
questionTextTarget: Hangi motosiklet kıyafeti optik olarak fark edilmeyi artırır?
explanationTarget: Parlak ve açık renkli kıyafetler görünürlüğü artırır. Koyu renkli kıyafetler daha zor fark edilir.

questionTextSource: Why should you regularly apply the brakes with force at standstill?
explanationSource: When standing still, use your brakes to ensure that the system works correctly (both the braking transmission, connection and the breaks themselves)
answerASource: - whether the mechanical transmission and connection components are in functioning order
answerBSource: - whether a hydraulic braking system has no leaks
answerCSource: - the deceleration of the brakes is adequate
questionTextTarget: Dururken frenlere neden düzenli olarak kuvvetlice basmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Fren sisteminin mekanik aktarım ve bağlantı parçalarının çalışıp çalışmadığını, hidrolik sistemde kaçak olup olmadığını ve fren geciktirmesinin yeterli olup olmadığını kontrol edersiniz.
answerATarget: - mekanik aktarım ve bağlantı parçalarının çalışır durumda olup olmadığını
answerBTarget: - hidrolik fren sisteminde kaçak olup olmadığını
answerCTarget: - frenlerin yavaşlatma etkisinin yeterli olup olmadığını

questionTextSource: What are the effects of a badly scratched helmet visor?
explanationSource: A badly scratched helmet visor will diminish your vision and will make light more intensely seen with the risk of dazzling
answerASource: The wearer is dazzled more intensely than usual
answerBSource: Own vision is impaired
answerCSource: In daylight, there are no negative effects
questionTextTarget: Kötü çizilmiş kask vizörünün etkileri nelerdir?
explanationTarget: Çizilmiş vizör görüşü bozar ve ışığın daha fazla dağılmasına/kamaşmaya yol açar. Gündüz de olumsuz etkileri vardır.

questionTextSource: What is correct for checking the brake light?
explanationSource: Make sure that the brake light works for the hand brake and foot break separately.
answerASource: Apply hand brake and foot brake one after the other
answerBSource: Apply hand brake and foot brake at the same time
answerCSource: Apply the hand brake only
questionTextTarget: Fren lambasını kontrol etmek için hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Fren lambasını kontrol ederken el freni ve ayak freni ayrı ayrı uygulanmalıdır.
answerATarget: El freni ve ayak freni sırayla uygulanır
answerBTarget: El freni ve ayak freni aynı anda uygulanır

questionTextSource: Where are you allowed to store luggage on motorcycles?
explanationSource: You can store luggage in the tank-top bag, panniers (equally distributed on the right and left), luggage rack, handlebars.
answerASource: In panniers or on the luggage rack
answerBSource: In the tank-top bag
answerCSource: Evenly distributed on the right and left of the handlebars
questionTextTarget: Fren lambasını kontrol etmek için hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Fren lambası, el freni ve ayak freni ayrı ayrı uygulanarak kontrol edilmelidir.
answerATarget: El freni ve ayak freni sırayla uygulanır
answerBTarget: El freni ve ayak freni aynı anda uygulanır

questionTextSource: How must you protect yourself from serious head injuries?
explanationSource: An officially approved protective helmet is required to protect your head against injuries
answerASource: - an officially approved protective helmet
answerBSource: - a steel helmet
answerCSource: - a tested protective work helmet
questionTextTarget: Kötü çizilmiş kask vizörünün etkileri nelerdir?
explanationTarget: Kötü çizilmiş vizör kendi görüşünüzü bozar ve normalden daha fazla kamaşmaya neden olur. Gündüz de olumsuz etkileri olabilir.

questionTextSource: What applies to the installation and use of rear-view mirrors on motorcycles?
explanationSource: In order to be able to use your rearview mirror, you must ensure that they are well fixed, adjusted, and work (are not cracked, blind)
answerASource: They must be fixed and adjusted properly
answerBSource: They must neither be cracked nor blind
answerCSource: A mirror on the right replaces the look over your shoulder
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet kullanırken uygun botları neden giymelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Uygun botlar, motosiklet dururken devrilse bile ciddi ayak yaralanmalarına karşı korur ve hava şartlarına bağlı üşümeyi azaltır. Hava direncini azaltmaz.
answerATarget: Motosiklet dururken devrilse bile ciddi ayak yaralanmaları yaşayabilirsiniz
answerBTarget: Hava koşullarına bağlı üşüme sağlığınıza zarar verebilir

questionTextSource: What is required when the motor liability insurance of your vehicle has expired?
explanationSource: It is required to have an insurance for your vehicle, without one you are not allowed to drive it
answerASource: - may no longer be used in road traffic
answerBSource: - must be submitted to the technical test centre
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürücüsünün güvenlik ekipmanına hangi parçalar dahildir?
explanationTarget: Uygun ceket ve uygun pantolon güvenlik ekipmanıdır. Spor ayakkabı yeterli koruyucu ekipman değildir.

questionTextSource: What can prevent you from hearing warning signals?
explanationSource: Other sounds, such as a loud radio or a loud exhaust, can prevent car drivers from perceiving important warning signals. Also, the use of headphones usually limits the ability to hear. This often means that warning signals are ignored by drivers. Make sure that you can always hear warning signals.
answerASource: Having the radio on too loud
answerBSource: Using headphones
answerCSource: The exhaust being too loud
questionTextTarget: Motosikletliler neden uygun koruyucu kask takmak zorundadır?
explanationTarget: Uygun kask baş yaralanmalarını mümkün olduğunca önlemek içindir. Radyo dinlemeyi kolaylaştırmak veya hava direncini azaltmak için değildir.
answerATarget: Baş yaralanmalarını mümkün olduğunca önlemek için
answerCTarget: Yüksek hızda hava direncini azaltmak için

questionTextSource: You have sold your vehicle which is still registered. The buyer has paid. What must you do?
explanationSource: If you have sold your licensed vehicle and received the payment, proceed as follows: 1. You hand over all vehicle documents to the new vehicle owner in exchange for a confirmation of receipt. 2. You report the name and address of the vehicle buyer to the admission office. This way, you protect yourself from unjustified claims that could be caused by traffic violations on the part of the new owner. 3. The inspection plate remains on the vehicle.
answerASource: Inform the registration centre immediately of the buyer's name and address
answerBSource: Hand over the vehicle registration certificate (Fahrzeugschein) and vehicle registration book (Fahrzeugbrief) or permit for use (Betriebserlaubnis) to the buyer against receipt
answerCSource: Remove the test stamp from the official registration plate
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet kıyafetinde hangi renkler fark edilmeyi artırır?
explanationTarget: Parlak ve açık renkli kıyafetler görünürlüğü artırır. Koyu renkler daha zor fark edilir.

questionTextSource: What is important with regard to the official registration plates?
explanationSource: For license numbers, it is important that they are placed in the required place. In addition, they must be easy to read and illuminated in the dark.
answerASource: They must be securely attached at the appropriate places
answerBSource: They must always be easily legible
answerCSource: The rear registration plates must be lit up in darkness
questionTextTarget: Yola çıkmadan önce ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Motosikletin yol ve işletme güvenliğini, kask vizörünü ve kıyafetlerin vücuda oturmasını kontrol etmelisiniz. Çantaların doğru sabitlendiğini de kontrol edin.
answerATarget: Motosikletin yol güvenliğini ve işletme güvenliğini kontrol etmek
answerBTarget: Kask vizörünü ve vücuda oturan kıyafeti kontrol etmek
answerCTarget: Yan çantaların ve topcase’in doğru sabitlendiğini kontrol etmek

questionTextSource: What is required when your vehicle is no longer covered by motor liability insurance?
explanationSource: Without a valid liability insurance, a car is not ready to drive and therefore may not participate in public transport. The liability insurance serves to regulate damage that you may be able to inflict on other vehicles. Irrespective of the financial circumstances of the injuring party, compensation for the injured party is thus guaranteed. If there is no liability insurance, the holder must deregister the car at the admission office. Failure to comply with this rule will result in a penalty.
answerASource: - may no longer be used in road traffic
answerBSource: - must be de-registered at the registration centre
answerCSource: - must be submitted to the registration centre
questionTextTarget: Vücuda oturmayan kıyafet giyerseniz ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yüksek hızda dalgalanan kıyafet yol güvenliğini etkiler ve aynadaki görüşünüzü azaltabilir. Hava direncini azaltmaz.
answerATarget: Yüksek hızda dalgalanan kıyafet yol güvenliğini etkiler
answerBTarget: Şişen kıyafet dikiz aynasındaki görüşünüzü azaltır

questionTextSource: What are you allowed to change on the official registration plate?
explanationSource: A license number is an official document, which may not be altered in any way. Therefore, do not attach any foils or stickers to your license plate.
answerASource: Nothing
answerBSource: Attach a protective foil for the lettering
answerCSource: Attach coloured stickers
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürücüsünün koruyucu kıyafetine neler dahil olmalıdır?
explanationTarget: Vücuda oturan motosiklet ceketi ve sırt koruyucu uygun koruyucu kıyafetin parçalarıdır. Alçak ayakkabılar uygun değildir.

questionTextSource: As a cyclist, what must you check before commencing your journey?
explanationSource: Before starting your trip, make sure that your lights and tires are in good condition and work properly.
answerASource: Condition of tyres
answerBSource: Lighting
answerCSource: First-aid material
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet kullanırken hangi kıyafetler görünürlüğünüzü artırır?
explanationTarget: Görünürlüğü yüksek kıyafetler ve karanlıkta retroreflektif ayrıntılı kıyafetler diğer yol kullanıcılarının sizi daha iyi görmesini sağlar. Uzun farla sürmek doğru çözüm değildir.

questionTextSource: What do we mean by the term "blind spot"?
explanationSource: In blind spots you can not see other road users. Areas around the vehicle that can not be seen even with the vehicle mirrors, count as such. The other two answers are wrong.
answerASource: Areas around the vehicle not visible even with the vehicle's mirrors
answerBSource: Areas in inner cities not accessible to vehicles due to the restrictions on visibility
answerCSource: Areas of the roadway which cannot be driven over due to the wide turning circle of my vehicle
questionTextTarget: İki tekerlekli aracınızla hareket etmeden önce neyi kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Hareket etmeden önce ışıkların ve frenlerin düzgün çalıştığını kontrol etmelisiniz. Ateşleme zamanlaması sürücünün günlük kontrolü değildir.

questionTextSource: While you are driving a car you get a call on your mobile phone. What must you be aware of here, if you do not have a hands-free set?
explanationSource: You must keep the cellphone ringing. Taking or holding the phone is generally prohibited for motorists and can lead to high fines. If necessary, stop at the nearest convenient location. First turn off the engine. Only now you are allowed to take your phone into your hands.
answerASource: The journey must be interrupted in order to use the telephone
answerBSource: The engine must be switched off in order to use the telephone
answerCSource: A mobile phone may not be used for more than 15 seconds while driving
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürerken tam kapalı kask takmanın faydası nedir?
explanationTarget: Tam kapalı kask yaralanmalara karşı daha iyi koruma sağlar, böceklerden korur ve ıslanmayı azaltır.

questionTextSource: What can be the consequence of your passenger (pillion passenger) on the motorbike not wearing conspicuous clothing?
explanationSource: If your passenger does not wear highly visible clothes (conspicuous clothes), it will make you less visible for people driving behind you
answerASource: - more difficult to recognise for the following traffic
answerBSource: - more difficult to recognise for the traffic ahead
answerCSource: - more difficult to recognise for oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında uyarı sinyallerini kaçırmanıza ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Çok yüksek sesle müzik dinlemek ve telefon görüşmesi sırasında dikkatin dağılması uyarı sinyallerini kaçırmanıza neden olabilir. Düşük motor devri bu açıdan belirleyici değildir.

questionTextSource: Why can motorcycles be overseen despite having their dipped headlights switched on?
explanationSource: Motorcycles are easy to miss because they are small and even more so if they are fast and wear clothes that are hard to see
answerASource: Because they are narrower than cars
answerBSource: Because if highly accelerated, motorcycles can approach extremely quickly
answerCSource: Because the persons onboard sometimes drive wearing inconspicuous clothing
questionTextTarget: İki tekerlekli araçtaki dikiz aynasının düzgün çalışması nasıl sağlanır?
explanationTarget: Dikiz aynası doğru ayarlanmış ve hasarsız olmalıdır. Gerekli görüşü sağlamak için gidonun yanından dışarı taşabilir.

questionTextSource: What may be expected if you do not wear conspicuous protective motorcycle clothing when riding a motorbike?
explanationSource: If you do not wear highly visible clothes (conspicuous clothes), you will be less visible to other drivers, people on the road and will thus have a higher risk of accidents
answerASource: I am more difficult to see
answerBSource: I have an increased risk of having an accident
answerCSource: I may anticipate no negative effects
questionTextTarget: Baş yaralanmalarına karşı kendinizi korumak için ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Uygun ve iyi oturan motosiklet kaskı takmalısınız. Motosiklet şapkası veya iş güvenliği kaskı yeterli değildir.
answerCTarget: - resmi olarak kontrol edilmiş iş güvenliği kaskı

questionTextSource: Why is it extremely advisable to wear protective motorcycle clothing during the journey?
explanationSource: Protective motorcycle clothes will protect you against injuries in case of an accident. It does not reduce aquaplaning nor protect the motorcycle.
answerASource: Injuries may be reduced in the event of a fall
answerBSource: Aquaplaning can be prevented during rainy conditions
answerCSource: In the event of accidents, the motorbike will be protected from damage
questionTextTarget: Çizilmiş bir kask vizörünü neden değiştirmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Çizilmiş vizör görüşü kısıtlar ve kamaşmayı artırır. Bu nedenle değiştirilmelidir.
answerCTarget: - vizörün daha fazla buğulanmasına neden olur

questionTextSource: What statements apply to the term "blind spot"?
explanationSource: In the blind spot you can not see by means of mirrors. Especially for bikers, this is particularly dangerous. The navigability of the Tropic has nothing to do with it and is wrong.
answerASource: - is particularly dangerous for cyclists
answerBSource: - is not visible even with mirrors
answerCSource: - cannot be driven over due to the turning circle
questionTextTarget: Motosikletle giderken uygun koruyucu kıyafet giymezseniz neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Düşme halinde yaralanma riskiniz artar, hava koşullarına karşı daha az korunursunuz ve kaza durumunda sigorta ödemeleri azalabilir.
answerBTarget: Hava koşullarının etkilerine karşı daha az korunurum
answerCTarget: Kaza durumunda sigorta ödemelerimin azaltılmasını hesaba katmalıyım

questionTextSource: What lighting is permissible so that you can be seen as early as possible in road traffic during day-light?
explanationSource: During the day in order to be visible you are permitted to use dipped headlights and daytime running lights
answerASource: Dipped headlights
answerBSource: Daytime running lights
answerCSource: Parking light
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinize takılı navigasyon cihazı kullanmak istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Hedefi motosiklet dururken girmeli, mümkünse sürüş sırasında cihazı kullanmaktan kaçınmalı ve kulaklığa entegre sesli yönlendirmeyi kullanmalısınız.
answerBTarget: - mümkünse sürüş sırasında cihazı kullanmaktan kaçınmak
answerCTarget: - kulaklığa entegre sesli çıkış işlevini kullanmak

questionTextSource: You want to exit a parking space and drive onto the road. What must you watch out for in particular?
explanationSource: You should also check on the vehicle especially to children playing. To the possible swiveling out of your vehicle and on the flow of traffic. All three are correct.
answerASource: For children playing around the vehicle
answerBSource: For moving traffic
answerCSource: For my vehicle swinging out sharply
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürücüsü için uygun koruyucu kıyafete neler dahil olmalıdır?
explanationTarget: Vücuda oturan motosiklet ceketi ve sırt koruyucu uygun koruma sağlar. Alçak ayakkabılar yeterli koruma değildir.

questionTextSource: Why is it risky to ride without protective motorcycle clothing?
explanationSource: Wearing protective motorcycle clothing will decrease the risk of injury in case of accident and will also protect you against the weather. In case of an accident insurance cover will be reduce if you do not wear protective clothing
answerASource: - an increased risk of injury
answerBSource: - less protection from weather conditions
answerCSource: - less insurance cover available should a damage event occur
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet kullanırken neden uygun motosiklet botları giymelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Motosiklet dururken devrilse bile ciddi ayak yaralanmaları olabilir. Hava koşulları aracın kullanımını etkileyebilir ve kaza halinde sigorta talepleri azaltılabilir.

questionTextSource: Why should you wear protective motorcycle clothing with a high-visibility colouring?
explanationSource: Wearing highly visible colours will make you easier to see and will thus reduce the risk of accidents
answerASource: Because it means others can see me better
answerBSource: Because it reduces the risk of an accident
answerCSource: Because it means I can still drive home if my lights fail
questionTextTarget: Neden görünürlüğü yüksek renkte koruyucu motosiklet kıyafeti giymelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Görünürlüğü yüksek renkler diğer yol kullanıcılarının sizi daha iyi görmesini sağlar ve kaza riskini azaltır.

questionTextSource: When driving, what can cause you to miss warning signals?
explanationSource:
Noise that is too loud, such as listening to music that is too loud, can drown out the warning signal and cause you to react to it too late.
Distractions caused by talking on the phone can also mean that you hear warning signals too late or not at all.

answerCSource: Driving at a low engine speed

questionTextSource: What is the benefit of wearing an integral helmet when riding a motorcycle?
explanationSource: A full-face helmet offers more protection than other helmet models, as full-face helmets are completely closed. The chin forms a whole with the helmet and cannot be pushed up, which means you are well protected against injuries. The complete face protection keeps wind, rain and insects away from your eyes. Your eyes are protected against wind and weather by the visor and your vision is not restricted by the weather.

answerBSource: - insects
answerCSource: - becoming wet

questionTextSource: What criterion do motorbike boots have to fulfil?
explanationSource:
Pay attention to the exact fit, the boots should fit snugly and reach over your ankles without restricting your freedom of movement.
You should also make sure that the boots have non-slip soles, which provide good grip on the footrests.

questionTextSource: What criterion do motorbike gloves have to fulfil?
explanationSource:
The motorbike gloves should fit snugly but not be too tight. Your fingers should be slightly bent without the fabric stretching.
The gloves should give you a good grip so that you can operate the brake and clutch levers without any problems.
Choose motorbike gloves made of abrasion-resistant materials such as leather or special textiles in order to be better protected against abrasions and burns in the event of a fall or accident.

questionTextSource: What should be observed when positioning the head rests in your car?
explanationSource: With correctly adjusted headrests the car driver reduces the force on the cervical spine in case of sudden vehicle movements. This makes headrests a direct protection device for the protection of the vehicle occupants in accidents. The headrests that can be adjusted electrically or manually in height and inclination should be adjusted so that the crown height of the head coincides with the top edge of the headrest. In order for their protective function to be fully effective, you should tilt the headrest so that your back of the head is no more than a few centimeters away from it.

questionTextSource: You are planning a long journey with your motor vehicle. Before commencing the journey, what should you check on the vehicle to avoid endangering yourself and others?

You should check your tyres at regular intervals, because wear, damage or incorrectly adjusted air pressure as well as insufficient tread depth represent a major safety risk.
A minimum tread depth of 1.6 mm applies. 
The headlights should also be checked for defects and their correct setting. For example, headlights that are set too high can dazzle oncoming traffic. 
A clear view should be ensured on every journey. This includes not only ensuring that the windscreen is free of dirt, but also that there is still sufficient windscreen washer fluid.

questionTextSource: Your car is snowed in. What do you need to do before you start your journey?

Before you drive off, you must remove the snow from the entire vehicle as it could fall while driving and endanger other road users. In addition, the snow could slide onto your windshield when you brake, blocking your visibility and making you completely unable to act.  Also remove the snow from the lighting equipment so that other road users can see you in good time and you have adequate visibility even in dark lighting conditions. 
Also make sure that no snow covers your license plates. If the license plates are illegible, you risk an administrative offense and a fine.

questionTextSource: You have fitted your motorbike with a tank bag and side panniers. What must you ensure?

questionTextSource: You want to drive your agricultural tractor with attached accessory equipment. What must you be aware of before driving off?

questionTextTarget: Takılı ekipmanlı tarım traktörünüzü kullanmak istiyorsunuz. Hareket etmeden önce neye dikkat etmelisiniz?

questionTextSource: You are driving an agricultural tractor with a mounted implement. After finishing working in the field, you want to drive on to a public road. What must you check first?

questionTextTarget: Takılı ekipmanlı tarım traktörü kullanıyorsunuz. Tarladaki işi bitirdikten sonra kamu yoluna çıkmak istiyorsunuz. Önce neyi kontrol etmelisiniz?

questionTextSource: You are driving a tractor with an attachment. After working in a field, now you want to drive on a public road. What should you note first?

questionTextSource: You come to a stop unexpectedly on a pedestrian crossing. What do you do?

Drive forwards or backwards as far as the traffic conditions allow. Pay attention to other road users. Do not drive on the sidewalk. This is intended exclusively for pedestrians.

questionTextSource: How should you behave when you leave a construction site with your vehicle?
explanationSource: When leaving a construction site, it is important to clean the lighting equipment to ensure that you are clearly visible to other road users and that road safety is not compromised. Removing stones trapped between the twin tires prevents them from being thrown out while driving, causing damage to other vehicles or causing accidents. In addition, loaded bulk material must be adequately covered to prevent material from falling onto the road while driving and thus posing a danger to following traffic. These measures serve to protect all road users and help prevent pollution and hazards in road traffic.
answerASource: - clean the lighting equipment
answerBSource: - remove stones stuck between the twin tyres
answerCSource: - ensure that loaded bulk material is adequately covered

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action in this situation?
explanationSource: It can be seen that the accident scene has already been adequately secured. For this reason, you should not brake sharply as this is unnecessary in this situation. A strong deceleration would only increase the risk of further accidents (especially rear-end collisions), since subsequent motorists do not expect a braking maneuver. While driving, photographing the accident is prohibited.
answerASource: I continue driving as before
answerBSource: I brake hard immediately
answerCSource: I take a photograph of the scene of the accident
questionTextTarget: Bu durumda doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Kaza yeri zaten yeterince güvenceye alınmış görünüyor. Bu nedenle sert fren yapmamalı ve kaza yerinin fotoğrafını çekmemelisiniz. Sürüşe önceki gibi devam edebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: On the right lane there was an accident and you drive towards the still unsecured accident site. Since the situation is not completely clear to you, you must reduce your speed. Drive as far to the left as possible to keep enough distance to the right-hand vehicles.
answerASource: I reduce my speed
answerBSource: I continue driving as far to the left as possible
answerCSource: I continue driving as before
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Sağ şeritte kaza var ve henüz tamamen güvenceye alınmamış kaza yerine yaklaşıyorsunuz. Hızınızı azaltmalı ve mümkün olduğunca soldan gitmelisiniz.

answerCSource: I continue driving just as before
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Kaza durumunda güvenlik için hızınızı daha da azaltmalı ve mümkün olduğunca soldan gitmelisiniz. Aynı şekilde devam etmek doğru değildir.

questionTextTarget: Aracınız vahşi bir hayvanla çarpıştı. Burada doğru davranış nedir?

questionTextSource: Why should you always carry the European accident report form with you on your journey?
explanationSource: The European Accident Report should be carried at all times, because it makes it easier to record accidents with people involved in the accident who speak other languages, and it enables the accident to be recorded independently.

answerBSource: - enables the parties involved to independently document the accident
answerCSource: - unambiguously clarifies the issue of liability at the scene of the accident
questionTextTarget: Avrupa kaza raporu formunu yolculukta neden her zaman yanınızda taşımalısınız?

answerBTarget: - tarafların kazayı bağımsız olarak belgelemesini sağlar

questionTextSource: How does an eCall system work in the event of a serious accident?
explanationSource:
In the event of severe car accidents, for which, for example, airbags trigger, the ECALL system automatically sets a 112 emergency call. He transmits the accident clock time and the exact location.
Alternatively, vehicle occupants can also trigger an SOS signal manually-for example with a heart attack by the passenger.
answerASource: - the position of the motor vehicle
answerBSource: - the time of the accident
answerCSource: - the severity of the injuries of the persons in the motor vehicle
questionTextTarget: Ciddi bir kazada eCall sistemi nasıl çalışır?
explanationTarget: eCall sistemi ciddi kazalarda otomatik olarak 112 acil çağrısı başlatır ve aracın konumunu ve kaza zamanını iletir. Yaralanmaların ağırlığını güvenilir şekilde iletmez.

questionTextSource: In what situation is the eCall system designed to be triggered manually?
explanationSource: The emergency call system can also be triggered manually in the event of an urgent medical problem, e.g. with a heart attack of the moving, passing or as a helping, in a serious accident.
answerASource: If I am witness to a serious accident
answerBSource: If a passenger suffers a medical emergency
answerCSource: If my vehicle sustains a puncture
questionTextTarget: eCall sistemi hangi durumda manuel olarak tetiklenmek üzere tasarlanmıştır?
explanationTarget: Ciddi bir kazaya tanık olduğunuzda veya bir yolcu tıbbi acil durum geçirdiğinde eCall manuel olarak tetiklenebilir. Lastik patlaması bunun için uygun sebep değildir.
answerBTarget: Bir yolcu tıbbi acil durum geçirirse

questionTextSource: You have an accident on the autobahn with your truck. In which order do you proceed?
explanationSource: In an accident with your truck on a highway, you should immediately stop, secure traffic and make out about the accident and potential injuries to help.
answerASource: Stop immediately, ensure traffic safety, check the effects of the accident and help any injured persons
answerBSource: Stop immediately, find witnesses, ensure traffic safety and help injured persons
answerCSource: Stop, call the police, switch on your hazard warning lights and wait
questionTextTarget: Kamyonunuzla otoyolda kaza yaptınız. Hangi sırayla hareket etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Önce hemen durmalı, trafik güvenliğini sağlamalı, kazanın sonuçlarını kontrol etmeli ve yaralılara yardım etmelisiniz.
answerATarget: Hemen durmak, trafik güvenliğini sağlamak, kazanın etkilerini kontrol etmek ve yaralılara yardım etmek
answerBTarget: Hemen durmak, tanık aramak, trafik güvenliğini sağlamak ve yaralılara yardım etmek
answerCTarget: Durmak, polisi aramak, dörtlü ikaz ışıklarını yakmak ve beklemek

questionTextSource: While you are travelling on the autobahn, your passengers tell you there is smoke in the bus. What must you do?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: Stop immediately on the hard shoulder and secure the vehicle at a sufficient distance
answerBSource: Direct your passengers to a location at a safe distance away from the bus and autobahn
answerCSource: Drive on to the next petrol station to get help
questionTextTarget: Otoyolda giderken yolcularınız otobüste duman olduğunu söylüyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Hemen emniyet şeridinde durmalı, aracı yeterli mesafeden güvenceye almalı ve yolcuları otobüsten ve otoyoldan güvenli uzaklıktaki bir yere yönlendirmelisiniz. Bir sonraki benzin istasyonuna kadar devam etmemelisiniz.
answerATarget: Hemen emniyet şeridinde durmak ve aracı yeterli mesafeden güvenceye almak
answerBTarget: Yolcuları otobüsten ve otoyoldan güvenli uzaklıktaki bir yere yönlendirmek
answerCTarget: Yardım almak için bir sonraki benzin istasyonuna kadar devam etmek

questionTextSource: Your bus overturns in an accident and you cannot open the doors. What must you do?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: Tell the passengers to leave the bus through the emergency windows and emergency doors and to remain calm
answerBSource: Ask uninjured passengers to help bring injured and frail persons and children out of the bus safely
answerCSource: First wait for help
questionTextTarget: Otobüsünüz bir kazada devrildi ve kapıları açamıyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Yolculara acil çıkış pencereleri ve acil kapılardan çıkmalarını ve sakin kalmalarını söylemelisiniz. Yaralı, güçsüz kişiler ve çocukların güvenli çıkarılması için yaralanmamış yolculardan yardım istemelisiniz.
answerATarget: Yolculara otobüsü acil pencereler ve acil kapılardan terk etmelerini ve sakin kalmalarını söylemek
answerBTarget: Yaralanmamış yolculardan, yaralı ve güçsüz kişileri ve çocukları güvenli şekilde otobüsten çıkarmaya yardım etmelerini istemek

questionTextSource: You are involved in a pile-up accident on the autobahn in fog. Your bus is wedged in by other vehicles. What must you do?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: Take injured persons and passengers to a place at a safe distance from the bus and autobahn and give first aid
answerBSource: Once you have evacuated the passengers to safety, return to the scene of the accident
answerCSource: First, look for witnesses at the scene of the accident
questionTextTarget: Siste otoyolda zincirleme kazaya karıştınız. Otobüsünüz başka araçlar arasında sıkıştı. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Yaralıları ve yolcuları otobüsten ve otoyoldan güvenli uzaklıktaki bir yere götürmeli ve ilk yardım yapmalısınız. Yolcular güvene alındıktan sonra kaza yerine gereksiz yere dönmemeli ve önce tanık aramamalısınız.
answerATarget: Yaralıları ve yolcuları otobüsten ve otoyoldan güvenli uzaklıktaki bir yere götürmek ve ilk yardım yapmak
answerBTarget: Yolcuları güvenli yere tahliye ettikten sonra kaza yerine geri dönmek

questionTextSource: You break down and have to stop on the right hand hard shoulder of an autobahn. What must you do?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: Switch on your hazard warning lights and place warning signs (safety devices) at a sufficient distance behind the vehicle
answerBSource: Ensure that your passengers remain at a safe distance away from the bus and autobahn
answerCSource: Call for help unless you can repair the vehicle yourself
questionTextTarget: Arıza yaptınız ve otoyolun sağ emniyet şeridinde durmak zorundasınız. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Dörtlü ikaz ışıklarını yakmalı, aracın arkasına yeterli mesafede uyarı işaretleri koymalı, yolcuların otobüsten ve otoyoldan güvenli uzaklıkta kalmasını sağlamalı ve aracı kendiniz onaramıyorsanız yardım çağırmalısınız.
answerATarget: Dörtlü ikaz ışıklarını yakmak ve aracın arkasına yeterli mesafede uyarı işaretleri/güvenlik tertibatı koymak
answerBTarget: Yolcuların otobüsten ve otoyoldan güvenli uzaklıkta kalmasını sağlamak

questionTextSource: Who is a party involved in an accident?
explanationSource: A participant in a traffic accident can be a person whose conduct has contributed to the selfsame and a person who caused the accident.
answerASource: A person whose conduct may have contributed to the accident
answerBSource: A person who has caused the accident
answerCSource: A person who is a witness to what happened
questionTextTarget: Kim kazaya karışan kişi sayılır?
explanationTarget: Davranışı kazaya katkıda bulunmuş olabilecek kişi ve kazaya sebep olan kişi kazaya karışan kişi sayılır. Sadece olaya tanık olan kişi bu nedenle kazaya karışmış sayılmaz.
answerATarget: Davranışı kazaya katkıda bulunmuş olabilecek kişi

questionTextSource: Does the person involved in an accident have to move his/her vehicle to the side?
explanationSource: A participant in the accident should drive his vehicle aside if only minor damage. So that traffic can continue to flow.
answerASource: Yes, in the case of minor damage
answerBSource: Yes, in any case
answerCSource: No, never
questionTextTarget: Kazaya karışan kişi aracını kenara çekmek zorunda mı?
explanationTarget: Sadece küçük hasar varsa araç kenara çekilmelidir. Her durumda veya hiçbir zaman gibi mutlak cevaplar doğru değildir.

questionTextSource: You are involved in a traffic accident. To ensure that passengers are not endangered, they must leave the bus. However, it is no longer possible to open the doors of your bus. What must you do now?
explanationSource:
If you are involved in a traffic accident and the doors do not open, you should first calm down the passengers.
Ask the passengers to leave the vehicle via the designated emergency outputs and ask the passengers to help each other.
answerASource: - calm the passengers
answerBSource: - request that the passengers use the emergency exits in the event of an emergency
answerCSource: - request the passengers to assist one another
questionTextTarget: Bir trafik kazasına karıştınız. Yolcuların tehlikeye girmemesi için otobüsü terk etmeleri gerekiyor. Ancak kapılar artık açılamıyor. Şimdi ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Yolcuları sakinleştirmeli, acil durumda acil çıkışları kullanmalarını istemeli ve yolcuların birbirine yardım etmesini talep etmelisiniz.
answerBTarget: - acil durumda yolculardan acil çıkışları kullanmalarını istemek

questionTextSource: While driving your bus on the motorway you become involved in a road traffic accident. The passengers need to disembark from the bus. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: The first thing you should do is reassure the passengers and inform them of the situation. Then give the passengers clear instructions, ask them to leave the vehicle via the designated emergency exits and ask them to help each other.
answerASource: I inform the passengers about the situation
answerBSource: I have to issue clear instructions about how to leave the bus safely
answerCSource: I have to remove my driver card from the tachograph
questionTextTarget: Otoyolda otobüsünüzle giderken trafik kazasına karıştınız. Yolcuların otobüsten inmesi gerekiyor. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Önce yolcuları durum hakkında bilgilendirmeli ve otobüsü güvenli şekilde nasıl terk edeceklerine dair açık talimatlar vermelisiniz. Sürücü kartını takograftan çıkarmak bu anda öncelik değildir.
answerBTarget: Otobüsü güvenli şekilde nasıl terk edeceklerine dair açık talimatlar vermeliyim

questionTextSource: What do these signals indicate?
explanationSource: These permanent lights can either enable or disable the lanes, depending on the traffic. They always relate directly to the lane over which they are mounted. A green sign indicates that you are allowed to drive on the lane, a red cross blocks it, a yellow sign with arrow means for you: lane change.
answerASource: The two lanes on the right are open to traffic
answerBSource: You may not use the two lanes on the left
answerCSource: You may use the two lanes on the left for overtaking only
questionTextTarget: Bu sinyaller neyi gösteriyor?
explanationTarget: Sürekli ışıklı işaretler üzerlerinde bulundukları şerit için geçerlidir. Yeşil ok şeridin açık olduğunu, kırmızı çarpı şeridin kullanılamayacağını gösterir.
answerCTarget: Soldaki iki şeridi sadece sollama için kullanabilirsiniz

questionTextSource: You are travelling at a speed of approximately 40 km/h. The lights change from "green" to "amber" when you are 10 m away. What do you do?
explanationSource: At 40 km/h, the braking distance according to the rule of thumb is 28 meters. Even with emergency braking, a car driver can barely come to a halt 10 meters in front of a traffic light. To prevent a possible rear-end collision, you should therefore continue driving.
answerASource: Proceed
answerBSource: Stop
questionTextTarget: Yaklaşık 40 km/saat hızla gidiyorsunuz. Trafik ışığı siz 10 m uzaktayken yeşilden sarıya dönüyor. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: 40 km/saat hızda güvenli durma mesafesi 10 metreden uzundur. Ani fren arkadan çarpma riski yaratabilir. Bu nedenle devam etmelisiniz.

questionTextSource: You are travelling at a speed of approximately 40 km/h. The lights change from "green" to "amber" when you are 40 m away. What do you do?
explanationSource: According to the rule of thumb, at a speed of 40 km/h your car comes to a stand after 28 meters. The only correct reaction is to stop.
answerASource: Stop
answerBSource: Proceed
questionTextTarget: Yaklaşık 40 km/saat hızla gidiyorsunuz. Trafik ışığı siz 40 m uzaktayken yeşilden sarıya dönüyor. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: 40 m mesafe bu hızda normal şekilde durmak için yeterlidir. Bu nedenle durmalısınız.

questionTextSource: You are approaching a traffic light which has been "green" for some time. What do you do?
explanationSource: Since the traffic light has been green for a while, it can switch at any moment. Continue at the same speed, watching the traffic light carefully and be ready to stop. Once you have reached your decision point - distance to the traffic light, from which a normal stop is no longer possible - drive on, even if the traffic light switches.
answerASource: Watch the traffic light closely
answerBSource: Approach but be ready to stop
answerCSource: Accelerate even though the speed limit is exceeded
questionTextTarget: Bir süredir yeşil yanan trafik ışığına yaklaşıyorsunuz. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Trafik ışığı her an değişebilir. Işığı dikkatle izlemeli ve durmaya hazır şekilde yaklaşmalısınız. Hız sınırını aşarak hızlanmamalısınız.
answerCTarget: Hız sınırı aşılmış olsa bile hızlanırım

questionTextSource: The traffic light has just changed to yellow. What is the right course of action if you are turning left?
explanationSource: The yellow traffic light indicates that you have to wait before the crossing. Since your distance to the stop line is far enough in this situation, you can safely stop.
answerASource: - stop
answerBSource: - turn
questionTextTarget: Trafik ışığı az önce sarıya döndü. Sola dönecekseniz doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Sarı ışık kavşaktan önce beklemeniz gerektiğini gösterir. Bu durumda duracak kadar mesafeniz olduğu için durmalısınız.

questionTextSource: What is true of permanently illuminated signs?
explanationSource: If there are crossed red diagonal beams, drivers on the lane must neither drive nor hold in front of them. A green arrow looking down means: You can drive on the lane. A yellow blinking, obliquely downward looking arrow, you must change the lane in the direction of the arrow.
answerASource: Permanently illuminated signs either block lanes or open them up to traffic
answerBSource: Vehicles may not stop at the side of carriageways with permanently illuminated signs
answerCSource: Permanently illuminated signs apply to multi-track motor vehicles only
questionTextTarget: Sürekli ışıklı işaretler için hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Sürekli ışıklı işaretler şeritleri kapatabilir veya trafiğe açabilir. Sadece çok izli motorlu araçlar için geçerli değildir.
answerATarget: Sürekli ışıklı işaretler şeritleri kapatır veya trafiğe açar
answerBTarget: Sürekli ışıklı işaret bulunan taşıt yollarının kenarında araçlar duramaz
answerCTarget: Sürekli ışıklı işaretler sadece çok izli motorlu araçlar için geçerlidir

questionTextSource: What do these permanently illuminated signs mean?
explanationSource: Continuous light signals above a lane inform you as a car driver whether this lane is passable or locked or if you need to leave it. Red crossed bars mean: The lane must not be used. A green arrow looking down means: You can drive on the lane. A yellow blinking, obliquely downward looking arrow, you must change the lane in the direction of the arrow.
answerASource: - 1 may continue driving on it
answerBSource: - 2 must change to the right-side lane
answerCSource: - 3 and lane 4 must stop
questionTextTarget: Bu sürekli ışıklı işaretler ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Yeşil ok 1 numaralı şeritte sürmeye devam edilebileceğini, sarı ok 2 numaralı şeridin sağ şeride değiştirilmesi gerektiğini, kırmızı çarpılar ise 3 ve 4 numaralı şeritlerin kullanılmaması gerektiğini gösterir.

questionTextSource: A vehicle with flashing blue lights and siren sounding is approaching you from the rear. What is the right course of action now?
explanationSource: The vehicle must be given free access. Therefore, you must reduce your speed and drive as far as possible to the side of the road so that the vehicle with blue flashing lights can continue its way unhindered.
answerASource: I drive over to the right-side as far as possible
answerBSource: I reduce my speed
answerCSource: I stop immediately
questionTextTarget: Mavi tepe lambası ve sireni açık bir araç arkadan yaklaşıyor. Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Bu araca serbest yol vermelisiniz. Hızınızı azaltmalı ve mümkün olduğunca sağa yanaşmalısınız. Hemen durmak her durumda doğru değildir.

questionTextSource: What do you do when you see this traffic sign on an autobahn?
explanationSource: Caution of congestion: With this traffic sign you should reduce the speed of your car and increase the distance to the vehicle in front. Get a better picture of the situation by watching the traffic in front of the next vehicle and, if necessary, drive a bit offset in the lane. Turn on your hazard lights when driving towards the end of a traffic jam.
answerASource: Increase your alertness and, as a matter of precaution, increase your distance to the vehicle in front
answerBSource: In case of a traffic jam, brake and switch on hazard warning lights
answerCSource: In case of a traffic jam, move over onto the hard shoulder and proceed
questionTextTarget: Otoyolda bu trafik işaretini gördüğünüzde ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret trafik sıkışıklığı tehlikesini bildirir. Dikkatinizi artırmalı, öndeki araçla mesafeyi artırmalı ve kuyruğa yaklaşırsanız fren yapıp dörtlü ikaz ışıklarını yakmalısınız. Emniyet şeridinden devam edemezsiniz.
answerATarget: Dikkatimi artırır ve önlem olarak öndeki araçla mesafemi artırırım
answerBTarget: Trafik sıkışıklığı varsa fren yapar ve dörtlü ikaz ışıklarını yakarım
answerCTarget: Trafik sıkışıklığı varsa emniyet şeridine geçer ve devam ederim

questionTextSource: What must you do when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The traffic sign announces a dangerous left turn. Decrease your speed to keep the centrifugal force small. Oncoming traffic could reach your lane due to its centrifugal force. Also, a vehicle could have broken down behind the curve. Drive as far as possible to the right. You follow the road, there's no turn. Therefore, you do not have to indicate.
answerASource: Reduce speed before the bend
answerBSource: Drive as far as possible over on the right-hand side
answerCSource: Indicate left before the bend
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretini gördüğünüzde ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: İşaret tehlikeli sol virajı bildirir. Virajdan önce hızınızı azaltmalı ve mümkün olduğunca sağdan gitmelisiniz. Sola sinyal vermek gerekmez.

questionTextSource: What do you do within this danger section?
explanationSource: Attention wild animals crossing: This sign is set up on routes, where a lot of wild animal accidents happened already. As soon as you see this sign, you should reduce the speed and be ready to brake. Pay particular attention to the roadside. If you see an animal, you should brake and dim. If game suddenly jumps in front of you, you should make an emergency brake. Avoid dodging, because then you might get into the oncoming lane.
answerASource: Drive more slowly, watch out for wild animals
answerBSource: Dip the headlights and brake when you see wild animals
answerCSource: Do not avoid hitting wild animals if oncoming traffic would be endangered
questionTextTarget: Bu tehlikeli kesimde ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Yaban hayvanı geçişi olabileceği için daha yavaş sürmeli, hayvanları gözlemlemeli, hayvan gördüğünüzde farları kısa fara alıp frenlemeli ve karşı trafiği tehlikeye atacaksa hayvandan kaçmamalısınız.
answerATarget: Daha yavaş sürmek, yaban hayvanlarına dikkat etmek
answerBTarget: Yaban hayvanı görünce kısa fara geçmek ve frenlemek
answerCTarget: Karşı trafik tehlikeye girecekse yaban hayvanına çarpmaktan kaçınmamak

questionTextSource: What must you be prepared for upon seeing this traffic sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates a section of the route with crosswinds. This is especially true for bridges and overpasses. If there's strong wind from the side you have to reduce your speed. You need to be prepared to hold on and countersteer to stay in the lane. The traffic sign has nothing to do with air traffic.
answerASource: For side winds
answerBSource: For counter-steering
answerCSource: For aircraft overhead
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretini gördüğünüzde neye hazırlıklı olmalısınız?
explanationTarget: İşaret yan rüzgâr tehlikesini bildirir. Yan rüzgârda direksiyonla karşı düzeltme yapmaya hazır olmalısınız. Uçaklarla ilgili değildir.

questionTextSource: What must you be prepared for upon seeing this traffic sign?
explanationSource: If you encounter this traffic sign, you have to adjust to strong crosswinds. Most commonly, this traffic sign appears on road sections that are particularly exposed to the wind - for example, on bridges or overpasses. With strong crosswinds, the driver must countersteer in order to stay in the lane. You also need to adjust the speed of your car to the wind conditions.
answerASource: For an alteration in the responsiveness of the vehicle
answerBSource: For the necessity for counter-steering
answerCSource: For the necessity for adjusting speed
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretini gördüğünüzde neye hazırlıklı olmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Güçlü yan rüzgâr aracın tepkisini değiştirebilir. Direksiyonla karşı düzeltme ve hızın ayarlanması gerekebilir.

questionTextSource: What should you anticipate when you see this road sign?
explanationSource: Because of trees, tall vehicles can brake suddenly and swerve. Tall vehicles can tear off branches as they pass, and these then lie on the roadway. Be especially attentive.
answerASource: Vehicles ahead that may swerve out suddenly to the left
answerBSource: Vehicles ahead that may brake suddenly
answerCSource: Tree branches lying on the roadway
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretini gördüğünüzde neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Ağaçlık yolda öndeki araçlar aniden sola kaçabilir veya fren yapabilir. Yolda dallar bulunabilir.

questionTextSource: What must you anticipate with this road sign?
explanationSource: All 3 answers are correct. Trees may lie in the driveway, branches may lie in the road, and cars may suddenly give way.
answerASource: Trees could protrude into my road area
answerBSource: There could be branches lying on the roadway
answerCSource: Vehicles could swerve suddenly
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretinde neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Ağaçlar yol alanınıza uzanabilir, yolda dallar bulunabilir ve araçlar aniden kaçma manevrası yapabilir.

questionTextSource: What is correct from this traffic sign onwards?
explanationSource: This sign indicates that no vehicles can proceed, you therefore cannot ride your motorized bicycle but can still push it
answerASource: You may push your motorized bicycle
answerBSource: You may drive on slowly with your motorized bicycle
answerCSource: You may proceed with your motorized bicycle when the engine is switched off
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretinden itibaren hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Bu işaret araçla geçişi yasaklar. Motorlu bisikletinizi süremezsiniz; ancak itebilirsiniz. Motor kapalıyken üzerinde gidemezsiniz.

questionTextSource: To what does the "12 t" refer on this traffic sign?
explanationSource: The total mass (12 t) refers to the vehicle including charge.
answerASource: - of the vehicle including load
answerBSource: - of the vehicle excluding load
answerCSource: - of the load excluding the vehicle
questionTextTarget: Bu trafik işaretindeki “12 t” neye karşılık gelir?
explanationTarget: 12 ton bilgisi, yük dahil aracın gerçek ağırlığını ifade eder.

questionTextSource: On your 10 m-long vehicle, the load is projecting 60 cm over the vehicle’s rear edge. What applies to you when this traffic sign is displayed?
explanationSource: The length of your truck is described as 10.6 m. (10 m + 60 cm truck of the load) which dominates. That's why you must not enter this road as a whole, the length of your truck 10.6 m.
answerASource: - not drive into a street displaying this sign, because, taken together, the vehicle and load are longer than 10 m
answerBSource: - drive into a street displaying this sign, if the load is specially marked
answerCSource: - drive into a street displaying this sign, because the load does not have to be taken into consideration
questionTextTarget: 10 m uzunluğundaki aracınızda yük, aracın arka kenarından 60 cm dışarı taşıyor. Bu trafik işareti varsa sizin için ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Araç ve yük birlikte 10,60 m uzunluğundadır. İşaretteki sınırı aştığı için bu yola giremezsiniz.
answerATarget: - araç ve yük birlikte 10 m’den uzun olduğu için bu işaretin bulunduğu yola girmemek
answerBTarget: - yük özel olarak işaretlenmişse bu işaretin bulunduğu yola girmek
answerCTarget: - yük dikkate alınmak zorunda olmadığı için bu işaretin bulunduğu yola girmek

questionTextSource: You are driving on this motorway. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource:
In principle, the right-hand driving rule applies on motorways. You are therefore obliged to drive in the right-hand lane unless you want to overtake. There is no one in front of you to overtake.
The left lane is closed. You may not use it under any circumstances. Not even if you have a breakdown.
answerASource: I move into the right-hand lane
answerBSource: I only use the left-hand lane if there is a breakdown
answerCSource: I remain in my current lane
questionTextTarget: Bu otoyolda gidiyorsunuz. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Otoyolda sağdan gitme kuralı geçerlidir. Sol şerit kapalıdır ve arıza durumunda bile kullanılamaz. Bu nedenle sağ şeride geçmelisiniz.
answerBTarget: Sol şeridi yalnızca arıza durumunda kullanırım

questionTextSource: What is the right behaviour now?
explanationSource: You are allowed to accelerate because you have passed the construction site with the speed limit, moved back into the correct lane and the road in front of you is clear.
answerASource: I accelerate
answerBSource: I maintain my speed
answerCSource: I only accelerate when the speed limit is removed by a road sign
questionTextTarget: Şimdi doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Şantiye ve hız sınırı bölgesini geçtiniz, doğru şeride döndünüz ve önünüzdeki yol açık. Bu nedenle hızlanabilirsiniz.
answerCTarget: Ancak hız sınırı trafik işaretiyle kaldırıldığında hızlanırım

questionTextSource: What must you remember when you see this traffic sign?
explanationSource: This traffic sign indicates that the following route can only be used with snow chains. Driving without snow chains is prohibited. The maximum speed with snow chains is 50 km/h. Pay attention to noises. If you hear something or if your car is twitchy you should stop and check the chains. This sign has nothing to do with track vehicles.
answerASource: Use snow-chains
