answerBSource: The EU parking card of a severely disabled person whom I am transporting
answerCSource: My residential parking permit
questionTextTarget: Burada hangi belgeyle park edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Burada, sizin AB ağır engelli park kartınız varsa veya AB ağır engelli park kartı olan bir kişiyi taşıyorsanız park edebilirsiniz. Sakin park izni yeterli değildir.
answerATarget: Ağır engelliler için AB park kartım
answerBTarget: Taşıdığım ağır engelli kişinin AB park kartı

questionTextSource: You need assistance on the autobahn. Which information does the arrow on the roadside marker give you?
explanationSource: Arrows on the reflector posts on the edge of a freeway point towards the nearest emergency services pillar. If you need help, follow the arrows to reach an emergency pillar as quickly as possible.
answerASource: Nearest emergency call telephone in the direction of the arrow
answerBSource: Nearest car park in the direction of the arrow
answerCSource: Next exit in the direction of the arrow
questionTextTarget: Otoyolda yardıma ihtiyacınız var. Yol kenarı işaretindeki ok size hangi bilgiyi verir?
explanationTarget: Ok, en yakın acil çağrı telefonunun yönünü gösterir.
answerATarget: Ok yönündeki en yakın acil çağrı telefonu

questionTextSource: What can you do to avoid unnecessary noise?
explanationSource: To avoid unnececessary noise, avoid making high revolutions with your engine and do not modify either the intake/exhaust system. Removing fairings do not impact noise.
answerASource: Avoid high engine revolutions
answerBSource: Do not modify intake and exhaust systems
answerCSource: Remove the fairings
questionTextTarget: Gereksiz gürültüyü önlemek için ne yapabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Yüksek motor devrinden kaçınmalı ve emme/egzoz sistemlerinde değişiklik yapmamalısınız. Kaportayı sökmek gürültüyü önlemez.
answerBTarget: Emme ve egzoz sistemlerinde değişiklik yapmamak

questionTextSource: What can you do to avoid noise pollution?
explanationSource: To avoid above normal level of noise called noise pollution, do all of the above.
answerASource: Don't drive off with spinning wheels
answerBSource: Avoid "power sound" through loudspeakers
answerCSource: Push the vehicle on residential premises, if possible
questionTextTarget: Gürültü kirliliğini nasıl önleyebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Patinaj yaparak kalkış yapmamalı, hoparlörlerden yüksek sesli “güçlü ses”ten kaçınmalı ve mümkünse konut alanlarında aracı itmelisiniz.

questionTextSource: How can you save fuel?
explanationSource: You as a car driver can save fuel when you are traveling with your vehicle at low speeds. You should shift as early as possible into a higher gear and switch back as late as possible to keep the engine speeds low.
answerASource: Change to a higher gear earlier
answerBSource: Change to a lower gear later
answerCSource: By driving frequently at high revolutions
questionTextTarget: Nasıl yakıt tasarrufu yapabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Motor devrini düşük tutmak için daha erken üst vitese geçmeli ve daha geç alt vitese düşmelisiniz. Sık sık yüksek devirde sürmek yakıtı artırır.

questionTextSource: How can noise be avoided?
explanationSource: Noise is generally generated by the running engine of a car. Driving at high speeds and strong acceleration contributes to increased noise. Stop the engine if you wait or park your vehicle somewhere for a longer amount of time.
answerASource: If possible, avoid strong acceleration
answerBSource: By switching off the engine if you have to wait or stop for a longer period
answerCSource: By driving at high revolutions
questionTextTarget: Gürültü nasıl önlenebilir?
explanationTarget: Mümkünse güçlü hızlanmadan kaçınmalı ve uzun süre beklemek veya durmak zorundaysanız motoru kapatmalısınız. Yüksek devirde sürmek gürültüyü artırır.
answerBTarget: Uzun süre beklemek veya durmak zorundaysanız motoru kapatarak

questionTextSource: How is avoidable noise caused?
explanationSource: Avoidable noise can be caused by driving with a defective exhaust system or by "playing" with the gas while standing. If a car driver honks because of a dangerous situation, this does not count as avoidable noise, but serves to avert danger.
answerASource: By driving with a defective exhaust
answerBSource: By "playing" with the accelerator when standing still
answerCSource: By sounding your horn when in danger
questionTextTarget: Kaçınılabilir gürültü nasıl oluşur?
explanationTarget: Arızalı egzozla sürmek veya dururken gaz pedalıyla oynamak kaçınılabilir gürültü oluşturur. Tehlike durumunda korna çalmak buna dahil değildir.

questionTextSource: Why should you avoid driving off at a rapid pace?
explanationSource: Making a racing start is an additional noise pollution for other road users. You as a car driver damage your vehicle as well as the tires due to high wear and abrasion with a racing start. The environment is additionally burdened. On the other hand, the rear-wheel brake is no longer and not any less loaded when starting.
answerASource: Because the noise you cause annoys others
answerBSource: Because of heavier tyre wear
answerCSource: Because this is a great strain on the rear brake
questionTextTarget: Neden hızlı kalkış yapmaktan kaçınmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Hızlı kalkış başkalarını rahatsız eden gürültü oluşturur ve lastik aşınmasını artırır. Arka fren için büyük bir yük değildir.
answerATarget: Çünkü oluşturduğum gürültü başkalarını rahatsız eder
answerCTarget: Çünkü arka fren için büyük bir yüktür

questionTextSource: How can you avoid pollution of the environment and benefit your engine after a cold start?
explanationSource: If possible, do not allow your vehicle to warm up while you are stationary as this will damage the engine and the environment. If warming up is done at low engine speeds, you will help to protect both. The engine is only fully resilient after reaching the operating temperature (green area).
answerASource: Set off at low revolutions per minute without running the engine until it warms up
answerBSource: Do not accelerate, let the engine warm up while the vehicle is stationary
answerCSource: Accelerate several times when stationary so that a favourable operation temperature is quickly reached
questionTextTarget: Soğuk çalıştırmadan sonra çevre kirliliğini önlemek ve motorunuza fayda sağlamak için ne yapabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Motoru durduğu yerde ısıtmadan, düşük devirle hareket etmelisiniz. Dururken motoru ısıtmak çevreye ve motora zarar verir.
answerATarget: Motoru ısınana kadar çalıştırmadan, düşük devirle hareket etmek
answerCTarget: Uygun çalışma sıcaklığına hızlı ulaşmak için dururken birkaç kez gaz vermek

questionTextSource: Which vehicles are allowed to enter this environmental zone?
explanationSource: Motor vehicle drivers are only allowed to drive their vehicles into an environmental zone if the vehicle has a valid sticker visibly attached to it, which at least corresponds to the qualifying plate (red, yellow, green). Motorcycles and vehicles with special rights are excluded from this regulation.
answerASource: A car with a red emissions sticker
answerBSource: A motorcycle
answerCSource: A car which meets the requirements for a green sticker even if it does not have an emissions sticker
questionTextTarget: Bu çevre bölgesine hangi araçlar girebilir?
explanationTarget: Gerekli plakete sahip araçlar ve motosikletler çevre bölgesine girebilir. Plaketi olmayan otomobil, yeşil plakete uygun olsa bile giremez.
answerCTarget: Yeşil plaket şartlarını taşıyan ama emisyon plaketi olmayan otomobil

questionTextSource: What is caused by driving with winter tyres during the summer months?
explanationSource: Every car driver should know that winter tires are designed for use in cold and snowy streets. By using them in summer months, the driving stability decreases. Greater rubber abrasion and tire wear lead to increased fuel consumption.
answerASource: - the fuel consumption
answerBSource: - tyre wear
answerCSource: - driving stability
questionTextTarget: Yaz aylarında kış lastikleriyle sürüş neye neden olur?
explanationTarget: Yazın kış lastikleri yakıt tüketimini ve lastik aşınmasını artırır, sürüş stabilitesini azaltır.

questionTextSource: What motor vehicles may enter an environment zone that has this sign?
explanationSource: The additional sign shows which motor vehicles with which sticker may enter. Motorbikes may enter in any case.
answerASource: Motor vehicles with a green particulate emissions sticker
answerBSource: Motorcycles
answerCSource: Motor vehicles that meet the requirements for a green particulate emissions sticker, even if no such sticker is attached
questionTextTarget: Bu işaretin bulunduğu çevre bölgesine hangi motorlu araçlar girebilir?
explanationTarget: Yeşil partikül emisyon plaketi olan motorlu araçlar ve motosikletler girebilir. Plaketi olmayan araçlar, şartları sağlasa bile bu seçenek kapsamında değildir.
answerATarget: Yeşil partikül emisyon plaketi olan motorlu araçlar
answerCTarget: Yeşil partikül emisyon plaketi şartlarını sağlasa bile plaketi olmayan motorlu araçlar

questionTextSource: You want to wash your car. Where should you do this in the interests of environmental protection?
explanationSource: You should always wash your vehicle in a car wash. There, the wastewater is disposed of by the operators in an environmentally friendly manner. On the other hand, if you wash your vehicle on the road or in a parking lot, the water gets into the ground untreated.
answerASource: At a carwash
answerBSource: In a carpark
answerCSource: On an open road
questionTextTarget: Arabanızı yıkamak istiyorsunuz. Çevre koruması açısından bunu nerede yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Aracınızı oto yıkamada yıkamalısınız. Orada atık su çevreye uygun şekilde bertaraf edilir.

questionTextSource: What increases the fuel consumption of your vehicle considerably?
explanationSource: Turning on the seat heating or air conditioning of your vehicle consumes a lot of energy and increases the fuel consumption of your car significantly. Navigation devices require relatively little power compared to these devices.
answerASource: - heated seats
answerBSource: - the air-conditioning
answerCSource: - the navigation device
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın yakıt tüketimini önemli ölçüde ne artırır?
explanationTarget: Koltuk ısıtması ve klima çok enerji tüketir ve yakıt tüketimini artırır. Navigasyon cihazı buna kıyasla az enerji harcar.

questionTextSource: What can reduce the fuel consumption of a commercial vehicle?
explanationSource: A reduction can cause all three answers. The use of louvers on the vehicle, the driver & predictive operation, even the use of special tires.
answerASource: Fitting air cowls to the vehicle
answerBSource: The farsighted driving style of the driver
answerCSource: The use of special tyres
questionTextTarget: Ticari aracın yakıt tüketimini ne azaltabilir?
explanationTarget: Araca hava yönlendiricileri takmak, sürücünün öngörülü sürüş tarzı ve özel lastiklerin kullanımı yakıt tüketimini azaltabilir.

questionTextSource: What are the effects of driving at high speed in motor vehicles with combustion engines?
explanationSource: Be aware that fast, high-speed driving results in high fuel consumption and high exhaust emissions. This also leads to more noise and to a not lower noise level.
answerASource: Fuel consumption increases
answerBSource: The emission of harmful substances increases
answerCSource: The noise level is reduced
questionTextTarget: İçten yanmalı motorlu araçlarda yüksek hızla sürüşün etkileri nelerdir?
explanationTarget: Yüksek hız yakıt tüketimini ve zararlı madde emisyonunu artırır. Gürültü seviyesi azalmaz.

questionTextSource: When riding a motorcycle, what can you do to avoid unnecessary noise?
explanationSource:
Improper exhaust systems lead to higher noise pollution. 
Uneven driving, such as frequent braking and then accelerating hard again, leads to unnecessary noise.
High-speed starting leads to unnecessary noise.
answerASource: By only using permissible exhaust systems
answerBSource: By driving off at high speed
answerCSource: By adopting an uneven driving style
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet sürerken gereksiz gürültüyü önlemek için ne yapabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Yalnızca izin verilen egzoz sistemlerini kullanmalı, yüksek hızla kalkıştan ve düzensiz sürüş tarzından kaçınmalısınız.
answerATarget: Sadece izin verilen egzoz sistemlerini kullanarak

questionTextSource: Why is an environmentally considerate driving style also beneficial for road safety?
explanationSource: Alternative fuels can also be used to drive fast. However, you will be driving in an environmentally friendly way if you avoid high speeds, if you drive with foresight and thus avoid, for example, braking hard and starting again.
answerASource: - driving in a far-sighted manner
answerBSource: - avoiding high speeds
answerCSource: - that with alternative fuels it is only possible to drive slowly
questionTextTarget: Çevreye duyarlı sürüş tarzı neden trafik güvenliği için de faydalıdır?
explanationTarget: Çevreye duyarlı sürüş öngörülü sürüşü ve yüksek hızlardan kaçınmayı içerir. Alternatif yakıtlarla sadece yavaş sürülebilir düşüncesi doğru değildir.

questionTextSource: What must you know about catalytic converters?
explanationSource: Vehicles with a catalytic converter should not be towed away. As a result, unburned fuel can flow into the catalytic converter and lead to damage or destruction of the catalyst. If the engine of the vehicle does not start even after several start attempts, the same consequences can occur.
answerASource: A catalytic converter can be damaged or destroyed when the car is towed to start
answerBSource: A catalytic converter can be damaged when the engine starts after many unsuccessful attempts
answerCSource: Unburned fuel in the catalytic converter cannot cause any damage when the engine starts
questionTextTarget: Katalitik konvertörler hakkında ne bilmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Aracı çekerek çalıştırmak katalitik konvertöre zarar verebilir veya onu tahrip edebilir. Çok sayıda başarısız çalıştırma denemesinden sonra motor çalışırsa da zarar oluşabilir.
answerATarget: Katalitik konvertör, araç çekilerek çalıştırıldığında zarar görebilir veya tahrip olabilir
answerBTarget: Çok sayıda başarısız denemeden sonra motor çalıştığında katalitik konvertör zarar görebilir
answerCTarget: Motor çalışırken yanmamış yakıt katalitik konvertörde zarar oluşturamaz

questionTextSource: Tyre wear is a burden to the environment. What can extend tyre life?
explanationSource: The wear of tires is the lowest when the tires are used as intended. Winter tires that are used in summer wear faster due to their material properties (rubber compound). Even with too little air pressure tires wear faster. Starting with high-speed and squealing tires wears tires due to increased abrasion.
answerASource: Avoiding high speeds
answerBSource: Observing the tyre pressure indicated in the owner's manual
answerCSource: Using winter tyres (M+S) in the summer
questionTextTarget: Lastik aşınması çevreye yük getirir. Lastik ömrünü ne uzatabilir?
explanationTarget: Yüksek hızlardan kaçınmak ve kullanım kılavuzunda belirtilen lastik basıncına uymak lastik ömrünü uzatır. Yazın kış lastiği kullanmak aşınmayı artırır.
answerBTarget: Kullanım kılavuzunda belirtilen lastik basıncına uymak

questionTextSource: How can you save fuel when driving a motor vehicle with automatic transmission?
explanationSource: Avoid the kick-down. The high-speed acceleration gear causes increased fuel consumption. For overtaking or merging on the freeway, however, it can be useful. With P, Parking, a vehicle with automatic transmission cannot be driven. Changing gears early to a higher gear also saves fuel.
answerASource: By not using the "kick down" facility, if possible
answerBSource: When driving in town traffic, always keep the selector lever in the lowest gear
answerCSource: By driving in gear "P", if possible
questionTextTarget: Otomatik şanzımanlı motorlu araç kullanırken nasıl yakıt tasarrufu yapabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Mümkünse kick-down kullanmamalısınız. Şehir içinde sürekli en düşük viteste sürmek veya P konumunda sürmek yakıt tasarrufu sağlamaz.
answerBTarget: Şehir trafiğinde vites seçiciyi daima en düşük viteste tutarak

questionTextSource: How can you keep the burden on the environment low?
explanationSource: In order to relieve the environment, you should form carpools with others as a car driver. The environment is particularly burdened by the number of moving vehicles. In addition, you should avoid a concentrated accumulation of several vehicles such as traffic jams.
answerASource: By forming car pools
answerBSource: By avoiding peak traffic periods
answerCSource: By avoiding roads with frequent traffic jams
questionTextTarget: Çevre üzerindeki yükü nasıl düşük tutabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Araç paylaşımı yapmak, yoğun saatlerden kaçınmak ve sık sık trafik sıkışıklığı olan yollardan kaçınmak çevre yükünü azaltır.
answerCTarget: Sık trafik sıkışıklığı olan yollardan kaçınarak

questionTextSource: What results in increased fuel consumption of your car?
explanationSource: Increased fuel consumption can be expected if, for example, you install roof or ski racks or if you load your vehicle with unnecessary objects. Increased tire pressure, on the other hand, does not matter for fuel consumption, even if it should be avoided altogether.
answerASource: A roof rack or ski rack
answerBSource: Transporting unnecessary objects
answerCSource: Excessive tyre pressure
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın yakıt tüketiminin artmasına ne neden olur?
explanationTarget: Tavan veya kayak taşıyıcı takmak ve gereksiz eşya taşımak yakıt tüketimini artırır. Aşırı yüksek lastik basıncı doğru çözüm değildir.

questionTextSource: How can you save fuel?
explanationSource: Additional load and additional attachments such as roof racks or ski holders increase fuel consumption: when not in use, remove them. You save fuel when driving low-speed: shift up the gear early. Turning off the air conditioning system saves fuel, as does maintaining tire pressure according to the manufacturer's specifications. Because too little tire pressure increases the rolling resistance.
answerASource: By observing at least the tyre pressure indicated in the owner's manual
answerBSource: By removing roof racks or ski racks
answerCSource: Avoid driving in top gear
questionTextTarget: Nasıl yakıt tasarrufu yapabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Kullanım kılavuzunda belirtilen en az lastik basıncına uymak ve tavan/kayak taşıyıcıları kullanmadığınızda sökmek yakıt tasarrufu sağlar. En yüksek viteste sürmekten kaçınmak doğru değildir.
answerATarget: Kullanım kılavuzunda belirtilen en az lastik basıncına uyarak
answerBTarget: Tavan taşıyıcıları veya kayak taşıyıcıları sökerek

questionTextSource: What should you avoid for reasons of environmental protection?
explanationSource: After starting the engine, you as a car driver should start immediately in a low-speed driving style. Warming up the engine while stationary is not permitted. Driving at high speeds, extending gears and switching late, wastes fuel. Unnecessary driving causes avoidable exhaust emissions.
answerASource: Letting the engine warm up when the vehicle is stationary
answerBSource: Unnecessary trips
answerCSource: Loud music with windows opened
questionTextTarget: Çevre koruması nedeniyle nelerden kaçınmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Araç dururken motoru ısıtmaktan, gereksiz yolculuklardan ve camlar açıkken yüksek sesli müzikten kaçınmalısınız.

questionTextSource: Which conduct shows awareness of the environment?
explanationSource: Avoid driving around aimlessly. Private transport pollutes the environment. Make carpools as often as you can. If possible, use public transport. If you are stuck in a traffic jam, do not run the engine unnecessarily, turn it off.
answerASource: Changing to public transport at collective parking areas ("P + R")
answerBSource: The formation of car pools
answerCSource: Switching off the engine in a traffic jam
questionTextTarget: Hangi davranış çevre bilinci gösterir?
explanationTarget: P+R otoparklarında toplu taşımaya geçmek, araç paylaşımı yapmak ve trafik sıkışıklığında motoru kapatmak çevre bilinci gösterir.
answerATarget: Toplu otoparklarda (“P + R”) toplu taşımaya geçmek

questionTextSource: How can you reduce noise?
explanationSource: Driving in the high-speed range causes more noise than a low-speed driving style. In built-up areas you should drive in the highest possible gear, so that the engine causes the least possible noise. Avoid a high-speed start with squeaky tires.
answerASource: By driving in 4th or 5th gear in built-up areas
answerBSource: By driving at high engine revolutions
answerCSource: By driving at high speed
questionTextTarget: Gürültüyü nasıl azaltabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Yerleşim içinde mümkün olduğunca yüksek viteste, düşük motor devriyle sürerek gürültüyü azaltabilirsiniz. Yüksek devir ve yüksek hız gürültüyü artırır.

questionTextSource: What does "power sound" in the car result in?
explanationSource: "Power sound" in the car causes over-stimulation. This over-stimulation may distract the car driver so that he/she may miss important other signals. Bear in mind that other road users are also bothered by the noise.
answerASource: Signals from other traffic - in particular sirens - are not heard
answerBSource: There is noise pollution for others even when the windows are closed
answerCSource: Driving errors due to the driver being diverted
questionTextTarget: Arabada “power sound” neye yol açar?
explanationTarget: Çok yüksek sesli müzik sürücünün dikkatini dağıtır, diğer trafik sinyallerinin özellikle sirenlerin duyulmamasına ve başkaları için gürültü kirliliğine neden olur.
answerATarget: Diğer trafikten gelen sinyaller, özellikle sirenler duyulmaz
answerBTarget: Camlar kapalı olsa bile başkaları için gürültü kirliliği olur
answerCTarget: Sürücünün dikkatinin dağılması nedeniyle sürüş hataları olur

questionTextSource: By which percentage does the fuel consumption (l/100 km) of a middle-class car driving at 160 km/h in general increase compared to driving at the recommended speed of 130 km/h?
explanationSource: Compared to driving at the advisory speed limit of 130 km/h, the fuel consumption at a speed of 160 km/h usually increases very much. For example, the consumption of a mid-range car can rise by up to 35%.
answerASource: By up to 35 %
answerBSource: By up to 5 %
answerCSource: By up to 10 %
questionTextTarget: Orta sınıf bir otomobilin 160 km/saat hızla giderken yakıt tüketimi, tavsiye edilen 130 km/saat hıza göre genel olarak yüzde kaç artabilir?
explanationTarget: 160 km/saat hızda yakıt tüketimi 130 km/saat tavsiye hızına göre belirgin şekilde artar; orta sınıf bir otomobilde bu artış yüzde 35’e kadar çıkabilir.

questionTextSource: When are you allowed to enter an environmental zone?
explanationSource: You may only drive into an environmental zone as a car driver if a valid badge is visibly attached to your vehicle that at least corresponds to the qualifying plate (red, yellow, green). Excluded from this rule are exclusively vehicles with special rights, for example historic motor vehicles.
answerASource: When your vehicle has a corresponding emissions sticker
answerBSource: When your vehicle enjoys special rights
answerCSource: When you have a low-emission vehicle
questionTextTarget: Bir çevre bölgesine ne zaman girebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Aracınızda ilgili geçerli emisyon plaketi varsa veya aracınız özel haklara sahipse çevre bölgesine girebilirsiniz. Düşük emisyonlu olmak tek başına yeterli değildir.

questionTextSource: Where do you have to place the emissions sticker for identifying lowemission vehicles?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you must ensure that the carbon emission sticker is affixed to the inside of the windshield of your vehicle so that it clearly identifies your low-emission vehicle.
answerASource: Clearly visible on the inside of the windscreen
answerBSource: Clearly visible on the outside of the windscreen
answerCSource: Clearly visible on the inside of the rear window
questionTextTarget: Düşük emisyonlu araçları gösteren emisyon plaketini nereye yapıştırmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Emisyon plaketi, ön camın iç tarafında dışarıdan açıkça görülebilecek şekilde bulunmalıdır.
answerATarget: Ön camın iç tarafına açıkça görünür şekilde
answerBTarget: Ön camın dış tarafına açıkça görünür şekilde
answerCTarget: Arka camın iç tarafına açıkça görünür şekilde

questionTextSource: If your car has a petrol engine but does not have an emissions sticker, are you allowed to enter an environmental zone which is sign-posted as follows?
explanationSource: Without visibly attached carbon emission sticker, motor vehicle drivers are not allowed to drive into an environmental zone with a gasoline engine. The badge on the vehicle must be valid and correspond at least to the qualifying plate (red, yellow, green).
answerASource: No, because my car does not have an emissions sticker
answerBSource: Yes, because I am driving a car with catalytic converter with lambda control
answerCSource: Yes, because this prohibition only applies to diesel vehicles
questionTextTarget: Benzinli aracınızın emisyon plaketi yoksa, bu şekilde işaretlenmiş çevre bölgesine girebilir misiniz?
explanationTarget: Hayır. Emisyon plaketi görünür şekilde takılı değilse benzinli araçla da çevre bölgesine giremezsiniz.
answerATarget: Hayır, çünkü aracımda emisyon plaketi yok
answerBTarget: Evet, çünkü lambda kontrollü katalitik konvertörlü benzinli araç kullanıyorum
answerCTarget: Evet, çünkü bu yasak sadece dizel araçlar için geçerlidir

questionTextSource: Where can you stow your baggage so that you do not increase your fuel consumption unnecessarily?
explanationSource: If possible, you should only store the luggage in the trunk of your vehicle. The use of a roof rack to carry luggage results in greatly increased aerodynamic drag, often resulting in a significant increase in fuel consumption.
answerASource: In the boot
answerBSource: Behind the front seats
answerCSource: On the roof-rack
questionTextTarget: Yakıt tüketimini gereksiz artırmamak için bagajınızı nerede taşıyabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Bagajı mümkünse bagaj bölümünde veya ön koltukların arkasında taşımalısınız. Tavan taşıyıcı hava direncini ve yakıt tüketimini artırır.

questionTextSource: Tyre wear negatively impacts the environment. How can you reduce this impact?
explanationSource: To reduce tyre wear (i.e. the wear on the tyres), you can drive with foresight and significantly minimise the load by regularly checking the tyre pressure in accordance with the manufacturer's specifications. Less wear = less load.
answerASource: By employing an anticipatory driving style
answerBSource: By regularly checking the tyre inflation pressure in accordance with the manufacturer's guidelines
answerCSource: By using winter tyres in summer
questionTextTarget: Lastik aşınması çevreyi olumsuz etkiler. Bu etkiyi nasıl azaltabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Öngörülü sürüş ve üretici talimatlarına göre lastik basıncını düzenli kontrol etmek lastik aşınmasını azaltır. Yazın kış lastiği kullanmak aşınmayı artırır.
answerBTarget: Lastik basıncını üretici talimatlarına göre düzenli kontrol ederek

questionTextSource: What can contribute to environmentally-friendly driving?
explanationSource: If possible, carpool to reduce the number of vehicles on the road. Training can help you to adopt a fuel-efficient driving style. Electric vehicles do not emit any pollutants, so they are particularly environmentally friendly when driving.
answerASource: Attending a practical driving training session for a fuel-efficient driving style
answerBSource: Using vehicles with an electric drive
answerCSource: Forming car pools
questionTextTarget: Çevre dostu sürüşe ne katkı sağlayabilir?
explanationTarget: Yakıt tasarruflu sürüş eğitimi, elektrikli araç kullanımı ve araç paylaşımı çevre dostu sürüşe katkı sağlar.
answerATarget: Yakıt tasarruflu sürüş tarzı için pratik sürüş eğitimine katılmak

questionTextSource: How can you save fuel if you drive a car with an automatic gearbox?
explanationSource: Unnecessary acceleration leads to high fuel consumption. Drive in eco mode if available. The car adapts its acceleration behaviour to reduce fuel consumption.
answerASource: Do not press down hard on the accelerator when moving off
answerBSource: Use the eco mode when driving
answerCSource: Switch off the engine when driving down a gradient
questionTextTarget: Otomatik şanzımanlı bir otomobil kullanırken nasıl yakıt tasarrufu yapabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Kalkışta gaz pedalına sert basmamak ve varsa eco modunu kullanmak yakıt tasarrufu sağlar. Yokuş aşağı inerken motoru kapatmak tehlikelidir.

questionTextSource: What cars that are driven within designated environmental zones must display a particulate matter sticker?
explanationSource: In principle, all cars in a designated environmental zone are subject to the obligation to display a fine dust sticker. Work machines, ambulances, etc. are exempt.
answerASource: - petrol engines
answerBSource: - diesel engines
answerCSource: - electric motors
questionTextTarget: Belirlenmiş çevre bölgelerinde kullanılan hangi otomobiller partikül madde plaketi taşımalıdır?
explanationTarget: Çevre bölgesinde kullanılan benzinli, dizel ve elektrikli otomobillerin kural olarak gerekli plaketi taşıması gerekir; bazı özel araçlar hariçtir.

questionTextSource: What can result from listening to very loud music while driving a car?
explanationSource:
Too loud music can cause warning signals and the like of other road users to be overheard. Too loud music can also annoy, disturb and thus endanger other road users.
The driver's ability to react deteriorates due to the loud music and the resulting reduced ability to concentrate.
answerASource: The driver fails to detect signals from other traffic
answerBSource: It causes a nuisance to other road users
answerCSource: The driver’s responsiveness is enhanced
questionTextTarget: Araba kullanırken çok yüksek sesle müzik dinlemek neye yol açabilir?
explanationTarget: Sürücü diğer trafik sinyallerini duymayabilir, diğer yol kullanıcıları rahatsız olabilir ve sürücünün tepki yeteneği azalabilir.
answerATarget: Sürücü diğer trafikten gelen sinyalleri algılamaz

questionTextSource: Air resistance affects the fuel consumption of a vehicle. What affects air resistance the most?
explanationSource:
The faster you drive, the greater the air resistance acting on your vehicle. Doubling your speed results in 4 times the air resistance. 
The tread depth of the tyres has a major effect on the rolling resistance of the tyres.
The number of passengers does not directly affect the air resistance.
answerASource: The speed travelled
answerBSource: The number of passengers
answerCSource: The profile depth of the tyres
questionTextTarget: Hava direnci aracın yakıt tüketimini etkiler. Hava direncini en çok ne etkiler?
explanationTarget: Hava direncini en çok hız etkiler. Hız arttıkça hava direnci çok daha fazla artar.

questionTextSource: You have to wait because a rail-crossing barrier is lowered. How can you now help protect the environment at this point?
explanationSource: By using the automatic start-stop system, the vehicle can be switched off while waiting and immediately switched on again with little effort. This minimises the emission of pollutants. Applying the handbrake has no effect on the vehicle's pollutant emissions.
answerASource: By using the automatic start-stop system
answerBSource: By putting the vehicle in first gear
answerCSource: By activating the parking brake
questionTextTarget: Hemzemin geçit bariyeri kapalı olduğu için beklemek zorundasınız. Burada çevreyi korumaya nasıl yardımcı olabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Otomatik start-stop sistemi beklerken motoru kapatarak emisyonları azaltır.

questionTextSource: What increases the range of an electric vehicle?
explanationSource: If you only brake slightly, the electric motor brakes and the kinetic energy is recovered. If you brake harder, you will be mechanically braked and the kinetic energy will not be recovered. Due to a high recuperation level, an electric car behaves like a combustion engine, so you may have to brake less strongly, i.e. mechanically. The heating in the electric car is fed directly from the battery and thus consumes energy that could also be used for driving.
answerASource: Using a high energy recovery (recuperation) level
answerBSource: Reducing the heater temperature
answerCSource: Short, sharp acceleration
questionTextTarget: Elektrikli aracın menzilini ne artırır?
explanationTarget: Yüksek enerji geri kazanımı seviyesi ve ısıtma sıcaklığını azaltmak menzili artırabilir. Kısa ve sert hızlanma menzili azaltır.
answerATarget: Yüksek enerji geri kazanımı/reküperasyon seviyesi kullanmak

questionTextSource: What is the benefit of recuperation in an electric vehicle?
explanationSource: Recuperation means "recovery". Just as electrical energy was converted into kinetic energy, braking converts the kinetic energy back into electrical energy, which is then fed back into the battery. This increases the range of the electric vehicle.
answerASource: - increases range
answerBSource: - conserves the service brake system
answerCSource: - means that energy can be recovered from the braking operation
questionTextTarget: Elektrikli araçta reküperasyonun faydası nedir?
explanationTarget: Reküperasyon frenleme sırasında enerjinin geri kazanılmasını sağlar, menzili artırır ve servis fren sistemini korur.
answerCTarget: - frenleme işleminden enerji geri kazanılmasını sağlar

questionTextSource: Your car is equipped with an automatic start-stop system. What is the environmental protection benefit from using this vehicle system?
explanationSource:
The automatic start-stop system automatically switches off the engine when you come to a standstill and restarts it as soon as you press one of the pedals. 
By switching off the engine, for example at traffic lights, the automatic start-stop system can reduce noise pollution and also save up to 15% fuel.
answerASource: - fuel consumption
answerBSource: - noise pollution
answerCSource: - tyre wear
questionTextTarget: Arabanız otomatik start-stop sistemiyle donatılmış. Bu sistemin çevre korumasına faydası nedir?
explanationTarget: Start-stop sistemi dururken motoru kapatarak yakıt tüketimini ve gürültü kirliliğini azaltabilir. Lastik aşınmasını azaltmaz.

questionTextSource: You are driving a car with a plug-in hybrid drive system. How can you optimise fuel consumption?
explanationSource:
By driving proactively - with gentle acceleration and timely braking - you can reduce your vehicle's fuel consumption. The electric motor is often used in this driving style. 
You can also reduce fuel consumption by regularly charging the battery of your plug-in hybrid on the power grid or minimize it by driving purely electrically.
answerASource: I regularly charge the battery using the mains supply
answerBSource: I use the electric drive through my driving style
answerCSource: I only use the recuperation to charge the battery
questionTextTarget: Plug-in hibrit tahrikli bir otomobil kullanıyorsunuz. Yakıt tüketimini nasıl optimize edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Bataryayı düzenli olarak şebekeden şarj etmeli ve sürüş tarzınızla elektrikli tahriki mümkün olduğunca kullanmalısınız. Bataryayı yalnızca reküperasyonla şarj etmek yeterli değildir.
answerATarget: Bataryayı düzenli olarak elektrik şebekesinden şarj ederim

questionTextSource: How can you avoid unnecessary noise?
explanationSource: Unnecessary noise you avoid by properly storing or use of the tension chains and by the renewing of knocked-out tailgate hinges or closures as they can rattle loudly.
answerASource: By replacing worn sideboard hinges or fastenings
answerBSource: Through correct stowing or use of chains
answerCSource: By greatly increasing the tyre pressure of an empty vehicle
questionTextTarget: Gereksiz gürültüyü nasıl önleyebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Aşınmış yan kapak menteşelerini veya kilitlerini değiştirerek ve zincirleri doğru yerleştirerek veya kullanarak gereksiz gürültüyü önleyebilirsiniz.
answerATarget: Aşınmış yan kapak menteşelerini veya kilitlerini değiştirerek
answerCTarget: Boş aracın lastik basıncını çok artırarak

questionTextSource: What can cause noise pollution?
explanationSource: 3 answers are correct. Loose or worn out tailgate hinges and unsecured load, but also loose tension chains.
answerASource: Loose chains
answerBSource: Loose or worn sideboard hinges
answerCSource: Unsecured load
questionTextTarget: Gürültü kirliliğine ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Gevşek zincirler, gevşek veya aşınmış yan kapak menteşeleri ve güvenceye alınmamış yük gürültü kirliliğine neden olabilir.
answerBTarget: Gevşek veya aşınmış yan kapak menteşeleri

questionTextSource: How can you avoid noise in built-up areas, in particular with empty vehicles?
explanationSource: In town you can avoid particularly poor road with your empty vehicle noise by inappropriate speed.
answerASource: By adapting your speed, particularly on a bad road surface
answerBSource: By driving at high speed in a low gear
answerCSource: By changing gear frequently with double-clutching
questionTextTarget: Yerleşim yerlerinde, özellikle boş araçlarla, gürültüyü nasıl önleyebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Özellikle kötü yol yüzeylerinde hızınızı uygun şekilde ayarlayarak gürültüyü azaltabilirsiniz. Düşük viteste yüksek hızla sürmek veya sık çift debriyaj yapmak gürültüyü artırır.
answerATarget: Özellikle kötü yol yüzeyinde hızı uyarlayarak

questionTextSource: Which motor vehicles are allowed to use a road with this sign?
explanationSource: This road leads in an environmental zone. All buses with a corresponding emissions sticker and all trucks with a corresponding sticker are allowed to drive here. Not all cars have this plaque, so are "all car" wrong.
answerASource: Any lorry with a corresponding emissions sticker
answerBSource: Any bus with a corresponding emissions sticker
answerCSource: Any car
questionTextTarget: Bu işaretli yolu hangi motorlu araçlar kullanabilir?
explanationTarget: Uygun emisyon plaketi olan kamyonlar ve otobüsler bu yola girebilir. Her otomobilin girebileceği anlamına gelmez.
answerATarget: Uygun emisyon plaketi olan her kamyon
answerBTarget: Uygun emisyon plaketi olan her otobüs

questionTextSource: How can you avoid creating noise?
explanationSource: Noise you can prevent this by you as possible befüllst empty compressed air tanks from a stationary plant and if you exchange worn out lift closures.
answerASource: - filling empty compressed air tanks from a stationary facility, if possible
answerBSource: - replacing worn-out side latches
answerCSource: - allowing the engine to idle during longer waiting times
questionTextTarget: Gürültü oluşumunu nasıl önleyebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Mümkünse boş basınçlı hava depolarını sabit bir tesisten doldurmalı ve aşınmış yan kapak kilitlerini değiştirmelisiniz. Uzun beklemelerde motoru rölantide bırakmak gürültü yapar.
answerATarget: - mümkünse boş basınçlı hava depolarını sabit bir tesisten doldurarak
answerCTarget: - uzun bekleme sürelerinde motoru rölantide bırakarak

questionTextSource: When planning your journeys, how can you make them environmentally-friendlier?
explanationSource: For the sake of the environment, motorists should refrain from all trips that are not absolutely necessary. Therefore, plan your trips well and make carpools as often as possible to avoid unnecessary trips. Another positive contribution to active environmental protection is the use of public transport.
answerASource: - combining several destinations into one single trip
answerBSource: - forming car pools with other vehicle users
answerCSource: - planning to use public transport instead of my own vehicle
questionTextTarget: Yolculuklarınızı planlarken onları nasıl daha çevre dostu hale getirebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Birden fazla hedefi tek yolculukta birleştirmek, araç paylaşımı yapmak ve kendi aracınız yerine toplu taşımayı planlamak çevreyi korur.
answerATarget: - birkaç hedefi tek bir yolculukta birleştirerek
answerBTarget: - diğer araç kullanıcılarıyla araç paylaşımı oluşturarak
answerCTarget: - kendi aracım yerine toplu taşıma kullanmayı planlayarak

questionTextSource: How do you drive down a descending gradient safely?
explanationSource: On a down grade, use the engine brake by shifting down to a lower gear. This relieves the service brakes. Under no circumstances change to idle! Because idling puts the engine brake out of action, thus the service brakes could overheat. In addition, the brake booster cannot work when the ignition is switched off. This considerably lengthens the braking distance.
answerASource: - select a gear in which I am not required to brake a great deal
answerBSource: - drive in neutral
answerCSource: - switch the ignition off
questionTextTarget: İnişli bir yolda nasıl güvenli inersiniz?
explanationTarget: Fazla fren yapmanıza gerek kalmayacak bir vites seçmelisiniz. Boşa almak veya kontağı kapatmak tehlikelidir.
answerATarget: - fazla fren yapmamı gerektirmeyecek bir vites seçmek

questionTextSource: What motor vehicles are permitted to enter an environment zone without a fine-particle badge?
explanationSource: All two- and three-wheeled motor vehicles and agricultural and forestry tractors may enter an environmental zone without the carbon emission sticker. They are exempt from the restrictions of the environmental zone. The installation of a catalytic converter does not exempt you as a car driver from the obligation to obtain an environmental badge.
answerASource: All two and three-wheeled motor vehicles
answerBSource: All agricultural and forestry tractors
answerCSource: All motor vehicles with a catalytic converter
questionTextTarget: Hangi motorlu araçlar partikül plaketi olmadan çevre bölgesine girebilir?
explanationTarget: Tüm iki ve üç tekerlekli motorlu araçlar ile tarım ve ormancılık traktörleri plaket olmadan çevre bölgesine girebilir. Katalitik konvertör tek başına muafiyet sağlamaz.
answerATarget: Tüm iki ve üç tekerlekli motorlu araçlar
answerCTarget: Katalitik konvertörü olan tüm motorlu araçlar

questionTextSource: What manufacturer specifications will allow you to know if your motor vehicle is environmentally-friendly?
explanationSource: The emission class provides information about the emission of pollutants. The emission classes defined by the standard and/or the law subdivide products that emit exhaust emissions or interference signals. In the automotive sector, moreover, the following applies: The lower the fuel consumption, the higher the efficiency class and thus the environmental friendliness of the vehicle.
answerASource: - about the fuel consumption
answerBSource: - about the efficiency category
answerCSource: - about the emissions class
questionTextTarget: Motorlu aracınızın çevre dostu olup olmadığını hangi üretici bilgileriyle anlayabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Yakıt tüketimi, verimlilik kategorisi ve emisyon sınıfı aracın çevre dostuluğu hakkında bilgi verir.

questionTextSource: Why are short journeys performed with a cold engine especially damaging to the environment?
explanationSource: Short trips with a cold engine usually consume more fuel than driving with a motor in operating temperature. That's why they are particularly harmful to the environment. In addition, the friction is greater in short-distance driving with a cold engine. This leads to a higher material wear.
answerASource: - more fuel is consumed
answerBSource: - the level of material wear is higher
answerCSource: - the vehicle's battery will be over-charged
questionTextTarget: Soğuk motorla yapılan kısa yolculuklar çevreye neden özellikle zararlıdır?
explanationTarget: Soğuk motorla kısa yolculuklarda daha fazla yakıt tüketilir ve malzeme aşınması daha yüksek olur. Araç aküsü aşırı şarj olmaz.

questionTextSource: What causes avoidable noise?
explanationSource: All noise disturbances arising during normal operation of a vehicle are considered unavoidable. As a car driver, you should avoid any excess noise, for example, honking as a greeting or closing the doors very loudly. A roof rack will not cause you any avoidable noise.
answerASource: By sounding the horn as a greeting
answerBSource: By firmly slamming doors shut
answerCSource: By driving with a roof-rack
questionTextTarget: Kaçınılabilir gürültüye ne neden olur?
explanationTarget: Selamlaşmak için korna çalmak ve kapıları sertçe kapatmak kaçınılabilir gürültüdür. Tavan taşıyıcı kullanmak bu kapsamda değildir.

questionTextSource: How does the eco-roll mode in commercial vehicles contribute to the reduction of fuel consumption?
explanationSource: Because the kinetic energy of the vehicle is maximally utilized in eco-roll mode is the right answer. This has to do with the automatic neutral position of the transmission. The rolling phase will not be shortened and the engine braking effect is not increased.
answerASource: - vehicle's kinetic energy is utilised to its maximum
answerBSource: - engine braking effect is increased
answerCSource: - vehicle's roll phase is reduced
questionTextTarget: Ticari araçlarda eco-roll modu yakıt tüketimini azaltmaya nasıl katkı sağlar?
explanationTarget: Eco-roll modunda aracın kinetik enerjisi en iyi şekilde kullanılır. Motor fren etkisi artırılmaz ve yuvarlanma fazı kısaltılmaz.
answerATarget: - aracın kinetik enerjisi azami şekilde kullanılır

questionTextSource: When must motorcycles be submitted for official inspection (Hauptuntersuchung)?
explanationSource: Similarly to cars, motorcycles should be inspected every two years
answerASource: Every two years
answerBSource: Every three years
answerCSource: Every time they are re-registered
questionTextTarget: Motosikletler resmi muayeneye (Hauptuntersuchung) ne zaman götürülmelidir?
explanationTarget: Motosikletler otomobiller gibi iki yılda bir resmi muayeneye götürülmelidir.

questionTextSource: How can you tell when you need to bring your vehicle in for its next vehicle roadworthiness test?
explanationSource: The date for the next main inspection of your vehicle can be found in the certificate of registration part 1. In addition, the appointment is clearly visible on the inspection plate printed on your license plate.
answerASource: By looking at the inspection tag on the rear license plate
answerBSource: By reading the entry made in the registration certificate Part I
answerCSource: By reading the entry in the operating manual for my vehicle
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın bir sonraki yol güvenliği muayenesine ne zaman götürülmesi gerektiğini nasıl anlarsınız?
explanationTarget: Bir sonraki Hauptuntersuchung tarihi arka plakadaki muayene etiketinden ve tescil belgesi Bölüm I’deki kayıttan anlaşılır.
answerBTarget: Tescil belgesi Bölüm I’deki kaydı okuyarak

questionTextSource: You have bought a second-hand car. The official inspection (Hauptuntersuchung) has just been carried out. When is it due for its next official inspection?
explanationSource: If the main inspection of a used car has just happened, you must do the next general inspection after two years. Only for newly purchased cars, the deadline for the next general inspection is three years.
answerASource: After two years
answerBSource: After one year
answerCSource: After three years
questionTextTarget: İkinci el bir otomobil satın aldınız. Resmi muayene yeni yapılmış. Bir sonraki resmi muayene ne zaman gerekir?
explanationTarget: İkinci el araçta muayene yeni yapıldıysa bir sonraki Hauptuntersuchung iki yıl sonra gerekir.

questionTextSource: You have left your registered caravan trailer for six months during the winter on a campground. What applies as far as the official inspection (Hauptuntersuchung) is concerned?
explanationSource: Even if you have parked your caravan on a campsite, you must meet the deadline for the general inspection. Technical defects, such as rust, can occur at any time and become a safety hazard if they're not repaired.
answerASource: The date indicated on the test stamp must be observed
answerBSource: The date indicated on the test stamp is extended by the time the caravan was stationary on the campground
questionTextTarget: Tescilli karavan römorkunuzu kış boyunca altı ay kamp alanında bıraktınız. Resmi muayene açısından ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Muayene etiketinde belirtilen tarihe uyulmalıdır. Kamp alanında bekleme süresi muayene tarihini uzatmaz.
answerBTarget: Muayene etiketindeki tarih, karavanın kamp alanında beklediği süre kadar uzar

questionTextSource: You have been requested to present a truck with a gross vehicle weight rating of 18 t for its vehicle roadworthiness test. What vehicle documents do you need?
explanationSource: With your trucks with a maximum mass of 18 t you should use the log book and the registration certificate Part I (also called registration papers) have with you.
answerASource: Registration certificate Part I (Motor Vehicle Registration)
answerBSource: Inspection log book
answerCSource: Registration certificate Part II (Motor Vehicle Title)
questionTextTarget: 18 t izin verilen toplam ağırlığa sahip bir kamyonu yol güvenliği muayenesine götürmeniz istendi. Hangi araç belgelerine ihtiyacınız var?
explanationTarget: Bu kamyon için tescil belgesi Bölüm I ve muayene defteri gerekir. Tescil belgesi Bölüm II genellikle yanınızda taşınmaz.

questionTextSource: You are requested to present a coach for its safety test. What vehicle documents do you need?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: Registration certificate Part I (Motor Vehicle Registration)
answerBSource: Inspection log book
answerCSource: Registration certificate Part II (Motor Vehicle Title)
questionTextTarget: Bir tur otobüsünü güvenlik testine götürmeniz istendi. Hangi araç belgelerine ihtiyacınız var?
explanationTarget: Güvenlik testi için tescil belgesi Bölüm I ve muayene defteri gerekir. Tescil belgesi Bölüm II gerekli değildir.

questionTextSource: You have been requested to present a trailer with a gross vehicle weight rating of 18 t for its vehicle roadworthiness test. What vehicle documents do you need?
explanationSource: must be at the trailer with a maximum total weight of 18 t, which presented for general inspection, requires the registration certificate part I (registration certificate), and the log book.
answerASource: Registration certificate Part I (Motor Vehicle Registration)
answerBSource: Inspection log book
answerCSource: Registration certificate Part II (Motor Vehicle Title)
questionTextTarget: 18 t izin verilen toplam ağırlığa sahip bir römorku yol güvenliği muayenesine götürmeniz istendi. Hangi araç belgelerine ihtiyacınız var?
explanationTarget: Bu römork için tescil belgesi Bölüm I ve muayene defteri gerekir.

questionTextSource: What is entered in the inspection log book?
explanationSource:
In the log book the date of the general inspection and safety check is entered.
The date of the Fahrteinschreibeüberprüfung not one of them.
answerASource: - vehicle roadworthiness test
answerBSource: - safety test
answerCSource: - tachograph inspection
questionTextTarget: Muayene defterine neler işlenir?
explanationTarget: Muayene defterine yol güvenliği muayenesi ve güvenlik testi işlenir. Takograf kontrolü bu kapsamda değildir.

questionTextSource: How can you tell when your vehicle needs to be brought in for its next safety inspection?
explanationSource: When you are presented to a security check next time have to, you realize the SP sign with Mark. The other two answers are wrong.
answerASource: By looking at the safety inspection plate with the test sticker
answerBSource: By reading the entry made in the registration certificate Part I
answerCSource: By looking at the inspection tag on the license plate
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın bir sonraki güvenlik muayenesine ne zaman götürülmesi gerektiğini nasıl anlarsınız?
explanationTarget: Bir sonraki güvenlik testi tarihi SP plakası üzerindeki test etiketinden anlaşılır.
answerATarget: Test etiketi olan güvenlik muayenesi plakasına bakarak
answerBTarget: Tescil belgesi Bölüm I’deki kaydı okuyarak

questionTextSource: What alterations can result in the permit for use (Betriebserlaubnis) being cancelled?
explanationSource: Adding a sidecar or fitting tires of a different size impact the way your vehicle behave and will thus lead the cancelation of your permit for use. Fitting a rear fog lamp does not change the way your vehicle behave and thus is permitted.
answerASource: Fitting a sidecar
answerBSource: Fitting tyres of a different size
answerCSource: Fitting a rear fog lamp
questionTextTarget: Hangi değişiklikler işletme izninin iptal olmasına neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yan sepet takmak veya farklı ebatta lastik takmak aracın davranışını değiştirebilir ve işletme iznini geçersiz kılabilir. Arka sis lambası takmak bu kapsamda değildir.

questionTextSource: What alterations can result in the permit for use (Betriebserlaubnis) being cancelled?
explanationSource: Your vehicule's next roadworthiness test can be seen either in the Part I of the registration certificate or on the inspection tag that is on your rear license plate
answerASource: Fitting an engine of different power
answerBSource: Fitting fairings
answerCSource: Fitting a radio
questionTextTarget: Hangi değişiklikler işletme izninin iptal olmasına neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Farklı güçte motor takmak ve kaplama/fairing takmak aracın tipini veya davranışını değiştirebilir ve işletme iznini geçersiz kılabilir. Radyo takmak genellikle bu sonucu doğurmaz.

questionTextSource: What alterations can result in the permit for use (Betriebserlaubnis) being cancelled?
explanationSource: Changing the gear ratio or the engine power impact the way your vehicle behave and will thus lead the cancelation of your permit for use
answerASource: Alterations to the gear ratio
answerBSource: Alterations to the engine to increase power
answerCSource: Fitting an electric starter
questionTextTarget: Hangi değişiklikler işletme izninin iptal olmasına neden olabilir?

answerCSource: - must be presented for inspection at the technical test centre
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın motorlu taşıt mali sorumluluk sigortası sona ermişse ne gerekir?
explanationTarget: Sigortası sona eren araç trafiğe çıkarılamaz. Tescil merkezinde iptal veya teknik test merkezine muayene bu sorunun doğru sonucu değildir.

questionTextSource: When are you not allowed to drive a motorized bicycle on public roads?

answerCSource: When no motor vehicle tax has been paid

explanationTarget: Susturucuyu boşaltmak ve dişli oranını değiştirmek işletme iznini iptal edebilir. İkinci ayna takmak genellikle iptal sebebi değildir.

questionTextSource: Which documents must you carry?
explanationSource: When driving you must always carry proof of insurance, permit for use, test certificate in case it is controlled by the police

explanationSource: As a car driver, you must always have your driver's license and vehicle registration certificate (certificate of registration part 1) with you. The vehicle title (registration certificate part 2) should be kept safely at home. It serves as proof of ownership and is not needed while driving.

questionTextSource: A technical modification to your vehicle means that the operating licence is extinguished. What consequences should you anticipate if you nevertheless use the vehicle on public roads?
explanationSource: If you use your vehicle on public roads despite the expired operating license, you will lose your insurance cover because the vehicle is no longer the one that was originally insured. Since there is an obligation to have insurance in Germany, driving without insurance is a misdemeanor. In the event of a police check, a fine will be imposed and you must expect an entry in the register of fitness to drive.
answerASource: A public authority fine
answerBSource: An entry into the Central Register of Road Traffic Offenders
answerCSource: The loss of my insurance cover
questionTextTarget: Aracınızdaki teknik değişiklik nedeniyle işletme izni sona erdi. Buna rağmen aracı kamu yollarında kullanırsanız hangi sonuçlarla karşılaşabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Geçersiz işletme izniyle trafiğe çıkarsanız para cezası, trafik siciline kayıt ve sigorta kapsamının kaybı gibi sonuçlarla karşılaşabilirsiniz.

explanationTarget: Gerekli sürücü belgesi sınıfına sahip olmalı ve ADR belgesini yanınızda taşımalısınız. En az 25 yaşında olma şartı yoktur.

explanationSource: These figures provide information about the transported hazardous goods. 33 is our 1203, the UN number is a risk number (highly flammable liquid) (flash point below 23 ° C) (also called material number) (gasoline or petrol)

answerCSource: - represent the maximum load capacity

answerCTarget: - en az 3 yıl kazasız araç kullanmış olmak

questionTextSource: An inspection has been performed because of a technical modification made to your vehicle. What are you obliged to do?
explanationSource: After the technical modification of a vehicle, an acceptance report is usually created during the assessment. However, an entry may also be made in part 1 of the certificate of registration. The protocol must be carried by the vehicle driver during each journey. On request, the protocol must be presented, for example, during a stop-and-search operation.
answerASource: - carry the inspection report or confirmation in my vehicle, and have the registration in certificate Part I corrected if necessary
answerBSource: - forward the inspection report or confirmation to the vehicle manufacturer
answerCSource: - stick the inspection report or confirmation into the designated place in the registration certificate Part II
questionTextTarget: Aracınızda teknik değişiklik nedeniyle bir inceleme yapıldı. Ne yapmakla yükümlüsünüz?

answerCTarget: - inceleme raporunu veya onayı tescil belgesi Bölüm II’de ayrılmış yere yapıştırmak

questionTextSource: The maximum design speed of a moped exceeds 25 km/h due to a prohibited technical modification. What are the consequences for me if I ride such a moped on public roads?
explanationSource: As soon as you change anything on your vehicle without a general operating permit or approval, the operating permit expires. Since riding a moped over 25 km/h is already class AM or higher, you are riding without a valid driving licence.
answerASource: I am committing a criminal offence for driving without a licence
answerBSource: I am committing an administrative offence because I have no authorisation to operate the moped
answerCSource: None, provided I do not drive any faster than 25 km/h
questionTextTarget: Yasak teknik değişiklik nedeniyle bir mopedin azami tasarım hızı 25 km/saatten fazla. Böyle bir mopedi kamu yollarında kullanırsam sonuçları nelerdir?
explanationTarget: Bu durumda gerekli sürücü belgesi olmadan araç kullanmış olabilirsiniz ve işletme izni de geçersiz olur. 25 km/saatten hızlı gitmemeniz sonucu değiştirmez.
answerATarget: Sürücü belgesi olmadan araç kullanma nedeniyle suç işlemiş olurum
answerBTarget: Moped için işletme iznim olmadığı için idari suç işlemiş olurum

questionTextSource: An assessment is required following modifications to your vehicle. When must this be performed?

answerCSource: When demanded by the registration authority

questionTextSource: What technical modification to a motorbike will generally void the issued operating licence?
explanationSource: The original gear ratio of the pinion and sprocket is part of the operating license granted. All changes that affect the drive of your vehicle must be registered. This means that the operating permit expires if you change the transmission ratio.
answerASource: Any change to the gear ratio of the pinion and chain wheel
answerBSource: Any change to the engine power
answerCSource: Installing a tankbag
questionTextTarget: Bir motosiklette hangi teknik değişiklik genel olarak verilen işletme iznini geçersiz kılar?
explanationTarget: Pinyon ve zincir dişlisi oranını değiştirmek veya motor gücünü değiştirmek işletme iznini geçersiz kılabilir. Depo çantası takmak geçersiz kılmaz.
answerATarget: Pinyon ve zincir dişlisi oranında değişiklik

questionTextSource: What technical modifications to a two-wheeler could result in the withdrawal of the vehicle’s type approval?
explanationSource:
The operating licence expires if modifications are made to the vehicle that change the vehicle type, could cause a hazard or worsen the exhaust or noise values.
The operating licence of your two-wheeler may lose its validity if, for example, you install special handlebars or use a wheel/tyre combination that is not explicitly approved for your two-wheeler. Two-wheeler is approved.
answerASource: Fitting customised handlebars
answerBSource: Changing the wheel/tyre combination
answerCSource: Installing an identical engine
questionTextTarget: İki tekerlekli araçta hangi teknik değişiklikler tip onayının iptaline neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Özel gidon takmak veya onaylı olmayan jant/lastik kombinasyonunu değiştirmek tip onayını geçersiz kılabilir. Aynı motoru takmak genellikle buna neden olmaz.

questionTextSource: What is the latest date on which you must display the new proof of insurance on your two-wheeler in order to continue driving without any gap in your cover?
explanationSource: From 1 March 2023, the new insurance licence plates will become invalid. In order to be allowed to continue riding without transition, take care of a new licence plate in good time.
answerASource: - 1st March
answerBSource: - 1st January
answerCSource: - 1st June
questionTextTarget: Kesintisiz sigorta kapsamıyla sürmeye devam etmek için yeni sigorta kanıtını iki tekerlekli aracınızda en geç hangi tarihte göstermelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Sigorta plakası her yıl 1 Mart’ta değişir. Kesintisiz kullanmak için yeni kanıt en geç 1 Mart’ta takılı olmalıdır.

questionTextSource: The validity of the insurance plate on your bike has expired. What are the consequences for its use on public roads?
explanationSource:
It is forbidden to use a two-wheeler on public roads without a valid insurance license plate. The law requires compulsory insurance so that possible accident costs are covered. 
You are allowed to push your two-wheeler on a sidewalk without a valid insurance license plate, as this does not count as “driving”.
answerASource: - no longer ride the bike
answerBSource: - push the bike on a pavement
answerCSource: - park the bike in a car park
questionTextTarget: Bisikletinizin/motorlu iki tekerlekli aracınızın sigorta plakasının geçerliliği sona erdi. Kamu yollarında kullanımı için sonuçlar nelerdir?
explanationTarget: Geçerli sigorta plakası olmadan aracı kamu yollarında süremezsiniz. Ancak aracı kaldırımda itebilirsiniz. Otoparkta park etmek bu sürüş yasağını ortadan kaldırmaz.

questionTextSource: The suspension of your motor vehicle has been lowered and an expert opinion must be obtained. When is this required?
explanationSource: If you lower a car you need this change on the chassis to be officially accepted. Therefore, the assessment must be done immediately. You must always carry the report or confirmation with you and, if necessary, have this technical change registered in the certificate of registration part 1, the registration certificate.

answerBSource: Together with the next official inspection (Hauptuntersuchung), at least 1 year after the alteration
answerCSource: When requested by the vehicle licensing authority
questionTextTarget: Motorlu aracınızın süspansiyonu alçaltıldı ve ekspertiz raporu alınması gerekiyor. Bu ne zaman gereklidir?
explanationTarget: Araç alçaltıldıktan hemen sonra teknik değerlendirme yapılmalıdır. Bir sonraki resmi muayeneyi bekleyemezsiniz.
answerBTarget: Bir sonraki resmi muayene ile birlikte, değişiklikten en az 1 yıl sonra

questionTextSource: You are holding a driving permit class B. Your car has the following specifications: - empty mass 1900 kg - permissible total mass 2400 kg - permissible towed load 1500 kg Which trailer are you allowed to tow?
explanationSource: Regardless of the information, a vehicle plus a trailer may only have a restricted total weight of 3,500 kg for a Class B driving license. When the car is fully loaded, the loaded trailer must not weigh more than 1,100 kg. Exception: The car has a maximum permissible mass of 3,500 kg and the trailer weighs less than 750 kg.

explanationTarget: C1 sınıfı ile en fazla 750 kg izin verilen toplam ağırlığa sahip römork çekebilirsiniz.

The extension of the driving license can be applied for at the earliest 6 months before the expiry of the validity period (5 years) and the end of the validity period is noted on the driving license.

explanationTarget: Geçerlilik süresini uzatmak için uygunluk ve görme yeteneği kanıtı gerekir. İlk yardım eğitiminin tekrar kanıtlanması gerekmez.

questionTextSource: You are driving a lorry in commercial freight transport. What do you have to be able to prove on request?
explanationSource:
As a truck driver in commercial freight transport, you must have the following documents with you:
        1. Documentation for transport: According to Section 7 Paragraph 1 No. 3 of the Road Haulage Act (GüKG), a transport document must be carried that contains information about the goods being transported, the sender and the recipient.
        2. Valid professional driver qualification: According to the Professional Driver Qualification Act (BKrFQG), you must provide evidence of appropriate qualifications, for example by entering the key number “95” on your driving license.
        3. Valid liability insurance for damage to goods: According to Section 7a GüKG, proof of liability insurance for damage to goods is required to cover liability for transported goods.

Carrying these documents is required by law and serves to ensure orderly and safe road transport.
answerASource: The documentation for transport
answerBSource: A valid professional driver qualification
answerCSource: A valid cargo liability insurance policy
questionTextTarget: Ticari yük taşımacılığında kamyon kullanıyorsunuz. Talep halinde neyi kanıtlayabilmelisiniz?

questionTextSource: When do you need an authorisation to transport goods in accordance with the Road Haulage Act?

answerBSource: - the transport distance is more than 100 km

questionTextSource: What modifications to the vehicle could result in the license to drive it being cancelled?
explanationSource: Changing the type of steering wheel or modifying the exhaust system impact the way your vehicle behave and will thus lead the cancelation of your permit for use. Replacing an engine by a similar one does not change the way your vehicle behave and thus is permitted.
answerASource: Installing a different type steering wheel

questionTextSource: Which of the following regulations govern the road transport of hazardous goods?

explanationTarget: Tehlikeli maddelerin karayoluyla taşınması GGVSEB ve ADR tarafından düzenlenir. Alman Medeni Kanunu bu özel düzenleme değildir.

questionTextSource: What proofs may be necessary for cross-border road haulage services?

questionTextSource: What is the correct response if, when reversing a combination vehicle the view to the rear is impeded?
explanationSource: If you drive backwards with a vehicle combination and your view is restricted to the rear, you must make sure that you do not endanger other road users. You should therefore be advised into traffic. This also applies to factory premises.

answerBSource: A person directing is only required when driving into a priority road
answerCSource: A person directing is not needed when on a factory premises
questionTextTarget: Araç kombinasyonuyla geri giderken arkaya görüş engelleniyorsa doğru davranış nedir?

questionTextSource: You are driving on a road with potholes and your trailer starts "jumping". What must you do?
explanationSource: You should not accelerate any further as this would cause the trailer to build up vibrations. Brake slightly instead. A reduced speed brings the trailer back under control.
answerASource: Reduce speed in order to avoid skidding
answerBSource: Accelerate to keep the combination of vehicles straight
answerCSource: Proceed at the same speed and avoid potholes
questionTextTarget: Çukurlu bir yolda gidiyorsunuz ve römorkunuz “zıplamaya” başlıyor. Ne yapmalısınız?

answerBTarget: Araç kombinasyonunu düz tutmak için hızlanmak
answerCTarget: Aynı hızla devam edip çukurlardan kaçınmak

questionTextSource: What must you remember when you want to use a trailer with overrun brakes behind your car?
explanationSource: Make sure that the breakaway cable is properly fastened. It has the effect that, in case of detachment, the trailer brake will automatically tighten and bring the trailer to a halt. The overrun brake has nothing to do with the maximum permissible speed.
answerASource: The actual total mass of the trailer must not exceed the towed load permitted for the car
answerBSource: The breakaway cable is connected to the towing vehicle
answerCSource: The permissible maximum speed for this combination of vehicles is 60 km/h, including on autobahns
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın arkasında atalet frenli römork kullanmak istediğinizde neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Römorkun gerçek toplam ağırlığı aracınız için izin verilen çekme yükünü aşmamalı ve kopma emniyet halatı çekici araca bağlanmalıdır. Bu kombinasyon için otoyolda genel azami hız 60 km/saat değildir.

answerBTarget: Kopma emniyet halatı çekici araca bağlanmalıdır
answerCTarget: Bu araç kombinasyonu için otoyollarda da izin verilen azami hız 60 km/saattir

questionTextSource: What is designated as towed load?
explanationSource: Only the actually dragged load is called trailer load, in other words the weight of the trailer. The manufacturer sets this value for carrying a trailer.
answerASource: The actual load being towed
answerBSource: The permissible total mass of the trailer
answerCSource: The useful load of the trailer
questionTextTarget: Çekilen yük olarak ne adlandırılır?

questionTextSource: What can affect the driving stability of a towed trailer?
explanationSource:
The load of a trailer should be distributed so that the center of gravity is as close as possible to the axle of the trailer. This ensures optimal driving stability and controllability of the trailer.
A load center of gravity that is far back can have a serious impact on the driving stability of your trailer. This can cause the trailer to sway more easily during sudden steering movements or at higher speeds, increasing the risk of an accident.
If the tire pressure on your trailer is too low, it can affect the driving stability of your trailer. On the one hand, low tire pressure leads to poorer road grip, which makes your trailer more uncontrollable when cornering. On the other hand, low tire pressure leads to increased tire wear, which increases the risk of tire damage while driving.
A shock absorber that is already leaking can also have a negative impact on the driving stability of your trailer. The leaking shock absorber on your trailer loses its damping properties, which can lead to unstable driving behavior and dangerous situations that are difficult to control.
answerASource: A centre of gravity that is far back in the trailer
answerBSource: Insufficient tyre pressure in the trailer tyres
answerCSource: A leaking shock absorber

questionTextSource: A single-axle trailer has an actual gross weight of 600 kg. What is the minimum possible vertical load?
explanationSource: The bearing load is the mass that rests on the coupling device of the towing vehicle. To determine it, the car driver can place a piece of wood or a pipe underneath the coupling point of the trailer and place a bathroom scale underneath. The bearing load is displayed. The minimum load to be carried by the towing vehicle shall not be less than 4% of the trailer's total weight for trailers with a gross vehicle weight of not more than 3.5 tons. However, a minimum load of 25 kg is sufficient. In this example, the minimum support load is 24 kg. When loading the trailer, you, as a car driver, must be careful not to undercut or exceed the minimum and maximum permitted load. By shifting the load, you can influence the bearing load.

explanationSource:
A break from driving is time that the driver spends recovering. During this time, the driver is not behind the steering wheel of the vehicle and does not carry out any driving activities. Work such as loading and unloading the vehicle is also forbidden during this time. 
Time spent by the driver in the passenger seat is also a break from driving.

You calculate the total permissible towed mass using the following data:
Maximum authorised mass of the towing vehicle plus the maximum authorised mass of the trailer minus the drawbar load of the trailer, if this is greater than the maximum authorised drawbar load of the towing vehicle.

questionTextSource: What should you factor in when planning your route?
explanationSource: When planning your route, you should take into account the driving and rest times and the regulations of the other country in the case of cross-border traffic.
answerASource: The driving and rest periods
answerBSource: The rules of other countries when undertaking cross-border journeys
answerCSource: The prohibition on driving on the public holidays of the individual federal states
questionTextTarget: Rota planlarken neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Sürüş ve dinlenme süreleri, sınır ötesi yolculuklarda diğer ülkelerin kuralları ve eyaletlerin resmi tatillerindeki sürüş yasakları dikkate alınmalıdır.
answerBTarget: Sınır ötesi yolculuklarda diğer ülkelerin kuralları
answerCTarget: Ayrı federal eyaletlerin resmi tatillerindeki sürüş yasağı

questionTextSource: What should be observed in relation to route planning?
explanationSource: When planning your route, you should be aware of possible traffic obstructions due to road works, the holiday travel regulations and driving and rest times. All answers are correct.
answerASource: The rules contained in the German summer holiday traffic regulations
answerBSource: The regulations on driving and rest periods
answerCSource: Possible obstructions of traffic caused by roadworks
questionTextTarget: Rota planlamasıyla ilgili neye dikkat edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Alman yaz tatili trafik yönetmeliği, sürüş ve dinlenme süreleri kuralları ve yol çalışmaları nedeniyle olası trafik engelleri dikkate alınmalıdır.
answerATarget: Alman yaz tatili trafik yönetmeliğindeki kurallar
answerBTarget: Sürüş ve dinlenme sürelerine ilişkin kurallar
answerCTarget: Yol çalışmaları nedeniyle olası trafik engelleri

questionTextSource: You are transporting general cargo. What should be noted in relation to route planning?
explanationSource: When transporting general cargo, you should consider all 3 answers. The order of loading and unloading points, the time required for loading and unloading (save time), and the application of driving and rest times in connection with the Working Hours Act. (rest and recharge your batteries)
answerASource: The sequence of the points for loading and unloading
answerBSource: The time required for loading and unloading
answerCSource: The application of the rules on driving and rest periods in conjunction with the German Working Time Act
questionTextTarget: Parça yük taşıyorsunuz. Rota planlamasında neye dikkat edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Yükleme ve boşaltma noktalarının sırası, yükleme-boşaltma için gereken süre ve sürüş/dinlenme süreleri ile Alman Çalışma Süresi Yasası dikkate alınmalıdır.
answerBTarget: Yükleme ve boşaltma için gereken süre
answerCTarget: Sürüş ve dinlenme süreleri kurallarının Alman Çalışma Süresi Yasası ile birlikte uygulanması

questionTextSource: What should you note when using your navigation system?
answerASource: You must consider the vehicle dimensions on the proposed route
answerBSource: Mounted mobile navigation systems may not impede the forward view
answerCSource: The arrival time calculated at the start of the journey takes account of mandatory driving and rest periods
questionTextTarget: Navigasyon sisteminizi kullanırken neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Önerilen rotada araç ölçülerini dikkate almalısınız. Monte edilmiş mobil navigasyon cihazları öne görüşü engellememelidir. Başlangıçta hesaplanan varış saati zorunlu sürüş ve dinlenme sürelerini hesaba katmayabilir.
answerATarget: Önerilen rotada araç ölçülerini dikkate almalısınız
answerBTarget: Monte edilmiş mobil navigasyon sistemleri öne görüşü engellememelidir
answerCTarget: Yolculuğun başında hesaplanan varış saati zorunlu sürüş ve dinlenme sürelerini dikkate alır

questionTextSource: What must you note when driving in other European countries in winter?
answerASource: - minimum tread depth of tyres
answerBSource: - obligation to fit your vehicle with winter tyres
answerCSource: - obligation to carry snow chains in your vehicle
questionTextTarget: Kışın diğer Avrupa ülkelerinde araç kullanırken neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Diğer ülkelerde lastiklerin asgari diş derinliği, kış lastiği zorunluluğu ve araçta kar zinciri bulundurma zorunluluğu farklı olabilir.

questionTextSource: Your motorcycle is fully loaded. How do you drive down a long mountain pass road?
explanationSource: When driving down over a long period of time, your brakes are at risk to overheat. To avoid this, try to use the braking effect of the engine on a low gear and limit the acceleration/deceleration in between turns.
answerASource: Utilize the braking effect of the engine by changing to a lower gear
answerBSource: Do not drive too fast between bends in order to avoid overheating the brakes
answerCSource: Use the front wheel brake only
questionTextTarget: Motosikletiniz tamamen yüklü. Uzun bir dağ geçidi inişinde nasıl sürersiniz?
explanationTarget: Düşük vitese geçerek motor freninden yararlanmalı ve virajlar arasında çok hızlı gitmeyerek frenlerin aşırı ısınmasını önlemelisiniz. Sadece ön freni kullanmamalısınız.
answerATarget: Düşük vitese geçerek motor freninden yararlanmak
answerBTarget: Frenlerin aşırı ısınmasını önlemek için virajlar arasında çok hızlı gitmemek

questionTextSource: When is there a danger of the motorcycle's front wheel lifting off the road?
explanationSource: Fast and sudden accelerations could lead to the front wheel lifting off the road. This could happen when accelerating on low gear or releasing the clutch suddenly when starting to drive
answerASource: On rapid acceleration in low gear
answerBSource: If the clutch is suddenly released on starting off
answerCSource: When the handbrake is pulled on hard
questionTextTarget: Motosikletin ön tekerleğinin yoldan kesilme tehlikesi ne zaman vardır?
explanationTarget: Düşük viteste hızlı hızlanırken veya kalkışta debriyaj aniden bırakılırsa ön tekerlek yerden kalkabilir. El frenini sert çekmek ön tekerleği kaldırmaz.

questionTextSource: You have changed the motorcycle. For the first time, you are driving a motorcycle with fairings. What is different?
explanationSource: Fairings do not decrease the danger of falling. However, it increases the sensitivity to the side wind but diminishes the front wind which creates a tendency to drive faster
answerASource: As the wind pressure is reduced, there is a tendency to drive faster
answerBSource: Sensitivity to side wind increases
answerCSource: The danger of falling has decreased
