questionTextTarget: Motosikleti değiştirdiniz. İlk kez kaplamalı/fairingli motosiklet kullanıyorsunuz. Ne farklıdır?
explanationTarget: Rüzgâr basıncı azaldığı için daha hızlı sürme eğilimi olabilir ve yan rüzgâra duyarlılık artar. Düşme tehlikesi azalmaz.
answerATarget: Rüzgâr basıncı azaldığı için daha hızlı sürme eğilimi vardır

questionTextSource: What must you particularly remember when carrying side-mounted cases or bags?
explanationSource: Adding luggage to your motorcycle will impact its behavior on the road. Make sure you do not exceed the maximum speed recommended by your manufacturer for driving with luggage and that you distribute weight evenly (on the right and left) to keep your motorcycle stable
answerASource: To avoid an uneven distribution of weight
answerBSource: Not to exceed the top speed recommended by the manufacturer of the motorcycle
answerCSource: With a full load, apply the rear brakes only
questionTextTarget: Yanlara takılan çanta veya kılıflar taşırken özellikle neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Ağırlığın dengesiz dağılımından kaçınmalı ve motosiklet üreticisinin önerdiği azami hızı aşmamalısınız. Tam yüklüyken sadece arka fren kullanılmaz.
answerBTarget: Motosiklet üreticisinin önerdiği azami hızı aşmamak
answerCTarget: Tam yükte sadece arka frenleri kullanmak

questionTextSource: What happens if you engage too low a gear and quickly release the clutch when driving at high speed?
explanationSource: If you engage a gear that is too low and release the clutch, your motorcycle will brutally decelerate and could cause you to fall or slip sideways
answerASource: The rear wheel locks and can slip sideways
answerBSource: A fall is often unavoidable
answerCSource: The front wheel lifts off the ground
questionTextTarget: Yüksek hızda çok düşük vitese geçip debriyajı hızlı bırakırsanız ne olur?
explanationTarget: Arka tekerlek kilitlenip yana kayabilir ve düşme çoğu zaman kaçınılmaz olabilir. Ön tekerlek bu nedenle kalkmaz.
answerATarget: Arka tekerlek kilitlenir ve yana kayabilir

questionTextSource: What must you check on your motorcycle before you set off?
explanationSource: Before starting to drive, make sure that the rearview mirrors are correctly installed, adjusted and work properly (not broken, blind) and that the breaks work properly
answerASource: The adjustment of the rear-view mirrors
answerBSource: Brake fluid level, lever travel
answerCSource: Setting of the camshaft
questionTextTarget: Yola çıkmadan önce motosikletinizde neyi kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Dikiz aynalarının ayarını, fren hidroliği seviyesini ve kol/pedal boşluğunu kontrol etmelisiniz. Eksantrik mili ayarı günlük kontrol değildir.

questionTextSource: When do you have to increase tyre pressure?
explanationSource: Tire pressure need to be increased if driving with more weight (additional passenger, heavy luggage) or when driving for long distances especially at high speed
answerASource: When you have a passenger
answerBSource: When driving on autobahns for longer periods of time at high speed
answerCSource: When driving with heavy luggage
questionTextTarget: Lastik basıncını ne zaman artırmanız gerekir?
explanationTarget: Yolcu alındığında, otoyolda uzun süre yüksek hızla gidildiğinde ve ağır bagajla sürüşte lastik basıncı artırılmalıdır.
answerBTarget: Otoyollarda uzun süre yüksek hızla giderken

questionTextSource: What must you remember when taking a passenger?
explanationSource: A passenger increases the weight on your motorcycle. This makes accelerating and thus overtaking longer. It increases the centrifugal force when turning and increases the braking distance.
answerASource: Driving characteristics change on bends, particularly when entering and leaving the bend
answerBSource: Under the same conditions, overtaking requires a longer distance
answerCSource: Under the same conditions, the braking distance is reduced
questionTextTarget: Yolcu alırken neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Virajlarda, özellikle viraja giriş ve çıkışta sürüş özellikleri değişir. Aynı koşullarda sollama için daha uzun mesafe gerekir. Fren mesafesi azalmaz.
answerATarget: Virajlarda, özellikle viraja girerken ve çıkarken sürüş özellikleri değişir
answerBTarget: Aynı koşullarda sollama daha uzun mesafe gerektirir

questionTextSource: What must you do to be ready to brake?
explanationSource: By placing your hand on the handbrakes and foot over the brake pedal you improve your reaction time to break
answerASource: Place your hand on the handbrake lever
answerBSource: Position your foot over the brake pedal
answerCSource: Change to a higher gear
questionTextTarget: Frenlemeye hazır olmak için ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Elinizi el freni koluna koymalı ve ayağınızı fren pedalının üzerine konumlandırmalısınız. Daha yüksek vitese geçmek fren hazırlığı değildir.

questionTextSource: Why does the rear wheel of a motorcycle tend to lock when braking rather than the front wheel?
explanationSource: When breaking, more weight is applied on the front wheel and less on the back wheel which can lock the back wheel
answerASource: - the load on the rear wheel is reduced
answerBSource: - the rear wheel is still propelled
answerCSource: - the load on the rear wheel increases
questionTextTarget: Motosiklette arka tekerlek neden frenlemede ön tekerlekten daha kolay kilitlenir?
explanationTarget: Frenleme sırasında arka tekerlek üzerindeki yük azalır. Bu nedenle kilitlenme eğilimi artar.

questionTextSource: What is correct when driving round bends on downhill slopes?
explanationSource: When going downhill you need to break more than on bends on flat areas. You should therefore break enough before the bend, you should also keep your distance from the demarcation line from the oncoming traffic in case you need to tilt your motorcycle more
answerASource: Brake adequately before the bend so that no additional braking is needed on the bend
answerBSource: Start taking the bend so that you do not get into the area of oncoming traffic even when you are leaning far over
answerCSource: When you do not see any oncoming traffic, follow the ideal line and use the whole width of the roadway
questionTextTarget: Yokuş aşağı virajlarda sürüş sırasında hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Viraja girmeden önce yeterince fren yapmalısınız, böylece viraj içinde ek fren yapmanız gerekmez. Viraja öyle başlamalısınız ki fazla yatışta bile karşı şeride girmeyesiniz.
answerATarget: Virajdan önce yeterince frenlemek, virajda ek fren gerekmeyecek şekilde
answerBTarget: Viraja, fazla yatmış olsanız bile karşı trafik alanına girmeyecek şekilde başlamak
answerCTarget: Karşı trafik görünmüyorsa ideal çizgiyi izleyip yolun tüm genişliğini kullanmak

questionTextSource: You are driving round a bend at a brisk pace which is tighter than you first thought. What do you do?
explanationSource: In this situation, making a sharp steering movement will be dangerous and could lead to a fall. You should decelerate gradually and lean further to turn more. If you brake sharply while turning, a torque force would tilt you from leaning to one side to a more upward position which will increase the radius of your turn
answerASource: Throttle back, lean further over
answerBSource: Do not brake sharply
answerCSource: Make an immediate sharp steering movement
questionTextTarget: Canlı tempoda viraja giriyorsunuz ve viraj sandığınızdan daha dar çıkıyor. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Gazı azaltmalı, motosikleti daha fazla yatırmalı ve sert fren yapmaktan kaçınmalısınız. Ani sert direksiyon hareketi tehlikelidir.
answerCTarget: Hemen ani sert direksiyon hareketi yapmak

questionTextSource: What must you particularly remember when raising motorcycles onto their stands (centre stands)?
explanationSource: To avoid the motorcycle to tip over or fall, you must ensure that the ground is firm, even and not too steep on a downward slope
answerASource: - must be hard and even
answerBSource: - should not slope steeply downwards
answerCSource: - must not slope upwards
questionTextTarget: Motosikleti orta sehpaya kaldırırken özellikle neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Zemin sert ve düz olmalı, dik şekilde aşağı eğimli olmamalıdır. Yukarı eğim olması tek başına yasak değildir.

questionTextSource: Why is the rule of having to adapt your driving to your visibility particularly important in bends?
explanationSource: In a bend, there is limited visibility due to the curvature of the road. You should reduce your speed as unforeseen risk factors such as dirt on the road, obstacles or tighter bends could appear
answerASource: Because bends can be tighter than expected
answerBSource: Because dangerously soiled roadways may be recognized too late
answerCSource: Because otherwise you lose too much momentum
questionTextTarget: Görüşe göre sürüş kuralı virajlarda neden özellikle önemlidir?
explanationTarget: Virajlar beklenenden daha dar olabilir ve tehlikeli kirlenmiş yol yüzeyi geç fark edilebilir.
answerATarget: Çünkü virajlar beklenenden daha dar olabilir
answerBTarget: Çünkü tehlikeli şekilde kirlenmiş yol çok geç fark edilebilir
answerCTarget: Çünkü aksi halde çok fazla ivme kaybedersiniz

questionTextSource: How can you counteract centrifugal force?
explanationSource: The centrifugal force can be either reduced by driving at a slower speed or be counteracted by leaning over more. Accelerating will do the opposite and increase the centrifugal force
answerASource: By leaning over
answerBSource: By reducing speed
answerCSource: By accelerating rapidly
questionTextTarget: Merkezkaç kuvvetine nasıl karşı koyabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Merkezkaç kuvvetine yatış açısıyla ve hızı azaltarak karşı koyabilirsiniz. Hızlı hızlanma kuvveti artırır.

questionTextSource: What can happen if a motorcycle is accelerated rapidly?
explanationSource: Accelerating while turning will increase the centrifugal force which will increase the radius of your turn. This could result in being directed in incoming traffic or on the pavement. In a straight line accelerating rapidly decrease stability
answerASource: If turning left, the motorcycle could leave the roadway and endanger pedestrians on the pavement
answerBSource: If turning right, the motorcycle can veer into the path of oncoming traffic
answerCSource: If driving straight ahead, driving stability is increased in any case
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet hızlı şekilde hızlandırılırsa ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sola dönerken motosiklet yoldan çıkıp kaldırımdaki yayaları tehlikeye atabilir. Sağa dönerken karşı trafiğin yoluna savrulabilir. Düz giderken denge her durumda artmaz.
answerATarget: Sola dönerken motosiklet yoldan çıkabilir ve kaldırımdaki yayaları tehlikeye atabilir
answerBTarget: Sağa dönerken motosiklet karşı trafiğin yoluna savrulabilir
answerCTarget: Düz giderken sürüş dengesi her durumda artar

questionTextSource: What must be changed before driving with a heavy load?
explanationSource: When driving with heavy loads, make sure to increase the tire pressure and adjust the pre-tension in the suspension springs
answerASource: Pre-tensioning of the springs
answerBSource: Tyre pressure
answerCSource: Chain tension
questionTextTarget: Ağır yükle sürmeden önce ne değiştirilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Ağır yükte yay ön gerilimi, lastik basıncı ve gerekirse zincir gerginliği ayarlanmalıdır.

questionTextSource: Which checks are particularly important before setting off?
explanationSource: All three are important to check before starting to drive. Make sure your visor is in good condition and not damaged or scratched. If you carry weight, make sure it is evenly distributed to not impact your center of gravity and do not impact your stability. Also ensure that the rear tire is in good condition.
answerASource: Profile of the rear tyre
answerBSource: Even load (front/rear, right/left)
answerCSource: Condition of your visor
questionTextTarget: Yola çıkmadan önce hangi kontroller özellikle önemlidir?
explanationTarget: Arka lastik profili, yükün dengeli dağıtımı ve vizörün durumu kontrol edilmelidir.

questionTextSource: In which cases should you apply the brakes only very carefully?
explanationSource: You should break carefully on slippery surfaces such as wet roads, tram tracks, sewer covers, lane markings but also dirt roads, roads with sand, stones as well as when driving with new tires
answerASource: On roadways with loose chippings or sand
answerBSource: On tram tracks, sewer covers and lane markings
answerCSource: When driving for the first time with new tyres
questionTextTarget: Hangi durumlarda frenleri yalnızca çok dikkatli kullanmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Gevşek mıcır veya kumda, tramvay rayları/kanal kapakları/şerit çizgileri üzerinde ve yeni lastiklerle ilk sürüşte çok dikkatli fren yapılmalıdır.
answerATarget: Gevşek mıcır veya kum bulunan yollarda
answerBTarget: Tramvay raylarında, kanal kapaklarında ve şerit işaretlerinde

questionTextSource: What is the normal braking procedure for motorcycles?
explanationSource: You should apply both brakes which will result in a shorter stopping distance than only applying one of the breaks
answerASource: Applying both brakes
answerBSource: Applying the rear brake only
answerCSource: Applying the front brake only
questionTextTarget: Motosikletlerde normal frenleme işlemi nasıldır?
explanationTarget: Normal frenleme için her iki fren birlikte kullanılır.

questionTextSource: Why must both brakes on a motorcycle always be in perfect working order?
explanationSource: Both brakes are required to function in case one of them suddenly fail, the other one can take over. Additionally using both brakes diminish the stopping distance compared to breaking with just one break
answerASource: To achieve the shortest possible braking distance
answerBSource: To be able to brake if one of the brakes fails
answerCSource: To safely park the motorcycle on a downhill slope
questionTextTarget: Motosiklette iki frenin de her zaman kusursuz çalışması neden gereklidir?
explanationTarget: En kısa fren mesafesine ulaşmak ve frenlerden biri arızalanırsa fren yapabilmek için iki fren de kusursuz olmalıdır.
answerATarget: Mümkün olan en kısa fren mesafesine ulaşmak için
answerBTarget: Frenlerden biri arızalanırsa fren yapabilmek için
answerCTarget: Motosikleti yokuş aşağı güvenle park etmek için

questionTextSource: Is there a difference in the tendency of the wheels to lock?
explanationSource: When breaking, more weight is applied on the front wheel and less on the back wheel. For this reason, the back wheel tends to lock first
answerASource: Yes, as a rule, the rear wheel locks first
answerBSource: Yes, as a rule, the front wheel locks first
answerCSource: No, as a rule, both wheels lock at the same time
questionTextTarget: Tekerleklerin kilitlenme eğiliminde fark var mıdır?
explanationTarget: Evet. Kural olarak arka tekerlek önce kilitlenir.
answerATarget: Evet, kural olarak arka tekerlek önce kilitlenir
answerBTarget: Evet, kural olarak ön tekerlek önce kilitlenir
answerCTarget: Hayır, kural olarak iki tekerlek aynı anda kilitlenir

questionTextSource: Is there a difference in the braking action?
explanationSource: When breaking, more weight is applied on the front wheel and less on the back wheel thus the front brake provides more braking power
answerASource: Yes, as a rule the front wheel brake has greater braking action
answerBSource: Yes, as a rule the rear wheel brake has greater braking action
answerCSource: No, as a rule, both brakes have the same braking action
questionTextTarget: Frenleme etkisinde fark var mıdır?
explanationTarget: Evet. Kural olarak ön tekerlek freni daha büyük frenleme etkisine sahiptir.
answerATarget: Evet, kural olarak ön tekerlek freni daha büyük frenleme etkisine sahiptir
answerBTarget: Evet, kural olarak arka tekerlek freni daha büyük frenleme etkisine sahiptir
answerCTarget: Hayır, kural olarak iki fren aynı frenleme etkisine sahiptir

questionTextSource: You come unexpectedly upon a stretch of road with loose chippings. What do you do?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: Reduce speed cautiously
answerBSource: Avoid braking hard and leaning over
answerCSource: Apply the front brake only
questionTextTarget: Beklenmedik şekilde gevşek mıcır bulunan bir yol kesimine geldiniz. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Hızı dikkatlice azaltmalı, sert fren yapmaktan ve fazla yatmaktan kaçınmalısınız.
answerBTarget: Sert fren yapmaktan ve yatmaktan kaçınmak

questionTextSource: Your vehicle was parked for a long time in the open in moist weather. What must you reckon with when applying the brakes for the first time?
explanationSource: When wet, brakes are less effective and the wheels will have a tendency to lock more. It has however no impact on braking of the engine on a lower gear.
answerASource: The wheels have a dangerous tendency to lock
answerBSource: Reduced braking action
answerCSource: Reduced braking action of the engine
questionTextTarget: Aracınız uzun süre nemli havada açıkta park edildi. Frenleri ilk kullandığınızda neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Nem ve pas nedeniyle fren etkisi azalabilir ve tekerleklerin kilitlenme eğilimi tehlikeli şekilde değişebilir.
answerATarget: Tekerleklerin tehlikeli şekilde kilitlenme eğilimi vardır

questionTextSource: What can be the reason for a motorized bicycle skidding on bends?
explanationSource: Skidding risk is increases because of slippery surfaces such as wet road, ice, sand, dirt, leaves, cobblestones, manholes. It can also be created due to heavy braking.
answerASource: Heavy braking
answerBSource: Wet or icy road surface
answerCSource: Sand or loose chippings
questionTextTarget: Motorlu bisikletin virajda kaymasına ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sert fren, ıslak veya buzlu yol, kum veya gevşek mıcır virajda kaymaya neden olabilir.

questionTextSource: When does the braking distance increase?
explanationSource: The heavier the vehicle, the longer will be the braking distance. Downward slopes as well as slippery surfaces also increase the braking distance
answerASource: When driving down slopes
answerBSource: When carrying heavy luggage
answerCSource: When there is headwind
questionTextTarget: Fren mesafesi ne zaman artar?
explanationTarget: Yokuş aşağı sürüşte ve ağır bagaj taşırken fren mesafesi artar. Karşı rüzgâr fren mesafesini artırmaz.

questionTextSource: What particular characteristics of disc brakes must you remember when driving on a wet road surface?
explanationSource: As a car driver you have to take into account that when the street is wet the effect of the disc brakes usually takes effect much later than on a dry road.
answerASource: As a rule, the effect of disc brakes starts later than on a dry road surface
answerBSource: As a rule, the effect of disc brakes starts earlier than on a dry road surface
questionTextTarget: Islak yolda disk frenlerin hangi özel özelliğini unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Islak yolda disk frenlerin etkisi genellikle kuru yola göre daha geç başlar.
answerATarget: Kural olarak disk frenlerin etkisi kuru yola göre daha geç başlar
answerBTarget: Kural olarak disk frenlerin etkisi kuru yola göre daha erken başlar

questionTextSource: What increases the danger of "flying out" of a bend when driving at high speed?
explanationSource: Decelerating or accelerating your car will result in less steering effort. As a result, there is an increased danger of "flying out" of the curve at high speed. Uncouple to get more steering power.
answerASource: Braking
answerBSource: Accelerating
answerCSource: Disengaging the clutch
questionTextTarget: Yüksek hızla virajda giderken virajdan dışarı savrulma tehlikesini ne artırır?
explanationTarget: Virajda fren yapmak veya hızlanmak savrulma tehlikesini artırabilir. Debriyajı ayırmak da dengeyi bozabilir.

questionTextSource: What must you take into consideration when checking tyre pressure?
explanationSource: When checking tire pressure, you must also take into account the temperature and load of the vehicle. These can influence the tire pressure. By contrast, the material of the wheel rim doesn't matter.
answerASource: Load/Number of passengers in the car
answerBSource: Tyre temperature
answerCSource: Material of the wheels (steel/aluminium)
questionTextTarget: Lastik basıncını kontrol ederken neyi dikkate almalısınız?
explanationTarget: Lastik basıncı yük/yolcu sayısına ve lastik sıcaklığına göre değerlendirilmelidir. Jant malzemesi belirleyici değildir.

questionTextSource: You drive round a bend once at 30 km/h and again at 60 km/h. How does the centrifugal force change?
explanationSource: The centrifugal force quadruples when the speed is doubled, that is, when you take the curve at 60 km/h the second time.
answerASource: - is four times as high
answerBSource: - is twice as high
answerCSource: - is the same
questionTextTarget: Bir virajı önce 30 km/saat, sonra 60 km/saat hızla alıyorsunuz. Merkezkaç kuvveti nasıl değişir?
explanationTarget: Hız iki katına çıkarsa merkezkaç kuvveti dört katına çıkar.

questionTextSource: What increases the effect of centrifugal force on the vehicle when driving round bends?
explanationSource: The speed has an immediate effect on the level of centrifugal force. Your braking distance quadruples when you drive at twice the speed. The centrifugal force increases the smaller the curve radius. The tire pressure has no effect on the centrifugal force.
answerASource: Higher speed
answerBSource: Smaller radius of a bend
answerCSource: Higher tyre pressure
questionTextTarget: Virajda merkezkaç kuvvetinin araca etkisini ne artırır?
explanationTarget: Daha yüksek hız ve daha küçük viraj yarıçapı merkezkaç kuvvetinin etkisini artırır. Daha yüksek lastik basıncı bu etkiyi artırmaz.

questionTextSource: You are driving a motorcycle with sidecar on the right. Which driving technique must you use on bends?
explanationSource: Driving with a sidecar increase your weight, you thus need to go slower when turning
answerASource: Moderate throttle on right-hand bends
answerBSource: Release throttle and brake lightly on left-hand bends
answerCSource: Always disengage the clutch on all bends
questionTextTarget: Sağda yan sepeti olan motosiklet kullanıyorsunuz. Virajlarda hangi sürüş tekniğini kullanmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Sağ virajlarda ılımlı gaz verilmeli, sol virajlarda gaz kesilip hafif fren yapılmalıdır. Tüm virajlarda debriyajı ayırmak doğru değildir.
answerBTarget: Sol virajlarda gazı bırakıp hafif fren yapmak
answerCTarget: Tüm virajlarda her zaman debriyajı ayırmak

questionTextSource: Where should a passenger on a motorcycle with sidecar sit to reduce the risk of tipping over on bends?
explanationSource: In order to keep a motorcycle with a sidecar stable, the weight should be equaly distributed on each side of the center of gravity. The second passenger therefore should sit in the sidecar
answerASource: In the sidecar
answerBSource: On the motorcycle
answerCSource: The position of the occupants has no significance
questionTextTarget: Yan sepetli motosiklette virajlarda devrilme riskini azaltmak için yolcu nerede oturmalıdır?
explanationTarget: Devrilme riskini azaltmak için yolcu yan sepette oturmalıdır.

questionTextSource: What can you do if the sidecar lifts off the ground on a right-hand bend when you are driving a motorcycle and sidecar (sidecar on the right)?
explanationSource: When turning right, a torque force will push the sidecar up. To reduce this torque you can slow down, shift your body weight to the right and make a wider turn.
answerASource: Release throttle, brake, shift your body weight to the right
answerBSource: Reduce steering lock angle, trace a wider arc within the lane you are travelling
answerCSource: Increase steering lock angle, accelerate
questionTextTarget: Sağda yan sepetli motosiklet kullanırken sağ virajda yan sepet yerden kalkarsa ne yapabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Gazı bırakmalı, fren yapmalı, vücut ağırlığınızı sağa kaydırmalı ve virajı daha geniş bir yayla almalısınız. Daha fazla direksiyon kırıp hızlanmak tehlikelidir.
answerATarget: Gazı bırakmak, fren yapmak, vücut ağırlığını sağa kaydırmak
answerBTarget: Direksiyon açısını azaltmak, şeridiniz içinde daha geniş yay çizmek

questionTextSource: What can happen to a motorcycle with a sidecar attached on the right when driving too fast round a right-hand bend?
explanationSource: When turning right, a torque force will push the sidecar up. At high speed the sidecar could be lifted-up, loose contact with the ground and tip over.
answerASource: The sidecar lifts off the ground and the combination tips over
answerBSource: The motorcycle lifts off the ground and the combination tips over to the right
questionTextTarget: Sağda yan sepet takılı motosiklet sağ virajı çok hızlı alırsa ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yan sepet yerden kalkabilir ve kombinasyon devrilebilir.
answerATarget: Yan sepet yerden kalkar ve kombinasyon devrilir
answerBTarget: Motosiklet yerden kalkar ve kombinasyon sağa devrilir

questionTextSource: So far, you have only driven solo motorcycles. You now change over to a combination (sidecar on the right, unbraked). How does driving differ?
explanationSource: As the sidecar is attached to your right, you cannot lean right and need to steer instead. When accelerating the sidecar tends to be pulled to the right. When breaking the sidecar will be pulled to the left
answerASource: When accelerating, the combination pulls to the right
answerBSource: When driving on bends, you must steer instead of leaning over
answerCSource: When braking, the combination pulls to the right
questionTextTarget: Şimdiye kadar sadece solo motosiklet kullandınız. Şimdi sağda, frensiz yan sepetli kombinasyona geçiyorsunuz. Sürüş nasıl farklıdır?
explanationTarget: Hızlanırken kombinasyon sağa çeker. Virajlarda yatmak yerine direksiyonla yön vermelisiniz.
answerBTarget: Virajlarda yatmak yerine direksiyonla yön vermelisiniz

questionTextSource: So far, you have only driven solo motorcycles. You now change over to a combination (sidecar on the right, unbraked). What is different?
explanationSource: As the sidecar is attached to your right, you cannot lean right and need to steer instead. When turning right, a torque force will push your sidecar up. At high speed the sidecar could be lifted-up, loose contact with the ground and tip over. When accelerating the sidecar tends to be pulled to the right. When breaking the sidecar will be pulled to the left
answerASource: When braking, the combination pulls to the left
answerBSource: The sidecar may lift off the ground on right-hand bends
answerCSource: You must not drive with dipped headlights during daytime
questionTextTarget: Şimdiye kadar sadece solo motosiklet kullandınız. Şimdi sağda, frensiz yan sepetli kombinasyona geçiyorsunuz. Ne farklıdır?
explanationTarget: Fren yaparken kombinasyon sola çekebilir. Sağ virajlarda yan sepet yerden kalkabilir. Gündüz kısa farla sürüş yasak değildir.
answerBTarget: Sağ virajlarda yan sepet yerden kalkabilir

questionTextSource: What should you know about using the emergency operation of bus doors?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: - should enable anyone on the bus to open the doors following accidents and breakdowns
answerBSource: - if misused, can lead to the doors being opened when the bus is moving
answerCSource: - can only be released by the driver
questionTextTarget: Otobüs kapılarının acil kullanım sistemi hakkında ne bilmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Acil kullanım sistemi, kaza ve arıza sonrası otobüsteki herkesin kapıları açabilmesini sağlamalıdır. Kötüye kullanılırsa kapılar hareket halindeyken açılabilir. Sadece sürücü tarafından açılmaz.
answerATarget: - kaza ve arıza sonrası otobüsteki herkesin kapıları açabilmesini sağlamalıdır
answerBTarget: - kötüye kullanılırsa otobüs hareket halindeyken kapıların açılmasına yol açabilir

questionTextSource: What can happen if you accelerate very rapidly when moving off on your motorbike?
explanationSource: Fast and sudden accelerations could lead to the front wheel lifting off the road, passenger falling and losing control overt the motorcycle as there is less or no steering due to less or no contact between the front wheel and the road
answerASource: The passenger can fall off
answerBSource: The front lift can lift up from the road surface
answerCSource: I can lose control over the motorbike
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizle kalkışta çok hızlı hızlanırsanız ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yolcu düşebilir, ön tekerlek yerden kalkabilir ve motosiklet üzerindeki kontrolünüzü kaybedebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: You are driving a local transport bus and want to drive away from a bus stop. What must you look out for?
explanationSource: Coming soon...
answerASource: - all doors are properly closed
answerBSource: - no persons are directly in front of the bus
answerCSource: - flowing traffic is not endangered
questionTextTarget: Yerel ulaşım otobüsü kullanıyorsunuz ve duraktan hareket etmek istiyorsunuz. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Tüm kapılar düzgün kapalı olmalı, otobüsün hemen önünde kimse bulunmamalı ve akan trafik tehlikeye atılmamalıdır.

questionTextSource: You are driving in the wet in a car with trailer on a narrow rural road and are approaching a clearly visible but tight left-hand bend. What should you do?
explanationSource: Decrease your speed before the turn. Take the weather conditions into account. Keep in mind that the centrifugal force grows twice as fast as the speed. You should only accelerate again in the curve vertex.
answerASource: I reduce my speed before the bend
answerBSource: I remain in the centre of the lane and only accelerate again once I am back on the straight
answerCSource: I only brake once I have reached the apex of the bend
questionTextTarget: Islak havada römorklu otomobille dar bir kırsal yolda gidiyorsunuz ve net görülen ama dar bir sol viraja yaklaşıyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Virajdan önce hızınızı azaltmalı, şeridin ortasında kalmalı ve ancak tekrar düz yola çıktığınızda hızlanmalısınız. Virajın tepe noktasında fren yapmak doğru değildir.
answerBTarget: Şeridin ortasında kalır ve ancak tekrar düz yola çıktığımda hızlanırım
answerCTarget: Ancak virajın tepe noktasına ulaştığımda fren yaparım

questionTextSource: What do you have to pay attention to, when jacking up a motorbike on its centre stand?
explanationSource: Setting a motorcycle on its centre stand requires more effort and can be difficult when on a steep slope. It is also sensitive to tipping over when tilted on the side
answerASource: - can tip over even when just slightly tilted
answerBSource: - can be difficult to jack up when on a steep gradient
answerCSource: - is best jacked up from a seated position
questionTextTarget: Motosikleti orta sehpaya alırken neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Motosiklet hafif eğimde bile devrilebilir ve dik eğimde sehpaya almak zor olabilir. Sehpaya en iyi oturarak alınmaz.
answerBTarget: - dik eğimde sehpaya almak zor olabilir

questionTextSource: What should you do if your motorbike starts to wobble?
explanationSource: If your motorcycle starts to wobble, decelerate, disengage the clutch and brake. Do not accelerate as it might increase the wobble and lead to an accident. Also do not try to compensate it as it is dangerous and could also lead to an accident
answerASource: - throttle back, disengage the clutch and brake carefully
answerBSource: - change down gears and accelerate as quickly as possible
answerCSource: - compensate wobbling by quickly counter-steering
questionTextTarget: Motosikletiniz yalpalamaya başlarsa ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Gazı azaltmalı, debriyajı ayırmalı ve dikkatli fren yapmalısınız. Hızlı hızlanmak veya sert karşı direksiyon tehlikelidir.
answerATarget: - gazı azaltmak, debriyajı ayırmak ve dikkatli fren yapmak
answerBTarget: - vites küçültmek ve mümkün olduğunca hızlı hızlanmak

questionTextSource: You are driving a motorbike equipped with an anti-lock braking system (ABS). How do you perform an emergency braking manoeuvre?
explanationSource: Breaking both foot and hand brake will result in the shortest stopping distance. ABS improves the stopping distance by un-blocking the wheels during strong brakes
answerASource: Effect the best-possible deceleration using hand and foot brake
answerBSource: Do not press the foot brake lever, because the ABS only functions at the front
answerCSource: Operate the hand and foot brake lever intermittently ("intermittent braking")
questionTextTarget: ABS’li motosiklet kullanıyorsunuz. Acil frenlemeyi nasıl yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: El ve ayak frenini kullanarak mümkün olan en iyi yavaşlamayı sağlamalısınız. Aralıklı frenleme yapmamalısınız.
answerATarget: El ve ayak freniyle mümkün olan en iyi yavaşlamayı sağlamak
answerBTarget: Ayak frenine basmamak, çünkü ABS sadece önde çalışır
answerCTarget: El ve ayak frenini aralıklı kullanmak

questionTextSource: How can driver assistance systems be helpful?
explanationSource: Driver assistance systems assist the car driver and increase traffic safety when the navigation device is programmed before driving. However, driver assistance systems can not compensate for an unfitness to drive.
answerASource: In increasing road safety
answerBSource: In assisting the driver
answerCSource: To compensate for unfitness to drive
questionTextTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri nasıl yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri trafik güvenliğini artırabilir ve sürücüyü destekleyebilir. Ancak sürüşe elverişsizliği telafi etmez.

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of, if you have to brake sharply while in a bend?
explanationSource: If you have to brake sharply in a curve, make sure that your motorcycle straightens up (inertia force). You have to turn harder to maintain the curve line.
answerASource: My motorcycle will become upright
answerBSource: I have to steer more strongly in order to maintain my cornering line
answerCSource: My cornering line decreases
questionTextTarget: Virajdayken sert fren yapmak zorunda kalırsanız neyi hesaba katmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Motosiklet doğrulma eğilimi gösterir ve viraj çizgisini korumak için daha güçlü yönlendirme gerekir. Viraj çizginiz kendiliğinden küçülmez.
answerBTarget: Viraj çizgimi korumak için daha güçlü yönlendirmeliyim

questionTextSource: What must you be aware of when driving a quad?
explanationSource: Reduce speed when turning, as quads tend to tip over due to their high centre of gravity.
answerASource: Wearing a suitable crash helmet is mandatory
answerBSource: Quads are prone to tipping over when driving through tight bends
answerCSource: The handling characteristics are similar to those of a car
questionTextTarget: Quad kullanırken neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Uygun koruyucu kask takmak zorunludur. Quadlar dar virajlarda devrilmeye yatkındır; sürüş özellikleri otomobile benzemez.

questionTextSource: What should be observed when driving a quad?
explanationSource: The quad has no steering assistance, so steering may be more difficult than driving a car.
answerASource: Protective motorcycle clothing should be worn
answerBSource: A warning triangle must be carried on the quad
answerCSource: The necessary steering force can be significantly greater than with a car
questionTextTarget: Quad kullanırken neye dikkat edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Koruyucu motosiklet kıyafeti giyilmelidir, quad üzerinde uyarı üçgeni taşınmalıdır ve gereken direksiyon kuvveti otomobile göre belirgin şekilde daha yüksek olabilir.
answerCTarget: Gerekli direksiyon kuvveti otomobile göre belirgin şekilde daha yüksek olabilir

questionTextSource: You are driving a motorbike with a manual gearbox. What do you have to do in order to be ready to brake?
explanationSource: Put your foot and hand already over the brake levers to initiate the braking process more quickly.
answerASource: I place my hand on the handbrake lever
answerBSource: I place my foot over the brake pedal
answerCSource: I change up to a higher gear
questionTextTarget: Manuel şanzımanlı motosiklet kullanıyorsunuz. Frenlemeye hazır olmak için ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Elinizi el freni koluna koymalı ve ayağınızı fren pedalının üzerine getirmelisiniz. Daha yüksek vitese geçmek fren hazırlığı değildir.

questionTextSource: You want to use a carrying case or pannier affixed to the side of your motorcycle. What must you be especially aware of?
explanationSource: Make sure that the weight is evenly distributed to stabilise the driving behaviour. Stow heavy luggage as far down as possible to keep the centre of gravity as low as possible.
answerASource: An unequal distribution of weight should be avoided
answerBSource: Heavier pieces of luggage should be stowed as close to the bottom as possible
answerCSource: The gross vehicle weight rating of the motorcycle may not be exceeded
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin yanına takılmış taşıma çantası veya yan çanta kullanmak istiyorsunuz. Özellikle neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Ağırlığın dengesiz dağılımından kaçınmalı, ağır bagajı mümkün olduğunca aşağı yerleştirmeli ve motosikletin izin verilen toplam ağırlığını aşmamalısınız.
answerBTarget: Ağır bagaj parçaları mümkün olduğunca aşağı yerleştirilmelidir
answerCTarget: Motosikletin izin verilen toplam ağırlığı aşılmamalıdır

questionTextSource: Your motorbike is equipped with a traction control system (TCS). What is the system designed to do?
explanationSource: Slippage" is the sudden increase in the speed of a drive wheel when it loses grip because you have accelerated too much. This triggers the anti-slip control, which prevents the wheel from spinning by braking.
answerASource: - prevents the rear wheel spinning when moving off
answerBSource: - stabilises the motorbike during an emergency braking manoeuvre
answerCSource: - prevents the front wheel from locking during braking
questionTextTarget: Motosikletiniz çekiş kontrol sistemiyle (TCS) donatılmış. Bu sistem ne için tasarlanmıştır?
explanationTarget: TCS kalkışta arka tekerleğin patinaj yapmasını önlemeye yardımcı olur. Acil frenlemede dengeleme veya ön tekerleğin kilitlenmesini önleme ABS’nin görevidir.
answerATarget: - kalkışta arka tekerleğin patinaj yapmasını önler
answerCTarget: - frenleme sırasında ön tekerleğin kilitlenmesini önler

questionTextSource: You are driving around a bend in the road, and the turning radius becomes smaller as the bend progresses. You had reckoned that the turning radius would be larger. How must you now react?
explanationSource:
If you have estimated the cornering radius to be larger, you should reduce your speed; by reducing your speed, you can drive a smaller cornering radius. 
You can also increase the lean angle in the bend so that you can take tighter bends.
answerASource: I increase my inclined position
answerBSource: I reduce my speed
answerCSource: I activate the emergency stop switch
questionTextTarget: Virajda gidiyorsunuz ve viraj ilerledikçe dönüş yarıçapı küçülüyor. Daha büyük yarıçap beklemiştiniz. Şimdi nasıl tepki vermelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Yatış açınızı artırmalı ve hızınızı azaltmalısınız. Acil stop düğmesini kullanmak doğru değildir.

questionTextSource: What should you take into account when you have to brake unexpectedly sharply while driving around a road bend?
explanationSource: When you brake in a bend, your motorbike is lifted up by the force of inertia. You have to counteract this by counter-steering with feeling. Otherwise you will continue straight ahead and not make the bend.
answerASource: My motorcycle tends to drive straight ahead
answerBSource: I should counter-steer gently
answerCSource: The driving line of my motorcycle remains unchanged
questionTextTarget: Virajda giderken beklenmedik şekilde sert fren yapmanız gerekirse neyi dikkate almalısınız?
explanationTarget: Motosikletiniz düz gitme eğilimi gösterir. Viraj çizgisini korumak için nazikçe karşı yönlendirme yapmalısınız.

questionTextSource: In bends with poor road conditions, what increases the risk of skidding?
explanationSource:
Ideally, all wheels should press on the road with the same force to ensure optimum grip and handling. If this is not the case, it can increase the risk of skidding in poor road conditions.
The suspension, for example, has the task of keeping all tyres on the road with the same force. If the suspension is damaged, it can no longer do this. The risk of skidding also increases if the tyre pressure is incorrect or if the vehicle is incorrectly or unevenly loaded.
This is because the tyres cannot apply the same force to the road and you lose grip more quickly.
answerASource: Having a damaged chassis
answerBSource: Having the wrong tyre inflation pressure
answerCSource: Having a wrongly loaded cargo
questionTextTarget: Kötü yol koşullarına sahip virajlarda kayma riskini ne artırır?
explanationTarget: Hasarlı şasi, yanlış lastik basıncı ve yanlış yüklenmiş yük kayma riskini artırır.

questionTextSource: You are travelling along a winding road with a steep gradient. Your motorbike is fully loaded. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource:
Avoid speeding up between bends, because speeding up would put even more strain on the brakes. Therefore, ride downhill without speeding up. 
Use the front and rear brakes evenly and try to use the braking effect of the motor to relieve the brakes. The higher the engine speed, the greater the braking effect.
answerASource: I drive in a low gear in order to use my engine’s braking action
answerBSource: I avoid accelerating to high speeds between bends in the road
answerCSource: I brake using the front-wheel brake only
questionTextTarget: Dik eğimli virajlı bir yolda gidiyorsunuz. Motosikletiniz tamamen yüklü. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Motor freninden yararlanmak için düşük viteste sürmeli ve virajlar arasında yüksek hızlara çıkmaktan kaçınmalısınız. Sadece ön frenle fren yapılmaz.
answerATarget: Motor freninden yararlanmak için düşük viteste giderim
answerBTarget: Virajlar arasında yüksek hızlara çıkmaktan kaçınırım
answerCTarget: Sadece ön tekerlek freniyle fren yaparım

questionTextSource: When is there a risk that the front wheel of the motorbike will lose contact with the carriageway?
explanationSource:
When speeding up, the weight shifts to the back. Extreme speeding in a low gear shifts the centre of gravity behind the rear axle and the front wheel lifts off.
A passenger also shifts the weight to the rear when speeding up. This weight shift relieves the front wheel and can cause it to lift off.
answerASource: - accelerate in a low gear
answerBSource: - accelerate while carrying a pillion passenger
answerCSource: - brake using the front-wheel brake
questionTextTarget: Motosikletin ön tekerleğinin yolla temasını kaybetme riski ne zaman vardır?
explanationTarget: Düşük viteste hızlanırken veya artçı yolcuyla hızlanırken ön tekerlek yerden kalkabilir. Ön frenle frenlemek bu riski oluşturmaz.

questionTextSource: What might happen if you shift to a low gear while travelling at a high speed?
explanationSource: The sudden, rapid increase in engine speed when engaging the clutch creates a braking effect. The engine braking force can cause your rear wheel to lock up or slip and lose grip on the road. You could lose control of your motorbike and crash.
answerASource: The rear wheel may lock
answerBSource: There is a high risk of crashing to the ground
answerCSource: The front wheel may lift up from the road surface
questionTextTarget: Yüksek hızda düşük vitese geçerseniz ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Arka tekerlek kilitlenebilir ve düşme riski yüksektir. Ön tekerlek bu nedenle kalkmaz.

questionTextSource: How should you respond if your motorbike begins to wobble?
explanationSource: By reducing the speed immediately, you can reduce swaying and increase driving stability. Swaying occurs at high speeds. So avoid driving very fast when continuing your journey.
answerASource: - immediately release the accelerator and slow down
answerBSource: - avoid high speeds as I continue my journey
answerCSource: - counter-steer right now
questionTextTarget: Motosikletiniz yalpalamaya başlarsa nasıl tepki vermelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Hemen gazı bırakıp yavaşlamalı ve yolculuğa yüksek hızlardan kaçınarak devam etmelisiniz. Sert karşı direksiyon yapmamalısınız.
answerBTarget: - yolculuğa devam ederken yüksek hızlardan kaçınmak

questionTextSource: What is the purpose of an emergency stop switch on a motorbike?
explanationSource: The emergency stop switch switches off the engine. You can use it to switch off the engine quickly in dangerous situations without having to turn the key.
answerASource: - turns off the engine
answerBSource: - turns off the lights
answerCSource: - triggers the eCall system
questionTextTarget: Motosiklette acil stop düğmesinin amacı nedir?
explanationTarget: Acil stop düğmesi motoru kapatır. Işıkları kapatmaz ve eCall sistemini tetiklemez.

questionTextSource: What applies to the effectiveness of the front and rear wheel brakes, especially at higher speeds?
explanationSource: When braking, the weight shifts forward, which puts greater strain on the front wheel. That's why the front wheel brake is usually designed for higher braking effects in order to make the greater load easier to control.
answerASource: - of the front brake is larger
answerBSource: - of the rear wheel brake is larger
answerCSource: - of the front and rear wheel brakes are equally powerful
questionTextTarget: Özellikle yüksek hızlarda ön ve arka frenlerin etkinliği için ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Ön frenin etkisi arka frene göre daha büyüktür.
answerBTarget: - arka tekerlek freninin etkisi daha büyüktür
answerCTarget: - ön ve arka frenler eşit güçtedir

questionTextSource: What can cause a motorcycle to oscillate at high speed?
explanationSource:
At high speeds on uneven roads or if the wheels are not balanced, your motorcycle tends to "sway" more quickly because the unevenness changes the road's position.
If you have a heavy load on the rear of your motorcycle, there will be less weight on the front wheel. At high speeds, your motorcycle may sway, making it harder for you to control your motorcycle.
answerASource: - with unbalanced wheels
answerBSource: - on uneven road surfaces
answerCSource: - with heavy luggage at the rear
questionTextTarget: Yüksek hızda motosikletin salınım yapmasına ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Dengesiz tekerlekler, bozuk yol yüzeyi ve arkada ağır bagaj motosikletin salınım yapmasına neden olabilir.

questionTextSource: What changes when a caravan trailer is towed?
explanationSource: If you drive with a caravan, not only does it increase the risk of skidding, the overtaking and braking distances will be longer as well. This is due to the additional load to be pulled and the pulling motion of the trailer.
answerASource: The distance for overtaking increases considerably
answerBSource: Hasty movements of the steering wheel increase the danger of skidding
answerCSource: The braking distance is reduced considerably
questionTextTarget: Karavan römorku çekildiğinde ne değişir?
explanationTarget: Sollama mesafesi belirgin şekilde artar ve ani direksiyon hareketleri savrulma riskini artırır. Fren mesafesi belirgin şekilde azalmaz.
answerBTarget: Ani direksiyon hareketleri kayma tehlikesini artırır

questionTextSource: What changes in a car when towing a two-axle trailer?
explanationSource: The combination of car and trailer requires more space when driving on bends and when turning. Likewise, the mass changes the accelerating ability. It is decreasing significantly.
answerASource: More space is needed when turning and driving round bends
answerBSource: Acceleration capacity is reduced
answerCSource: Driving stability increases
questionTextTarget: İki akslı römork çekerken otomobilde ne değişir?
explanationTarget: Dönüşlerde ve virajlarda daha fazla alan gerekir, hızlanma kabiliyeti azalır. Sürüş dengesi artmaz.
answerATarget: Dönüşlerde ve virajlarda daha fazla alan gerekir

questionTextSource: You are in your car towing a trailer on a road with oncoming traffic and want to turn left. What must you particularly remember when you set off again?
explanationSource: With a trailer you have a lower accelerating ability, changed mass and a greater total length. This must be taken into consideration when you're starting your car again. Oncoming traffic must not be warned in this case by using the flash light.
answerASource: Think about the length of your car and trailer combination
answerBSource: Consider the reduced acceleration capacity
answerCSource: Warn oncoming traffic by flashing your lights
questionTextTarget: Karşı trafikli yolda römorklu otomobilinizle sola dönmek istiyorsunuz. Tekrar hareket ederken özellikle neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Otomobil-römork kombinasyonunuzun uzunluğunu ve azalan hızlanma kabiliyetini dikkate almalısınız. Karşı trafiği selektörle uyarmamalısınız.
answerATarget: Otomobil ve römork kombinasyonumun uzunluğunu düşünmek
answerCTarget: Karşı trafiği far yakıp söndürerek uyarmak

questionTextSource: You are in your car towing a trailer which has no brakes and you approach a long steep downhill slope. What is correct?
explanationSource: Reduce your speed on time. Us a gear as low as possible. The thus activated engine brake supports the braking action of the pedal braking. By no means you should put your car in idling. This would make the vehicle faster.
answerASource: Reduce speed, if necessary, engage low gear in time, be ready to brake
answerBSource: Make allowance for the pushing effect of the trailer
answerCSource: Relieve the car brakes by disengaging the clutch at frequent intervals
questionTextTarget: Frensiz römork çeken otomobilinizle uzun ve dik bir yokuş aşağı yola yaklaşıyorsunuz. Hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Hızı azaltmalı, gerekirse zamanında düşük vitese geçmeli ve fren yapmaya hazır olmalısınız. Römorkun itme etkisini hesaba katmalısınız. Debriyajı sık sık ayırmak doğru değildir.
answerATarget: Hızı azaltmak, gerekirse zamanında düşük vitese geçmek, fren yapmaya hazır olmak
answerCTarget: Debriyajı sık sık ayırarak otomobil frenlerini rahatlatmak

questionTextSource: What must you check on a car with a caravan trailer before setting out on a journey?
explanationSource: Caravans restrict the view to the back. Therefore, you must check before the start of the journey, if the mirrors provide sufficient visibility to the back. You also need to make sure that the illuminating devices are working.
answerASource: Whether the lights of the trailer are working
answerBSource: Whether the view through the rear-view mirrors is adequate
answerCSource: Whether the passengers in the caravan trailer have put on their safety belts
questionTextTarget: Karavan römorklu otomobille yola çıkmadan önce neyi kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Römork ışıklarının çalışıp çalışmadığını ve dikiz aynalarından görüşün yeterli olup olmadığını kontrol etmelisiniz. Karavan içinde yolcu taşınmaz.
answerBTarget: Dikiz aynalarından görüşün yeterli olup olmadığını
answerCTarget: Karavan römorkundaki yolcuların emniyet kemeri takıp takmadığını

questionTextSource: You are in your car towing a fully loaded trailer which has no brakes. What is correct?
explanationSource: Note that a fully loaded trailer without its own brake extends the braking distance and thus the stopping distance by the respective trailer load. The thinking distance does not change in this case.
answerASource: Braking distance increases
answerBSource: Reaction distance increases
answerCSource: Stopping distance reduces
questionTextTarget: Frensiz, tam yüklü römork çeken otomobil kullanıyorsunuz. Hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Fren mesafesi artar. Tepki mesafesi hız ve tepki süresine bağlıdır, römork nedeniyle artmaz. Durma mesafesi azalmaz.

questionTextSource: You want to tow a singe-axle caravan trailer behind your car. What must you check?
explanationSource: The caravan reduces the view to the back. You as a car driver have to check whether the rear view through the existing mirrors is sufficient. You may need to attach extra mirrors to your car. Towing vehicle and trailer must always be coordinated.
answerASource: If the permissible trailer load or the permissible coupling of the car are exceeded
answerBSource: If additional rear-view mirrors must be mounted because of the width of the trailer
answerCSource: If the trailer is licensed to transport passengers
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın arkasında tek akslı karavan römorku çekmek istiyorsunuz. Ne kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Aracın izin verilen römork yükünün veya izin verilen bağlantı/dikey yükünün aşılıp aşılmadığını ve römork genişliği nedeniyle ek dikiz aynası gerekip gerekmediğini kontrol etmelisiniz.
answerATarget: Aracın izin verilen römork yükünün veya izin verilen bağlantı yükünün aşılıp aşılmadığını
answerBTarget: Römorkun genişliği nedeniyle ek dikiz aynası takılması gerekip gerekmediğini
answerCTarget: Römorkun yolcu taşımaya ruhsatlı olup olmadığını

questionTextSource: You want to set off in an automatic car (hydraulic converter). What must you know?
explanationSource: If you give a "go" with an engaged gear as a car driver in a vehicle with automatic transmission it will try to start driving. This can only be prevented by operating the service brake. The selector lever can and may be operated with the engine stationary and running.
answerASource: When selecting a gear, the car must, as a rule, be held by the service brakes
answerBSource: The selector lever must only be moved when the engine has stopped
answerCSource: The engine revolutions must be raised considerably so that the engine does not stall
questionTextTarget: Otomatik şanzımanlı (hidrolik konvertörlü) bir otomobille hareket etmek istiyorsunuz. Ne bilmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Vites seçilirken araç kural olarak servis freniyle tutulmalıdır. Seçici kol yalnızca motor durmuşken hareket ettirilmez ve motorun stop etmemesi için devir yükseltmek gerekmez.
answerATarget: Vites seçilirken araç kural olarak servis freniyle tutulmalıdır
answerBTarget: Seçici kol yalnızca motor durmuşken hareket ettirilmelidir
answerCTarget: Motorun stop etmemesi için motor devri belirgin şekilde artırılmalıdır

questionTextSource: What must you remember with regard to tyre pressure?
explanationSource: By regularly checking the air pressure of the tires, tire damage can be avoided, but fuel can also be saved. If you put your vehicle under a greater burden, you need to adjust the tire pressure.
answerASource: To check the air pressure regularly, including that of the spare wheel
answerBSource: To increase the pressure to the level stated in the vehicle manual when the vehicle is heavily loaded
answerCSource: To reduce the air pressure before longer trips
questionTextTarget: Lastik basıncıyla ilgili neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Lastik basıncı düzenli kontrol edilmeli, yedek lastik de dahil edilmelidir. Araç ağır yüklüyse kullanım kılavuzunda belirtilen değere yükseltilmelidir. Uzun yol öncesi basınç azaltılmaz.
answerATarget: Yedek lastik dahil hava basıncını düzenli kontrol etmek
answerBTarget: Araç ağır yüklüyse basıncı araç kullanım kılavuzunda belirtilen seviyeye yükseltmek
answerCTarget: Uzun yolculuklardan önce hava basıncını azaltmak

questionTextSource: You had a tyre failure and must mount the emergency wheel. What is prohibited when you continue to drive?
explanationSource: Emergency wheels have a different design than conventional wheels and are only allowed up to a speed of 80 km/h. They have worse operating characteristics. You should only drive with them as far as necessary. Taking other people with you is allowed.
answerASource: Driving faster than 80 km/h
answerBSource: Driving longer than necessary with the emergency wheel
answerCSource: Taking passengers
questionTextTarget: Lastik arızası yaşadınız ve acil durum tekerleğini takmanız gerekiyor. Sürüşe devam ederken ne yasaktır?
explanationTarget: Acil durum tekerleğiyle 80 km/saatten hızlı gitmek ve gerekenden uzun süre kullanmak yasaktır. Yolcu almak genel olarak yasak değildir.
answerBTarget: Acil durum tekerleğiyle gerekenden uzun süre sürmek

questionTextSource: When driving, you notice that the car constantly pulls to the left. What could be the cause of this?
explanationSource: If your vehicle pulls to the left so that countersteering is required, too little air pressure in the left tire could be the cause or a different wheel setting. A badly worn tire usually does not have this effect.
answerASource: Too little air in the front left tyre
answerBSource: Incorrect wheel adjustment at the front axle (track, wheel camber)
answerCSource: The left rear tyre is extensively worn
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında otomobilin sürekli sola çektiğini fark ediyorsunuz. Bunun sebebi ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sol ön lastikte hava az olması veya ön aks ayarının bozuk olması buna neden olabilir. Sol arka lastiğin aşırı aşınması da etkileyebilir, ancak tipik ana sebepler ön lastik ve ön aks ayarıdır.
answerATarget: Sol ön lastikte çok az hava olması
answerCTarget: Sol arka lastiğin aşırı aşınmış olması

questionTextSource: What does a front-wheel drive car tend to do if you accelerate too much on a bend?
explanationSource: As a car driver, you must always expect your vehicle with front-wheel drive to swing off in front if you over-accelerate on a turn. Your vehicle will more likely under than oversteer.
answerASource: The front end tends to turn out to the side
answerBSource: The vehicle tends to oversteer
answerCSource: The rear end tends to turn out to the side
questionTextTarget: Önden çekişli otomobil virajda fazla hızlanırsanız ne yapma eğilimindedir?
explanationTarget: Önden çekişli araçta ön taraf dışa doğru kayma eğilimi gösterir, yani araç önden kayar.
answerATarget: Ön taraf yana doğru dışa açılma eğilimi gösterir
answerCTarget: Arka taraf yana doğru dışa açılma eğilimi gösterir

questionTextSource: What does a rear-wheel drive car tend to do if you accelerate too much on a bend?
explanationSource: You should always expect your vehicle with rear wheel drive to swing off to the back if you over-accelerate on a turn. It is more likely to oversteer than understeer.
answerASource: The rear end tends to turn out to the side
answerBSource: The front end tends to turn out to the side
answerCSource: The car tends to understeer
questionTextTarget: Arkadan çekişli otomobil virajda fazla hızlanırsanız ne yapma eğilimindedir?
explanationTarget: Arkadan çekişli araçta arka taraf dışa doğru kayma eğilimi gösterir.
answerATarget: Arka taraf yana doğru dışa açılma eğilimi gösterir
answerBTarget: Ön taraf yana doğru dışa açılma eğilimi gösterir

questionTextSource: What are the advantages of an anti-slip device (ASR)?
explanationSource: The traction control system (TCS) of a car prevents the wheels of the vehicle from spinning, especially when accelerating faster. Slipping away to the side when starting to drive on slippery roads is thereby largely prevented.
answerASource: No wheelspin when setting off
answerBSource: Reduced danger of sliding sideways when setting off on a slippery roadway
answerCSource: No locking of the wheels when braking
questionTextTarget: Patinaj önleyici sistemin (ASR) avantajları nelerdir?
explanationTarget: ASR kalkışta tekerlek patinajını önler ve kaygan yolda kalkışta yana kayma tehlikesini azaltır. Frenlemede tekerlek kilitlenmesini önlemek ABS’nin görevidir.
answerBTarget: Kaygan yolda kalkışta yana kayma tehlikesinin azalması

questionTextSource: You want to couple up a trailer with ball coupling. What is correct?
explanationSource: In a trailer with ball clutch, the clutch dog must firmly enclose the spherical head. The fuse must engage. Make sure the electrical connection works. The support wheel must not run while driving. It must be locked in high position.
answerASource: The claw of the coupling must fit securely around the ball. The locking device must engage
answerBSource: The electrics must be connected
answerCSource: The jack wheel must be set so that it can also run when driving
questionTextTarget: Küresel bağlantılı bir römork bağlamak istiyorsunuz. Hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Bağlantı çenesi kürenin etrafına güvenli şekilde oturmalı ve kilit mekanizması devreye girmelidir. Elektrik bağlantısı yapılmalıdır. Destek tekerleği sürüş sırasında çalışacak şekilde bırakılmaz.
answerATarget: Bağlantı çenesi kürenin etrafına güvenli şekilde oturmalıdır. Kilit mekanizması devreye girmelidir
answerCTarget: Destek tekerleği sürüş sırasında da dönebilecek şekilde ayarlanmalıdır

questionTextSource: What must you do after coupling up a single-axle trailer with overrun brakes?
explanationSource: The breakaway cable must be hung on the coupling device of the towing vehicle. With an overrun brake, the trailer brakes automatically when the connection to the towing vehicle breaks off. The function of the brake must be checked. The support wheel must not run while driving, so it should be brought to the upper position.
answerASource: Check that the brakes are working
answerBSource: Raise the jack wheel, if fitted, to the highest setting
answerCSource: Attach the brakeaway cable to the coupling of the motor vehicle
questionTextTarget: Atalet frenli tek akslı römorku bağladıktan sonra ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Frenlerin çalışmasını kontrol etmeli, varsa destek tekerleğini en üst konuma kaldırmalı ve kopma emniyet halatını çekici aracın bağlantısına takmalısınız.
answerBTarget: Varsa destek tekerleğini en üst konuma kaldırmak
answerCTarget: Kopma emniyet halatını motorlu aracın bağlantısına takmak

questionTextSource: What must you bear in mind when loading a single-axle trailer?
explanationSource: When loading a single-axle trailer, you must ensure to comply with the total mass and that your load does not exceed the permissible axial load and bearing load.
answerASource: - axle load
answerBSource: - load on the coupling
answerCSource: - total mass
questionTextTarget: Tek akslı römork yüklerken neyi dikkate almalısınız?
explanationTarget: Aks yüküne, bağlantı/dikey yüke ve toplam kütleye dikkat etmelisiniz.

questionTextSource: You want to park your single-axle trailer (overrun brakes, 1000 kg permissible total mass) on a slope. What must you do?
explanationSource: You must always secure your trailer against possibly rolling away. To do this, you must use the parking brake and place the wheel chocks in front of the wheels. Usually such trailers have no reverse lockout.
answerASource: Pull the parking brake
answerBSource: Place wheel chocks under the wheels
answerCSource: Engage the reverse lock
questionTextTarget: Tek akslı römorkunuzu (atalet frenli, izin verilen toplam kütle 1000 kg) eğimde park etmek istiyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Park frenini çekmeli ve tekerleklerin altına takoz koymalısınız. Geri kilidini devreye almak yeterli güvence değildir.

questionTextSource: Which dangerous defects can have occurred on a trailer with overrun brakes which has been parked for some time?
explanationSource: If you leave a trailer standing somewhere for a long time, the weather can cause damage: electrical connections can be damaged, rust can form on the brakes. Sun exposure does not increase the tire pressure too much, so that no dangerous defects occur.
answerASource: The brakes may not work because of rust
answerBSource: Cable connections can be defective
answerCSource: Tyre pressure may have increased greatly due to exposure to the sun
questionTextTarget: Bir süre park edilmiş atalet frenli römorkta hangi tehlikeli kusurlar oluşmuş olabilir?
explanationTarget: Frenler pas nedeniyle çalışmayabilir ve kablo bağlantıları arızalı olabilir. Güneş nedeniyle lastik basıncının çok artması burada tipik tehlikeli kusur değildir.
answerCTarget: Güneş etkisiyle lastik basıncı çok artmış olabilir

questionTextSource: What must you remember when loading a trailer?
explanationSource: Always pay attention to the proper securing of your cargo. In order not to endanger yourself and other road users, you must always have a clear view and full control over your vehicle. The cargo must be marked at the rear and may not protrude more than 50 cm at the front.
answerASource: - must be securely packed
answerBSource: - must not project more than 1 m beyond the rear reflectors, unless specially marked
answerCSource: - must not project more than 1 m beyond the front of the towing vehicle
questionTextTarget: Römork yüklerken neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Yük güvenli şekilde yerleştirilmeli, özel işaretlenmemişse arka reflektörlerden 1 m’den fazla taşmamalı ve çekici aracın önünden 1 m’den fazla taşmamalıdır.
answerBTarget: - özel işaretlenmemişse arka reflektörlerden 1 m’den fazla taşmamalıdır
answerCTarget: - çekici aracın önünden 1 m’den fazla taşmamalıdır

questionTextSource: Why should you not press the clutch and switch off the engine at the same time when driving down a long slope?
explanationSource: When the engine is off, the engine brake (brake booster) cannot work. Even power steering is not turned on then. To respond quickly and effectively to dangerous situations, you may need both.
answerASource: The steering of vehicles with servo-assisted steering immediately becomes unusually heavy
answerBSource: Full braking power cannot be reached in vehicles with brake booster system despite great force being applied to the pedal
answerCSource: The battery will be overcharged
questionTextTarget: Uzun yokuş aşağı sürüşte debriyaja basıp aynı anda motoru kapatmamanız neden gerekir?
explanationTarget: Servo direksiyonlu araçlarda direksiyon hemen alışılmadık şekilde ağırlaşır ve fren servolu araçlarda pedala büyük kuvvet uygulansa bile tam fren gücüne ulaşılamayabilir.
answerATarget: Servo destekli direksiyonlu araçlarda direksiyon hemen alışılmadık şekilde ağırlaşır
answerBTarget: Fren servolu araçlarda pedala büyük kuvvet uygulansa bile tam fren gücüne ulaşılamaz

questionTextSource: Why should you not apply the clutch when driving on a long, steep downhill slope?
explanationSource: If you step down the clutch, the engine brake will not work and you will have to use the service brake more. As a result, overheating and increased brake wear can occur.
answerASource: Because the braking action of the engine will have no effect
answerBSource: Because this causes unnecessary wear of the brakes
answerCSource: Because in this case the brake servo unit will no longer function
questionTextTarget: Uzun ve dik yokuş aşağı sürüşte neden debriyaja basmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: Debriyaja basarsanız motor freni etkisiz kalır ve frenler gereksiz aşınır. Fren servosu bu nedenle hemen devre dışı kalmaz.
answerBTarget: Çünkü bu frenlerde gereksiz aşınmaya neden olur
answerCTarget: Çünkü bu durumda fren servosu artık çalışmaz

questionTextSource: What is correct when coupling a full trailer?
explanationSource: You should make sure that a suitable person in the viewing area is about you and instructor you and that this person obstacles and road users that you can not see, warns you of a Mehrachsanhängers when coupling.
answerASource: - should be positioned in the driver's line of vision and guide him
answerBSource: - warns of obstacles and road users not visible to the driver
answerCSource: - hold the drawbar until it has locked into the hitch
questionTextTarget: Tam römork bağlarken hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Yönlendiren kişi sürücünün görüş alanında bulunmalı ve onu yönlendirmelidir. Sürücünün göremediği engel ve yol kullanıcıları konusunda uyarmalıdır. Çeki demiri bağlantıya kilitlenene kadar elde tutulmamalıdır.
answerATarget: - sürücünün görüş alanında bulunmalı ve onu yönlendirmelidir
answerBTarget: - sürücünün göremediği engeller ve yol kullanıcıları konusunda uyarır
answerCTarget: - çeki demirini bağlantıya kilitlenene kadar tutmak

questionTextSource: You are driving in a pair with a load. What should be noted when performing an emergency stop?
explanationSource: If you are driving with more weight, you should apply more braking force. Due to the additional weight, the rear wheel brakes will brake more as well
answerASource: - have to apply more braking force
answerBSource: - that the rear-wheel brakes may operate more powerfully
answerCSource: - have to apply less braking force
questionTextTarget: Yüklü bir araç kombinasyonu kullanıyorsunuz. Acil frenlemede neye dikkat edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Yük nedeniyle daha fazla fren kuvveti gerekebilir ve arka tekerlek frenleri daha güçlü etki edebilir. Daha az fren kuvveti gerekmez.
answerATarget: - daha fazla fren kuvveti uygulamak gerekir
answerBTarget: - arka tekerlek frenleri daha güçlü çalışabilir
answerCTarget: - daha az fren kuvveti uygulamak gerekir

questionTextSource: You suddenly have to brake when cornering on a wet carriageway. What special aspects exist with a vehicle equipped with an anti-lock braking system (ABS)?
explanationSource: On wet roads, the antilocking system prevents the wheels from locking and shortens the braking distance. In addition, the vehicle remains more steerable when braking. On gravel or snow, the braking distance can certainly be much longer.
answerASource: The steering capability is retained for longer
answerBSource: The vehicle will always remain stable
answerCSource: It is not possible for the vehicle to skid out of the bend
questionTextTarget: Islak yolda virajdayken aniden fren yapmanız gerekiyor. ABS’li araçta hangi özel durum vardır?
explanationTarget: ABS direksiyon kabiliyetinin daha uzun süre korunmasına yardımcı olur. Araç her zaman stabil kalmaz ve virajdan kaymanın imkânsız olduğu anlamına gelmez.
answerATarget: Direksiyon kabiliyeti daha uzun süre korunur

questionTextSource: What is the effect of the cornering characteristics of a combination vehicle (car towing a caravan) when taking a turn?
explanationSource: Despite careful driving, it is possible that the trailer cuts the curve or even swings out. The car driver must therefore proceed with caution in order to exclude hazards to others.
answerASource: - can jut out
answerBSource: - can cut the corner
answerCSource: - generally follows the track of the car
questionTextTarget: Karavan çeken otomobil kombinasyonunun dönüş davranışı dönüş sırasında nasıl etkiler?
explanationTarget: Kombinasyon dışa taşabilir ve virajı içten kesebilir. Genel olarak otomobilin izini tam takip etmez.

questionTextSource: You experience pendular movements on your motorbike. What could be the cause of these?
explanationSource: If your entire motorcycle swings to the front and back, this could be caused by heavy load or imbalance in the wheel
answerASource: The load
answerBSource: A wheel imbalance
answerCSource: Driving at low revs
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizde salınım hareketleri hissediyorsunuz. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yük ve tekerlek dengesizliği salınım hareketlerine neden olabilir. Düşük devirde sürüş tipik neden değildir.

questionTextSource: What can restrict the functionality of a lane departure warning system?
explanationSource: The function of the lane departure warning system may be limited if the system cannot properly pick up lane signals. This is, because the computer-controlled system works on the basis of different optical systems. There are no signals from the guardrails. Another name for the lane departure warning system is: Lane Keeping Assist (active lane departure warning system with steering assistance).
answerASource: A dirty road surface
answerBSource: The absence of road markings
answerCSource: The absence of guardrails
questionTextTarget: Şerit takip uyarı sisteminin işlevini ne kısıtlayabilir?
explanationTarget: Kirli yol yüzeyi ve yol çizgilerinin olmaması sistemi kısıtlayabilir. Korkulukların olmaması belirleyici değildir.

questionTextSource: What information should you obtain before undertaking a journey with a purely electric vehicle?
explanationSource: The car driver should inform himself about the range of the electric vehicle before starting the journey. This differs significantly from the range of conventional vehicles and more frequent stops to recharge the batteries are necessary. You should also take into account that there is more technology in an electric vehicle. Although it is generally true that electric vehicles are just as safe as conventional cars. But in their bodies usually run cables that are designed for enormously high voltages.
answerASource: The locations at which I can charge the vehicle
answerBSource: What I have to do following an accident
answerCSource: Factors that influence the range
questionTextTarget: Tamamen elektrikli araçla yolculuğa çıkmadan önce hangi bilgileri edinmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Aracı nerelerde şarj edebileceğinizi, kaza sonrası ne yapmanız gerektiğini ve menzili etkileyen faktörleri önceden öğrenmelisiniz.

questionTextSource: You are planning a longer journey with a purely electric vehicle. What should you be aware of?
explanationSource: If you are planning a longer journey with a purely electric vehicle, you should consider that your car has a much lower range compared to conventional vehicles. In addition, the capacity of the batteries is influenced by the outside temperature.
answerASource: The availability of electric charging stations
answerBSource: The battery charging time
answerCSource: The influence of external ambient temperatures on the range
questionTextTarget: Ani fren sırasında elektronik stabilite programı (ESP) size nasıl yardımcı olur?
explanationTarget: ESP aracın savrulmasını azaltabilir ve yön dengesini korumaya yardımcı olabilir. Fizik sınırlarını ortadan kaldırmaz.

questionTextSource: What should you be aware of when charging purely electric vehicles?
explanationSource: When charging pure electric vehicles, you must be aware that they cannot be recharged at every gas station. Only use the charging cables approved by the manufacturer. Depending on the power connection, the charging time varies.
answerASource: The charge time depends on the power supply
answerBSource: Charging should only be performed with a charging cable approved by the manufacturer
answerCSource: Charging is available at every filling station
questionTextTarget: Adaptif hız sabitleyici (ACC) hangi durumda size yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: ACC öndeki araca olan mesafeyi ve seçilen hızı korumaya yardımcı olur. Sürücünün sorumluluğunu ortadan kaldırmaz.

questionTextSource: How is a purely electric vehicle different from a vehicle with a combustion engine?
explanationSource: Pure electric vehicles are almost noiseless. These vehicles also have no direct exhaust emissions. The aerodynamic drag depends on the volume of the body and not on the type of drive.
answerASource: - have a lower engine noise
answerBSource: - do not have any direct exhaust emissions
answerCSource: - have a lower aerodynamic drag
questionTextTarget: Acil fren asistanı hangi durumda yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Acil fren asistanı kritik durumlarda frenlemeyi destekleyebilir veya otomatik acil frenleme başlatabilir. Dikkatsiz sürüşü telafi etmez.

questionTextSource: You are driving a purely electric vehicle in a residential area. What should you be aware of due to your lower engine noise?
explanationSource: With a pure electric vehicle, you are almost noiseless on the road and you can acoustically be hardly perceived by other road users. Especially cyclists are at risk if they hear no engine noise. Without looking back, they often turn.
answerASource: Pedestrians will not notice me or will do so later than usual
answerBSource: Cyclist travelling ahead will turn left, without looking behind them
answerCSource: Vehicles following behind will tailgate me
questionTextTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri hakkında neyi bilmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Sistemin sınırlarını bilmeli ve her zaman trafiği kendiniz izlemelisiniz. Sistemler sorumluluğu tamamen devralmaz.
answerCTarget: Sistemin tüm görevleri her zaman tamamen devraldığını varsayabilirim

questionTextSource: You are driving a motor vehicle fitted with anti-lock braking system (ABS). How do you achieve the shortest possible braking distance?
explanationSource: If you drive a car with an automatic anti-lock braking system, you achieve the shortest braking distance by braking abruptly and with maximum pedal force. The ABS prevents the wheels from locking during braking.
answerASource: - suddenly and with maximum force
answerBSource: - carefully and then increasingly harder
answerCSource: - multiple times at quick intervals and with maximum force
questionTextTarget: Hangi durumlarda sürücü destek sistemlerinin işlevi sınırlanabilir?
explanationTarget: Kötü hava, kirli sensörler veya eksik yol işaretleri sistemlerin çalışmasını sınırlayabilir.

questionTextSource: A lane assist system with corrective steer control can help you when driving. What should you be aware of?
explanationSource: A prerequisite for a perfect function of the lane departure warning system are good road markings. Keep in mind that technical driving assistants cannot compensate for inability to drive. As a car driver, you must be able to intervene into the driving experience at all times.
answerASource: - keep the vehicle in lane if the road markings are clear
answerBSource: - not function if the road markings are poor
answerCSource: - compensate for a lack of fitness to drive (e.g. tiredness)
questionTextTarget: Otomatik acil frenleme sistemi ne yapabilir?
explanationTarget: Sistem çarpışma tehlikesini algılayabilir, sürücüyü uyarabilir ve gerekirse otomatik frenleme başlatabilir.

questionTextSource: You are driving at high speed into a bend. What could happen if you had to brake suddenly?
explanationSource: If you drive fast into a tight curve, you lose road grip when you brake hard and slide out of the curve. (Centrifugal force)
answerASource: - could lose its grip on the road
answerBSource: - could skid out of the bend
answerCSource: - will constantly maintain its driving stability with the stability control
questionTextTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri kullanırken ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri sürücüyü destekler, fakat sürüş sorumluluğu sürücüde kalır. Sistemler her durumda kusursuz çalışmaz.

questionTextSource: What can result in your motor vehicle skidding while driving round a bend?
explanationSource: If you turn sharply, your vehicle may start to skid on bends. This can also happen if you drive too fast. Adjust your speed when cornering.
answerASource: Heavy oversteer
answerBSource: Driving too fast
answerCSource: Gently accelerating at the exit of the bend
questionTextTarget: Hangi durumlar acil fren asistanının işlevini kısıtlayabilir?
explanationTarget: Kirli sensörler, kötü hava koşulları ve sistemin algılayamadığı engeller acil fren asistanını sınırlayabilir.

questionTextSource: The lane keeping assist system warns you with acoustic, haptic or optical signals. What might be the cause of this?
explanationSource: If you drift out of your lane, the lane departure warning system detects this by recognising that you are approaching the lane marking. The permissible total mass must not be exceeded.
answerASource: My vehicle is getting close to the road markings at the side of the road
answerBSource: My vehicle is undercutting the safety distance to the vehicle ahead
answerCSource: Another vehicle is overtaking me with not enough side clearance
questionTextTarget: Adaptif hız sabitleyici kullanırken neyi unutmamalısınız?
