explanationTarget: Aracınızın sağ yanında bir bisikletli bulunduğunda dönüş asistanı uyarı verebilir. Şerit çizgisini aşma veya çok hızlı dönme bu sistemin tipik uyarı sebebi değildir.
answerATarget: Aracımın sağ tarafında bir bisikletli bulunuyor

questionTextSource: Your motor vehicle is equipped with a turn assist system. What function does this perform during a turning manoeuvre?
explanationSource: A turn assistant checks the area to the right of the truck for bikers and walkers when turning right and warns the driver.
answerASource: - warns the driver of weaker road users on the passenger side
answerBSource: - warns the driver of obstructions on the passenger side
answerCSource: - can perform the complete turning manoeuvre
questionTextTarget: Motorlu aracınız dönüş asistanıyla donatılmış. Dönüş manevrası sırasında bu sistemin işlevi nedir?
explanationTarget: Sistem yolcu tarafındaki zayıf yol kullanıcıları ve engeller konusunda sürücüyü uyarabilir. Tüm dönüş manevrasını yapamaz.
answerATarget: - yolcu tarafındaki zayıf yol kullanıcıları konusunda sürücüyü uyarır
answerBTarget: - yolcu tarafındaki engeller konusunda sürücüyü uyarır

questionTextSource: What can you expect if you take a truck with a heavy load and drive it around a tight bend?
explanationSource: A heavily loaded truck can tip over when negotiating a tight curve, or inadequately secured cargo can slip because of centrifugal forces that are proportional to the mass of the vehicle and the cargo. These forces can destabilize the vehicle and cause it to tip over, especially if the center of gravity is high. Inadequately secured loads can slip due to these forces, further affecting the vehicle's balance and increasing the risk of accidents. Correct load securing is therefore essential to ensure the stability of the vehicle and increase road safety.
answerASource: The lorry can tip over if driven too fast
answerBSource: Insufficiently secured cargo can slip
answerCSource: The lorry handles better on bends
questionTextTarget: Ağır yüklü bir kamyonla dar virajdan geçerseniz ne bekleyebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Çok hızlı sürülürse kamyon devrilebilir ve yeterince güvenceye alınmamış yük kayabilir. Kamyon virajlarda daha iyi yol tutmaz.
answerCTarget: Kamyon virajlarda daha iyi yol tutar

questionTextSource: Which facilities on a trailer are not operational when the electrical connections to the towing vehicle are interrupted or the cables are not connected?
explanationSource: If the cables from the trailer are not operational because the electronic connection has been lost to the towing vehicle, the ABS is not working and lighting equipment will not work.
answerASource: The automatic anti-locking device (ABS)
answerBSource: All lighting facilities
answerCSource: The anti-slip device (ASR)
questionTextTarget: Çekici araçla elektrik bağlantısı kesilmişse veya kablolar bağlı değilse römorktaki hangi sistemler çalışmaz?
explanationTarget: Elektrik bağlantısı yoksa römorkun ABS sistemi ve tüm aydınlatma tertibatları çalışmaz. ASR bu cevapta ilgili değildir.

questionTextSource: What should you regularly check with a spare tyre carried in the vehicle?
explanationSource: When carried spare you should pay attention to the secure attachment and check the air pressure. Profile name is incorrect.
answerASource: That it is securely in place
answerBSource: The tyre pressure
answerCSource: The profile designation
questionTextTarget: Araçta taşınan yedek lastikte neyi düzenli kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Yedek lastiğin güvenli şekilde sabitlendiğini ve lastik basıncını düzenli kontrol etmelisiniz. Profil adı belirleyici değildir.

questionTextSource: You are driving a loaded truck on a road with gradients. Despite engaging the permanent brake, the speed increases markedly. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: You should try to increase the engine braking effect of your truck for a downgrade by looking brakes on with the service brake to be able to switch back.
answerASource: Continue braking using the service brake to allow you to change down gears
answerBSource: Disengage the permanent brake and maintain speed using the service brake only
answerCSource: Continue braking using the service brake to allow you to change up gears
questionTextTarget: Yüklü kamyonla eğimli yolda gidiyorsunuz. Sürekli fren devrede olmasına rağmen hız belirgin artıyor. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Vites küçültebilmek için servis freniyle frenlemeye devam etmelisiniz. Sürekli freni bırakıp yalnızca servis freniyle gitmek veya vites büyütmek doğru değildir.
answerATarget: Vites küçültebilmek için servis freniyle frenlemeye devam etmek
answerBTarget: Sürekli freni devreden çıkarıp hızı yalnızca servis freniyle korumak
answerCTarget: Vites büyütebilmek için servis freniyle frenlemeye devam etmek

questionTextSource: What should be noted with a motorbike with a conventional anti-lock braking system (ABS) when braking in a bend?
explanationSource: Even if your motorcycle has ABS, you should still use controlled braking as ABS is mostly made for strong braking in straight lines. In a bend, the stronger you break, the more torque you will feel which will tend to put your motorcycle from a tilted to a straight position.
answerASource: You should nevertheless perform controlled braking when in a declined position
answerBSource: The self-righting torque is dependent on the braking force
answerCSource: The transmissible braking forces increase in the declined position
questionTextTarget: Klasik ABS’li motosikletle virajda fren yaparken neye dikkat edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Yatık pozisyonda bile kontrollü frenleme yapmalısınız. Doğrulma momenti fren kuvvetine bağlıdır. Yatık pozisyonda aktarılabilir fren kuvvetleri artmaz.
answerATarget: Yatık pozisyonda yine de kontrollü frenleme yapılmalıdır
answerCTarget: Yatık pozisyonda aktarılabilir fren kuvvetleri artar

questionTextSource: What can help the wobbling of a motorbike?
explanationSource: Wobbling increases at higher speed and if the weight is not well distributed such as more weight on the right or left side
answerASource: Driving at a higher speed
answerBSource: One-sided weight loading
answerCSource: Driving at a slower speed
questionTextTarget: Motosikletin yalpalamasına ne yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Daha düşük hızda sürmek yalpalamayı azaltabilir. Daha yüksek hız veya tek taraflı yükleme yalpalamayı artırabilir.

questionTextSource: What can cause a motorbike to start wobbling?
explanationSource: Wobbling can be due to unbalanced weights (more weight to the right or left side) or wrongly fitted fairings that cause more drag to one or the other side
answerASource: Wrongly fitted fairings
answerBSource: Unbalanced loading of side panniers
answerCSource: Poor fuel quality
questionTextTarget: Motosikletin yalpalamaya başlamasına ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yanlış takılmış kaplamalar ve yan çantaların dengesiz yüklenmesi yalpalamaya neden olabilir. Yakıt kalitesi tipik neden değildir.

questionTextSource: What is the effect of the cornering characteristics of a combination vehicle (motor vehicle towing a trailer) when taking a turn?
explanationSource: The cornering characteristics of a vehicle combination can swing when turning and you can cut the corner.
answerASource: - can jut out
answerBSource: - can cut the corner
answerCSource: - generally follows the track of the towing vehicle
questionTextTarget: Römork çeken motorlu araç kombinasyonunun dönüş davranışı dönüş sırasında nasıl etkiler?
explanationTarget: Kombinasyon dışarı taşabilir ve virajı içten kesebilir. Genel olarak çekici aracın izini tam takip etmez.
answerCTarget: - genellikle çekici aracın izini takip eder

questionTextSource: You notice there is play on the handlebar bearing. What must you do?
explanationSource: Having a loose handlebar with some play is dangerous and make your motorcycle more difficult to control, make sure to not have any play to guarantee your safety
answerASource: Have the play eliminated
answerBSource: Leave the play because it is easier to move the handlebar
questionTextTarget: Gidon yatağında boşluk fark ettiniz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Gidon yatağındaki boşluk giderilmelidir. Boşluk bırakılırsa sürüş davranışı bozulabilir.
answerBTarget: Gidonu daha kolay hareket ettirdiği için boşluğu bırakmak

questionTextSource: When you move the handlebar, you notice that the handlebar bearing is catching in one place. What must you do?
explanationSource: Having catching in your handelbar bearing makes your motorcycle more difficult to control, make sure to not have any to garantee your safety
answerASource: Have the catching eliminated
answerBSource: Increase the play of the handlebar bearing to improve track-holding
questionTextTarget: Gidonu hareket ettirdiğinizde gidon yatağının bir noktada takıldığını fark ediyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Takılma giderilmelidir. İz tutuşu iyileştirmek için boşluk artırılmaz.
answerBTarget: İz tutuşunu iyileştirmek için gidon yatağı boşluğunu artırmak

questionTextSource: What can play in the handlebar bearing cause?
explanationSource: Having a loose handlebar with some play is dangerous and make your motorcycle more difficult to control, make sure to not have any play to garantee your safety
answerASource: It can have a negative influence on road behaviour
answerBSource: Road behaviour is improved
answerCSource: Track-holding is improved
questionTextTarget: Gidon yatağındaki boşluk neye neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Gidon yatağındaki boşluk sürüş davranışını olumsuz etkileyebilir. Sürüş davranışını veya iz tutuşunu iyileştirmez.

questionTextSource: What effect can a defective steering shock absorber have on road behaviour?
explanationSource: A defective steering shock absorber can cause the steering wheel to vibrate/shimmy and decrease the stability and roadworthiness of your motorcycle
answerASource: A defective steering shock absorber can cause the steering wheel to shimmy
answerBSource: Roadworthiness can deteriorate
answerCSource: Roadworthiness only deteriorates at low speed
questionTextTarget: Arızalı direksiyon amortisörü sürüş davranışını nasıl etkileyebilir?
explanationTarget: Arızalı direksiyon amortisörü direksiyonun titremesine neden olabilir ve yol güvenliğini kötüleştirebilir. Etki sadece düşük hızlarda olmaz.
answerATarget: Arızalı direksiyon amortisörü direksiyonun titremesine neden olabilir
answerCTarget: Yol güvenliği sadece düşük hızda kötüleşir

questionTextSource: What can decisively impair road behaviour?
explanationSource: All three will worsen the steering of your motorcycle making it more difficult to control and drive safely
answerASource: Deflected handlebar bearing
answerBSource: Defective steering shock absorber
answerCSource: Play in the handlebar bearing
questionTextTarget: Sürüş davranışını belirgin şekilde ne bozabilir?
explanationTarget: Eğilmiş gidon yatağı, arızalı direksiyon amortisörü ve gidon yatağındaki boşluk sürüş davranışını belirgin şekilde bozabilir.

questionTextSource: You notice your motorcycle has poor track-holding. What can be the cause?
explanationSource: Both play in the wheel bearings and deflected back fork can cause your motorcycle to not keep its course and make handling more difficult and less safe
answerASource: Too much play in the wheel bearings
answerBSource: Deflected backfork
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin iz tutuşunun kötü olduğunu fark ediyorsunuz. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Tekerlek yataklarında fazla boşluk veya eğilmiş arka maşa kötü iz tutuşuna neden olabilir.

questionTextSource: Your motorcycle no longer keeps the track. What can be defective?
explanationSource: A bent fork or frame can make your motorcycle not aligned which will result in difficulty to keep your course
answerASource: Bent fork
answerBSource: Bent frame
answerCSource: Defective rear wheel brake
questionTextTarget: Motosikletiniz artık izini korumuyor. Ne arızalı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Eğilmiş çatal veya eğilmiş şasi motosikletin iz tutuşunu bozabilir. Arızalı arka fren tipik neden değildir.

questionTextSource: When you throttle down without disengaging the clutch, your motorcycle no longer keeps to the track. What can be the cause of this?
explanationSource: Both play in the rear wheel bearing and fork bearing can cause your motorcycle to not keep its course and make handling more difficult and less safe
answerASource: Too much play of the fork bearing
answerBSource: Too much play of the rear-wheel bearing
answerCSource: Idle speed too high
questionTextTarget: Debriyajı ayırmadan gazı kestiğinizde motosikletiniz artık izini korumuyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Çatal yatağında veya arka tekerlek yatağında çok fazla boşluk buna neden olabilir. Rölanti devrinin yüksek olması tipik neden değildir.
answerBTarget: Arka tekerlek yatağında çok fazla boşluk

questionTextSource: You notice that the lever travel of the hydraulic front wheel brake on your motorcycle has become considerably longer. What must you do?
explanationSource: It is a sign of a defective front wheel brake which needs to be repaired or replaced
answerASource: Have the front wheel brake repaired
answerBSource: Only use the rear wheel brake until the next service
answerCSource: Fill up the brake fluid immediately
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin hidrolik ön freninde kol hareketinin belirgin şekilde uzadığını fark ediyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Ön fren derhal tamir ettirilmelidir. Sadece arka freni kullanarak devam etmek veya hemen fren hidroliği eklemek güvenli çözüm değildir.
answerBTarget: Bir sonraki servise kadar sadece arka freni kullanmak

questionTextSource: The mirror holder on your motorcycle is loose. What do you do?
explanationSource: You should never remove your mirror and need to fix them as they are required at all time to see the traffic behind you
answerASource: Fix the mirror holder
answerBSource: Remove the mirror
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin ayna tutucusu gevşek. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Ayna tutucusunu sabitlemelisiniz. Aynayı sökmek doğru değildir.

questionTextSource: What can you check on your tyre?
explanationSource: The driver can check on the tire whether the prescribed tread depth is present and whether the tread has a consistent wear. In addition, the age of the tire can be read off the so-called DOT number.
answerASource: Uniform wear of the profile
answerBSource: Profile
answerCSource: The age of the tyre
questionTextTarget: Lastiğinizde neyi kontrol edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Lastik profilinin eşit aşınmasını, profil derinliğini ve lastiğin yaşını kontrol edebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: When do you need to renew the brake pads?
explanationSource: The car driver must replace the brake pads on the vehicle if they are heavily contaminated by oil. Replacement is also necessary and mandatory when reaching the wear limit.
answerASource: If they have become oiled
answerBSource: If they have reached the wear limit
answerCSource: If they have got wet
questionTextTarget: Fren balatalarını ne zaman yenilemeniz gerekir?
explanationTarget: Fren balataları yağlanmışsa veya aşınma sınırına ulaşmışsa yenilenmelidir. Islanmaları tek başına yenileme sebebi değildir.

questionTextSource: Just after driving off, you test the brakes. Why?
explanationSource: Immediately after the start of the journey you should check the effectiveness of the service brake with a brake test for your own safety. Unlike bleeding the brake system, you can do this yourself by pressing the brake comfortably.
answerASource: To check the effectiveness of the brakes
answerBSource: To bleed the brake system quickly
questionTextTarget: Hareket ettikten hemen sonra frenleri test ediyorsunuz. Neden?
explanationTarget: Frenlerin etkinliğini kontrol etmek için. Fren sisteminin havasını hızlıca almak için yapılmaz.
answerBTarget: Fren sisteminin havasını hızlıca almak için

questionTextSource: Why does the brake fluid have to be exchanged according to the instructions of the vehicle manufacturer?
explanationSource: The brake fluid also draws water from the air, so the proportion of water in the brake fluid increases over time. Too much water will cause bubbles in the brake fluid. If air bubbles get into the brake line, the braking action can completely fail.
answerASource: To ensure the brake system continues to function even under higher stress
answerBSource: To ensure the percentage of water in the brake fluid does not reach a level which is unacceptable
answerCSource: To ensure the brake system does not leak
questionTextTarget: Fren hidroliği neden araç üreticisinin talimatlarına göre değiştirilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Fren sisteminin yüksek yük altında da çalışmasını sağlamak ve fren hidroliğindeki su oranının kabul edilemez seviyeye çıkmasını önlemek için değiştirilir.
answerATarget: Fren sisteminin daha yüksek yük altında da çalışmaya devam etmesini sağlamak için
answerBTarget: Fren hidroliğindeki su oranının kabul edilemez seviyeye ulaşmamasını sağlamak için
answerCTarget: Fren sisteminin sızdırmaz olmasını sağlamak için

questionTextSource: In which cases is it imperative to test the brakes?
explanationSource: A brake test is always essential if a vehicle has not been moved for a long period of time or if you are taking over a vehicle from someone else. If an oil change has been made on a vehicle, this has no effect on the brake system.
answerASource: When you drive a different vehicle
answerBSource: If a vehicle has not been used for a longer period
answerCSource: Each time the engine oil is changed
questionTextTarget: Hangi durumlarda frenleri mutlaka test etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Başka bir araç kullanırken veya araç uzun süre kullanılmamışsa frenler test edilmelidir. Her motor yağı değişiminde şart değildir.

questionTextSource: What do you have to check the tyres on your vehicle at regular intervals for?
explanationSource: At regular intervals you should check the air pressure and tread depth of your vehicle tires. In addition, you should regularly check the tires on your vehicle for external damage.
answerASource: For correct air pressure
answerBSource: For sufficient profile
answerCSource: For external damage
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın lastiklerini düzenli olarak ne açısından kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Doğru hava basıncı, yeterli profil ve dış hasarlar düzenli kontrol edilmelidir.

questionTextSource: If tyre pressure is too high or too low, what can this cause?
explanationSource: If the internal tire pressure is too high or too low, the driving behavior will deteriorate. In addition, the tire wear increases. If the tire pressure is too low, the tire heats up by flexing, while the "soft" tire is excessively compressed and relieved at the footprint. The consequences are an increased fuel consumption and a high rolling resistance, in addition, the driving stability decreases. If the tire pressure is too high, the tire may burst. It is important to check the tire pressure regularly and to take the information recommended by the manufacturer into account. The tire pressure has no influence on the thinking distance.
answerASource: Road behaviour can deteriorate
answerBSource: Tyre wear can increase
answerCSource: Reaction distance can be longer
questionTextTarget: Lastik basıncı çok yüksek veya çok düşükse neye neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sürüş davranışı kötüleşebilir ve lastik aşınması artabilir. Tepki mesafesi lastik basıncından doğrudan uzamaz.

questionTextSource: You hit a tyre against a hard obstacle with force. What must you do?
explanationSource: Tire and wheel rim must be thoroughly checked before proceeding. Damage to the tire flanks is particularly critical. A deformed wheel rim can cause the tire to slip off the rim. A torn alloy wheel can also have dire consequences. The wheel bolts are not subjected to extraordinary strain, so they do not need to be tightened.
answerASource: Have the tyres and rim checked immediately
answerBSource: Retighten the wheel bolts
questionTextTarget: Lastiği sert bir engele kuvvetli şekilde çarptınız. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Lastikleri ve jantı hemen kontrol ettirmelisiniz. Sadece bijonları sıkmak yeterli değildir.
answerATarget: Lastikleri ve jantı hemen kontrol ettirmek

questionTextSource: What happens when you drive with a tyre pressure which is far too low?
explanationSource: If you drive with significantly too low tire pressure, the tire may overheat. The low air pressure decreases the driving stability, the vehicle "floats" on the road. A reduction in tire footprint due to concavity in the tread center increases tire wear. Too little tire pressure also increases fuel consumption.
answerASource: Tyres heat up excessively
answerBSource: Driving stability decreases
answerCSource: Tyre wear decreases
questionTextTarget: Çok düşük lastik basıncıyla sürerseniz ne olur?
explanationTarget: Lastikler aşırı ısınır ve sürüş dengesi azalır. Lastik aşınması azalmaz, artar.

questionTextSource: What can be the cause of a rear light not to work?
explanationSource: If the taillight fails, you should first check the bulb. Even a defective fuse can cause a failure. The starter, however, does not matter because it is not related to the lighting system.
answerASource: Bulb is defective
answerBSource: Fuse has blown
answerCSource: Starter is defective
questionTextTarget: Arka lambanın çalışmamasının nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Ampul arızalı olabilir veya sigorta atmış olabilir. Marş motoru arızası arka lambayı tipik olarak etkilemez.

questionTextSource: The control light of your indicator is blinking considerably faster than usual. What can be the cause of this?
explanationSource: The flashing interval of the control lamp is shortened significantly if a bulb of the turn signal is defective. A fault with the flashing light switch cannot be the cause of the faster flashing.
answerASource: A bulb is defective
answerBSource: The direction indicator switch is defective
questionTextTarget: Sinyal kontrol lambası normalden belirgin şekilde hızlı yanıp sönüyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Bir ampul arızalı olabilir. Sinyal kolunun arızalı olması da mümkün olabilir, ancak hızlı yanıp sönmenin tipik sebebi ampul arızasıdır.

questionTextSource: Why are you required to have a defective exhaust system repaired immediately?
explanationSource: You must repair a rusted exhaust system immediately, otherwise parts of the exhaust may fall onto the road. This poses a danger to the other road users. In addition, rusty exhaust parts create unnecessary noise. A rusted exhaust system has no effect on the temperature of the engine.
answerASource: Because of the noise pollution
answerBSource: Because parts of the exhaust system can drop on the roadway
answerCSource: Because the engine would overheat
questionTextTarget: Arızalı egzoz sistemini neden hemen tamir ettirmeniz gerekir?
explanationTarget: Gürültü kirliliği nedeniyle ve egzoz parçaları yola düşebileceği için tamir ettirilmelidir. Motorun aşırı ısınması asıl sebep değildir.
answerBTarget: Egzoz sistemi parçaları yola düşebileceği için

questionTextSource: The noise of the exhaust has suddenly become louder than usual. What do you do?
explanationSource: It is likely that the exhaust system is broken or rusted. A rusted exhaust system can endanger other road users if parts fall off. The exhaust must be checked and repaired. The air filter cannot be the cause of the loud exhaust sound.
answerASource: Check the exhaust system
answerBSource: Nothing because nobody is endangered
answerCSource: Renew the engine air filter
questionTextTarget: Egzoz sesi aniden normalden daha yüksek oldu. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Egzoz sistemini kontrol etmelisiniz. Kimse tehlikede değil diye hiçbir şey yapmamak veya motor hava filtresini değiştirmek doğru değildir.
answerBTarget: Hiçbir şey yapmamak, çünkü kimse tehlikeye girmiyor

questionTextSource: If the horn does not work, what can be the reason?
explanationSource: If the horn of your vehicle does not work, it may be due to a faulty fuse or a faulty switch. A malfunction on the starter has no effect on the function of the horn.
answerASource: Blown fuse
answerBSource: The horn's operating device is defective
answerCSource: Defective starter
questionTextTarget: Korna çalışmıyorsa nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sigorta atmış olabilir veya korna kumanda tertibatı arızalı olabilir. Marş motoru arızası korna için tipik neden değildir.

questionTextSource: When braking, you note that your vehicle pulls to the right. What should you do?
explanationSource: A defective brake system poses a significant risk, which can lead to accidents. The car driver must have the problem remedied in a specialist workshop.
answerASource: I go to a car workshop
answerBSource: I do not need to fix the problem, as long as I can compensate by counter-steering
answerCSource: I oil the brake pads
questionTextTarget: Fren yaparken aracınızın sağa çektiğini fark ediyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Aracı servise götürmelisiniz. Karşı direksiyonla telafi etmek veya fren balatalarını yağlamak doğru değildir.
answerBTarget: Karşı direksiyonla telafi edebildiğim sürece sorunu gidermem gerekmez

questionTextSource: What can cause an excessively large brake cylinder stroke?
explanationSource: One cause of an excessive brake cylinder stroke is a worn out bearing of the transmission devices and a failure of the automatic slack adjuster. Too high a reservoir pressure does not affect too much brake cylinder stroke.
answerASource: A defective automatic slack adjuster
answerBSource: Worn mountings on the transmission system
answerCSource: Excessively high reservoir pressure
questionTextTarget: Fren silindiri strokunun aşırı büyük olmasına ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Otomatik fren ayarlayıcısının arızalı olması veya aktarma sistemindeki yatakların aşınması aşırı strok oluşturabilir. Aşırı yüksek depo basıncı buna neden olmaz.

questionTextSource: The brake light of your vehicle is not working. What could be the cause of this?
explanationSource: A functioning brake light is significant for the participation in traffic. If the car driver notices a fault on the vehicle, a direct replacement of the corresponding parts must take place. As a cause defective bulbs and broken fuses come into question.
answerASource: The relevant fuse is defective
answerBSource: The bulb is defective
answerCSource: The fill level of the brake fluid is too low
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın fren lambası çalışmıyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: İlgili sigorta veya ampul arızalı olabilir. Fren hidroliği seviyesinin düşük olması fren lambasını doğrudan söndürmez.

questionTextSource: What must you do if the oil pressure warning light fails to switch off after starting the engine?
explanationSource: To avoid damage to the engine, stop the engine immediately and check the engine oil level.
answerASource: I shut down the engine immediately
answerBSource: I check the engine oil level
answerCSource: I continue driving until the next oil change
questionTextTarget: Motor çalıştıktan sonra yağ basıncı uyarı lambası sönmüyorsa ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Motoru hemen kapatmalı ve motor yağı seviyesini kontrol etmelisiniz. Bir sonraki yağ değişimine kadar sürmeye devam edemezsiniz.
answerCTarget: Bir sonraki yağ değişimine kadar sürmeye devam ederim

questionTextSource: When it is necessary to check the braking system of your motorcycle immediately?
explanationSource: The brake indicator light warns of a defective brake system; if it lights up while driving, you should have the vehicle checked immediately. If the brakes are applied on one side, the vehicle cannot keep to the lane. Have the brake system checked.
answerASource: If the brake fluid level in the reservoir has dropped considerably
answerBSource: If no pressure point is felt when pulling the brake lever
answerCSource: If the brake control light illuminates while you are driving
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin fren sistemini ne zaman derhal kontrol ettirmeniz gerekir?
explanationTarget: Fren hidroliği seviyesi belirgin düşmüşse, fren kolunu çekince basınç noktası hissedilmiyorsa veya sürüş sırasında fren kontrol lambası yanıyorsa fren sistemi hemen kontrol edilmelidir.
answerATarget: Haznedeki fren hidroliği seviyesi belirgin şekilde düştüyse
answerBTarget: Fren kolunu çekince basınç noktası hissedilmiyorsa
answerCTarget: Sürüş sırasında fren kontrol lambası yanarsa

questionTextSource: How do you properly perform a visual check to ensure the brake lights are working?
explanationSource: To make sure that both the hand and foot brake lights are working, operate and check them one after the other. If you apply both brakes at the same time, you cannot be sure that both brakes activate the brake light
answerASource: - the hand and footbrake one after the other
answerBSource: - the hand and footbrake simultaneously
answerCSource: - either the handbrake or the footbrake
questionTextTarget: Fren lambalarının çalıştığını görsel olarak doğru kontrol etmek için ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: El freni ve ayak freni sırayla uygulanmalıdır. Böylece her iki kumandanın fren lambasını çalıştırıp çalıştırmadığı anlaşılır.
answerATarget: - el ve ayak frenini sırayla uygulamak
answerBTarget: - el ve ayak frenini aynı anda uygulamak
answerCTarget: - ya el frenini ya da ayak frenini uygulamak

questionTextSource: One of your wheels has collided heavily against a kerb. What should you note?
explanationSource:
If you have hit a hard obstacle, you should immediately have the tyre and rim checked for possible damage to ensure safe driving.
If the wheel has been damaged in the collision, it could have a negative effect on the vehicle's handling. If the tyre is only slightly or not obviously damaged, it could still lose air gradually.
answerASource: The vehicle should be checked in a garage
answerBSource: The handling of the vehicle could be negatively affected
answerCSource: The tyre could have a slow puncture
questionTextTarget: Tekerleklerden biri kaldırıma/kenar taşına kuvvetli çarptı. Neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Araç serviste kontrol ettirilmelidir; sürüş davranışı olumsuz etkilenebilir ve lastikte yavaş hava kaybı oluşabilir.
answerBTarget: Aracın sürüş davranışı olumsuz etkilenmiş olabilir

questionTextSource: The tail light of your vehicle is not working. What could be the cause of this?
explanationSource: A blown fuse or a defective bulb can be the cause of a tail light failure.
answerASource: The relevant fuse is faulty
answerBSource: The bulb is defective
answerCSource: The main beam light switch is faulty
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın arka lambası çalışmıyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: İlgili sigorta arızalı veya ampul bozuk olabilir. Uzun far şalteri arka lambanın tipik nedeni değildir.

questionTextSource: How can you detect that a disc brake system has worn brake pads?
explanationSource: The wear markings on the brake pad serve to check the wear state of the brake pads and to draw your attention to the fact that an exchange of the brake pads is required. Likewise, a low level in the brake fluid container can indicate high wear of the brake pad. Since a lot of brake fluid is directed into the brake cylinder when brake pads are worn.
answerASource: By the wear marks on the brake pad
answerBSource: By a very low fill level in the brake fluid reservoir
answerCSource: By an unusually large amount of looseness in the handbrake lever
questionTextTarget: Disk fren sisteminde fren balatalarının aşındığını nasıl anlayabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Fren balatasındaki aşınma işaretlerinden veya fren hidroliği haznesindeki çok düşük seviyeden anlaşılabilir. El freni kolundaki aşırı boşluk disk fren balatası için tipik gösterge değildir.
answerBTarget: Fren hidroliği haznesindeki çok düşük seviyeden
answerCTarget: El freni kolundaki alışılmadık derecede büyük boşluktan

questionTextSource: Your vehicle’s brake light is not working. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: If the lamp is defective, the vehicle's brake light does not work, you should fix it immediately. If only the lamp is defective, you can exchange it yourself or have it replaced by a workshop.
answerASource: I arrange for a garage to repair the vehicle
answerBSource: I attempt to determine the cause and repair the fault myself
answerCSource: I arrange for the brake fluid to be changed
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın fren lambası çalışmıyor. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Aracı serviste tamir ettirmeli veya sebebi bulup arızayı kendiniz gidermelisiniz. Fren hidroliğini değiştirmek doğru çözüm değildir.
answerBTarget: Sebebi bulmaya ve arızayı kendim gidermeye çalışırım

questionTextSource: The exhaust noise has suddenly become unusually loud. What is the right thing to do?
explanationSource: Check the exhaust immediately, e.g. if it is no longer sufficiently secured, this can cause damage to the exhaust, which can make the noise louder. So make sure that any defects are repaired before you continue riding.
answerASource: I immediately check the exhaust system for a faulty mounting
answerBSource: I ensure that any possible damage is promptly repaired
answerCSource: I am allowed to exceed the exhaust noise limits until my next vehicle inspection
questionTextTarget: Egzoz sesi aniden alışılmadık derecede yüksek oldu. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Egzoz sisteminde bağlantı/askı arızası olup olmadığını hemen kontrol etmeli ve olası hasarı en kısa zamanda tamir ettirmelisiniz.
answerATarget: Egzoz sistemini hemen arızalı bağlantı açısından kontrol ederim
answerBTarget: Olası hasarın kısa sürede tamir edilmesini sağlarım
answerCTarget: Bir sonraki araç muayenesine kadar egzoz gürültü sınırlarını aşabilirim

questionTextSource: You discover a considerable amount of play on the steering head bearings of your motorbike. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: Significant play in the steering head bearing indicates that the bearing is broken. Have it repaired professionally before you continue riding.
answerASource: - arrange for the steering head bearings to be properly repaired
answerBSource: - have the quick-release axle of the front wheel properly tightened
answerCSource: - have the handlebars properly tightened onto the clamps
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin gidon başı yatağında ciddi boşluk fark ettiniz. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Gidon başı yatağının usulüne uygun tamir edilmesini sağlamalısınız. Ön teker hızlı bağlantısını veya gidon kelepçelerini sıkmak bu sorunu çözmez.
answerATarget: - gidon başı yatağının usulüne uygun tamir edilmesini sağlamak
answerBTarget: - ön tekerleğin hızlı bağlantı aksını usulüne uygun sıktırmak

questionTextSource: How can you detect a fault in the steering head bearings of your motorbike?
explanationSource:
The steering head bearing should move smoothly and without detent points or play.
If the handlebars are difficult to turn, for example, this may be due to the steering head bearing. A stiff handlebar makes the motorbike less controllable and must therefore be repaired immediately by a specialist.
answerASource: - the presence of click stop sounds
answerBSource: - sluggishness in the movement
answerCSource: - some play existing there
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin gidon başı yatağında arıza olduğunu nasıl anlayabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Takılma/klik sesleri, ağır hareket etme veya boşluk olması gidon başı yatağı arızasını gösterebilir.

questionTextSource: How can you detect your indicator is defective?
explanationSource:
Before setting off, check the function of the indicator by operating the indicator lever and checking that it flashes.
If the indicator light flashes faster than usual while riding, an indicator may be faulty. Correct the fault immediately.
answerASource: The indicator control lamp flashes faster than normal
answerBSource: By performing a functionality test before moving off
answerCSource: The control lamp for the indicator is permanently illuminated red
questionTextTarget: Sinyalinizin arızalı olduğunu nasıl anlayabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Sinyal kontrol lambası normalden hızlı yanıp sönebilir. Ayrıca hareket etmeden önce işlev testiyle arıza anlaşılabilir. Kırmızı sürekli ışık tipik gösterge değildir.
answerATarget: Sinyal kontrol lambası normalden hızlı yanıp söner
answerBTarget: Hareket etmeden önce işlev testi yaparak
answerCTarget: Sinyal kontrol lambası sürekli kırmızı yanar

questionTextSource: You can see that the free travel of the lever of the hydraulic front-wheel brake has increased considerably. What do you have to do?
explanationSource: If the free distance on the brake lever of the hydraulic front brake has increased, the brake is probably defective. Have the front brake components checked and repaired immediately.
answerASource: Have the components of the front-wheel brake inspected without delay
answerBSource: Only use the rear-wheel brake until the next inspection
answerCSource: Adjust the travel of the brake lever
questionTextTarget: Hidrolik ön fren kolunun boş hareketinin belirgin şekilde arttığını görüyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Ön fren bileşenlerini gecikmeden kontrol ettirmelisiniz. Sadece arka frenle devam etmek veya kol boşluğunu ayarlamak yeterli değildir.
answerATarget: Ön fren bileşenlerini gecikmeden kontrol ettirmek
answerBTarget: Bir sonraki muayeneye kadar sadece arka freni kullanmak

questionTextSource: The tracking characteristics of your motorbike have deteriorated. What might be the cause of this?
explanationSource:
The rear swing arm is the movable suspension for the rear wheel. If the bearing of the rear swing arm is worn, the tracking behaviour deteriorates. Replace the bearing.
If the chain tensioners on your motorbike have been adjusted unevenly, the rear wheel may no longer be exactly in line with the front wheel and the tracking behaviour could deteriorate.
answerASource: The chain tensioner was unevenly adjusted
answerBSource: The bearings of the swingarm have become worn
answerCSource: The engine idling speed is set too high
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin iz tutuşu kötüleşti. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Zincir gergisinin eşit ayarlanmaması veya salıncak yataklarının aşınması iz tutuşunu bozabilir. Motor rölanti devrinin yüksek olması tipik neden değildir.
answerCTarget: Motor rölanti devrinin çok yüksek ayarlanmış olması

questionTextSource: In what road situation can a worn and therefore slippery coupling negatively affect road safety?
explanationSource: You can recognise a worn and slipping clutch by the fact that it no longer engages and you can no longer shift gears properly. This is particularly problematic if you have to accelerate quickly, e.g. when overtaking on country roads or merging onto the motorway. Have the clutch repaired by a workshop.
answerASource: When overtaking on main roads
answerBSource: While merging on the motorway
answerCSource: When performing an emergency braking manoeuvre
questionTextTarget: Aşınmış ve bu yüzden kaygan kavrama hangi trafik durumunda yol güvenliğini olumsuz etkileyebilir?
explanationTarget: Ana yollarda sollarken veya otoyola katılırken hızlanma gecikebilir. Acil frenleme sırasında kavrama kayması belirleyici değildir.

questionTextSource: You are on a lengthy journey and stop to refuel. What checks should you perform on your motorbike at this time?
explanationSource: Before starting longer rides, you should check your lights and tyres. You should also check that your luggage is properly secured before starting off and at every stop.
answerASource: - my tyres
answerBSource: - my lights
answerCSource: - the fastening of my luggage
questionTextTarget: Uzun bir yolculuktasınız ve yakıt almak için durdunuz. Bu sırada motosikletinizde neleri kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Lastikleri, ışıkları ve bagajın sabitlenmesini kontrol etmelisiniz.

questionTextSource: A display on your liquid-cooled vehicle indicates an excessively high engine temperature. What should you do now?
explanationSource: Stop as quickly as possible at a suitable location and switch off the engine to prevent engine damage due to overheating.
answerASource: I stop at a suitable place as quickly as possible
answerBSource: I drive on slowly at a high engine speed to improve the engine cooling
answerCSource: I continue onwards in a low gear until I reach my next scheduled driving break
questionTextTarget: Sıvı soğutmalı aracınızda motor sıcaklığının aşırı yüksek olduğunu gösteren bir gösterge yanıyor. Şimdi ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: En kısa sürede uygun bir yerde durmalısınız. Soğutmayı iyileştirmek için yüksek devirde yavaş sürmeye veya planlı molaya kadar devam etmeye çalışmamalısınız.
answerATarget: En kısa sürede uygun bir yerde dururum
answerBTarget: Motor soğutmasını iyileştirmek için yüksek motor devriyle yavaş sürerim
answerCTarget: Bir sonraki planlı molaya kadar düşük viteste devam ederim

questionTextSource: A display on your liquid-cooled vehicle indicates that the temperature of your coolant is excessively high. What might be the cause of this?
explanationSource:
The reason for an excessively high coolant temperature can be sediment and dirt, as they reduce heat dissipation. 
Coolant can escape through leaks or defective seals. If you have less coolant, it heats up faster. Check your vehicle for visible leaks and have them repaired if necessary.
If the radiator fan is defective, the temperature will rise quickly. Check the radiator fan for blockages and have it replaced by a specialist if necessary.
answerASource: The radiator is contaminated with dirt
answerBSource: The radiator fan has stopped working
answerCSource: There is a perforation in the radiator system
questionTextTarget: Sıvı soğutmalı aracınızda soğutma sıvısı sıcaklığının çok yüksek olduğu gösteriliyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Radyatör kirlenmiş, fan çalışmıyor veya soğutma sisteminde delik/kaçak olabilir.

questionTextSource: What can negatively affect your motorbike's stability on the road?
explanationSource:
A worn steering head bearing leads to play in the steering. The riding stability of your motorbike could be worse, especially when cornering.
If your shock absorbers are worn out, they can no longer compensate for bumps in the road. The grip of the tyres on the road can be reduced and the riding stability of your motorbike deteriorates.
answerASource: Loose steering head bearings
answerBSource: A worn shock absorber
answerCSource: A perforated exhaust system
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin yol stabilitesini ne olumsuz etkileyebilir?
explanationTarget: Gevşek gidon başı yatağı veya aşınmış amortisör yol stabilitesini olumsuz etkileyebilir. Delik egzoz sistemi bu açıdan belirleyici değildir.

questionTextSource: Your motorbike is liquid-cooled. What should you be sure you do?
explanationSource:
You should check the coolant level regularly and refill if necessary to prevent the engine from overheating.
Blockages and dirt can impair the function of the radiator. Avoid this by keeping the outer surfaces clean.
answerASource: Regularly check the coolant level
answerBSource: Regularly clean the outer surface of the cooler
answerCSource: Top it up with coolant at every refuelling stop
questionTextTarget: Motosikletiniz sıvı soğutmalı. Neye mutlaka dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Soğutma sıvısı seviyesini düzenli kontrol etmeli ve soğutucunun dış yüzeyini düzenli temizlemelisiniz. Her yakıt alışta soğutma sıvısı eklemek gerekmez.
answerATarget: Soğutma sıvısı seviyesini düzenli kontrol etmek
answerCTarget: Her yakıt alışta soğutma sıvısı eklemek

questionTextSource: The steering wheel is harder to turn than usual. What can cause this?
explanationSource: If the steering is stiff, a defect in the steering gear can be the cause. Also, the failure of power steering can cause the steering wheel to be moved more difficult than normal. You have a similar effect with too low tire pressure, but not too high.
answerASource: Defective steering gear
answerBSource: Servo-steering is not working
answerCSource: Tyre pressure is too high
questionTextTarget: Direksiyon simidi normalden daha zor dönüyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Direksiyon mekanizması arızalı olabilir veya servo direksiyon çalışmıyor olabilir. Lastik basıncının çok yüksek olması tipik sebep değildir.

questionTextSource: The brakes on your car are pulling strongly to one side. What effects can this have when you are braking?
explanationSource: If the brake on the car has a strong one-sided effect, this has a significant negative effect on the drivability of the vehicle. The vehicle may break sideways into adjacent lanes or start skidding. The braking distance gets longer. The antilocking system remains functional.
answerASource: Your car can veer to the side
answerBSource: Longer braking distance
answerCSource: Anti-lock braking system (ABS) fails
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın frenleri güçlü şekilde bir tarafa çekiyor. Frenleme sırasında bunun etkisi ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Araç yana savrulabilir ve fren mesafesi uzayabilir. ABS’nin tamamen devre dışı kalması zorunlu sonuç değildir.
answerCTarget: Kilitlenme önleyici sistem (ABS) devre dışı kalır

questionTextSource: When you press on the brake pedal, it touches the floor. Only when you press on it several times does the pedal travel become shorter. What must you do?
explanationSource: If the brake pedal can be pushed down to the floor of the vehicle and the pedal travel becomes shorter after repeatedly stepping on it, there is air in the brake system. This means that the brake has to be serviced and repaired immediately. It's not possible to continue your journey. Also, refilling the brake fluid does not solve the problem.
answerASource: Park the car immediately
answerBSource: Have the brakes repaired
answerCSource: It is sufficient to fill up the brake fluid
questionTextTarget: Fren pedalına bastığınızda pedalı tabana kadar itiyorsunuz. Ancak birkaç kez bastıktan sonra pedal hareketi kısalıyor. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Aracı hemen durdurmalı ve frenleri tamir ettirmelisiniz. Sadece fren hidroliği doldurmak yeterli değildir.

questionTextSource: The brake lights do not function. What do you do?
explanationSource: A defect in the brake lights must be rectified immediately in order not to endanger anyone on the road and to avoid accidents. Defective bulbs or broken fuses can be a cause for malfunctioning brake lights.
answerASource: Repair them immediately
answerBSource: Renew the brake fluid
questionTextTarget: Fren lambaları çalışmıyor. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Fren lambaları derhal tamir edilmelidir. Fren hidroliğini yenilemek bu arızanın çözümü değildir.

questionTextSource: How can you tell while driving that an indicator lamp is not working?
explanationSource: A faulty indicator is noticeable because the indicator light in the instrument display flashes much faster than usual. As a driver, you are able to quickly identify the defect while driving.
answerASource: The indicator signal light will flash faster than usual
answerBSource: You cannot detect a defective indicator lamp while driving
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında bir sinyal lambasının çalışmadığını nasıl anlarsınız?
explanationTarget: Sinyal kontrol lambası normalden hızlı yanıp söner.
answerATarget: Sinyal kontrol lambası normalden hızlı yanıp söner
answerBTarget: Arızalı sinyal lambasını sürüş sırasında anlayamazsınız

questionTextSource: You are driving in the dark with dipped headlights. Oncoming traffic flash their headlights at you. What can this mean?
explanationSource: If the oncoming driver is turning the headlights up and dips them again this is a typical sign that you are dazzling oncoming traffic with your front lights. The reason for this are incorrectly set head lamps or setting the headlight range in a way that does not correspond to the load condition. Do not misunderstand turning the headlights up and dipping them again as an invitation to turn on the high beam of your car.
answerASource: The headlamps on your vehicle are set incorrectly and are dazzling
answerBSource: The light range adjustment is not adapted to your vehicle load
answerCSource: Other drivers are telling you to turn on your main beam
questionTextTarget: Karanlıkta kısa farla gidiyorsunuz. Karşıdan gelenler size selektör yapıyor. Bu ne anlama gelebilir?
explanationTarget: Farlarınız yanlış ayarlanmış ve karşı trafiği kamaştırıyor olabilir veya far yükseklik ayarı aracın yüküne uyarlanmamış olabilir.
answerATarget: Aracınızın farları yanlış ayarlanmış ve kamaştırıyor olabilir
answerBTarget: Far yükseklik ayarı araç yüküne uyarlanmamış olabilir
answerCTarget: Diğer sürücüler uzun farı açmanızı söylüyor

questionTextSource: The glass in your left outside mirror is broken. What do you do?
explanationSource: On each vehicle, a left exterior mirror is mandatory. If the glass has cracked, you must replace the mirror immediately, even if all other mirrors are working properly. Only then can you continue your journey.
answerASource: Renew the mirror glass
answerBSource: Do not renew the mirror glass because you can still partly see to the rear
questionTextTarget: Sol dış aynanızın camı kırık. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Ayna camını yenilemelisiniz. Kısmen arkayı görebildiğiniz için değiştirmemek doğru değildir.
answerBTarget: Kısmen arkayı görebildiğiniz için ayna camını yenilememek

questionTextSource: The windscreen washer does not work. What can be the reason for this?
explanationSource: If the windscreen washer does not work, it may be due to clogged nozzles or a defective fuse. However, it is also possible that there is no more water in the storing tank and therefore the windscreen washer does not work.
answerASource: No water in the reservoir
answerBSource: Defective fuse
answerCSource: Blocked jets
questionTextTarget: Cam yıkama sistemi çalışmıyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Depoda su yok, sigorta arızalı veya püskürtme memeleri tıkalı olabilir.

questionTextSource: Too little water is coming out of the windscreen washer jets. What can cause this?
explanationSource: The windshield washer nozzles of your vehicle may be partially clogged if too little water comes out of them. The cause of the malfunctioning windscreen washer could also be a defect of the water pump. Too much water is not considered a cause of the error.
answerASource: Jets are partly blocked
answerBSource: Defective washer pump
answerCSource: Too much water in the reservoir
questionTextTarget: Cam yıkama püskürtme memelerinden çok az su geliyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Memeler kısmen tıkalı olabilir veya yıkama pompası arızalı olabilir. Depoda çok fazla su olması buna neden olmaz.

questionTextSource: The windscreen wipers do not wipe clean? What can be the reason for this?
explanationSource: If the wipers do not wipe clean, this may be due to an oil film on the windscreen. Even worn windscreen wiper blades can affect the function of the windscreen wipers. A defect in the window heater, however, has no effect on it.
answerASource: The windscreen wiper blades are worn
answerBSource: There is an oil film on the windscreen
answerCSource: The windscreen heating is defective
questionTextTarget: Silecekler camı temiz silmiyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Silecek lastikleri aşınmış olabilir veya camda yağ filmi olabilir. Cam ısıtmasının arızalı olması tipik sebep değildir.

questionTextSource: The windscreen wipers on your car do not function. What can be the cause of this?
explanationSource: If the windscreen wipers on your car do not work, it may be due to a faulty engine in the windscreen washer system. Even a blown fuse can be the cause. By contrast, too much water is not responsible for any failure.
answerASource: Blown fuse
answerBSource: Windscreen wiper motor defective
answerCSource: Too much water in the windscreen washer
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın silecekleri çalışmıyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sigorta atmış olabilir veya silecek motoru arızalı olabilir. Cam yıkama deposunda çok su olması neden değildir.
answerCTarget: Cam yıkama deposunda çok fazla su var

questionTextSource: A safety belt lock does not close. What do you do?
explanationSource: If the lock of a seatbelt does not close properly, you must first take care of the repair or get a replacement. Without proper operation of the seat belts driving even at low speed is not allowed because intact seat belts are mandatory.
answerASource: Have the lock repaired
answerBSource: Nothing because the seat is equipped with an airbag
answerCSource: Drive at a low speed
questionTextTarget: Emniyet kemeri kilidi kapanmıyor. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Kilit tamir ettirilmelidir. Koltukta hava yastığı olması veya yavaş sürmek bunu telafi etmez.
answerBTarget: Koltuk hava yastığıyla donatıldığı için hiçbir şey yapmamak

questionTextSource: A safety belt does not roll up automatically. What can be the reason for this?
explanationSource: It sometimes happens that the belt is twisted and jammed in the guide provided when unbuckling. If this happens it is not possible for the strap to roll up anymore. In addition, the device may have a defect. It then has to be repaired or replaced.
answerASource: Safety belt is twisted
answerBSource: Automatic retractor is defective
answerCSource: Seat adjustment is defective
questionTextTarget: Emniyet kemeri otomatik olarak sarılmıyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Emniyet kemeri bükülmüş olabilir veya otomatik sarma mekanizması arızalı olabilir. Koltuk ayarının arızası tipik neden değildir.

questionTextSource: Your car’s steering wheel wobbles while you are driving. What can be the reason?
explanationSource: If the steering wheel flutters while driving, defective shock absorbers may be the reason. They prevent vertical movements of the tires. Damage of the suspension can also be a possible cause. The same flutter effect is also caused by wheels with an imbalance.
answerASource: Wheels are unbalanced
answerBSource: Shock absorbers are defective
answerCSource: Wheel suspension-spring is damaged
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında aracınızın direksiyon simidi titriyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Tekerlekler balanssız olabilir, amortisörler arızalı olabilir veya tekerlek süspansiyon yayı hasarlı olabilir.

questionTextSource: What can be the reason for a tyre on front axle wearing on one side more than the other?
explanationSource: Basically, there are two causes for the different degrees of wear of the front tires: Either the wheel alignment is not correct or an axle guide is bent. You should immediately correct the wheel alignment or carry out a repair of the axle guide.
answerASource: Track alignment not in order
answerBSource: Steering axle is bent
questionTextTarget: Ön akstaki bir lastiğin bir tarafının diğer taraftan daha fazla aşınmasına ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Rot ayarı bozuk olabilir veya direksiyon aksı eğilmiş olabilir.

questionTextSource: What can cause excessive wear on tyres?
explanationSource: Improper tire pressure and suspension damage are the most common causes of excessive tire wear. Tire pressure refers to too little air pressure. This increases the abrasion. The attachment of a front spoiler does not lead to tire damage.
answerASource: Damage to the wheel suspension-spring
answerBSource: Incorrect tyre pressure
answerCSource: Mounting a front spoiler
questionTextTarget: Lastiklerde aşırı aşınmaya ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Tekerlek süspansiyon yayında hasar veya yanlış lastik basıncı aşırı aşınmaya neden olabilir. Ön spoiler takmak tipik neden değildir.

questionTextSource: Whilst driving, your vehicle pulls to the right. What can be the reason for this?
explanationSource: If your vehicle pulls to the right while driving, the wheel position may be responsible. But even a bent axle guide can be the cause. In contrast, the steering damper usually has no influence on the directional stability of your vehicle.
answerASource: Steering axle bent
answerBSource: Wheel alignment not in order
answerCSource: Loose steering shock absorber
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında aracınız sağa çekiyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Direksiyon aksı eğilmiş, tekerlek ayarı bozuk veya direksiyon amortisörü gevşek olabilir.

questionTextSource: What is the impact on your vehicle if you operate the steering wheel while stationary?
explanationSource: Attempting to steer your vehicle while standing requires much more effort than when it's rolling. This increased effort is transferred to the entire steering including the track rod. This is more stressed than when steering while driving.
answerASource: The tyre tread can be damaged
answerBSource: A heavy strain is exerted on the front axle mechanism
answerCSource: Steering is made easier
questionTextTarget: Araç dururken direksiyon simidini çevirirseniz araca etkisi ne olur?
explanationTarget: Lastik sırtı zarar görebilir ve ön aks mekanizmasına büyük yük biner. Direksiyonu kolaylaştırmaz.
answerBTarget: Ön aks mekanizmasına ağır yük biner

questionTextSource: When should you arrange for the braking system of your car to be checked?
explanationSource: The brake control light warns of a defective brake system; if it lights up while driving, you should have the vehicle checked immediately. If the brakes are applied on one side, the vehicle cannot keep to the lane. Have the brake system checked.
answerASource: If the brake control light illuminates while driving
answerBSource: If my car fails to stay in line when I brake
answerCSource: If I performed an emergency braking manoeuvre with my car
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın fren sistemini ne zaman kontrol ettirmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Sürüş sırasında fren kontrol lambası yanarsa veya fren yaparken araç çizgisini korumazsa fren sistemi kontrol edilmelidir. Acil frenleme yaptıktan sonra her zaman şart değildir.
answerATarget: Sürüş sırasında fren kontrol lambası yanarsa

questionTextSource: While driving, you notice that your car pulls heavily to the left when you brake. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource:
If your vehicle behaves in an unusual way, you should always go to a workshop immediately. This way you can prevent possible accidents. Since there is obviously something wrong with your brakes, you should avoid situations in which you have to brake hard or fully.
Braking with the handbrake can cause your car to drift out of its lane. You should never do this while driving.
answerASource: - have my car inspected in a garage without delay
answerBSource: - only continue driving at low speed
answerCSource: - only use the handbrake from that time on
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında fren yapınca aracınızın güçlü şekilde sola çektiğini fark ediyorsunuz. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Aracı gecikmeden serviste kontrol ettirmelisiniz. Sadece düşük hızla devam etmek veya bundan sonra yalnızca el frenini kullanmak doğru değildir.
answerCTarget: - bundan sonra yalnızca el frenini kullanmak

questionTextSource: Your vehicle is much more difficult to steer than usual. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource:
If your vehicle behaves unusually, you should always go to a garage immediately.
Further journeys would entail too much risk. You would be putting yourself and other road users in danger.
answerASource: I arrange for my vehicle to be inspected by a garage without delay
answerBSource: For the time being, I bear this steering behaviour in mind when continuing to drive
answerCSource: I reduce the tyre inflation pressure on the front axle
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın direksiyonu normalden çok daha zor dönüyor. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Aracınızı gecikmeden serviste kontrol ettirmelisiniz. Bu davranışı dikkate alarak devam etmek veya ön aksta lastik basıncını düşürmek doğru değildir.
answerBTarget: Şimdilik bu direksiyon davranışını dikkate alarak sürmeye devam ederim

questionTextSource: You note that the tyres on your vehicle's front axle are showing uneven amounts of wear. What should be checked?
explanationSource:
There are several reasons for unevenly worn tyres. You should check the tyre pressure. 
A defective shock absorber or also an incorrect suspension setting can lead to uneven wear. Both should be checked at a specialist garage.
answerASource: The chassis settings
answerBSource: The tyre inflation pressure
answerCSource: The shock absorbers
questionTextTarget: Ön aks lastiklerinizin düzensiz aşındığını fark ediyorsunuz. Ne kontrol edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Şasi ayarları, lastik basıncı ve amortisörler kontrol edilmelidir.

questionTextSource: While driving, your vehicle pulls to the right. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource:
If your vehicle pulls to the right while driving, this could indicate incorrect tyre pressure. Check it and drive to a workshop if necessary.
Braking hard will not improve handling. It will only lead to riskier driving and could endanger you and other road users.
If your vehicle behaves abnormally, you should always go to a workshop immediately.
Further driving would involve too much risk.
answerASource: I check the tyre inflation pressure and take the vehicle to a garage if necessary
answerBSource: I simply note the steering behaviour when I continue driving
answerCSource: I attempt to improve the handling by braking heavily
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında aracınız sağa çekiyor. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Lastik basıncını kontrol etmeli ve gerekirse aracı servise götürmelisiniz. Sadece bunu dikkate alarak sürmek veya sert frenle düzeltmeye çalışmak doğru değildir.
answerATarget: Lastik basıncını kontrol eder ve gerekirse aracı servise götürürüm

answerCTarget: Sert fren yaparak yol tutuşunu iyileştirmeye çalışırım

questionTextSource: When must you arrange for your car to be inspected by a garage?
explanationSource: If you notice any defects in your suspension or steering system, you should visit a workshop immediately. These could be very dangerous for you and others and have a negative effect on the driving behaviour and especially the safety of your car.
answerASource: - to the chassis
answerBSource: - to the steering system
answerCSource: - to the paintwork
questionTextTarget: Arabanızı ne zaman serviste kontrol ettirmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Şasi veya direksiyon sisteminde hasar varsa araç serviste kontrol ettirilmelidir. Boya hasarı bunun için zorunlu sebep değildir.

questionTextSource: The indicator light is flashing much faster than usual. What could be the cause of this?
explanationSource: As an indication of a defective bulb, the indicator light flashes twice as fast. You can also see the faster flashing in the vehicle cockpit. This means that you can even see that an indicator has failed while driving.
answerASource: A bulb is defective
answerBSource: The fuse is faulty
answerCSource: The hazard lights are switched on
questionTextTarget: Sinyal kontrol lambası normalden çok daha hızlı yanıp sönüyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Bir ampul arızalı olabilir veya sigorta arızalı olabilir. Dörtlü ikaz ışıklarının açık olması tipik neden değildir.

questionTextSource: When should you arrange for your car to be inspected in a garage?
explanationSource: You should have your car checked by a workshop if the airbag indicator light does not go out after a short time after starting the engine. This could indicate that something is wrong with the airbag or, for example, the seat belt system. A continuous noise when braking could indicate damage to the brake system.  Normally, your car will drive straight ahead without holding the steering wheel. If you have to counter-steer all the time to stay in lane, you should have it checked by a workshop.
answerASource: If there is a permanent noise when braking
answerBSource: If the airbag indicator light does not switch off after the engine is started
answerCSource: If you have to continuously counter-steer when driving in a straight line
questionTextTarget: Arabanızı ne zaman serviste kontrol ettirmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Fren yaparken sürekli ses varsa, motor çalıştıktan sonra hava yastığı kontrol lambası sönmüyorsa veya düz giderken sürekli karşı direksiyon gerekiyorsa servise gidilmelidir.
answerBTarget: Motor çalıştıktan sonra hava yastığı kontrol lambası sönmüyorsa
answerCTarget: Düz giderken sürekli karşı direksiyon yapmak zorunda kalıyorsanız

questionTextSource: When accelerating, you notice that the steering wheel trembles. How should you do here?
explanationSource: If the steering wheel "flutters" under acceleration, you should take a closer look at the front wheels. You should first check the front wheels for damage and then check whether the front wheels are still properly attached.
answerASource: - front wheels for damage
answerBSource: - mounting of the front wheels
answerCSource: - steering wheel mounting
questionTextTarget: Hızlanırken direksiyon simidinin titrediğini fark ediyorsunuz. Ne kontrol edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Ön tekerleklerde hasar, ön tekerleklerin bağlantısı ve direksiyon simidi bağlantısı kontrol edilmelidir.

questionTextSource: The front passenger seatbelt is defective. What must you do?
explanationSource: A defective seat belt must be professionally replaced. As long as the seat belt is defective, the seat may no longer be used, as the person in this seat is very endangered.
answerASource: I have to arrange for the seatbelt to be replaced
answerBSource: I may not use the seat any longer
answerCSource: I have to adjust the seatbelt height adjuster
questionTextTarget: Ön yolcu emniyet kemeri arızalı. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Emniyet kemerini değiştirtmeli ve bu koltuğu artık kullanmamalısınız. Kemer yükseklik ayarı sorunu çözmez.

questionTextSource: You are driving within a built-up area during darkness. Oncoming drivers are flashing their headlights as a warning to you. What might this mean in this situation?
explanationSource: If there are an oncoming vehicles, then this can be because you have switched on your high beam and that they are dazzling. However, this can also be a memory for you, because you have forgotten, for example, to turn on the low beam.
answerASource: My vehicle is dazzling oncoming vehicles
answerBSource: I have forgotten to switch on my dipped headlights
answerCSource: I should turn on my main beam lights
questionTextTarget: Karanlıkta yerleşim içinde gidiyorsunuz. Karşıdan gelen sürücüler size uyarı olarak selektör yapıyor. Bu durumda ne anlama gelebilir?
explanationTarget: Aracınız karşı trafiği kamaştırıyor olabilir veya kısa farları açmayı unutmuş olabilirsiniz. Uzun farı açmanız gerektiği anlamına gelmez.

questionTextSource: The indicator lamp of your car’s Electronic Stability Program (ESC) is continuously illuminated. What might this indicate?
explanationSource:
A permanently shining ESP warning light in the car indicates a problem with the driving dynamics control of the vehicle-a deactivation of the driving assistance system also results in a permanently bright ESP control light in many cars.
If you have not deactivated or switched off with a permanently shining ESP warning lamp, you should go to a workshop promptly to have the functioning of the driving dynamic control checked.
answerASource: - has been deactivated
answerBSource: - is defective
answerCSource: - is switched on
questionTextTarget: Arabanızın elektronik stabilite programı (ESC) kontrol lambası sürekli yanıyor. Bu neyi gösterebilir?
explanationTarget: ESC devre dışı bırakılmış veya arızalı olabilir. Sürekli yanması sistemin normal şekilde çalıştığı anlamına gelmez.

questionTextSource: The seat belt for the front passenger in your car is faulty. What is the right behaviour?
explanationSource: A seat with a defective seat belt may no longer be used. To do this, a defective seat belt must be professionally replaced or repaired to ensure the safety of the person in question.
answerASource: I have the seat belt repaired
answerBSource: I do not let anyone travel in the passenger seat
answerCSource: I adjust the belt height adjuster
questionTextTarget: Arabanızdaki ön yolcu emniyet kemeri arızalı. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Emniyet kemerini tamir ettirmeli ve ön yolcu koltuğunda kimsenin seyahat etmesine izin vermemelisiniz. Kemer yükseklik ayarı çözüm değildir.
answerBTarget: Ön yolcu koltuğunda kimsenin seyahat etmesine izin vermem

questionTextSource: What can cause the filling time of an air brake system to be longer than normal?
explanationSource: If the filling time of the air brake system longer than normal, please check the air tank or connections for leaks, or increase the capacity of the air compressor, because this is too low.
answerASource: Leaking air tanks or connectors
answerBSource: Inadequate air compressor performance
answerCSource: Too much water in the air tanks
questionTextTarget: Havalı fren sisteminin dolum süresinin normalden uzun olmasına ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Hava tanklarında veya bağlantılarda kaçak olması ya da hava kompresörünün yetersiz performansı dolum süresini uzatabilir. Tanklarda fazla su olması tipik sebep değildir.
answerCTarget: Hava tanklarında çok fazla su olması

questionTextSource: The warning device of the brake system is activated when driving. What does this mean?
explanationSource: When the pressure warning device responsive while driving, it means that the brake system is probably faulty and should be repaired. The reservoir pressure is no longer sufficient and should be checked for pressure loss.
answerASource: Reserve pressure is no longer adequate
answerBSource: The brake system is probably defective
answerCSource: A brake cylinder is leaking
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında fren sisteminin uyarı tertibatı devreye giriyor. Bu ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: Rezerv basınç artık yeterli olmayabilir ve fren sistemi muhtemelen arızalıdır. Fren silindirinde kaçak da mümkün olabilir.

questionTextSource: What can cause the air compressor in a braking system with a multi-circuit safety valve to deliver compressed air continuously?
explanationSource: If the air compressor promotes continuously compressed air is the cause, that a connected to the multi-circuit protection valve pneumatic circuit has become leaking and the air compressor piston wear has progressed so far that the switch-off is no longer achieved.
answerASource: Piston wear in the air compressor has reached the stage where the cut-off pressure is no longer reached
answerBSource: A compressed air circuit connected to the multi-circuit safety valve is leaking
answerCSource: The multi-circuit safety valve is not switching off
questionTextTarget: Çok devreli koruma valfli fren sisteminde hava kompresörünün sürekli basınçlı hava basmasına ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Kompresörde piston aşınması nedeniyle kesme basıncına ulaşılamayabilir veya çok devreli koruma valfine bağlı bir hava devresinde kaçak olabilir.
answerATarget: Hava kompresöründeki piston aşınması nedeniyle kesme basıncına artık ulaşılamaması
answerBTarget: Çok devreli koruma valfine bağlı bir basınçlı hava devresinin kaçırması

questionTextSource: What faults could be a possible cause of inadequate air compressor performance?
explanationSource: For an insufficient capacity of the air compressor faulty air compressor are eligible and belt slip or the pollution of the air filter. Water in the reservoirs is not decisive.

answerBSource: Damaged air compressor
answerCSource: Water in the reserve tanks
questionTextTarget: Hava kompresörünün yetersiz performansına hangi arızalar neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Kayışın kayması, hava filtresinin kirli olması veya kompresörün hasarlı olması yetersiz hava performansına neden olabilir. Tanklarda su olması kompresör performansını doğrudan düşürmez.
answerATarget: Kayışın kayması veya hava filtresinin kirli olması

questionTextSource: The compressed air system has failed in a vehicle fitted with an air-assisted hydraulic braking system. Can the vehicle still be braked by means of the service brake system?
explanationSource: If the compressed air support is down at your vehicle with pressure air-assisted hydraulic braking system, you can achieve only a slight braking action despite large foot force even when the vehicle is unladen.
answerASource: Even pressing your foot down hard will produce only little braking effect, also if the vehicle is unloaded
answerBSource: The entire service brake system becomes inoperative
answerCSource: Yes, as the vacuum pump of the diesel engine replaces air assistance
questionTextTarget: Hava destekli hidrolik fren sistemli araçta basınçlı hava sistemi arızalandı. Araç servis freniyle hâlâ frenlenebilir mi?
explanationTarget: Araç boş olsa bile pedala çok sert bassanız da fren etkisi sadece zayıf olur. Tüm servis freni tamamen devre dışı kalmaz, dizel motorun vakum pompası hava desteğinin yerini almaz.
answerATarget: Ayağınızla sert bassanız bile araç boş olsa da sadece zayıf fren etkisi oluşur
answerBTarget: Tüm servis freni sistemi çalışmaz hale gelir
answerCTarget: Evet, dizel motorun vakum pompası hava desteğinin yerini alır

questionTextSource: While driving a motor vehicle with air brake system, the line to a wheel brake cylinder at the front axle breaks. How can you notice this damage?
explanationSource: you can notice the damage to the lower braking effect. During braking, the double pressure gauge of front brake circuit or on the warning device. can you tell when you brake while driving the damage. All three answers are correct.
answerASource: You cannot notice this damage when driving without braking
answerBSource: When braking, by the warning device or the double pressure gauge of the front brake circuit
answerCSource: By the reduced braking action
questionTextTarget: Havalı fren sistemli araçta sürüş sırasında ön akstaki bir tekerlek fren silindirine giden hat kopuyor. Bu hasarı nasıl fark edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Fren yapmadan sürüş sırasında fark edilmeyebilir. Frenleme sırasında ön fren devresinin uyarı cihazı veya çift basınç göstergesi ve azalan fren etkisiyle fark edilebilir.
answerATarget: Fren yapmadan sürüş sırasında bu hasarı fark edemezsiniz
answerBTarget: Frenleme sırasında ön fren devresinin uyarı tertibatı veya çift basınç göstergesiyle

questionTextSource: While driving a motor vehicle with air brake system, a line on the reservoir of the front axle brake circuit breaks. How can you notice this damage?
explanationSource: you can see the damage to the lower braking effect and the double pressure gauge of the brake circuit of the front axle or the warning device. The low braking effect is not right.

answerBSource: By the reduced braking action
answerCSource: The spring-loaded brake is activated
questionTextTarget: Havalı fren sistemli araçta sürüş sırasında ön aks fren devresinin rezerv tankındaki bir hat kopuyor. Bu hasarı nasıl fark edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Ön aks fren devresinin çift basınç göstergesi veya uyarı tertibatıyla ve azalan fren etkisiyle fark edebilirsiniz. Yay kurmalı fren otomatik devreye girmez.

questionTextSource: What could be the effect of a strongly leaking air bellows have on road worthiness?
explanationSource: A heavily leaky air spring bellows can affect the braking efficiency due to wrong control pressure of the ALB (automatic load-dependent brake force control). Your vehicle is to incline on one side. Please fix it immediately.
answerASource: The vehicle tilts to one side
answerBSource: The brake action is impaired by a incorrect control pressure of the automatic load-dependent braking force regulator (ALB)
answerCSource: The brake line of the front brake circuit loses airpressure
questionTextTarget: Hava süspansiyon körüğünde ciddi kaçak yol güvenliğini nasıl etkileyebilir?
explanationTarget: Araç bir tarafa yatabilir ve otomatik yüke bağlı fren kuvveti regülatörünün (ALB) yanlış kumanda basıncı nedeniyle fren etkisi bozulabilir.
answerBTarget: Otomatik yüke bağlı fren kuvveti regülatörünün (ALB) yanlış kontrol basıncı nedeniyle fren etkisi bozulur
answerCTarget: Ön fren devresinin fren hattı hava kaybeder

questionTextSource: When several spring leaves of a spring assembly snap, what are the effects on roadworthiness?
explanationSource: All three are correct. The directional stability of the vehicle is compromised at break of the spring leaves. The vehicle breaks out during braking and the adjustment of the ALB (automatic load-dependent braking force control) is distorted.
answerASource: Directional stability of the vehicle is impaired
answerBSource: The vehicle pulls when braking
answerCSource: The automatic load-dependent braking force regulator (ALB) is set incorrectly
questionTextTarget: Bir yaprak yay paketindeki birkaç yaprak kırılırsa yol güvenliği nasıl etkilenir?
explanationTarget: Aracın yön dengesi bozulabilir ve frenleme sırasında araç çekebilir. ALB ayarı da etkilenebilir.
answerCTarget: Otomatik yüke bağlı fren kuvveti regülatörü (ALB) yanlış ayarlanır

questionTextSource: The brake line to a wheel brake cylinder of your motor vehicle is leaking heavily. How can you detect this issue?
explanationSource: If your brake line is leaking at a wheel brake cylinder, you can tell both by the noise of escaping compressed air and by the pressure warning indicator. Low braking efficiency while driving is also a clear indication and should be repaired.
answerASource: From the noise generated by the escaping compressed air
answerBSource: From the pressure warning indicator
answerCSource: From the reduced braking action experienced while driving
questionTextTarget: Motorlu aracınızın tekerlek fren silindirine giden fren hattı ciddi şekilde kaçırıyor. Bu sorunu nasıl fark edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Kaçan basınçlı havanın sesiyle, basınç uyarı göstergesiyle ve sürüş sırasında azalan fren etkisiyle fark edilebilir.
