questionTextSource: What effect can damage to important axle suspension components have on road safety?
explanationSource: If there is damage to essential components of the axle suspension, this can affect the driving behaviour, further damage can occur if it is not repaired immediately. The tyres may be washed out.
answerASource: The handling can be negatively effected
answerBSource: The vehicle may sustain additional damage
answerCSource: The tyres can experience spotty wear
questionTextTarget: Aks süspansiyonunun önemli parçalarındaki hasar yol güvenliğini nasıl etkileyebilir?
explanationTarget: Sürüş davranışı olumsuz etkilenebilir, araçta ek hasarlar oluşabilir ve lastiklerde düzensiz aşınma meydana gelebilir.

questionTextSource: What could be the possible cause of low air compressor output?
explanationSource: One of the reasons for the air compressor's delivery rate being too low can be contamination of the intake air filter and another a defective air compressor.
answerASource: Excessive dirt in the intake air filter
answerBSource: Defective air compressor
answerCSource: Water in the reservoir tanks
questionTextTarget: Hava kompresörünün düşük performansının olası nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Emiş hava filtresinin aşırı kirlenmesi veya kompresörün arızalı olması düşük performansa neden olabilir. Rezerv tanklarındaki su bu cevaba göre sebep değildir.
answerATarget: Emiş hava filtresinin aşırı kirli olması

questionTextSource: What should you do if the engine temperature warning light illuminates while you are driving?
explanationSource: Check the operating instructions for what to do now.
answerASource: You should stop at a suitable place as soon as possible, and follow the guidelines of the manufacturer
answerBSource: Continue driving slowly at a higher engine speed to improve cooling
answerCSource: Continue driving in low gear to the next scheduled break of journey
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında motor sıcaklığı uyarı lambası yanarsa ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: En kısa sürede uygun bir yerde durmalı ve üretici talimatlarına uymalısınız. Yüksek devirle yavaş sürmeye devam etmek doğru değildir.

answerCTarget: Bir sonraki planlı molaya kadar düşük viteste devam ederim

questionTextSource: In a two-line braking system, what is the effect of a rupture in the emergency line to the trailer?
explanationSource: The trailer brake valve of a two-line braking system includes the trailer air supply to the interrupted supply line at a fraction (pressure drop), and initiates a braking of the trailer. It does not trigger automatic braking when towing.

answerBSource: - seals off the trailer air supply from the broken emergency line
answerCSource: - activates automatic braking of the truck
questionTextTarget: İki hatlı fren sisteminde römorka giden besleme hattı koparsa ne olur?

answerBTarget: - kopan besleme hattından römork hava beslemesini kapatır

questionTextSource: How can you tell whether the trailer brake valve is working (air tank filled) after the parking brake has been released?
explanationSource: Whether the trailer brake valve is working, you can tell by (red coupling head) go when disconnecting the supply line, the pistons of the brake cylinders of the trailer into the braking position and supply and brake lines coupled, the pistons of the brake cylinders go of the trailer, operating the brake pedal into the brake position ,
answerASource: When the emergency line (red hose coupler) is disconnected, the brake cylinder pistons of the trailer go into braking position
answerBSource: When the emergency and service lines are coupled up, the brake cylinder pistons of the trailer go into braking position when the brake pedal is depressed
answerCSource: When the service line (yellow hose coupler) is disconnected, the brake cylinder pistons of the trailer go into braking position without the brake pedal being depressed
questionTextTarget: Park freni bırakıldıktan sonra römork fren valfinin çalıştığını nasıl anlarsınız (hava tankı dolu)?
explanationTarget: Kırmızı besleme hattı ayrıldığında römorkun fren silindir pistonları frenleme konumuna geçmelidir. Sarı servis hattı ayrıldığında kendiliğinden frenleme bu test değildir.
answerATarget: Besleme hattı (kırmızı hortum bağlantısı) ayrıldığında römorkun fren silindir pistonları frenleme konumuna geçer
answerBTarget: Besleme ve servis hatları bağlıyken fren pedalına basıldığında römorkun fren silindir pistonları frenleme konumuna geçer
answerCTarget: Servis hattı (sarı hortum bağlantısı) ayrıldığında fren pedalına basılmadan römorkun fren silindir pistonları frenleme konumuna geçer

questionTextSource: What happens if one of the service brake circuits of a dual-circuit compressed air-braking system leaks when the vehicle is in motion?
explanationSource: If one of the service brake circuits 2 of a two-circuit air brake is leaky, the air pressure supply of the leaky circle has been removed and the braking action can significantly diminish. The four-circuit protection valve secures the intact circuits against the risk of pressure drop below the safety pressure.
answerASource: The air supply will escape from the leaking circuit and the braking action can diminish considerably
answerBSource: The four-way protection valve protects the intact circuits from pressure falling below the safety pressure
answerCSource: The four-way protection valve supplies the leaking circuit with additional air to compensate for the pressure loss
questionTextTarget: Çift devreli basınçlı hava fren sisteminin bir servis freni devresi sürüş sırasında kaçırırsa ne olur?
explanationTarget: Kaçıran devreden hava kaçar ve fren etkisi belirgin şekilde azalabilir. Dört devreli koruma valfi sağlam devreleri güvenlik basıncının altına düşmekten korur.
answerATarget: Hava kaçağı olan devreden hava kaçar ve fren etkisi belirgin şekilde azalabilir
answerBTarget: Dört devreli koruma valfi sağlam devreleri güvenlik basıncının altına düşmekten korur
answerCTarget: Dört devreli koruma valfi basınç kaybını telafi etmek için kaçıran devreye ek hava verir

questionTextSource: The electric connections to your towing vehicle are interrupted. What device on the trailer is therefore rendered inoperable?
explanationSource: When the electronic connections are interrupted, work not yet ABV EBS.
answerASource: The anti-lock braking system (ABS)
answerBSource: The electronic braking system (EBS)
answerCSource: The traction control system (TCS)
questionTextTarget: Çekici aracınızla elektrik bağlantıları kesilmiş. Römorkta hangi donanım bu nedenle çalışmaz?
explanationTarget: Elektrik bağlantısı kesilirse römorkun ABS ve EBS sistemleri çalışmaz. TCS bu cevapta ilgili değildir.

questionTextSource: What device on the trailer will not function if the electrical connection to the towing vehicle is missing or interrupted?
explanationSource: When the electronic connection to the trailer is disconnected, the electronic braking system (EBS) and the lighting are not working. Check the connection before driving.
answerASource: The electronic braking system (EBS)
answerBSource: The lighting system
answerCSource: The traction control system (TCS)
questionTextTarget: Çekici araçla elektrik bağlantısı yoksa veya kesilmişse römorkta hangi donanım çalışmaz?
explanationTarget: Elektronik fren sistemi (EBS) ve aydınlatma sistemi çalışmaz. TCS bu cevapta doğru seçenek değildir.

questionTextSource: Your motorbike is fitted with a chain drive attached to the rear wheel. What should you regularly check the chain for?
explanationSource:
You can check a few things on your chain yourself to minimise wear and extend the service life of your chain.
Check the slack to make sure the chain is neither too loose or too tight and check the chain for elongated or bent links.
You should also check the lubrication of the chain regularly and re-lubricate it if necessary to minimise wear and extend the service life of the chain.
answerASource: The amount of slack
answerBSource: Its lubrication
answerCSource: The level of wear
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizde arka tekerleğe bağlı zincir tahriki var. Zincirde neyi düzenli kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Zincirin boşluğu, yağlanması ve aşınma durumu düzenli kontrol edilmelidir.

questionTextSource: Your motorbike is fitted with a chain drive attached to the rear wheel. What do you have to be aware of when tightening the chain?
explanationSource:
Follow the manufacturer's instructions for all work on your motorbike or have it carried out by specialists. 
When tensioning the chain, make sure that the rear wheel remains correctly aligned. This ensures greater directional stability and avoids unnecessary tyre wear.
The slack of the chain is important and must comply with the manufacturer's specifications.
answerASource: The amount of slack must meet the manufacturer’s specifications
answerBSource: The directional stability of the rear wheel must be secured
answerCSource: The chain must be grease-free during tensioning
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizde arka tekerleğe bağlı zincir tahriki var. Zinciri gererken neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Zincir boşluğu üretici talimatlarına uygun olmalı ve arka tekerleğin yön dengesi sağlanmalıdır. Zincirin germe sırasında yağsız olması gerekmez.
answerATarget: Boşluk miktarı üretici talimatlarına uygun olmalıdır

questionTextSource: Your motorcycle is equipped with a belt drive to the rear wheel. What should you check regularly?
explanationSource:
On a belt-driven motorcycle, the belt must be inspected regularly for damage and you must also check the tension of the belt.
Cracks, frays and damaged teeth can cause serious damage to your motorcycle.
Likewise, too little tension on the belt on your motorcycle can lead to loss of performance and increased material wear.
answerASource: - the tension of the belt
answerBSource: - the belt for damage
answerCSource: - the lubrication of the belt
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizde arka tekerleğe kayış tahriki var. Neyi düzenli kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Kayışın gerginliği ve hasar durumu düzenli kontrol edilmelidir. Kayış yağlanmaz.

questionTextSource: What may be the result of too little coolant in the engine?
explanationSource: Too little coolant can lead to engine damage and should always be checked by you. Another consequence is the engine overheating. Make sure you have enough coolant.
answerASource: - lead to engine damage
answerBSource: - lead to overheating of the engine
answerCSource: - lead to an increase of fuel consumption
questionTextTarget: Motorda soğutma sıvısının çok az olması neye yol açabilir?
explanationTarget: Soğutma sıvısı azsa motor hasarı ve motorun aşırı ısınması oluşabilir. Yakıt tüketimi artışı asıl sonuç değildir.

questionTextSource: You are in a traffic jam, driving at walking speed. When is the least wear exerted on the clutch of your manual transmission vehicle?
explanationSource: Engage the clutch fully to avoid unnecessary wear on the clutch. Choose a gear in which you can coast without using the clutch and accelerator.
answerASource: - drive in a low gear without pressing the clutch if at all possible
answerBSource: - repeatedly start and stop driving
answerCSource: - drive slowly with the clutch slipped
questionTextTarget: Trafik sıkışıklığında yürüme hızında gidiyorsunuz. Manuel şanzımanlı aracınızın debriyajı en az ne zaman aşınır?
explanationTarget: Mümkünse debriyaja basmadan düşük viteste sürmek debriyaj aşınmasını en aza indirir. Sürekli dur-kalk veya yarım debriyaj aşınmayı artırır.
answerATarget: - mümkünse debriyaja basmadan düşük viteste sürmek

questionTextSource: Why is a diesel engine also called an self-ignition engine?
explanationSource: Because diesel engines get along without spark plugs of the work cycle is started by the ignition of the injected fuel in the compressed air.
answerASource: Because the working stroke is started when the injected fuel ignites in contact with the compressed air
answerBSource: Because the working stroke is started by the pressure sensitive fuel
answerCSource: Because the working stroke is started by an ignition spark
questionTextTarget: Dizel motora neden kendiliğinden ateşlemeli motor denir?
explanationTarget: Çalışma zamanı, püskürtülen yakıtın sıkıştırılmış hava ile temas edince kendiliğinden tutuşmasıyla başlar.
answerATarget: Çünkü çalışma zamanı, püskürtülen yakıtın sıkıştırılmış hava ile temas ettiğinde tutuşmasıyla başlar
answerBTarget: Çünkü çalışma zamanı basınca duyarlı yakıtla başlar
answerCTarget: Çünkü çalışma zamanı ateşleme kıvılcımıyla başlar

questionTextSource: What is the function of the camshaft in a diesel engine?
explanationSource: The object of the camshaft in a diesel engine is to control the valves in the engine. Depending on the shape or height of the cams they remain open or close.
answerASource: To control the valves in the engine
answerBSource: To limit the engine speed
answerCSource: To control the engine temperature
questionTextTarget: Dizel motorda eksantrik milinin görevi nedir?
explanationTarget: Eksantrik mili motordaki supapları kumanda eder. Motor devrini veya sıcaklığını kontrol etmez.

questionTextSource: What is the function of a coolant thermostat in an engine's cooling system?
explanationSource: As the name suggests, the coolant thermostat regulates the engine operating temperature. The other two answers are not correct.
answerASource: To regulate the engine's operating temperature
answerBSource: To show the engine's operating temperature
answerCSource: To show coolant level in the radiator
questionTextTarget: Motor soğutma sistemindeki soğutma suyu termostatının görevi nedir?
explanationTarget: Termostat motorun çalışma sıcaklığını düzenler. Sıcaklığı veya soğutma sıvısı seviyesini göstermek için değildir.

questionTextSource: What can cause damage to an engine's cooling system in winter?
explanationSource: By insufficient antifreeze engine damage can occur. Please ensure that this is always filled.
answerASource: Insufficient frost protection
answerBSource: When the coolant is not exchanged at least twice a year
answerCSource: No damage can be caused because closed systems do not need any servicing
questionTextTarget: Kışın motor soğutma sisteminde ne hasara neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yetersiz don koruması soğutma sisteminde hasara neden olabilir. Soğutma sıvısını yılda iki kez değiştirmemek tek başına sebep değildir.

answerCTarget: Kapalı sistemler bakım gerektirmediği için hasar oluşmaz

questionTextSource: Which engine oil covers the largest range of temperatures?
explanationSource: The smaller number (10) (light oil) in SAE 10 W 40 is the lowest temperature range of the oil, and the number beside the W (40) the greater viscosity for high temperatures.
answerASource: SAE 10 W 40
answerBSource: SAE 30
answerCSource: SAE 10 W 30
questionTextTarget: Hangi motor yağı en geniş sıcaklık aralığını kapsar?
explanationTarget: SAE 10W-40, verilen seçenekler içinde en geniş sıcaklık aralığını kapsar.

questionTextSource: Your diesel engine does not start in winter. What can be the reason for this?
explanationSource: If you still summer diesel in the tank, it may be that the engine in the winter does not start because flocculate at low temperatures and cause clogging the fuel filter.
answerASource: There is still some summer diesel fuel in the tank
answerBSource: The spark plugs do not produce ignition sparks
answerCSource: The ignition cables have got wet
questionTextTarget: Dizel motorunuz kışın çalışmıyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Depoda hâlâ yazlık dizel yakıt bulunması kışın çalıştırma sorununa neden olabilir. Dizel motorda buji kıvılcımı veya ateşleme kablosu yoktur.
answerATarget: Depoda hâlâ yazlık dizel yakıt olması

questionTextSource: You are driving your vehicle at walking speed in a traffic jam. In which cases is the wear on the clutch lowest?
explanationSource: If you drive possible without the use of the clutch when driving in a low gear, the wear in a traffic jam, where you drive at a walking pace, the lowest.
answerASource: Driving in a low gear if possible without using the clutch
answerBSource: Constant starting and stopping
answerCSource: Driving slowly with a slipping clutch
questionTextTarget: Trafik sıkışıklığında yürüme hızında gidiyorsunuz. Debriyaj aşınması hangi durumda en azdır?
explanationTarget: Mümkünse debriyaj kullanmadan düşük viteste sürmek debriyaj aşınmasını azaltır. Sürekli dur-kalk ve yarım debriyaj aşınmayı artırır.

questionTextSource: What is the function of a differential lock?
explanationSource: The differential lock distributes the drive torque evenly to the driving time, thereby preventing the compensation of the speed differences between the outer- and inner cam wheel. It improves traction considerably during slow off-road travel and slippery road surfaces.
answerASource: - improves the traction during slow off-road driving and on slippery road surfaces
answerBSource: - distributes the drive torque evenly across the drive wheels
answerCSource: - improves handling during cornering
questionTextTarget: Diferansiyel kilidinin görevi nedir?
explanationTarget: Diferansiyel kilidi, yavaş arazi sürüşünde ve kaygan zeminlerde çekişi artırır ve tahrik torkunu tahrik tekerleklerine eşit dağıtır. Viraj davranışını iyileştirmez.
answerATarget: - yavaş arazi sürüşünde ve kaygan yollarda çekişi artırır
answerBTarget: - tahrik torkunu tahrik tekerleklerine eşit dağıtır

questionTextSource: When it is helpful to activate the differential lock?
explanationSource: The differential lock you should go straight on slippery roads during slow and if you're stuck up and rotate individual drive wheels. This should be helpful.
answerASource: - have become bogged down and individual drive wheels are spinning
answerBSource: - am slowly driving straight ahead on slippery road surfaces
answerCSource: - am manoeuvring on dry road surfaces
questionTextTarget: Diferansiyel kilidini ne zaman etkinleştirmek faydalıdır?
explanationTarget: Araç saplandıysa ve tek tek tahrik tekerlekleri patinaj yapıyorsa veya kaygan zeminde yavaş düz gidiyorsanız faydalıdır. Kuru zeminde manevra yaparken kullanılmaz.
answerATarget: - araç saplandıysa ve bazı tahrik tekerlekleri patinaj yapıyorsa

questionTextSource: When can I activate the differential lock so that this does not possibly damage the motor vehicle?
explanationSource: If your car is and you drive at a walking pace, you should have no damaging effect expected.
answerASource: - is stationary
answerBSource: - is driving at walking speed
answerCSource: - is understeering while taking a bend
questionTextTarget: Diferansiyel kilidini araca zarar vermemek için ne zaman etkinleştirebilirim?
explanationTarget: Diferansiyel kilidi araç duruyorken veya yürüme hızında düz giderken etkinleştirilebilir. Virajda önden kayarken etkinleştirilmez.

questionTextSource: What increases clutch wear in motor vehicles with a manual gearbox?
explanationSource: In the case of a manual gearbox, the clutch wear increases in motor vehicles that start in a high gear (e.g. 2nd gear) and maneuvering with increased engine speed.
answerASource: Starting in high gear
answerBSource: Manoeuvring at high engine speed
answerCSource: Starting in low gear
questionTextTarget: Manuel şanzımanlı motorlu araçlarda debriyaj aşınmasını ne artırır?
explanationTarget: Yüksek viteste kalkış yapmak ve yüksek motor devriyle manevra yapmak debriyaj aşınmasını artırır. Düşük viteste kalkış doğru olandır.

questionTextSource: How can you preserve the clutch components of motor vehicles with a manual gearbox?
explanationSource: In order to protect the clutch components in motor vehicles with manual transmissions, put the vehicle in neutral while waiting, take your foot off the clutch pedal and maneuver at a low engine speed.
answerASource: While waiting to move, I select the neutral gear and remove my foot from the clutch pedal
answerBSource: I manoeuvre using a low engine speed
answerCSource: I select a high gear when starting
questionTextTarget: Manuel şanzımanlı araçlarda debriyaj parçalarını nasıl koruyabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Beklerken boşa alıp ayağınızı debriyaj pedalından çekmek ve düşük motor devriyle manevra yapmak debriyajı korur. Yüksek viteste kalkış debriyajı yorar.
answerATarget: Hareket etmek için beklerken boşa alır ve ayağımı debriyaj pedalından çekerim

questionTextSource: What is the function of a differential lock (mechanically locked differential transmission)?
explanationSource: The differential lock improves traction when driving slowly off-road and on slippery roads because the drive torque is evenly distributed to the drive wheels.
answerASource: - improves traction for low-speed off-road driving and on slippery road surfaces
answerBSource: - evenly distributes the torque to the driving wheels
answerCSource: - improves handling during cornering
questionTextTarget: Diferansiyel kilidinin (mekanik kilitli diferansiyel) görevi nedir?
explanationTarget: Diferansiyel kilidi, yavaş arazi sürüşünde ve kaygan zeminlerde çekişi artırır ve tahrik torkunu tahrik tekerleklerine eşit dağıtır. Viraj davranışını iyileştirmez.
answerATarget: - yavaş arazi sürüşünde ve kaygan yollarda çekişi artırır

questionTextSource: What should I ensure when refilling with engine oil?
explanationSource: Engine oil may only be used according to the specifications of the manufacturer. You are only allowed to refill the right oil. Make sure that you do not exceed the maximum permissible fill level, otherwise damage to the motor may occur. Never fill engine oil while the engine is running.
answerASource: That I use engine oil that meets the vehicle manufacturer's specifications
answerBSource: That I do not exceed the maximum fill level
answerCSource: That I refill the engine oil while the engine is running
questionTextTarget: Motor yağı eklerken neye dikkat etmeliyim?
explanationTarget: Araç üreticisinin şartlarını karşılayan motor yağı kullanmalı ve azami dolum seviyesini aşmamalısınız. Motor çalışırken yağ eklenmez.
answerATarget: Araç üreticisinin şartlarını karşılayan motor yağı kullanmak

questionTextSource: What is the function of engine oil in a combustion engine?
explanationSource: Engine oil has different effects on an internal combustion engine. It is used for wear protection, cooling and cleaning. Make sure the engine oil level is sufficient.
answerASource: - wear protection
answerBSource: - cooling
answerCSource: - cleaning
questionTextTarget: İçten yanmalı motorda motor yağının görevi nedir?
explanationTarget: Motor yağı aşınmaya karşı korur, soğutmaya katkı sağlar ve temizleme görevi görür.

questionTextSource: How can you check the engine oil level?
explanationSource: There is a sight glass where you can read the oil level. Otherwise, you can read it via an oil dipstick.
answerASource: - sight-glass
answerBSource: - oil dipstick
answerCSource: - instant fuel consumption display
questionTextTarget: Motor yağı seviyesini nasıl kontrol edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Motor yağı seviyesi gözetleme camı veya yağ çubuğu ile kontrol edilebilir. Anlık yakıt tüketim göstergesiyle kontrol edilmez.

questionTextSource: How can you check the engine oil level?
explanationSource: Depending on the vehicle, the engine oil level can be checked in different ways. Modern vehicles can display the oil level in the infotainment system.
answerASource: - driver information system
answerBSource: - oil dipstick
answerCSource: - instant fuel consumption display
questionTextTarget: Motor yağı seviyesini nasıl kontrol edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Motor yağı seviyesi sürücü bilgi sistemi veya yağ çubuğu ile kontrol edilebilir. Anlık yakıt tüketim göstergesiyle kontrol edilmez.

questionTextSource: Why does the coolant have to be checked for sufficient frost protection before winter begins?
explanationSource: A freezing of the coolant (extends) to avoid you should adequately check the antifreeze. So you avoid even damage to the cooling system in case of frost. The operating license of the vehicle does not go out by it.
answerASource: So the coolant does not freeze
answerBSource: So the cooling system is not damaged by frost
answerCSource: So the vehicle's operating permit does not lapse
questionTextTarget: Kış başlamadan önce soğutma sıvısının yeterli don koruması neden kontrol edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Soğutma sıvısının donmaması ve soğutma sisteminin dondan zarar görmemesi için kontrol edilmelidir. İşletme izniyle ilgisi yoktur.
answerBTarget: Soğutma sistemi dondan zarar görmesin diye
answerCTarget: Aracın işletme izni sona ermesin diye

questionTextSource: What are the functions of anti-freeze in the coolant system?
explanationSource: Antifreeze protect against corrosion (rust) and protect the cooling system from freezing. In the summer months, this is not the case.
answerASource: Anti-freeze protects against corrosion
answerBSource: Anti-freeze protects the cooling system against freezing
answerCSource: Anti-freeze causes corrosion in the summer months
questionTextTarget: Soğutma sistemindeki antifrizin görevleri nelerdir?
explanationTarget: Antifriz korozyona karşı korur ve soğutma sistemini donmaya karşı korur. Yaz aylarında korozyona neden olmaz.
answerBTarget: Antifriz soğutma sistemini donmaya karşı korur
answerCTarget: Antifriz yaz aylarında korozyona neden olur

questionTextSource: Why do diesel and petrol engines need engine oil?
explanationSource: Motor oil is needed in diesel and gasoline engines because it serves to reduce the internal friction and thus the piston and the bearing is not fixed run. The lubricating water pump is irrelevant.
answerASource: So pistons and bearings do not seize up
answerBSource: To reduce internal friction
answerCSource: To lubricate the water pump
questionTextTarget: Dizel ve benzinli motorlar neden motor yağına ihtiyaç duyar?
explanationTarget: Motor yağı pistonların ve yatakların sıkışmasını önler ve iç sürtünmeyi azaltır. Su pompasını yağlamak için değildir.

questionTextSource: What are the requirements of lubricating oils for diesel engines?
explanationSource: Lubricating oils of diesel engines are used for heat resistance, fluidity in cold weather and wear reduction.
answerASource: They have to reduce wear
answerBSource: They have to be heat resistant
answerCSource: They have to be fluid during cold periods
questionTextTarget: Dizel motor yağlarından hangi özellikler beklenir?
explanationTarget: Aşınmayı azaltmalı, ısıya dayanıklı olmalı ve soğukta akışkan kalmalıdır.

questionTextSource: What is the meaning of the date of manufacture "1217" specified on the tyre?
explanationSource: The date of manufacture indicated on the tire is made up of the manufacturing week and the year of manufacture. So "1217" means: 12th week in the year 2017.
answerASource: - manufactured in 12th calendar week of the year 2017
answerBSource: - manufactured in the 12th month (December) of the year 2017
answerCSource: - manufactured on the 1/2/2017
questionTextTarget: Lastikte belirtilen üretim tarihi “1217” ne anlama gelir?
explanationTarget: 1217 kodu, lastiğin 2017 yılının 12. takvim haftasında üretildiğini gösterir.

questionTextSource: When should you check the tyre pressure?
explanationSource: You should check the tyre pressure regularly when the tyres are cold and immediately after each tyre change. It is not necessary to check after every journey.
answerASource: Regularly when the tyres are cool
answerBSource: Directly after a tyre change
answerCSource: Directly after every journey
questionTextTarget: Lastik basıncını ne zaman kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Lastik basıncı düzenli olarak ve lastikler soğukken kontrol edilmelidir. Her yolculuktan hemen sonra sıcak lastikte ölçüm doğru sonuç vermeyebilir.

questionTextSource: What can be the consequences of having too much or too little air pressure in the tyres of the motorcycle?
explanationSource: The tyre closure increases due to greater friction. The tyre deforms and thus worsens the driving behaviour.
answerASource: The motorcycle’s handling will be poorer
answerBSource: Tyre wear is increased
answerCSource: The reaction distance is lengthened
questionTextTarget: Motosiklet lastiklerinde hava basıncının çok fazla veya çok az olmasının sonuçları ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yanlış lastik basıncı motosikletin sürüş davranışını kötüleştirir ve lastik aşınmasını artırır. Tepki mesafesini doğrudan uzatmaz.

questionTextSource: Your tyre inflation pressure is clearly too low while you driving on public roads. What is the consequence of this?
explanationSource: A low tyre pressure results that a larger area of the tyre lies on the asphalt while driving. In addition, the tyre no longer has a round shape and can no longer roll cleanly. If the tyre pressure is significantly too low, the driving stability in curves decreases dangerously and the steering behaviour deteriorates.
answerASource: There will be a considerable deterioration in the vehicle’s manoeuvrability
answerBSource: The vehicle’s stability will be dangerously reduced when cornering
answerCSource: The level of tyre wear will decrease greatly
questionTextTarget: Kamu yollarında giderken lastik basıncınız açıkça çok düşük. Bunun sonucu nedir?
explanationTarget: Çok düşük lastik basıncı aracın manevra kabiliyetini belirgin şekilde kötüleştirir ve virajlarda stabiliteyi tehlikeli biçimde azaltır. Lastik aşınması azalmaz.
answerATarget: Aracın manevra kabiliyeti belirgin şekilde kötüleşir
answerBTarget: Virajlarda aracın stabilitesi tehlikeli şekilde azalır

questionTextSource: What must you check when regularly inspecting your vehicle’s tyres?
explanationSource:
You should check your tires at regular intervals. It is important that you control the external state of the tires, make sure that the tires have no external damage and that the legally required minimum profile depth of 1.6 mm is not undercut.
Especially in front of longer journeys or with a higher load, you should make sure to check the tire pressure beforehand.
answerASource: The air pressure

questionTextSource: A tyre’s adhesion to the road surface depends on what?
explanationSource: The liability of a tire on the road is heavily dependent on the road conditions and the weather conditions. It is best to liability a tire on a dry road. However, wetness, snow, ice, bumps or dirt can severely affect tire liability. The tire temperature also plays an important role in liability because it influences the properties of the rubber compound. Summer tires could become harder at low temperatures and reduce their liability, while winter tires could wear out faster at high temperatures.

questionTextSource: What should you check regularly if your car has a spare wheel carried outside the body of the car?
explanationSource: If you carry a spare wheel outside the body, it is important to regularly check the double lock and the tire pressure. The double lock ensures that the spare wheel is securely attached while driving and does not come loose, which could lead to dangerous situations on the road. The tire pressure should be checked, as a spare wheel with insufficient air pressure is not ready for use in the event of a breakdown and therefore cannot fulfill its function as a reserve. Because the spare tire often remains unused, it can lose air pressure over time; Regular checks ensure that it can be used immediately if necessary.
answerASource: The double safeguard
answerBSource: The tyre pressure
answerCSource: The rolling resistance

questionTextSource: Your motorbike is equipped with a cornering optimised anti-lock braking system (ABS). What is the purpose of this assist system?
explanationSource: The automatic anti-lock brake prevents the wheels from locking when braking. This allows you to brake and steer at the same time when cornering. In contrast to the standard anti-lock brake, the lean angle-optimised anti-lock brake increases the steering ability by reducing the set-up torque, especially during critical braking manoeuvres in bends.
answerASource: - enhances manoeuvrability during critical braking manoeuvres while cornering
answerBSource: - reduces the righting moment of the motorbike when braking while cornering
answerCSource: - increases the righting moment of the motorbike when braking while cornering
questionTextTarget: Motosikletiniz viraj optimizasyonlu ABS ile donatılmış. Bu destek sisteminin amacı nedir?
explanationTarget: Virajda kritik frenlemede manevra kabiliyetini artırır ve frenleme sırasında motosikletin doğrulma momentini azaltır. Doğrulma momentini artırmak amaç değildir.
answerATarget: - virajda kritik frenleme manevralarında manevra kabiliyetini artırır
answerBTarget: - virajda frenlerken motosikletin doğrulma momentini azaltır
answerCTarget: - virajda frenlerken motosikletin doğrulma momentini artırır

questionTextSource: What is the effect of an automatic anti-locking device (ABS)?
explanationSource: An antilocking system ensures that the wheels of a vehicle do not block even when the car driver performs an emergency stop. The car remains at least limitedly steerable and the braking distance does not change even on slippery roads. In aquaplaning, a water gore between the road surface and the tires is created mainly by high speeds. Floating of the vehicle is not prevented by the antilocking system.
answerASource: The vehicle is braked in the best possible way also on wet roadways
answerBSource: Steering control is largely retained when braking
answerCSource: Aquaplaning is prevented
questionTextTarget: Otomatik kilitlenme önleyici sistemin (ABS) etkisi nedir?
explanationTarget: ABS ıslak yolda da mümkün olan en iyi frenlemeyi destekler ve frenleme sırasında direksiyon kontrolünün büyük ölçüde korunmasını sağlar. Aquaplaning’i önlemez.
answerATarget: Araç ıslak yolda da mümkün olan en iyi şekilde frenlenir
answerBTarget: Frenleme sırasında direksiyon kontrolü büyük ölçüde korunur

questionTextSource: What are the advantages of an automatic anti-locking device (ABS)?
explanationSource: The antilocking system has the advantage that it prevents locking of the wheels when braking on wet or dirty tracks. For this purpose, the brake pressure is regulated at short intervals. Normal driving characteristics are not affected by the ABS.
answerASource: The wheels do not lock when braking
answerBSource: Steering control is retained even when braking heavily
answerCSource: Bends can be taken considerably faster
questionTextTarget: Otomatik kilitlenme önleyici sistemin (ABS) avantajları nelerdir?
explanationTarget: ABS frenleme sırasında tekerleklerin kilitlenmesini önler ve sert frenlemede bile direksiyon kontrolünü korumaya yardımcı olur. Virajlar çok daha hızlı alınamaz.
answerBTarget: Sert frenlemede bile direksiyon kontrolü korunur
answerCTarget: Virajlar belirgin şekilde daha hızlı alınabilir

questionTextSource: What are the advantages of an automatic anti-locking device (ABS)?
explanationSource: An anti-lock braking system is particularly useful for heavy braking on wet or dirty roads. It counteracts possible locking of the wheels by controlling the brake pressure at short intervals. This prevents the vehicle from breaking out of the lane. The antilocking system has no effect on driving in curves. Spinning of the wheels when starting can prevent the traction control system (TCS), not the antilocking system.
answerASource: It is possible to brake heavily and avoid an obstacle at the same time
answerBSource: On setting off, wheelspin is prevented
answerCSource: The danger of tipping over is reduced when braking on bends
questionTextTarget: Otomatik kilitlenme önleyici sistemin (ABS) avantajları nelerdir?
explanationTarget: ABS ile güçlü fren yaparken aynı anda engelden kaçmak daha mümkündür. Kalkışta patinajı önlemek ASR’nin görevidir; virajda devrilme tehlikesini azaltmak temel işlev değildir.
answerATarget: Güçlü fren yapıp aynı anda engelden kaçmak mümkündür
answerCTarget: Virajlarda fren yaparken devrilme tehlikesi azalır

questionTextSource: When does the braking action of a trailer with overrun brakes start?
explanationSource: When the trailer hangs on the towing vehicle, the braking effect occurs in a trailer with overrun brake. As the name implies, the trailer brake will not be released until the trailer reaches the towing vehicle.
answerASource: When the trailer runs up to the truck
answerBSource: When the brake pedal in the truck is activated
answerCSource: Before the braking action of the truck starts, so that the truck and trailer remain extended

explanationTarget: Römork çekici araca doğru bastırdığında atalet freni devreye girer. Çekici aracın fren pedalına basılması dolaylı olarak bunu başlatır.
answerCTarget: Çekici aracın fren etkisi başlamadan önce, çekici ve römork gergin kalsın diye

questionTextSource: When is there a particularly high risk of a combination vehicle jack-knifing or skidding on a slippery road?
explanationSource: In a vehicle combination, the danger is particularly great when steering is jerky and when braking when cornering with the service brake with maximum delay.

answerBSource: By applying maximum pressure on the service brake when driving around a bend
answerCSource: By accelerating gradually
questionTextTarget: Kaygan yolda araç kombinasyonunun katlanma veya kayma riski ne zaman özellikle yüksektir?
explanationTarget: Sürücü ani direksiyon hareketi yaparsa veya virajda servis frenine azami basınç uygulanırsa risk özellikle yüksektir. Kademeli hızlanma doğru seçenek değildir.
answerBTarget: Virajda servis frenine azami basınç uygulanırsa

questionTextSource: When is there a particularly high risk of a semi-trailer truck with compressed-air brakes jack-knifing or skidding on a slippery road?
explanationSource: If the truck when cornering brake more than the trailer, the risk on a slippery surface is particularly large buckle or hurling. When the retarder (retarder) is fully actuated when cornering, it may / come to different braking forces effects.

answerBSource: If the truck is braked harder than the trailer when driving around a bend
answerCSource: If the load largely impinges on the drive shaft
questionTextTarget: Basınçlı hava frenli yarı römorklu kamyonda kaygan yolda katlanma veya kayma riski ne zaman özellikle yüksektir?
explanationTarget: Virajda retarder tam devredeyse veya çekici römorktan daha güçlü frenlenirse risk artar. Yükün büyük ölçüde tahrik aksına binmesi bu riski artırmaz.
answerBTarget: Virajda çekici römorktan daha güçlü frenlenirse
answerCTarget: Yük büyük ölçüde tahrik aksına biniyorsa

questionTextSource: You are pulling a trailer with overrun brakes. What must you be aware of?
explanationSource: Coming soon...

explanationTarget: Atalet frenli römorkta geri sürüş, ileri sürüş ve römorku bağlama sırasında üretici talimatlarına dikkat edilmelidir.

questionTextSource: What could happen if the cruise control system (speed limiter) is switched off too late?
explanationSource: The speed controller constantly keeps a set speed. So, when driving into road sections with speed limits, you may exceed the maximum speed. You can drive in corners at too fast a speed. The controller cannot correct the distance. If you turn off the device too late, you might get too close.

answerBSource: Excessively high cornering speed
answerCSource: Exceeding the permissible maximum speed

explanationTarget: Öndeki araca fazla yaklaşma, viraja aşırı hızla girme veya izin verilen azami hızı aşma riski oluşabilir.

questionTextSource: With what can a cruise control system (speed limiter) assist you?
explanationSource: Cruise control keeps your car at a constant speed, but does not control the distance to the vehicle in front of you. While you take your foot off the gas pedal and focus solely on the road, you save fuel at the same time.

answerBSource: With maintaining an energy-saving driving style
answerCSource: With maintaining the minimum distance to the vehicle ahead

explanationTarget: Sistem sabit hızı ve enerji tasarruflu sürüş tarzını korumaya yardımcı olabilir. Öndeki araçla asgari mesafeyi korumak adaptif sistemin görevidir.

questionTextSource: What should I be aware of when using an adaptive cruise control system?
explanationSource: An adaptive speed control system evaluates the position and the speed of the vehicle in front of you. By doing so, it aligns the speed and distance of your vehicle, including appropriate adaptive engine control and brake interventions (in-phase control). Nevertheless, you as a car driver, should not be distracted. You can influence the system at any time. Because the system function can be affected by weather conditions.
answerASource: I must remain constantly attentive even when using the system for a longer period
answerBSource: The system can be affected by heavy rain or snow fall
answerCSource: Activating the accelerator or brake pedal can always override the system
questionTextTarget: Adaptif hız sabitleyici sistemi kullanırken neye dikkat etmeliyim?
explanationTarget: Sistemi uzun süre kullansanız bile sürekli dikkatli kalmalısınız. Sistem yoğun yağmur veya kardan etkilenebilir; gaz veya fren pedalına basarak geçersiz kılınabilir.
answerATarget: Sistemi uzun süre kullansam bile sürekli dikkatli kalmalıyım
answerBTarget: Sistem yoğun yağmur veya kar yağışından etkilenebilir
answerCTarget: Gaz veya fren pedalına basmak sistemi her zaman geçersiz kılabilir

questionTextSource: What function is performed by an adaptive cruise control system on a motor vehicle?
explanationSource: An adaptive cruise control system, also known as adaptive cruise control, determines the position and the speed of the vehicle in front of you with a sensor and adjusts the speed and the distance of the subsequent vehicle. This is adaptively regulated with engine control and brake intervention (in-phase control). The system cannot recognize and set the prescribed safety distance.
answerASource: - independently accelerates the vehicle to a previously configured speed
answerBSource: - brakes independently, when the vehicle ahead is moving slower
answerCSource: - automatically maintains the prescribed safety distance
questionTextTarget: Motorlu araçtaki adaptif hız sabitleyici sistem hangi işlevi görür?
explanationTarget: ACC aracı önceden ayarlanan hıza kadar hızlandırabilir ve öndeki araç daha yavaş gidiyorsa bağımsız frenleyebilir. Öngörülen güvenlik mesafesini her zaman garanti etmez.

answerBTarget: - öndeki araç daha yavaş gidiyorsa bağımsız frenler
answerCTarget: - öngörülen güvenlik mesafesini otomatik olarak korur

questionTextSource: What benefits does the driver of a motor vehicle have by using a cruise control system?
explanationSource: The cruise control maintains a steady vehicle speed on a level road and relieves you in operating the vehicle. The traffic density cannot be adjusted to the speed.

answerBSource: - makes it easier for the driver to operate the vehicle

questionTextSource: In which situation is it helpful to use an adaptive cruise control system (ACC)?
explanationSource: Adaptive Cruise Control monitors the distance to the vehicle in front and adjusts your speed accordingly. When driving on motorways and highways, the use of an adaptive cruise control system is recommended.
answerASource: - motorways
answerBSource: - expressways
answerCSource: - winding roads
questionTextTarget: Adaptif hız sabitleyici sistemi (ACC) hangi durumda kullanmak faydalıdır?
explanationTarget: ACC otoyollarda ve hızlı yollarda faydalı olabilir. Virajlı yollarda kullanımı uygun değildir.

questionTextSource: How can you manually override an activated cruise control system?

answerASource: By braking

questionTextSource: What is the purpose of an adaptive cruise control system (ACC) in motor vehicles?
explanationSource:
The active cruise control system adjusts the vehicle to the speed you set, just like ordinary cruise control.
It also brakes when it detects vehicles ahead. It does not slow down if it cannot detect them, e.g. at night, in heavy rain, fog, etc.
answerASource: - independently accelerates the vehicle until it reaches a previously set speed
answerBSource: - independently slows the vehicle if it identifies a vehicle ahead travelling at a lower speed
answerCSource: - always maintains the prescribed safety distance to the vehicle ahead
questionTextTarget: Motorlu araçlarda adaptif hız sabitleyici sistemin (ACC) amacı nedir?
explanationTarget: ACC önceden ayarlanmış hıza kadar hızlandırabilir ve öndeki yavaş aracı algılarsa yavaşlatabilir. Güvenlik mesafesini her zaman otomatik garanti etmez.
answerATarget: - önceden ayarlanmış hıza ulaşana kadar aracı bağımsız hızlandırır
answerBTarget: - öndeki aracın daha yavaş gittiğini algılarsa aracı bağımsız yavaşlatır
answerCTarget: - öndeki araca öngörülen güvenlik mesafesini her zaman korur

questionTextSource: While driving, you use the adaptive cruise control (ACC). The speed is set to 100 km/h. What must you be prepared for before entering a bend in the road?
explanationSource:
The adaptive cruise control system automatically maintains the speed you have set while keeping the correct distance from vehicles in front. 
You have set the speed of the AGR to 100 km/h. Because the vehicle in front is now out of sight, the AGR will accelerate. Set a lower speed to safely negotiate the bend.
answerASource: The ACC may cause my vehicle to accelerate
answerBSource: I have to adjust my speed to the situation
answerCSource: The ACC will prompt me to reduce my speed

questionTextSource: What is the function of your vehicle’s emergency brake assist?
explanationSource: An emergency brake assist is a safety system for motor vehicles that warns you of a collision in critical situations. It also supports emergency braking if a collision is detected by increasing the brake pressure and thus reducing the collision speed.
answerASource: - issues warnings about the immediate risk of a rear-end collision
answerBSource: - can reduce the risk of injury in the event of an unavoidable collision
answerCSource: - brakes the speed of my vehicle if the event I accidentally overrun the traffic lane boundary

answerBTarget: - kaçınılmaz bir çarpışmada yaralanma riskini azaltabilir

explanationSource: When the service brake is applied with switched permanent brake, the following happens: The wheels of the driving axle (s) can be braked more sharply.

questionTextTarget: Motorlu araç kullanırken hız kontrol sisteminin (cruise control) avantajları nelerdir?

answerCSource: Only at high speeds

explanationSource: Among ALB (automatically loads dependent braking force control), it is understood that the braking force is controlled automatically according to the load on the axles. This is very useful at different loads.

questionTextSource: The rear wheels of an unloaded vehicle equipped with an automatic load-dependent braking force regulator (ALB) lock each time the brakes are strongly applied. What can be the cause?
explanationSource: The causes can defective or incorrectly set ALB be, or the breaking of several spring blades of the rear axle.

answerBSource: Several spring leaves on the rear axle have broken
answerCSource: Strong fading of the brakes
questionTextTarget: ALB’li boş aracın arka tekerlekleri her güçlü frenlemede kilitleniyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?

answerCTarget: ALB fren kuvvetini yol yüzeyinin durumuna göre otomatik ayarlar

questionTextSource: How does a spring-loaded brake system work?
explanationSource: When operating the hand brake valve, the spring-loaded brake cylinder is vented and thereby effects by the resilience of the braking. Because of the safety, the spring-loaded brake more without pressure.
answerASource: When the handbrake valve is activated, the spring-loaded brake cylinder is purged of air. The spring power thus activates the brakes

answerCSource: When the brake pedal is applied at standstill, compressed air flows into the spring-loaded brake cylinder. The compressed air thus activates the brakes

explanationTarget: El freni valfi devreye alındığında yay kurmalı fren silindirinin havası boşaltılır ve yay kuvveti frenleri devreye sokar.

questionTextSource: The spring-loaded brake has been applied on a truck which has broken down with engine failure. The air supply is exhausted. What effect does this have?
explanationSource: If you want your vehicle towed, must be the spring-loaded brake is released with the auxiliary device. Another effect of the exhausted air pressure, the spring-loaded brake does not respond to press the hand brake valve. The spring-loaded brake must not be replaced in order to be towed.

questionTextSource: You are driving a double-decker bus. Where should a fire extinguisher be located?
explanationSource: According to Section 35g of the Road Traffic Licensing Regulations (StVZO), double-decker buses must carry at least two operational fire extinguishers with a filling mass of 6 kg each. A fire extinguisher should be placed in the immediate vicinity of the driver's seat to provide the driver with quick access in an emergency. The second fire extinguisher must be located on the upper passenger level so that rapid action can be taken there in the event of a fire. This arrangement ensures that both the driver and passengers on both levels of the bus can act quickly in the event of a fire to increase the safety of all occupants.

answerBSource: On the upper deck
answerCSource: In the luggage compartment

explanationSource: Failure to observe the traffic sign "Stop. Grant right of way" is a serious violation, an A violation, which is recorded in the driving qualifying register. In the event of an A-violation or two minor violations (B-violations) within the probationary period, you will have to attend a retraining seminar as a novice driver. You will not have to take an exam again.

questionTextSource: What should a driving licence applicant anticipate if he is found driving without a licence?
explanationSource: A person who wants to obtain a driving license not only has to bring along the necessary physical and mental requirements. In addition, he must not have repeatedly violated traffic regulations or penal laws. This would show that the applicant is not suitable for driving a motor vehicle. The same applies to driving without a license. Should a person, who wants to obtain a driving license, drive without one, the authorities might not allow you to attend the exam.

questionTextSource: A learner driver has committed several violations during the probationary period. The authority has ordered that the driver attends a supplementary driving course. The learner driver fails to comply with this order. What can they expect to happen?
explanationSource: The probationary period for novice drivers is 2 years. During this time, very strict penalties from the catalogue of fines apply. If you commit an A offence or two B offences during the probationary period, you will be ordered to attend an advanced training seminar (ASF). If you do not comply with this official order, your driving licence will be revoked.

explanationTarget: Bu durumda sürücü belgesinin geri alınmasını bekleyebilir. Deneme süresinin 3 yıl daha uzatılması veya sürücü uygunluk oturumu bu soruda doğru sonuç değildir.

questionTextSource: A driving licence applicant practices practical driving skills without a driving instructor on public roads. What should he expect if the police perform a check on him?
explanationSource:
As a driving licence applicant, you are not allowed to drive on public roads without a instructor. Driving without a license is a criminal offence and can be punished with a fine or prison sentence.
The police can order a check of your ability to drive. As a driving license applicant, you run the risk of never receiving a driving license.

answerBSource: A review of his fitness to drive a motor vehicle
answerCSource: No consequences provided he is accompanied in the vehicle by a holder of a driving licence

explanationTarget: 35 saatlik eğitim sağlık bilincini artırmaya ve karayolu yük taşımacılığı kurallarına ilişkin bilgileri tazelemeye yöneliktir. Ek ehliyet sınıfı kazandırmaz.
answerBTarget: Karayolu yük taşımacılığı kurallarına ilişkin bilgilerimi tazelemek

questionTextSource: Working as a professional driver requires you to complete a basic qualification and to regularly attend training programmes. Where will you find information concerning the validity period of your professional driver’s basic qualification?
explanationSource: You can find the information about the time limit on the back of your driving licence.
answerASource: On my driving licence
answerBSource: On the driver card
answerCSource: On the website of the Federal Motor Transport Authority
questionTextTarget: Profesyonel sürücü olarak çalışmak temel yeterlilik ve düzenli eğitim gerektirir. Profesyonel sürücü temel yeterliliğinizin geçerlilik süresiyle ilgili bilgiyi nerede bulursunuz?
explanationTarget: Geçerlilik bilgisi sürücü belgenizde bulunur. Sürücü kartı veya KBA web sitesi bu cevapta doğru yer değildir.
answerCTarget: Federal Motorlu Taşıtlar Dairesinin web sitesinde

questionTextSource: You are a commercial bus driver. What is the purpose of the 35-hour further training course, which you must attend within 5 years?
explanationSource: If you are transporting people commercially by bus, within 35-hour training course you will learn how to increase health awareness and refresh your knowledge of the regulations for passenger transport. Participation is compulsory.
answerASource: To increase awareness of health
answerBSource: To refresh my knowledge of the passenger transport regulations
answerCSource: To acquire additional driving licence classes
questionTextTarget: Ticari otobüs sürücüsüsünüz. 5 yıl içinde katılmanız gereken 35 saatlik ileri eğitimin amacı nedir?
explanationTarget: Bu eğitim sağlık bilincini artırmaya ve yolcu taşımacılığı kurallarına ilişkin bilgileri tazelemeye yöneliktir. Ek ehliyet sınıfları kazandırmaz.
answerBTarget: Yolcu taşımacılığı kurallarına ilişkin bilgilerimi tazelemek

questionTextSource: What can lead to a review of your fitness to be a bus driver?
answerASource: - my physical capabilities
answerBSource: - my mental capacity
answerCSource: - the reliability of my employer
questionTextTarget: Otobüs sürücüsü olarak uygunluğunuzun incelenmesine ne yol açabilir?
explanationTarget: Fiziksel ve zihinsel kapasitenizle ilgili şüpheler uygunluk incelemesine yol açabilir. İşverenin güvenilirliği buna dahil değildir.

questionTextSource: When can the authorities order a bus driver to undergo a fitness assessment?
answerASource: If the driver has seriously violated road traffic regulations
answerBSource: If the driver has committed a serious road traffic offence
answerCSource: If there are indications that the bus driver has a high potential for aggression
questionTextTarget: Yetkililer bir otobüs sürücüsünden ne zaman uygunluk değerlendirmesi isteyebilir?
explanationTarget: Sürücü trafik kurallarını ciddi şekilde ihlal etmişse, ağır bir trafik suçu işlemişse veya yüksek saldırganlık potansiyeli gösteren belirtiler varsa uygunluk değerlendirmesi istenebilir.
answerATarget: Sürücü trafik kurallarını ciddi şekilde ihlal etmişse
answerBTarget: Sürücü ciddi bir trafik suçu işlemişse
answerCTarget: Otobüs sürücüsünde yüksek saldırganlık potansiyeli olduğuna dair belirtiler varsa

questionTextSource: After receiving your Class C driving licence for the first time, you want to transport goods commercially. How can you meet the requirements?
answerASource: - the accelerated initial qualification
answerBSource: - a professional driver training programme
answerCSource: - a 35-hour advanced training course
questionTextTarget: C sınıfı ehliyetinizi ilk kez aldıktan sonra ticari yük taşımak istiyorsunuz. Şartları nasıl yerine getirebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Hızlandırılmış temel yeterlilik veya profesyonel sürücü eğitimi ile şartlar yerine getirilebilir. 35 saatlik ileri eğitim ilk yeterliliğin yerine geçmez.

questionTextSource: After receiving your Class D driving licence for the first time, you want to transport passengers commercially. How can you meet the requirements?
answerASource: - the accelerated initial qualification
answerBSource: - a professional driver training programme
answerCSource: - a 35-hour advanced training course
questionTextTarget: D sınıfı ehliyetinizi ilk kez aldıktan sonra ticari yolcu taşımak istiyorsunuz. Şartları nasıl yerine getirebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Hızlandırılmış temel yeterlilik veya profesyonel sürücü eğitimi ile şartlar yerine getirilebilir. 35 saatlik ileri eğitim ilk yeterliliğin yerine geçmez.

questionTextSource: To be employed as a professional driver, you will need an initial qualification as well as regular training. How are the relevant proofs documented?
explanationSource: Professional drivers who work in the transport of goods or passengers on public roads require an initial qualification and then regular further training. The validity of these trainings are documented on the driver qualification certificate.
answerASource: On the driver qualification card
answerBSource: In the Federal Motor Vehicle and Transport Authority’s professional driver qualification register (KBA)
answerCSource: On the webpage of my driver licensing agency
questionTextTarget: Profesyonel sürücü olarak çalışmak için temel yeterlilik ve düzenli eğitim gerekir. İlgili kanıtlar nasıl belgelenir?
explanationTarget: Kanıtlar sürücü yeterlilik kartında ve Federal Motorlu Taşıtlar ve Taşımacılık Dairesi’nin profesyonel sürücü yeterlilik sicilinde belgelenir. Ehliyet makamının web sayfasında belgelenmez.
answerBTarget: Federal Motorlu Taşıtlar ve Taşımacılık Dairesi’nin (KBA) profesyonel sürücü yeterlilik sicilinde

questionTextSource: What is documented on the driver qualification card?
explanationSource: Professional drivers who work in the transport of goods or passengers on public roads require an initial qualification and then regular further training. The validity of these trainings are documented on the driver qualification certificate.
answerASource: - initial qualification
answerBSource: - training
answerCSource: - the issued driver’s licence
questionTextTarget: Sürücü yeterlilik kartında ne belgelenir?
explanationTarget: Sürücü yeterlilik kartında temel yeterlilik ve düzenli eğitimler belgelenir. Verilmiş sürücü belgesi bu kartta belgelenen unsur değildir.
